safety_notes_en: Cold in nature and moist in quality; contraindicated in spleen vacuity with loose stools. Prolonged high-dose use may impair the spleen and promote dampness.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主消渴热中，除邪气，肢体浮肿，下水，补不足，益气。

description_zh: 百合科植物知母的干燥根茎。归肺、胃、肾经。上能清肺胃之实热，下能滋肝肾之阴精，常与石膏相须为用（白虎汤）治气分大热。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 知母含知母皂苷及芒果苷等成分，具有解热、降血糖、抗炎、抗菌及神经保护作用，为清热泻火、滋阴润燥之药理依据。
summary.en: Anemarrhena rhizome contains timosaponins and mangiferin with antipyretic, hypoglycemic, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial and neuroprotective effects, underlying its heat-clearing, fire-draining and yin-nourishing actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: High fever at the qi level with vexing thirst
Yin-deficient internal heat and steaming-bone tidal fever

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 将知母配石膏清气分实热，配黄柏滋肾降火。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky pairs Zhi Mu with Shi Gao to clear qi-level repletion heat and with Huang Bai to nourish kidney and drain fire.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述知母皂苷 B-II 在阿尔茨海默动物模型中显示神经保护作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite timosaponin B-II showing neuroprotection in Alzheimer's animal models.

description_en: The dried rhizome of Anemarrhena asphodeloides (Asparagaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Kidney channels. Bitter, sweet, and cold, it clears Lung and Stomach repletion heat in the upper body while enriching Liver and Kidney yin essence below. Paired with shi gao in Bai Hu Tang, it forms the quintessential combination for draining qi-level great heat.

actions.en: Clear the Lung and calm wheezing

indications.zh: 温热病气分实热，壮热烦渴
indications.en: Qi-level repletion heat in warm diseases with vigorous fever, vexation and thirst
Lung heat with wheezing and cough

indications.zh: 胃火亢盛，头痛、牙痛、口舌生疮
indications.en: Exuberant Stomach fire with headache, toothache, and mouth sores
Summerheat stroke with vexation and thirst

indications.zh: 外用疮疡溃后不敛，湿疹烫伤（煅）
indications.en: Topical: non-healing sores, eczema, burns (calcined form)

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒及阴虚内热者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and yin vacuity with internal heat.

dosage_range.notes: 内服宜先煎15–60g，大剂量可用至120–250g（治温热病高热）；外用适量，煅研末敷患处

processing_methods.name: 生石膏
processing_methods.effect: 清热泻火、除烦止渴，用于气分实热证

processing_methods.name: 煅石膏
processing_methods.effect: 收湿敛疮、生肌止血，外用为主

safety_notes_zh: 生石膏大寒，脾胃虚寒者忌内服。用量过大可损伤阳气。煅石膏不宜内服，仅供外用。
safety_notes_en: Raw shi gao is very cold; contraindicated for internal use in spleen-stomach vacuity cold. Excessive dosage may damage yang qi. Calcined shi gao should not be taken internally; for external use only.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，微寒。主中风寒热，心下逆气惊喘，口干舌焦不能息，腹中坚痛，除邪鬼，产乳金疮。

description_zh: 硫酸盐类矿物硬石膏族石膏，主含含水硫酸钙。归肺、胃经。为清气分大热之要药，与知母相须为用（白虎汤）治阳明气分实热。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 石膏为含水硫酸钙矿物药，具有解热、抗炎、镇静作用，主治阳明气分大热。
summary.en: Gypsum (hydrated calcium sulfate) is a mineral drug with antipyretic, anti-inflammatory and mild sedative effects, principally used for yangming-qi level high heat.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: High fever with irritability and thirst from external contraction

evidence_notes.note_zh: 清热泻火、除烦止渴，为白虎汤君药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Clears heat, drains fire, and relieves thirst; sovereign herb in Bai Hu Tang.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定生石膏含CaSO4·2H2O不得少于95.0%，煅石膏供外用收湿敛疮。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies not less than 95.0% CaSO4·2H2O in raw gypsum; calcined gypsum is for external astringent use.

description_en: Gypsum fibrosum, a sulfate mineral composed primarily of hydrated calcium sulfate. Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Pungent, sweet, and very cold, it is the principal mineral medicinal for clearing qi-level great heat, eliminating vexation, and relieving thirst. Paired with zhi mu in Bai Hu Tang for yang-brightness qi-level repletion heat.

actions.en: Moisten the intestines and unblock the bowels

indications.en: Amenorrhea, dysmenorrhea, and abdominal masses from blood stasis
Postpartum abdominal pain from blood stasis
Traumatic injury with stasis swelling and pain
Intestinal dryness with constipation
Lung and intestinal abscess

contraindications_zh: 孕妇忌用。便溏者慎用。血虚无瘀滞者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution in loose stools. Not suitable in blood vacuity without stasis.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–10g，宜捣碎入药

processing_methods.name: 生桃仁
processing_methods.effect: 活血祛瘀、润肠通便之力较胜

processing_methods.name: 炒桃仁
processing_methods.effect: 缓和油腻，减少滑肠，多用于瘀血证而便不燥者

safety_notes_zh: 本品含苦杏仁苷，水解产生氢氰酸，过量可致中毒（头晕、恶心、呼吸困难）。不宜生吞整粒。孕妇禁用（有致堕胎之虞）。
safety_notes_en: This herb contains amygdalin, which produces hydrocyanic acid upon hydrolysis; overdose may cause poisoning (dizziness, nausea, dyspnea). Should not be swallowed whole in raw form. Contraindicated during pregnancy (risk of inducing miscarriage).

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主瘀血血闭瘕邪气，杀小虫。

description_zh: 蔷薇科植物桃或山桃的干燥成熟种子。归心、肝、大肠经。为活血祛瘀之常用药，与红花相须为用（桃红四物汤）以增强破血之力。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桃仁主含苦杏仁苷和脂肪油，具有活血化瘀、润肠通便、抗凝及抗炎作用。
summary.en: Peach kernel contains amygdalin and fatty oil, with blood-activating, laxative, antiplatelet/anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 瘀血痛经、产后瘀滞腹痛
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Blood-stasis dysmenorrhea and post-partum stasis pain

evidence_notes.note_zh: 活血祛瘀、润肠通便，为桃核承气汤主药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Invigorates blood, dispels stasis, and moistens the intestines; principal herb in Tao He Cheng Qi Tang.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 苦杏仁苷在肠道可释出氢氰酸，大剂量有中毒风险；与抗凝药物合用可能增加出血倾向。
evidence_notes.note_en: Amygdalin can release hydrocyanic acid in the gut with overdose toxicity risk; may potentiate anticoagulants.

pregnancy.note_zh: 桃仁活血破瘀，孕妇禁用。
pregnancy.note_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy due to blood-quickening and stasis-breaking action.

lactation.note_en: Limited data; use with caution during lactation.

description_en: The dried mature seed of Prunus persica or P. davidiana (Rosaceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, sweet, and neutral, it is a widely used blood-invigorating herb that dispels stasis while also moistening the intestines and unblocking the bowels. Paired with hong hua in Tao Hong Si Wu Tang for enhanced stasis-breaking action.

actions.en: Invigorate blood and unblock the channels

indications.en: Blood stasis amenorrhea and dysmenorrhea
Retained lochia after childbirth
Abdominal masses
Chest bi and cardiac pain
Traumatic injury with stasis swelling and pain
Dark-colored rashes from heat stagnation with blood stasis

contraindications_zh: 孕妇忌用。月经过多及有出血倾向者慎用或忌用。无瘀血者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution or avoid in excessive menstruation and bleeding tendency. Not suitable when there is no blood stasis.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g。小剂量(1.5–3g)养血和血；中剂量(3–6g)活血调经；大剂量(9–15g)破血逐瘀。

processing_methods.name: 生红花
processing_methods.effect: 活血通经，散瘀止痛

processing_methods.name: 酒红花
processing_methods.effect: 增强活血通经之功

safety_notes_zh: 辛温行散，孕妇绝对禁用，误服可致流产。月经过多、出血倾向、溃疡病及消化道出血者禁用。与抗凝药物合用可增加出血风险。过量可致月经过多、崩漏。
safety_notes_en: Acrid and warm with dispersing action; absolutely contraindicated during pregnancy, as accidental ingestion may cause miscarriage. Contraindicated in excessive menstruation, bleeding tendency, peptic ulcer disease, and gastrointestinal bleeding. Concurrent use with anticoagulants may increase bleeding risk. Overdose may cause excessive menstruation or uterine flooding and spotting.

classical_references.passage: 红花古名红蓝花，《神农本草经》未载，《开宝本草》始录；《金匮要略》已有红蓝花酒方治妇人腹中刺痛。

description_zh: 菊科植物红花的干燥花。归心、肝经。活血通经、散瘀止痛之要药；常与桃仁相须为用（桃红四物汤），临床广泛用于心脑血管疾病及妇科瘀血证。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 红花（Carthamus tinctorius）主含羟基红花黄色素 A 等醌式查尔酮色素，药理示其扩张冠脉、抗血小板、抗血栓、抗炎与改善微循环作用。
summary.en: Honghua (Carthamus tinctorius) contains quinochalcone pigments, chiefly hydroxysafflor yellow A; pharmacology shows coronary vasodilation, antiplatelet, antithrombotic, anti-inflammatory and microcirculation-improving effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Amenorrhea, dysmenorrhea and postpartum blood stasis

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以羟基红花黄色素 A 作为含量测定指标；红花注射液与红花黄色素注射液用于心脑血管疾病。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses HSYA as assay marker; honghua injection and safflower yellow injection used for cardiovascular-cerebrovascular disease.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 具活血作用，孕妇禁用；与抗凝抗血小板药合用需警惕出血风险。
evidence_notes.note_en: Blood-moving action contraindicates pregnancy; caution with anticoagulant/antiplatelet drugs for bleeding risk.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 小剂量活血，大剂量破血；与桃仁为经典活血药对。
evidence_notes.note_en: Small doses invigorate blood, large doses break stasis; classical pair with taoren.

pregnancy.note_zh: 红花活血通经，孕妇禁用，可致流产。
pregnancy.note_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy. Blood-quickening and channel-freeing action may cause miscarriage.

description_en: The dried flower of Carthamus tinctorius (Asteraceae). Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Pungent and warm, it invigorates blood, unblocks the channels, dispels stasis, and alleviates pain. In small doses it nourishes and harmonizes blood; in larger doses it breaks stasis. Commonly paired with tao ren in Tao Hong Si Wu Tang and widely applied in cardiovascular and gynecological blood-stasis conditions.

actions.en: Clear the Heart and eliminate vexation

indications.zh: 月经不调，经闭痛经，产后瘀滞
indications.en: Irregular menstruation, amenorrhea, dysmenorrhea, and postpartum stasis
Chest bi (angina), epigastric and hypochondriac pain
Abdominal masses and accumulations
Heat-bi pain
Vexation and insomnia
Sores and swelling with toxicity

contraindications_zh: 不宜与藜芦同用（十八反）。无瘀血者慎用。孕妇慎用。月经过多及出血倾向者忌用。
contraindications_en: Should not be used concurrently with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma) per the Eighteen Antagonisms (shiba fan). Use with caution when there is no blood stasis. Use with caution during pregnancy. Contraindicated in excessive menstruation and bleeding tendency.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服10–15g，大剂量可用至30g。活血化瘀宜酒炙用；清心除烦宜生用。

processing_methods.name: 生丹参
processing_methods.effect: 清心凉血，活血消痈

processing_methods.name: 酒丹参
processing_methods.effect: 增强活血通经止痛之功

safety_notes_zh: 与藜芦相反，不可同用。与抗凝药物（华法林、阿司匹林）合用可增加出血风险。现代研究显示本品及复方丹参制剂与抗凝药存在药物相互作用。月经过多、有出血倾向者慎用。
safety_notes_en: Antagonizes li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma); must not be used together. Concurrent use with anticoagulants (warfarin, aspirin) may increase bleeding risk. Modern research shows drug interactions between this herb, compound dan shen preparations, and anticoagulants. Use with caution in excessive menstruation and bleeding tendency.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，微寒。主心腹邪气，肠鸣幽幽如走水，寒热积聚，破癥除瘕，止烦满，益气。

description_zh: 唇形科植物丹参的干燥根及根茎。归心、肝经。“一味丹参，功同四物”，为活血调经、祛瘀止痛之要药；现代广泛用于冠心病、心绞痛等心脑血管疾病。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 丹参含脂溶性丹参酮类（丹参酮 IIA、隐丹参酮）与水溶性酚酸类（丹酚酸 B、迷迭香酸），药理证实其扩张冠脉、抗血小板聚集、抗氧化与抗肝纤维化作用。
summary.en: Danshen contains lipophilic tanshinones (tanshinone IIA, cryptotanshinone) and hydrophilic phenolic acids (salvianolic acid B, rosmarinic acid); pharmacology confirms coronary vasodilation, antiplatelet, antioxidant and antifibrotic activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 缺血性脑卒中急性期辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收录丹参注射液、复方丹参滴丸等中成药用于冠心病治疗。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists Danshen injection and Compound Danshen dripping pill for CAD.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 与华法林合用可能增加出血风险，需监测 INR；可能影响 CYP 代谢。
evidence_notes.note_en: Co-administration with warfarin may increase bleeding risk; INR monitoring recommended; possible CYP-mediated interactions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 抗血小板机制不同于乙酰水杨酸，通过抑制花生四烯酸代谢与降低血小板内 cAMP 水平实现。
evidence_notes.note_en: Antiplatelet action differs from ASA, acting via arachidonic acid pathway inhibition and modulation of platelet cAMP.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Salvia miltiorrhiza (Lamiaceae). Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Bitter and cool, the classical saying 'one dan shen equals the four substances' attests to its comprehensive blood-invigorating and regulating capacity. It is a key herb for invigorating blood, dispelling stasis, clearing Heart heat, and cooling blood, and is extensively used in modern practice for coronary heart disease.

actions.en: Direct qi downward and eliminate distention
Loosen the middle and regulate qi

indications.en: Damp stagnation injuring the middle with epigastric fullness, vomiting, and diarrhea
Food stagnation with qi stagnation, abdominal distention, and constipation
Phlegm-rheum cough and wheezing
Plum-pit qi (globus)
Emotional constraint with fullness of the chest and epigastrium

contraindications_zh: 孕妇慎用。气虚、津亏及阴虚者忌用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution during pregnancy. Contraindicated in qi vacuity, fluid depletion, and yin vacuity.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；或入丸散。大剂量行气除满可用至15g。

processing_methods.name: 生厚朴
processing_methods.effect: 燥性较烈，多外用或入丸散

processing_methods.name: 姜厚朴
processing_methods.effect: 消除对咽喉的刺激，增强宽中和胃、降逆止呕之功，为临床主要炮制品

safety_notes_zh: 辛苦温燥，易伤津耗气，气虚、津亏、阴虚及孕妇慎用或忌用。生品对咽喉有刺激，内服必须姜炙。现代研究显示过量可致腹泻、呕吐。
safety_notes_en: Acrid, bitter, warm, and drying; may easily damage fluids and consume qi; use with caution or avoid in qi vacuity, fluid depletion, yin vacuity, and pregnancy. The raw herb irritates the throat; it must be ginger-processed before internal use. Modern research shows overdose may cause diarrhea and vomiting.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，温。主中风伤寒，头痛寒热，惊悸气，血痹死肌，去三虫。

description_zh: 木兰科植物厚朴或凹叶厚朴的干燥干皮、根皮及枝皮。归脾、胃、肺、大肠经。为行气化湿、消胀除满之要药；与苍术、陈皮相配为平胃散以燥湿运脾。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 厚朴主含新木脂素类（厚朴酚、和厚朴酚）与挥发油，药理证实其抗菌、抗焦虑、抗炎、肌肉松弛与促进胃肠蠕动作用。
summary.en: Houpo contains neolignans (magnolol, honokiol) and essential oil; pharmacology confirms antibacterial, anxiolytic, anti-inflammatory, muscle-relaxant and gastrointestinal prokinetic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Damp obstruction of middle burner with abdominal distension

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 焦虑及应激相关症状辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以厚朴酚与和厚朴酚的总量作为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses the sum of magnolol and honokiol as assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 半夏厚朴汤、厚朴温中汤为经典方，用于气滞痰阻与中焦寒湿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Banxia Houpo Tang and Houpo Wenzhong Tang are classical for qi stagnation–phlegm and cold-damp middle-burner.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 孕妇慎用；气虚津伤者不宜单用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Caution in pregnancy; avoid as sole agent in qi vacuity with fluid damage.

description_en: The dried bark of Magnolia officinalis or M. officinalis var. biloba (Magnoliaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Lung, and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, pungent, and warm, it is the principal herb for moving qi, resolving dampness, eliminating distention, and transforming phlegm. Paired with cang zhu and chen pi it forms Ping Wei San for drying dampness and mobilizing the Spleen.

actions.en: Astringe sweat and stanch uterine bleeding

indications.zh: 肝肾不足，腰膝酸软，眩晕耳鸣
indications.en: Liver-Kidney vacuity with weak low back and knees, dizziness and tinnitus
Impotence from Kidney vacuity
Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Enuresis and urinary frequency
Uterine bleeding, leukorrhea, and profuse menstruation
Profuse sweating with collapse and wasting-thirst disorder

contraindications_zh: 命门火炽、素有湿热、小便不利者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in blazing ministerial fire, pre-existing damp-heat, and difficult urination.

dosage_range.notes: 一般煎服6–12g；急救固脱可用20–30g

processing_methods.name: 生山茱萸
processing_methods.effect: 敛汗固脱力较强

processing_methods.name: 酒山茱萸
processing_methods.effect: 补肝肾、固精缩尿作用增强

safety_notes_zh: 必须去核入药，果核能滑精（古训）。酸温收涩，命门火炽及湿热淋证忌用。
safety_notes_en: The pit must be removed before medicinal use; the pit may cause seminal efflux (traditional precaution). Sour, warm, and astringent; contraindicated in blazing ministerial fire and damp-heat strangury.

classical_references.passage: 味酸，平。主心下邪气寒热，温中，逐寒湿痹，去三虫。久服轻身。

description_zh: 山茱萸科植物山茱萸的干燥成熟果肉。归肝、肾经。为补肝肾、涩精气之要药，六味地黄丸核心药对，张锡纯谓其能救脱。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 山茱萸主含环烯醚萜苷类（马钱苷、莫诺苷）及三萜类成分，具有抗氧化、免疫调节、降血糖及肾保护作用。
summary.en: Cornus fruit contains iridoid glycosides (loganin, morroniside) and triterpenoids, with antioxidant, immunomodulatory, hypoglycemic and renoprotective activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 2型糖尿病早期肾病辅助治疗
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Adjunctive therapy in early diabetic nephropathy
Lumbar weakness, spermatorrhea and involuntary seminal loss
Persistent spontaneous sweating and uterine bleeding

evidence_notes.note_zh: 传统用于肝肾不足之腰膝酸软、头晕耳鸣，为六味地黄丸关键药味。
evidence_notes.note_en: Traditionally used for Liver/Kidney vacuity with lumbar soreness and tinnitus; a key ingredient in Liu Wei Di Huang Wan.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 动物实验显示马钱苷可降低糖尿病大鼠肾小球硬化程度。
evidence_notes.note_en: Animal studies show loganin reduces glomerulosclerosis in diabetic rats.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以马钱苷为含量测定指标，不得少于0.60%。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses loganin as the marker compound, requiring not less than 0.60%.

description_en: The dried mature flesh of Cornus officinalis (Cornaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sour, astringent, and warm, it is the key herb for supplementing the Liver and Kidney, astringent-securing to stem desertion, and securing essence. A core component of Liu Wei Di Huang Wan. Zhang Xichun praised its ability to rescue from desertion in critical conditions.

indications.en: Heat entering ying and blood levels with maculopapular rash
Hematemesis and epistaxis from blood heat

indications.zh: 阴虚发热，夜热早凉，无汗骨蒸
indications.en: Yin-vacuity fever, fever at night cooling by morning, steaming bone tidal fever without sweating
Amenorrhea, dysmenorrhea, and abdominal masses from blood stasis
Traumatic injury with pain
Carbuncles, sores, and intestinal abscess with abdominal pain

contraindications_zh: 血虚有寒、月经过多及孕妇不宜服用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in blood vacuity with cold, excessive menstruation, and pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 清热凉血、退虚热生用；活血化瘀酒炒；止血炒炭

processing_methods.name: 生牡丹皮
processing_methods.effect: 清热凉血、退虚热之力较强

processing_methods.name: 酒牡丹皮
processing_methods.effect: 活血化瘀通经作用增强

processing_methods.name: 丹皮炭
processing_methods.effect: 凉血止血，用于血热出血

safety_notes_zh: 性凉而活血，脾胃虚寒便溏者慎用。孕妇禁用（活血可致堕胎）。
safety_notes_en: Cool in nature with blood-activating properties; use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with loose stools. Contraindicated during pregnancy (blood-activating action may induce miscarriage).

classical_references.passage: 味辛，寒。主寒热中风，瘛疭、痉、惊痫邪气，除癥坚瘀血留舍肠胃，安五脏，疗痈疮。

description_zh: 毛茛科植物牡丹的干燥根皮。归心、肝、肾经。既善清营血分实热，又能退阴分虚热（无汗骨蒸），为六味地黄丸退虚热之主药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 牡丹皮含丹皮酚、芍药苷及鞣质，具抗炎、抗菌、解热、镇痛、抗凝及降压作用。
summary.en: Moutan bark contains paeonol, paeoniflorin, and tannins with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, antipyretic, analgesic, antiplatelet, and antihypertensive effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 血热出血与皮肤过敏性炎症

evidence_notes.note_zh: 丹皮酚具抗炎、解热、镇静及抗血小板作用；动物实验显示降压效应。
evidence_notes.note_en: Paeonol shows anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, sedative, and antiplatelet activity; animal studies show antihypertensive effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 牡丹皮清热凉血、活血化瘀，无汗骨蒸与血热妄行常用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Clears heat, cools blood, and invigorates blood — used for steaming bone without sweat and for blood-heat bleeding.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 孕妇及月经过多者慎用——可能增强抗凝及抗血小板药物效应。
evidence_notes.note_en: Use caution in pregnancy and menorrhagia — may potentiate anticoagulant/antiplatelet drugs.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定丹皮酚含量不少于 1.2%。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies paeonol content ≥1.2%.

description_en: The dried root bark of Paeonia suffruticosa (Ranunculaceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, and Kidney channels. Bitter, pungent, and cool, it excels at both clearing repletion heat in the constructive-blood level and withdrawing vacuity heat from the yin level, including bone-steaming fever without sweating. It is the primary herb for clearing vacuity heat in Liu Wei Di Huang Wan.

indications.en: Dysuria with edema and distention
Diarrhea with scanty urination
Phlegm-rheum with dizziness
Heat strangury with painful urination
Hyperlipidemia (modern clinical use)

contraindications_zh: 肾虚精滑、无湿热者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in kidney vacuity with seminal efflux when there is no damp-heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g，大剂量可用至30g（降脂、利水）

processing_methods.name: 生泽泻
processing_methods.effect: 利水渗湿、泄热作用较强

processing_methods.name: 盐泽泻
processing_methods.effect: 引药下行，增强泻肾火之力，多用于阴虚火旺证

safety_notes_zh: 久服或大量服用可耗伤阴精。近年有泽泻肝毒性报道，长期使用应监测肝肾功能。肾虚滑精者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Prolonged or high-dose use may consume yin-essence. Recent reports of ze xie hepatotoxicity; liver and kidney function should be monitored during long-term use. Contraindicated in kidney vacuity with seminal efflux.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，寒。主风寒湿痹，乳难，消水，养五脏，益气力，肥健。久服耳目聪明，不饥延年，轻身面生光。

description_zh: 泽泻科植物东方泽泻或泽泻的干燥块茎。归肾、膀胱经。六味地黄丸三泻之一，既能利湿又能泄肾火，为泄火存阴之妙品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 泽泻主含泽泻醇 A、B、C 等原萜烷型三萜，具有利尿、降血脂、降血糖、抗脂肪肝及抗动脉粥样硬化作用。
summary.en: Alisma rhizome contains protostane triterpenes (alisols A, B and C) with diuretic, hypolipidemic, hypoglycemic, antisteatotic and antiatherosclerotic activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 水湿内停之水肿、小便不利
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Edema and dysuria from internal water-damp retention
Adjunct for hyperlipidemia and fatty liver

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以 23-乙酰泽泻醇 B 和 23-乙酰泽泻醇 C 为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses 23-acetyl alisol B and 23-acetyl alisol C as assay markers.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述泽泻醇类在动物模型中显著降低血清胆固醇和甘油三酯。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite alisols significantly reducing serum cholesterol and triglycerides in animal models.

description_en: The dried tuber of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. orientale (Alismataceae). Enters the Kidney and Bladder channels. Sweet, bland, and cold, it is one of the 'three draining' herbs in Liu Wei Di Huang Wan, simultaneously promoting urination and draining Kidney fire. This dual action of draining fire while preserving yin is considered a subtle clinical refinement.

actions.en: Fortify the Spleen and augment the Lung
Tonify the middle and augment qi
Support upright qi and expel pathogenic factors

indications.en: Spleen and Lung qi vacuity with reduced appetite and fatigue
Cough and shortness of breath, vacuity wheezing

indications.zh: 气血两虚，面色萎黄，心悸气短
indications.en: Dual vacuity of qi and blood with sallow complexion, palpitations, and shortness of breath
Fluid damage with thirst, internal heat wasting-thirst disorder
Exterior invasion with underlying qi vacuity

contraindications_zh: 实证、热证禁服。不宜与藜芦同用（参照人参）。气滞、肝火盛者慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in repletion and heat patterns. Should not be used concurrently with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma) (refer to ren shen). Use with caution in qi stagnation and exuberant liver fire.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–30g。补气力较人参为缓，故常用量宜大；轻症9–15g，重症可至30g。

processing_methods.name: 生党参
processing_methods.effect: 养阴生津，补肺止咳

processing_methods.name: 米炒党参
processing_methods.effect: 健脾益气，和胃止泻

processing_methods.name: 蜜炙党参
processing_methods.effect: 增强润肺补气、益气生津之功

safety_notes_zh: 甘平补气，实证、邪盛者不宜。现代研究未见明显毒性，常规用量安全。与藜芦传统相反。
safety_notes_en: Sweet, neutral, and qi-tonifying; not suitable in repletion patterns and exuberant pathogens. Modern research shows no significant toxicity at standard dosages. Traditionally antagonizes li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma).

classical_references.passage: 人参，味甘，微寒。主补五脏，安精神，定魂魄，止惊悸，除邪气，明目，开心益智。
classical_references.source_chapter: 依古代本草党参入药较晚，清代《本草从新》始载；此处引《神农本草经》人参条以示其补气渊源。

description_zh: 桔梗科植物党参、素花党参或川党参的干燥根。归脾、肺经。为平补脾肺之要药，古方中人参多可以党参代之（虚寒厥逆、脱证仍需人参）；现代临床广泛用作人参之平和替代品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 党参主含党参多糖、党参炔苷与皂苷类成分，药理显示其增强免疫、抗疲劳、调节胃肠功能与造血支持作用。
summary.en: Dangshen contains Codonopsis polysaccharides, lobetyolin and saponins; pharmacology shows immune enhancement, antifatigue, gastrointestinal modulation and hematopoietic support.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 慢性胃炎、功能性消化不良
贫血及化疗后气血虚弱辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以党参炔苷作为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses lobetyolin as the HPLC assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 传统作为人参的替代品以补中益气，但作用较缓和。
evidence_notes.note_en: Traditionally used as a milder substitute for ginseng to tonify middle qi.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 实证、热证及肝火旺者不宜单独大量使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Avoid single high-dose use in repletion heat or liver-fire patterns.

description_en: The dried root of Codonopsis pilosula, C. pilosula var. modesta, or C. tangshen (Campanulaceae). Enters the Spleen and Lung channels. Sweet and neutral, it is a mild tonic for the Spleen and Lung, widely substituted for ren shen in classical formulas where the condition does not involve collapse or severe yang depletion. Modern clinical practice extensively employs it as a gentler alternative to ginseng.

actions.en: Drain downward and unblock the bowels

indications.zh: 实热积滞，腹满胀痛，大便燥结
indications.en: Repletion heat accumulation with abdominal distention, pain, and dry hard stools
Intestinal abscess with swelling and pain
Throat swelling, sores of mouth and tongue
Red swollen painful eyes

indications.zh: 外用治乳痈初起、痔疮肿痛
indications.en: Topical use for early breast abscess and hemorrhoid swelling

contraindications_zh: 孕妇忌用。脾胃虚寒及阴虚体质者忌服。哺乳期妇女慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated during pregnancy. Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and yin-deficient constitution. Use with caution during lactation.

dosage_range.notes: 内服宜溶入煎好的药汁或开水中冲服，不宜入煎；外用适量，化水涂敷

processing_methods.name: 芒硝
processing_methods.effect: 天然硫酸钠经煮炼结晶而成，生品即入药

processing_methods.name: 玄明粉
processing_methods.effect: 芒硝置阴凉干燥处风化为白色粉末，药性较和缓，宜用于口腔咽喉疾患

safety_notes_zh: 含硫酸钠，大量服用可引起电解质紊乱（钠潴留、低钾）。心肾功能不全、水肿、高血压者慎用。不宜与三棱同用（十九畏：芒硝畏三棱）。
safety_notes_en: Contains sodium sulfate; high doses may cause electrolyte disturbances (sodium retention, hypokalemia). Use with caution in cardiac or renal insufficiency, edema, and hypertension. Should not be used concurrently with san leng per the Nineteen Incompatibilities (shijiu wei): mang xiao is incompatible with san leng.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主百病，除寒热邪气，逐六腑积聚，结固留癖，能化七十二种石。

description_zh: 硫酸盐类矿物芒硝族芒硝经精制而成的结晶体，主含含水硫酸钠。归胃、大肠经。为咸寒润下软坚之要药，与大黄相须为用（大承气汤）攻下力最著。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 芒硝主含硫酸钠，为渗透性盐类泻剂，并具外用消炎消肿作用。
summary.en: Mirabilite is chiefly sodium sulfate — an osmotic saline laxative with topical anti-inflammatory and decongestant uses.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 术前肠道准备（盐类泻剂）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 硫酸钠在肠道不被吸收，通过渗透作用保留水分而致泻。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sodium sulfate is not absorbed in the gut and produces osmotic retention of water to induce purgation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 孕妇禁用——刺激肠道可能引发子宫收缩；脱水、电解质紊乱、肾功能不全者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy — intestinal irritation may trigger uterine contraction; caution with dehydration, electrolyte disturbance, and renal impairment.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 芒硝咸苦大寒，软坚泻下，与大黄相须用于阳明腑实证。
evidence_notes.note_en: Salty-bitter and very cold — softens hardness and purges; paired with rhubarb for yangming organ repletion.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定 Na₂SO₄·10H₂O 含量不少于 99.0%。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia requires Na₂SO₄·10H₂O content ≥99.0%.

pregnancy.note_zh: 芒硝攻下力猛，孕妇禁用。
pregnancy.note_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy due to strong purgative action.

description_en: Refined crystalline sodium sulfate (Natrii Sulfas), derived from the mineral glauberite. Enters the Stomach and Large Intestine channels. Salty, bitter, and cold, it is the principal salty-cold purgative for moistening dryness and softening hardness. Paired with da huang in Da Cheng Qi Tang, their combined purgative effect is maximal.

actions.en: Break up qi and disperse accumulation
Transform phlegm and eliminate focal distention

indications.en: Accumulation with focal distention, fullness, and pain
Constipation from qi stagnation
Food stagnation, dysentery with tenesmus
Phlegm turbidity blocking the chest with chest bi and chest bind
Visceroptosis (modern clinical application)

contraindications_zh: 孕妇及脾胃虚弱、气虚者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution during pregnancy and in spleen-stomach vacuity and qi vacuity.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g，大剂量可用至15–30g（治脏器下垂）；破气消积宜生用，和胃消痞宜麸炒

processing_methods.name: 生枳实
processing_methods.effect: 破气消积之力峻猛

processing_methods.name: 麸枳实
processing_methods.effect: 缓和峻烈之性，长于理气和胃，消食化痰

safety_notes_zh: 破气力强，孕妇及气血虚弱者慎用。大剂量可致胃肠不适。现代研究示其有强心升压作用，过敏者慎用。
safety_notes_en: Strong qi-breaking action; use with caution during pregnancy and in qi and blood vacuity. High doses may cause gastrointestinal discomfort. Modern research shows it has cardiotonic and vasopressor effects; use with caution in those with allergies.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主大风在皮肤中，如麻豆苦痒，除寒热结，止痢，长肌肉，利五脏，益气轻身。

description_zh: 芸香科植物酸橙及其栽培变种或甜橙的干燥幼果。归脾、胃、大肠经。为破气消积之要药，与大黄、芒硝、厚朴同用（大承气汤）治阳明腑实证。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 枳实含辛弗林、N-甲基酪胺等拟交感胺及黄酮类成分，具有促进胃肠蠕动、升压、强心及改善子宫脱垂的作用；心血管疾病及高血压患者慎用。
summary.en: Citrus aurantium immature fruit contains sympathomimetic amines (synephrine, N-methyltyramine) and flavonoids producing prokinetic, pressor, cardiotonic and uterine/rectal prolapse-reducing effects; caution is warranted in cardiovascular disease and hypertension.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 胃肠积滞之脘腹胀满、便秘
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Epigastric distension and constipation from food/qi stagnation
Gastroptosis, uterine prolapse and rectal prolapse

evidence_notes.note_zh: Brinker 警示辛弗林与单胺氧化酶抑制剂及咖啡因合用有心血管风险。
evidence_notes.note_en: Brinker warns of cardiovascular risk when synephrine is combined with MAO inhibitors or caffeine.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述枳实注射液在中国用于感染性休克升压，具辛弗林拟交感作用基础。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite Zhi Shi injection used in China as a pressor in septic shock, mediated by synephrine's sympathomimetic action.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以辛弗林和橙皮苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses synephrine and hesperidin as assay markers.

description_en: The dried immature fruit of Citrus aurantium and its cultivars or C. sinensis (Rutaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, pungent, sour, and slightly warm, it is the key herb for breaking up qi stagnation and dispersing accumulation. Used with da huang, mang xiao, and hou po in Da Cheng Qi Tang to treat yang-brightness bowel repletion.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and quiet the Heart
Astringe the Lung and stop cough

indications.en: Chronic cough and wheezing from Lung vacuity
Spontaneous sweating and night sweats
Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Chronic unremitting diarrhea
Palpitations, insomnia, excessive dreaming, and forgetfulness
Fluid damage with thirst and wasting-thirst disorder

contraindications_zh: 外有表邪、内有实热、咳嗽初起、麻疹初发者均忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in exterior pathogens, internal repletion heat, early-stage cough, and early-stage measles.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服2–6g；研末服每次1–3g；敛肺止咳宜生用，补肾涩精宜蜜炙或醋炙

processing_methods.name: 生五味子
processing_methods.effect: 敛肺止咳、生津敛汗之力较强

processing_methods.name: 醋五味子
processing_methods.effect: 增强酸涩收敛之性，涩精止泻

processing_methods.name: 蜜五味子
processing_methods.effect: 补益作用增强，缓和酸性

safety_notes_zh: 现代研究示有降转氨酶作用，但过量可致胃肠刺激、反酸。表邪未解者服用易留邪。
safety_notes_en: Modern research shows transaminase-lowering effects, but overdose may cause gastrointestinal irritation and acid reflux. Use when exterior pathogens remain unresolved may trap pathogens.

classical_references.passage: 味酸，温。主益气，咳逆上气，劳伤羸瘦，补不足，强阴，益男子精。

description_zh: 木兰科植物五味子（北五味子）的干燥成熟果实。归肺、心、肾经。皮肉甘酸，核中辛苦，五味俱全而酸味最胜，为敛肺滋肾之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 五味子主含联苯环辛烯型木脂素（五味子素甲乙丙、戈米辛等），具有保肝降酶、镇静、适应原样及抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Schisandra fruit contains dibenzocyclooctadiene lignans (schisandrins A/B/C, gomisins) with hepatoprotective, transaminase-lowering, sedative, adaptogenic and antioxidant effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 慢性肝炎血清转氨酶升高
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Chronic hepatitis with elevated serum transaminases
Insomnia with dream-disturbed sleep and palpitations
Lung-Kidney deficient cough and spontaneous/night sweats

evidence_notes.note_zh: 联苯双酯（双环醇）为五味子丙素的合成衍生物，收录于《中国药典》用于保肝降酶。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bifendate/bicyclol, a synthetic derivative of schisandrin C, is listed in the Chinese Pharmacopoeia as a hepatoprotective agent.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 可诱导 CYP3A4 代谢，可能降低他克莫司、环孢素等免疫抑制剂血药浓度。
evidence_notes.note_en: Induces CYP3A4; may reduce plasma levels of tacrolimus, cyclosporine and related immunosuppressants.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以五味子醇甲（五味子素甲）为含量测定指标，不得少于0.40%。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses schisandrin (schizandrin) as the assay marker, requiring not less than 0.40%.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Schisandra chinensis (Schisandraceae). Enters the Lung, Heart, and Kidney channels. Sour and sweet with warm nature, its skin and flesh are sweet-sour while the kernel is pungent-bitter, embodying all five flavors though sourness predominates. It is the essential herb for astringent-securing the Lung and enriching the Kidney, featured in Sheng Mai San.

actions.en: Release the exterior and disperse cold
Move qi and harmonize the stomach

indications.en: Wind-cold common cold with cough, nausea, and vomiting
Spleen and Stomach qi stagnation with chest oppression and vomiting
Morning sickness and restless fetus in pregnancy
Fish or crab food poisoning with abdominal pain, vomiting and diarrhea

contraindications_zh: 温病及气弱表虚者忌用。阴虚内热者慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in warm disease and qi weakness with exterior vacuity. Use with caution in yin vacuity with internal heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–9g，不宜久煎，宜后下；外用适量，煎水洗

processing_methods.name: 紫苏叶
processing_methods.effect: 解表散寒、行气宽中、安胎解毒

processing_methods.name: 苏梗
processing_methods.effect: 取用紫苏梗（茎）则行气宽中、止痛安胎作用更著，发表力弱

safety_notes_zh: 含挥发油（紫苏醛等），久煎则有效成分挥发。气虚、阴虚及温病热盛者忌用。少数人可有接触性皮炎。
safety_notes_en: Contains volatile oils (perillaldehyde, etc.); prolonged decoction causes volatile components to evaporate. Contraindicated in qi vacuity, yin vacuity, and warm disease with exuberant heat. Contact dermatitis may occur in some individuals.

classical_references.passage: 紫苏叶，治伤寒头痛，憎寒壮热，咳嗽气喘，中寒呕逆等证。

description_zh: 唇形科植物紫苏的干燥叶或带嫩枝。归肺、脾经。为辛温解表兼行气宽中之要药，常用于风寒表证兼气滞胸闷或胃气上逆者（香苏散、参苏饮）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal volatile oil component, antimicrobial and antiemetic

summary.zh: 紫苏叶挥发油以紫苏醛为主，另含迷迭香酸和木犀草素等酚类成分，具有解热、抗过敏、抗菌、解痉及安胎止呕的药理作用。
summary.en: Perilla leaf volatile oil is dominated by perillaldehyde, with rosmarinic acid and luteolin providing antipyretic, antiallergic, antimicrobial, antispasmodic and antiemetic/fetus-calming activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-cold common cold with qi stagnation chest oppression

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 过敏性疾病（鼻炎、皮炎）辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述迷迭香酸在 IgE 介导的过敏反应模型中显著抑制肥大细胞脱颗粒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite rosmarinic acid markedly inhibiting mast cell degranulation in IgE-mediated allergy models.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出紫苏叶发散风寒、行气宽中、安胎、解鱼蟹毒，四大功效并行。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky lists Zi Su Ye's four core functions: release wind-cold, move qi and soothe the middle, calm the fetus and detoxify fish/crab poisoning.

description_en: The dried leaf or leafy twig of Perilla frutescens (Lamiaceae). Enters the Lung and Spleen channels. Pungent and warm, it releases the exterior and disperses cold while simultaneously moving qi and harmonizing the stomach, making it the key herb for wind-cold exterior patterns complicated by qi stagnation and chest oppression, as in Xiang Su San and Shen Su Yin.

actions.en: Dispel wind and release the exterior

indications.en: Wind-cold exterior invasion with headache and body aches
Wind-damp bi pain with limb contractures
Wind rash with itching
Tetanus and opisthotonos
Liver-Spleen disharmony with abdominal pain and diarrhea

contraindications_zh: 阴血亏虚、热病动风发痉者不宜使用。血虚痉急、头痛不因风邪者禁用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in yin-blood vacuity and wind-stirring with spasms from heat disease. Contraindicated in blood vacuity with spasms and headache not caused by wind pathogens.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服4–9g；止泻可炒用。

processing_methods.name: 生防风
processing_methods.effect: 祛风解表、胜湿止痛力强

processing_methods.name: 炒防风
processing_methods.effect: 缓和辛散之性，长于止泻

processing_methods.name: 防风炭
processing_methods.effect: 止血止泻

safety_notes_zh: 辛温发散，阴血亏虚、热病动风及热极生风者不宜。现代研究未见明显毒性。
safety_notes_en: Acrid and warm with dispersing action; not suitable in yin-blood vacuity, wind-stirring from heat disease, and extreme heat generating wind. Modern research shows no significant toxicity.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，温。主大风头眩痛，恶风，风邪目盲无所见，风行周身，骨节疼痹，烦满。久服轻身。

description_zh: 伞形科植物防风的干燥根。归膀胱、肝、脾经。为治风通用之品，被誉为“风药中之润剂”、“治风之仙药”；与黄芪、白术相伍即玉屏风散以固表止汗。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 防风主含色原酮类（升麻素苷、5-O-甲基维斯阿米醇苷）与挥发油，药理示其解热、镇痛、抗炎、抗过敏与免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Fangfeng contains chromone glycosides (prim-O-glucosylcimifugin, 5-O-methylvisammioside) and essential oil; pharmacology shows antipyretic, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, antiallergic and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以升麻素苷与 5-O-甲基维斯阿米醇苷之和作为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses the sum of prim-O-glucosylcimifugin and 5-O-methylvisammioside as assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 与黄芪、白术配伍成玉屏风散，为经典扶正固表方。
evidence_notes.note_en: Combined with huangqi and baizhu in Yu Ping Feng San, a classical immune-supporting exterior-stabilizing formula.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 阴虚火旺、血虚发痉者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Use cautiously in yin-vacuity fire or blood-vacuity convulsions.

description_en: The dried root of Saposhnikovia divaricata (Apiaceae). Enters the Bladder, Liver, and Spleen channels. Pungent, sweet, and slightly warm, it is known as a 'general-purpose wind herb' and praised as the 'moistening agent among wind medicinals' for its gentle, non-drying nature. Paired with huang qi and bai zhu in Yu Ping Feng San to secure the exterior and stop sweating.

actions.en: Dry dampness and fortify the Spleen
Induce sweating and release the exterior

indications.en: Dampness obstructing the middle jiao with epigastric and abdominal distention
Diarrhea and edema
Wind-damp bi pain
Wind-cold exterior invasion with dampness
Night blindness and blurred vision

contraindications_zh: 阴虚内热、气虚多汗、血虚津亏者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with internal heat, qi vacuity with excessive sweating, and blood vacuity with fluid depletion.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–9g；燥湿运脾多用3–6g；祛风湿可用至9–15g。

processing_methods.name: 生苍术
processing_methods.effect: 燥湿、祛风湿之力较胜

processing_methods.name: 麸炒苍术
processing_methods.effect: 缓和燥性，增强健脾和胃之功

processing_methods.name: 焦苍术
processing_methods.effect: 燥湿止泻

safety_notes_zh: 辛温香燥，燥性较烈，易伤津耗液。阴虚内热、津液亏虚者不宜。现代研究未见明显毒性。
safety_notes_en: Acrid, warm, aromatic, and drying with intense drying properties; may easily damage fluids. Not suitable in yin vacuity with internal heat and fluid depletion. Modern research shows no significant toxicity.

classical_references.passage: 术，味苦，温。主风寒湿痹，死肌，痉疸，止汗，除热，消食。

description_zh: 菊科植物茅苍术或北苍术的干燥根茎。归脾、胃、肝经。燥湿之力胜于白术，为治湿阻中焦之要药；苍术白术同源而功效有别，苍术偏于燥湿运脾，白术偏于补脾益气。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 苍术的主要活性成分为挥发油（苍术素、茅术醇、β-桉叶醇），具有燥湿健脾、促胃肠动力、抗溃疡及抑菌作用；传统上燃烧用于环境空气消毒。
summary.en: Atractylodis Rhizoma contains volatile constituents (atractylodin, hinesol, β-eudesmol), with aromatic damp-transforming, prokinetic, antiulcer, and antimicrobial activity; traditionally burned for indoor air disinfection.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 脾胃湿困之脘腹胀满、食欲不振
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Damp obstructing the spleen and stomach with distension and anorexia

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 夜盲症（传统用于维生素A缺乏）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Night blindness (traditionally for vitamin A vacuity)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出苍术与白术功效相近，但苍术燥性更烈，主燥湿；白术偏于健脾补气。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky distinguishes Cang Zhu as more strongly drying (used chiefly for dampness) while Bai Zhu is more tonifying to spleen qi.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学记载苍术挥发油对流感病毒及多种细菌有抑制作用，为传统苍术烟熏消毒的药理基础。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen report that Cang Zhu volatile oil inhibits influenza virus and multiple bacteria, providing a pharmacological basis for traditional smoke fumigation.

description_en: The dried rhizome of Atractylodes lancea or A. chinensis (Asteraceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Liver channels. Pungent, bitter, and warm, its dampness-drying action surpasses that of bai zhu, making it the primary herb for dampness obstructing the middle burner. While both share an origin, cang zhu excels at drying dampness and mobilizing the Spleen, whereas bai zhu excels at supplementing the Spleen and augmenting qi.

actions.en: Release the exterior and dissipate cold
Warm the Lung and transform thin mucus

indications.zh: 风寒表证，尤宜阳虚外感
indications.en: Wind-cold exterior patterns, especially with underlying yang vacuity
Headache, toothache, and painful obstruction
Nasal congestion and deep-source nasal discharge

indications.zh: 寒饮伏肺，咳嗽气喘，痰多清稀
indications.en: Cold thin mucus lodged in the Lung with cough, wheezing, and copious watery sputum
Wind-cold-damp painful obstruction with cold pain of the lower back and knees

contraindications_zh: 气虚多汗、阴虚阳亢头痛、阴虚肺热咳嗽者忌用。反藜芦（十八反）。内服煎汤一般不过钱（不超过3g），用量过大可致中毒。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in qi vacuity with excessive sweating, headache from yin vacuity with yang hyperactivity, and cough from yin-deficient lung heat. Antagonizes li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma) per the Eighteen Antagonisms (shiba fan). For internal decoction, generally do not exceed one qian (no more than 3g); excessive dosage may cause poisoning.

dosage_range.notes: 内服入汤剂一般1–3g，研末吞服0.5–1g；古有“细辛不过钱”之说，过量可致呼吸抑制及中毒。

processing_methods.name: 生细辛
processing_methods.method: 除去杂质，喷淋清水，稍润，切段，阴干生用
processing_methods.effect: 解表散寒，温肺化饮，通窍止痛

safety_notes_zh: 细辛含黄樟醚（safrole）和马兜铃酸类成分，过量可引起恶心、呕吐、头痛、呼吸困难甚至呼吸麻痹。现行药典规定根及根茎入药，不用地上部分。孕妇慎用；不可与藜芦配伍。
safety_notes_en: Xi xin contains safrole and aristolochic acid-type components; overdose may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, dyspnea, and even respiratory paralysis. Current pharmacopoeia specifies using roots and rhizomes only, not the aerial parts. Use with caution during pregnancy; must not be combined with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma).

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主咳逆，头痛脑动，百节拘挛，风湿痹痛，死肌。久服明目，利九窍，轻身长年。

description_zh: 马兜铃科植物北细辛、汉城细辛或华细辛的干燥根及根茎。归肺、肾、心经。辛温走窜，上行可散头面风寒而通鼻窍止头痛，内行可温肺化饮以平喘止咳，外行可搜剔筋骨风湿而止痹痛，为散寒止痛、温肺化饮之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 细辛主含挥发油（甲基丁香酚、黄樟醚等）及木脂素，具有镇痛、解热、局部麻醉及抗炎作用；有潜在毒性。
summary.en: Asarum herb contains volatile phenylpropanoids (methyl eugenol, safrole) and lignans, with analgesic, antipyretic, local anesthetic and anti-inflammatory effects; potentially toxic.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-cold headache, toothache and sinus congestion

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》2005年版起已将细辛法定药用部位由全草改为根及根茎，以降低地上部分马兜铃酸暴露；规定含马兜铃酸I不得超过0.001%。
evidence_notes.note_en: Since 2005, the Chinese Pharmacopoeia has restricted official Xi Xin to root and rhizome (not whole plant) to reduce aristolochic acid exposure, with a limit of aristolochic acid I not exceeding 0.001%.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 黄樟醚具肝毒及潜在致癌性；马兜铃酸有明确肾毒性及致癌性，剂量与时间均应严格控制。
evidence_notes.note_en: Safrole is hepatotoxic and potentially carcinogenic; aristolochic acid is definitively nephrotoxic and carcinogenic—dose and duration must be strictly controlled.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 「细辛不过钱」为传统用量警戒，通常每剂不超过3g。
evidence_notes.note_en: The adage 'Xi Xin no more than one qian' reflects traditional dose caution, generally not exceeding 3 g per dose.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Asarum heterotropoides var. mandshuricum, A. sieboldii, or A. sieboldii var. seoulense (Aristolochiaceae). Enters the Lung, Kidney, and Heart channels. Pungent and warm, this highly mobile and penetrating herb disperses wind-cold in the head and face, warms the Lung to transform thin mucus, and searches out wind-dampness from sinews and bones.

actions.en: Release the exterior and dissipate cold
Dry dampness and stop vaginal discharge

indications.zh: 风寒感冒，头痛，眉棱骨痛
indications.en: Wind-cold common cold with headache and supraorbital pain
Yangming (frontal) headache and toothache with gum swelling
Deep-source nasal congestion with persistent discharge
Cold-damp vaginal discharge

indications.zh: 疮疡肿毒初起或脓成不溃
indications.en: Early-stage sores and abscesses, or suppurative lesions that fail to drain

contraindications_zh: 阴虚血热及痈疽已溃、脓出通畅者不宜用。辛香温燥，阴虚火旺者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in yin vacuity with blood heat and already-ulcerated abscesses with freely draining pus. Acrid, aromatic, warm, and drying; use with caution in yin vacuity with effulgent fire.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤3–10g；外用适量，研末撒或调敷。

processing_methods.name: 生白芷
processing_methods.method: 除去杂质，大小分开，略浸，润透切片，干燥
processing_methods.effect: 解表散寒，祛风止痛，通窍燥湿

safety_notes_zh: 含呋喃香豆素类成分，大量使用可致光敏反应及轻度毒性；孕妇慎用。
safety_notes_en: Contains furanocoumarin compounds; large doses may cause photosensitivity reactions and mild toxicity; use with caution during pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主女人漏下赤白，血闭阴肿，寒热，风头侵目泪出，长肌肤，润泽，可作面脂。

description_zh: 伞形科植物白芷或杭白芷的干燥根。归肺、胃、大肠经。辛散温通，芳香上达，善入阳明，为治阳明头痛、眉棱骨痛与鼻渊之要药；兼能燥湿止带、消肿排脓。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 白芷富含呋喃香豆素类（欧前胡素、异欧前胡素、白当归素）及挥发油，具有解热、镇痛、抗炎、抗菌及光敏作用。
summary.en: Angelicae dahuricae Radix is rich in furanocoumarins (imperatorin, isoimperatorin, byakangelicin) and essential oil, with antipyretic, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and photosensitizing activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 头痛（尤其前额痛及牙痛）
银屑病（呋喃香豆素光化学疗法原料）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出白芷挥发油及香豆素成分具有抗炎、镇痛和抑菌作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes that the essential oil and coumarins exhibit anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antimicrobial activity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Brinker 警示白芷中的呋喃香豆素可引起光敏反应，服用后应避免过度日晒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Brinker warns that furanocoumarins in Bai Zhi can cause photosensitization; excessive sun exposure should be avoided after use.

description_en: The dried root of Angelica dahurica or A. dahurica var. formosana (Apiaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Pungent and warm, it is fragrant and ascending, with particular affinity for the yang-brightness channel. It is the essential herb for yang-brightness headache, supraorbital pain, and deep-source nasal congestion, while also drying dampness to stop vaginal discharge and reducing swelling to expel pus.

actions.en: Release the exterior and dispel wind

indications.zh: 外感表证，无论风寒风热皆可配用
indications.en: Exterior patterns from wind-cold or wind-heat invasion
Incompletely expressed measles and itchy wind-rash
Early-stage sores with concurrent exterior signs
Sore, swollen throat
(Charred form) intestinal bleeding, uterine bleeding, and nosebleed

contraindications_zh: 表虚自汗、阴虚头痛者忌用。凡病人表虚有汗及血虚寒热而不因于风寒、风热、风湿者，并禁用之。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in exterior vacuity with spontaneous sweating and headache from yin vacuity. Contraindicated when patients have exterior vacuity with sweating and blood vacuity with alternating cold and heat not due to wind-cold, wind-heat, or wind-dampness.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤4.5–9g，不宜久煎；发表透疹消疮宜生用，止血须炒炭用。

processing_methods.name: 生荆芥
processing_methods.method: 除去杂质，抢水洗净，切段，干燥
processing_methods.effect: 解表散风，透疹消疮

processing_methods.name: 荆芥炭
processing_methods.method: 取净荆芥段，武火炒至表面焦黑色、内部焦褐色，存性，喷淋清水灭尽火星
processing_methods.effect: 止血

safety_notes_zh: 气味辛散，不宜久煎，后下为佳；炒炭存性，以防灰化失效。
safety_notes_en: Acrid and dispersing in nature; should not be decocted for too long, best added near the end; when charring, preserve its properties to prevent ash degradation.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主寒热鼠瘘，瘰疬生疮，破结聚气，下瘀血，除湿痹。

description_zh: 唇形科植物荆芥的干燥地上部分。归肺、肝经。性温而不燥，药力平和，风寒风热表证皆宜，兼能透疹、消疮；炒炭后性涩，功能止血，为治多种出血证之常用药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 荆芥挥发油主含单萜类，具有解热、发汗、抗炎、止痒及轻度抗菌作用。
summary.en: Schizonepeta essential oil contains monoterpenes that confer antipyretic, diaphoretic, anti-inflammatory, antipruritic, and mild antibacterial effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Early-stage wind-cold or wind-heat common cold

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 风疹瘙痒及荨麻疹辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 荆芥辛微温，发表散风，为风邪在表常用药；炒炭能止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid and slightly warm — releases the exterior and dispels wind; charred form stops bleeding.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 挥发油扩张皮肤毛细血管促发汗，并具抗炎止痒作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Essential oil dilates cutaneous capillaries to promote sweating and exerts anti-inflammatory and antipruritic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以挥发油含量（不少于 0.60% mL/g）为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies essential oil content (≥0.60% mL/g) as the quality marker.

description_en: The dried aerial part of Schizonepeta tenuifolia (Lamiaceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Pungent and slightly warm, its nature is warm yet not drying and its action mild, making it suitable for both wind-cold and wind-heat exterior patterns. It also vents rashes, disperses sores, and when charred it transforms into an astringent hemostatic used for various bleeding conditions.

actions.en: Release the exterior and dissipate cold

indications.zh: 风寒夹湿表证，恶寒发热，头痛身痛
indications.en: Wind-cold-damp exterior patterns with chills, fever, headache, and generalized body aches
Taiyang-channel headache with stiffness of the neck and upper back

indications.zh: 风寒湿痹，肩背肢节疼痛，尤善上半身风湿
indications.en: Wind-cold-damp painful obstruction of the shoulder, upper back, and joints, especially of the upper body
Wind-edema with superficial swelling
Tetanic spasms (used in combination)

contraindications_zh: 阴血亏虚之头痛、身痛及血虚痹痛者忌用；辛温香燥，用量过多易耗气伤阴，脾胃虚弱者亦须慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in headache, body pain from yin-blood vacuity, and bi-pain from blood vacuity; acrid, warm, aromatic, and drying, excessive dosage may easily consume qi and damage yin; also use with caution in spleen and stomach vacuity.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤3–10g。用量过大易致呕吐，脾胃虚弱者不宜服。

processing_methods.name: 生羌活
processing_methods.method: 除去杂质，洗净，润透切片，干燥
processing_methods.effect: 解表散寒，祛风胜湿止痛

safety_notes_zh: 气味雄烈，用量过大易致呕吐。血虚痹痛、阴虚头痛者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Potent aroma; excessive dosage may easily cause vomiting. Contraindicated in bi-pain from blood vacuity and headache from yin vacuity.

classical_references.passage: 羌活气雄而散，味薄上升，入足太阳膀胱经，以其为拨乱反正之主，故大寒大热之病非此不除也。

description_zh: 伞形科植物羌活或宽叶羌活的干燥根茎及根。归膀胱、肾经。辛散苦燥，气味雄烈，善入足太阳膀胱经，能散风寒湿邪而通利关节止痛，为治风寒湿痹在上半身及太阳经头痛之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 羌活富含香豆素（羌活醇、异欧前胡素）与挥发油，现代研究显示解热、镇痛、抗炎及抗心律失常作用，对应传统祛风散寒、胜湿止痛之功。
summary.en: Notopterygium contains furanocoumarins (notopterol, isoimperatorin) and volatile oils with antipyretic, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiarrhythmic effects in preclinical models, aligning with its traditional wind-cold-damp dispelling and pain-relieving use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-cold colds with headache and generalized body pain

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 风湿痹痛，尤其上半身肩背
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-damp arthralgia, especially upper body (shoulders, back)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）强调羌活气味雄烈，阴虚血燥者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky cautions that Notopterygium is pungent and drying and should be used carefully in yin-deficient or blood-dry patients.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述羌活醇有抗心律失常及镇痛活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize notopterol's antiarrhythmic and analgesic activities.

description_en: The dried rhizome and root of Notopterygium incisum or N. franchetii (Apiaceae). Enters the Bladder and Kidney channels. Pungent, bitter, and warm, its qi and flavor are vigorous and powerful, with particular affinity for the foot greater yang Bladder channel. It excels at dispersing wind-cold-dampness and relieving joint pain, making it the key herb for wind-cold-damp impediment of the upper body and greater yang headache.

actions.en: Induce sweating and release the exterior
Transform dampness and harmonize the middle

indications.zh: 阴暑证：夏月外感风寒，内伤生冷，恶寒发热，头痛无汗
indications.en: Yin-summerheat pattern: summer wind-cold exterior invasion with internal cold damage, chills, fever, headache, and absence of sweating
Epigastric and abdominal distention with pain, vomiting, and diarrhea
Edema with difficult urination
Summer-dampness vomiting and diarrhea
Leg-qi (beriberi-like) swelling

contraindications_zh: 香薷为夏月解表之药，辛温发汗力强，素称“夏月麻黄”，表虚有汗者及阳暑证（中暑发热汗出）忌用。热服易致呕吐，宜凉服。
contraindications_en: Xiang ru is a summer exterior-releasing herb with strong acrid-warm diaphoretic action, traditionally called "the ma huang of summer"; contraindicated in exterior vacuity with sweating and yang-type summerheat (heatstroke with fever and sweating). Taking it hot may easily cause vomiting; it is best taken after cooling.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤3–10g；发表用量宜小且不宜久煎，利水退肿用量宜大且须浓煎。宜凉服以免致吐。

processing_methods.name: 生香薷
processing_methods.method: 除去残根及杂质，切段，阴干生用
processing_methods.effect: 发汗解表，化湿和中，利水消肿

safety_notes_zh: 发汗力强，不宜用于表虚自汗及阳暑。热服易致呕，宜待凉服。
safety_notes_en: Strong diaphoretic action; not suitable in exterior vacuity with spontaneous sweating and yang-type summerheat. Taking it hot may cause vomiting; best taken after cooling.

classical_references.passage: 香薷乃夏月解表之药，如冬月之用麻黄，气虚者尤不可多服。

description_zh: 唇形科植物石香薷或江香薷的干燥地上部分。归肺、胃经。辛温芳香，外能发汗解表散寒，内能化湿和中，兼可利水消肿，为夏月感受风寒、内伤暑湿之要药，有“夏月麻黄”之称。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 香薷挥发油含香薷酮、百里香酚等，具有发汗解热、抗菌抗病毒及利尿作用，为『夏月之麻黄』的药理基础。
summary.en: Elsholtzia volatile oil contains elsholtzia ketone, thymol and related monoterpenes with diaphoretic, antipyretic, antimicrobial, antiviral and diuretic actions, underpinning its reputation as the summer-season Ma Huang.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 暑湿感冒、恶寒发热无汗
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Summer-damp wind-cold with chills, fever and anhidrosis

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出香薷外散表寒、内化湿浊，尤宜暑月阴暑证。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Xiang Ru releases the exterior and transforms dampness, particularly for summer yin-type cold patterns.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 现代研究显示其挥发油对多种革兰阳性菌有抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite modern studies showing volatile oil inhibits multiple Gram-positive bacteria.

description_en: The dried aerial part of Mosla chinensis or M. chinensis var. jiangxiensis (Lamiaceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Pungent and slightly warm, it releases the exterior and disperses cold externally while transforming dampness and harmonizing the middle internally, with an additional diuretic action. Known as the 'Ephedra of summer,' it is the essential herb for summer wind-cold with internal dampness injury.

actions.en: Cool the blood and stop dysenteric disorder

indications.zh: 外感风热或温病初起，发热微恶风寒，咽痛口渴
indications.en: Early-stage wind-heat or warm-disease invasion with fever, slight chills, sore throat, and thirst
Hot toxic sores, abscesses, and boils with redness, swelling, and pain
Heat-toxin dysentery with bloody, pus-streaked stool
Sore, swollen throat
Summer-heat with irritability and thirst

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒及气虚疮疡脓清者忌用。性寒，不宜久服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and qi vacuity with clear pus from sores. Cold in nature; not suitable for prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤6–15g，疏散风热宜生用，清热解毒大剂量可用至30–60g；亦可代茶饮。

processing_methods.name: 生金银花
processing_methods.method: 除去杂质，筛去灰屑，生用
processing_methods.effect: 清热解毒，疏散风热

processing_methods.name: 金银花炭
processing_methods.method: 取净金银花，武火炒至表面焦褐色，存性，喷淋清水灭尽火星
processing_methods.effect: 凉血止痢

safety_notes_zh: 性寒，脾胃虚寒、久泻便溏者不宜长期服用。已溃之痈疽，脓稀清者不宜用。
safety_notes_en: Cold in nature; not suitable for prolonged use in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with chronic diarrhea and loose stools. Not suitable in already-ulcerated abscesses with thin, clear pus.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，温，无毒。主寒热身肿，久服轻身长年益寿。

description_zh: 忍冬科植物忍冬的干燥花蕾或带初开的花。归肺、心、胃经。甘寒芳香，既能清透肺经及肌表之风热，又善清解血分热毒，为治一切内外痈肿疮疡之要药，亦为治风热感冒、温病初起之常用药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 金银花含绿原酸、木犀草苷及挥发油，具有抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎及解热作用。
summary.en: Lonicera yields chlorogenic acid, luteoloside, and essential oil with antibacterial, antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 上呼吸道感染与流感样症状
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Upper respiratory infection and influenza-like illness

evidence_notes.note_zh: 绿原酸与木犀草素对多种革兰阳性、阴性细菌及呼吸道病毒有体外抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chlorogenic acid and luteolin show in vitro inhibition of Gram-positive/negative bacteria and respiratory viruses.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 金银花甘寒清热解毒，为温病卫气分证要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cold herb that clears heat and resolves toxin — principal for warm-disease wei and qi-level patterns.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定绿原酸含量不少于 1.5%，木犀草苷不少于 0.050%。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies chlorogenic acid ≥1.5% and luteoloside ≥0.050%.

description_en: The dried flower bud or newly opened flower of Lonicera japonica (Caprifoliaceae). Enters the Lung, Heart, and Stomach channels. Sweet and cold, its fragrant quality allows it to clear and vent wind-heat from the Lung and exterior while its cooling nature resolves heat-toxin in the blood level. It is the premier herb for all internal and external abscesses, sores, and carbuncles, and a cornerstone of Yin Qiao San.

indications.zh: 外感风热，温病初起，发热头痛
indications.en: Externally contracted wind-heat and early-stage warm disease with fever and headache

indications.zh: 温病邪入心包，高热神昏
indications.en: Warm-disease heat entering the Pericardium with high fever and clouded consciousness
Hot toxic abscesses, sores, and erysipelas with redness and swelling
Scrofulous lumps and phlegm nodules
Heat-type painful urinary dribbling

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒及气虚脓清之痈疽、久泻便溏者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold, qi vacuity with clear pus from abscesses, chronic diarrhea, and loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤6–15g。青翘清热解毒力强，老翘透表散热力胜。

processing_methods.name: 青翘
processing_methods.method: 秋季果实初熟尚带绿色时采收，除去杂质，蒸熟晒干
processing_methods.effect: 清热解毒力强，偏清气分及血分热毒

processing_methods.name: 老翘
processing_methods.method: 果实熟透时采收，晒干，除去种子及杂质
processing_methods.effect: 长于疏散风热，透表散邪

safety_notes_zh: 性寒，脾胃虚寒及气虚久泻者不宜服；用于已溃痈疽脓清者亦须慎用。
safety_notes_en: Cold in nature; not suitable in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and qi vacuity with chronic diarrhea; also use with caution in already-ulcerated abscesses with clear pus.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主寒热，鼠瘘，瘰疬，痈肿，恶疮，瘿瘤，结热，蛊毒。

description_zh: 木犀科植物连翘的干燥果实。归肺、心、小肠经。苦寒清泄，轻清上浮，既能清心火、解疮毒，又能疏散风热透邪外出，素有“疮家圣药”之称，为温病卫气营血各阶段及一切痈肿疮毒之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 连翘含连翘酯苷、连翘苷及挥发油，具广谱抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎及解热作用。
summary.en: Forsythia contains forsythiaside, phillyrin, and essential oil with broad antibacterial, antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 上呼吸道感染与流感样症状
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Upper respiratory infection and influenza-like illness

evidence_notes.note_zh: 连翘酯苷 A 对多种呼吸道病毒和细菌有体外抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Forsythiaside A inhibits multiple respiratory viruses and bacteria in vitro.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 连翘与金银花相须为用，为温病卫气分证首选药对。
evidence_notes.note_en: Paired with Lonicera as the archetypal duo for wei and qi-level warm diseases.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以连翘苷（不少于 0.15%）和连翘酯苷 A（不少于 0.25%）为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies phillyrin (≥0.15%) and forsythiaside A (≥0.25%) as quality markers.

description_en: The dried fruit of Forsythia suspensa (Oleaceae). Enters the Lung, Heart, and Small Intestine channels. Bitter and slightly cold, it is light and ascending, excelling at clearing Heart fire, resolving sore-toxin, and venting wind-heat outward. Historically honored as the 'sage herb for sores' (chuang jia sheng yao), it treats warm diseases at all four levels and all forms of abscesses and carbuncles.

actions.en: Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Wind-heat common cold with fever and headache
Ascendant Liver yang with dizziness and headache

indications.zh: 肝经风热或肝火上攻，目赤肿痛
indications.en: Wind-heat or Liver fire rising with red, swollen, painful eyes

indications.zh: 肝肾精血不足，目暗昏花
indications.en: Liver and Kidney essence-blood vacuity with blurred vision
Sores, carbuncles, and toxic swellings

contraindications_zh: 气虚胃寒、食少泄泻者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in qi vacuity with stomach cold, poor appetite, and diarrhea.

dosage_range.notes: 疏散风热多用黄菊花（杭菊）；平肝明目多用白菊花（滁菊、亳菊）；清热解毒多用野菊花。

processing_methods.name: 生菊花
processing_methods.effect: 疏散风热，清热解毒

processing_methods.name: 菊花炭
processing_methods.effect: 偏于止血

safety_notes_zh: 脾胃虚寒者不宜长期大量服用，以防伤中阳。
safety_notes_en: Not suitable for prolonged high-dose use in spleen-stomach vacuity cold, to prevent damaging middle yang.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主诸风头眩肿痛，目欲脱，泪出，皮肤死肌，恶风湿痹。久服利血气，轻身耐老延年。

description_zh: 菊科植物菊的干燥头状花序。归肺、肝经。辛凉解表，既能疏散上焦风热，又可平肝清肝明目，为外感风热头痛目赤及肝阳眩晕之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 菊花含黄酮、绿原酸及挥发油，具抗炎、抗氧化、抗菌、扩张冠脉及降压作用。
summary.en: Chrysanthemum contains flavonoids, chlorogenic acid, and essential oil with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, antimicrobial, coronary-dilating, and antihypertensive activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-heat common cold with headache and red eyes

evidence_notes.note_zh: 黄酮成分抑制炎症因子释放，挥发油对多种细菌有抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Flavonoids inhibit inflammatory cytokine release; the essential oil inhibits multiple bacterial species.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 菊花疏风清热、平肝明目，为眼疾常用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Disperses wind-heat, pacifies liver, and brightens the eyes — a classic ophthalmic herb.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以绿原酸、木犀草苷和 3,5-O-二咖啡酰奎宁酸为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies chlorogenic acid, luteoloside, and 3,5-di-O-caffeoylquinic acid as quality markers.

description_en: The dried capitulum of Chrysanthemum morifolium (Asteraceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Pungent, sweet, bitter, and cool, it disperses upper-burner wind-heat, pacifies ascendant Liver yang, clears the Liver, and brightens the eyes. It is a key herb for exterior wind-heat headache with red eyes and for Liver-yang dizziness.

actions.en: Clear the Lung and moisten dryness
Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes
Cool the blood and stop bleeding

indications.zh: 风热感冒，温病初起，发热头痛
indications.en: Wind-heat cold or early-stage warm disease with fever and headache

indications.zh: 肺热或燥热咳嗽，咽干少痰
indications.en: Lung heat or dry-heat cough with dry throat and scanty phlegm
Liver yang ascending with dizziness, headache, and red eyes

indications.zh: 肝经风热或肝火上炎，目赤昏花
indications.en: Liver channel wind-heat or Liver fire with red, sore, or blurred eyes
Reckless bleeding from blood-heat such as hematemesis and epistaxis

contraindications_zh: 肺胃虚寒者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in lung-stomach vacuity cold.

dosage_range.notes: 外感风热宜生用；肺燥咳嗽多用蜜炙桑叶。

processing_methods.name: 生桑叶
processing_methods.effect: 疏散风热，清肝明目

processing_methods.name: 蜜桑叶
processing_methods.effect: 润肺止咳作用增强

safety_notes_zh: 一般用量安全，大剂量或久服对脾胃虚寒者可致腹泻。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe at standard dosages; high doses or prolonged use may cause diarrhea in spleen-stomach vacuity cold.

classical_references.passage: 桑根白皮，味甘寒。主伤中五劳六极，羸瘦，崩中脉绝，补虚益气。叶主除寒热，出汗。

description_zh: 桑科植物桑的干燥叶。归肺、肝经。既能疏散外感风热，又善清肺润燥、平肝明目，为温病初起及秋燥咳嗽之常用药，桑菊饮之君药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桑叶含 1-脱氧野尻霉素（α-葡萄糖苷酶抑制剂）、芦丁及绿原酸，现代研究显示其降血糖、降血脂与抗氧化作用，对应传统疏散风热、清肺润燥之功并延伸至代谢调节。
summary.en: Mulberry leaf contains 1-deoxynojirimycin (an α-glucosidase inhibitor), rutin, and chlorogenic acid, with preclinical and small clinical data on blood-glucose and lipid lowering and antioxidant effects, aligning with its traditional wind-heat dispersing and lung-moistening use and extending to metabolic applications.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 2 型糖尿病餐后血糖控制辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述桑叶 DNJ 抑制 α-葡萄糖苷酶，减少餐后血糖峰值。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize that mulberry leaf DNJ inhibits α-glucosidase and blunts postprandial glucose peaks.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载霜桑叶尤其擅长清肺润燥，为秋燥咳嗽之常用药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes frost-exposed mulberry leaf is especially suited to lung dryness and is commonly used for autumn-dryness cough.

description_en: The dried leaf of Morus alba (Moraceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Sweet, bitter, and cold, it disperses wind-heat, clears the Lung and moistens dryness, and calms ascendant Liver yang while clearing the Liver and brightening the eyes. It is a standard herb for early-stage warm-disease and autumn dryness cough, serving as the chief in Sang Ju Yin.

actions.en: Clear and benefit the head and eyes
Benefit the throat and vent rashes
Course the Liver and move qi

indications.zh: 风热感冒，温病初起，发热无汗
indications.en: Wind-heat common cold or early warm disease with fever and absence of sweating
Wind-heat attacking upward with headache and red eyes
Exuberant wind-heat with sore, swollen throat
Early-stage measles with rash failing to vent
Liver qi constraint with chest oppression and hypochondriac distension

contraindications_zh: 阴虚血燥、肝阳偏亢、表虚自汗者忌用。哺乳期妇女不宜多服（减少乳汁）。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with blood dryness, liver yang hyperactivity, and exterior vacuity with spontaneous sweating. Not suitable for excessive use during lactation (may reduce milk supply).

dosage_range.notes: 入汤剂宜后下，以防挥发油散失。发汗解表用叶，疏肝行气用梗。

processing_methods.name: 薄荷叶
processing_methods.effect: 疏散风热，清利头目

processing_methods.name: 薄荷梗
processing_methods.effect: 偏于理气疏肝

safety_notes_zh: 挥发油为主要有效成分，煎煮时间过长则效减；婴幼儿鼻腔及面部慎用薄荷脑。
safety_notes_en: Volatile oil is the primary active constituent; prolonged decoction reduces efficacy; use menthol with caution on the nasal cavity and face of infants and young children.

classical_references.passage: 薄荷，辛凉，能消风散热，清头目，利咽喉，治中风失音，小儿惊热，语涩舌胎。

description_zh: 唇形科植物薄荷的干燥地上部分。归肺、肝经。辛凉轻清，善走头面，为疏散风热、清利头目、利咽透疹之要药，亦为银翘散方中重要佐使。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal component of essential oil, ca. 30–50%

summary.zh: 薄荷的主要活性成分为薄荷醇及薄荷酮，具有解热、抗菌、局部清凉止痒、促胃肠动力及胆汁分泌作用。
summary.en: Menthae haplocalycis Herba contains menthol and menthone as principal volatile constituents, with antipyretic, antimicrobial, topical cooling/antipruritic, prokinetic, and choleretic activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肠易激综合征（薄荷油肠溶胶囊）

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-heat pattern headache and sore throat

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论收录薄荷（Mentha × piperita）用于肠易激综合征和消化不良的临床证据。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monographs document clinical evidence for Mentha × piperita in irritable bowel syndrome and functional dyspepsia.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出薄荷为辛凉解表药，入煎剂应后下以免挥发油损失。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes that Bo He is a cool acrid exterior-releasing herb and should be added at the end of decoction to preserve its volatile oils.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Brinker 提醒婴幼儿面部外用含高浓度薄荷醇制剂可能诱发喉痉挛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Brinker cautions that high-menthol topical products applied to the face of infants can trigger laryngospasm.

description_en: The dried aerial part of Mentha haplocalyx (Lamiaceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Pungent and cool, light and clearing, it excels at reaching the head and face, making it the key herb for dispersing wind-heat, clearing and benefiting the head and eyes, benefiting the throat, and venting rashes. It also courses the Liver and moves qi, and is a crucial component in Yin Qiao San.

actions.en: Diffuse the Lung and dispel phlegm
Benefit the throat and vent rashes

indications.en: Wind-heat common cold with cough and profuse phlegm

indications.zh: 风热或热毒壅盛，咽喉肿痛
indications.en: Wind-heat or toxic-heat with sore, swollen throat
Measles rash failing to vent
Wind rash with itching
Carbuncles, toxic sores, mumps, and erysipelas

contraindications_zh: 气虚便溏者忌用；痘疹家气虚色白、大便自利者忌服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in qi vacuity with loose stools; also contraindicated in qi vacuity with pale complexion and spontaneous diarrhea in measles patients.

dosage_range.notes: 炒用可缓其寒滑之性，减少滑肠之弊；入汤剂宜捣碎。

processing_methods.name: 生牛蒡子
processing_methods.effect: 疏散风热，解毒利咽作用较强

processing_methods.name: 炒牛蒡子
processing_methods.effect: 缓和寒滑之性，长于透疹、利咽，减少滑肠

safety_notes_zh: 性寒滑，大剂量或体质虚寒者服后易致腹泻。
safety_notes_en: Cold and slippery in nature; high doses or use in vacuity-cold constitution may easily cause diarrhea.

classical_references.passage: 牛蒡子，味辛平。主明目补中，除风伤。根茎疗伤寒寒热，汗出中风面肿，消渴热中。

description_zh: 菊科植物牛蒡的干燥成熟果实。归肺、胃经。辛散苦泄，性寒滑利，外能疏散风热，内可宣肺祛痰、解毒利咽，为治风热咽痛、麻疹不透之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 牛蒡子主含木脂素类（牛蒡苷及其苷元），具有抗炎、抗病毒、抗肿瘤及降血糖的现代药理报道，与其疏散风热、解毒透疹的传统应用相符。
summary.en: Arctium seed contains lignans (arctiin and arctigenin) with reported anti-inflammatory, antiviral, antitumor, and hypoglycemic activities in preclinical studies, aligning with its traditional role in dispersing wind-heat and venting rashes.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 风热咽喉肿痛、感冒初起
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-heat sore throat and early-stage common cold

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载牛蒡子具缓泻之性，虚寒便溏者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Arctium seed has a mild laxative tendency and should be used cautiously in patients with cold vacuity and loose stools.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述牛蒡苷元在体外对多种病毒及肿瘤细胞株具抑制活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize in-vitro inhibitory activity of arctigenin against several viruses and tumor cell lines.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Arctium lappa (Asteraceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Pungent, bitter, and cold, it disperses wind-heat externally while diffusing the Lung and expelling phlegm internally. With its slippery quality, it benefits the throat and vents rashes, making it the essential herb for wind-heat sore throat and incomplete eruption of measles.

actions.en: Benefit the throat and restore the voice
Brighten the eyes and remove screens (nebulae)

indications.en: Wind-heat common cold with sore throat and hoarseness
Measles failing to vent, and wind rash with itching
Red eyes with screens obscuring vision
Acute and chronic childhood convulsions, and tetanus (lockjaw)
Restless nocturnal crying in infants

contraindications_zh: 孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution during pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 一般用量3–6g；治破伤风等证可用至15–30g。

processing_methods.name: 生蝉蜕
processing_methods.effect: 疏散风热，透疹，息风止痉

safety_notes_zh: 传统认为孕妇慎用；大剂量用于止痉时应在医师指导下使用。
safety_notes_en: Traditionally cautioned during pregnancy; when using large doses for antispasmodic purposes, use under physician guidance.

classical_references.passage: 蝉壳，味咸甘寒，无毒。主小儿惊痫夜啼，癫病寒热。

description_zh: 蝉科昆虫黑蚱若虫羽化时脱落的皮壳。归肺、肝经。质轻性浮，既能疏散肺经风热而利咽开音、透疹止痒，又善入肝经以明目退翳、息风止痉，为儿科要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: main structural component of the exuvia

summary.zh: 蝉蜕主要成分为甲壳素及少量蛋白质与氨基酸，动物实验显示其煎剂具有镇静、解热、抗惊厥及抗过敏作用。
summary.en: Cicadae Periostracum consists mainly of chitin with minor proteins and amino acids; decoctions show sedative, antipyretic, anticonvulsant, and antiallergic activity in animal studies.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Wind-heat red eyes with corneal opacity

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出蝉蜕常与荆芥、防风配伍用于风疹瘙痒，与僵蚕配伍用于小儿惊风。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes that Chan Tui is commonly paired with jing jie and fang feng for wind-rashes, and with jiang can for pediatric convulsions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学记载蝉蜕提取物在小鼠实验中表现出剂量依赖性的抗惊厥和镇静作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen report that cicada slough extracts show dose-dependent anticonvulsant and sedative effects in mouse models.

description_en: The cast-off exoskeleton of the nymph of Cryptotympana pustulata (Cicadidae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Sweet and cool, light and buoyant, it disperses Lung-channel wind-heat to benefit the throat and restore the voice, vents rashes and stops itching, and enters the Liver channel to brighten the eyes, clear visual obstructions, and extinguish wind to stop spasms. An important pediatric medicinal.

actions.en: Release the flesh and reduce fever
Unblock channels and quicken the network vessels

indications.en: Exterior pattern with stiff, painful neck and upper back
Febrile disease with irritability and thirst, and wasting-thirst disorder
Early measles with rash failing to vent completely
Spleen vacuity diarrhea, and damp-heat dysenteric disorder

indications.zh: 中风偏瘫，眩晕头痛，胸痹心痛
indications.en: Wind-stroke hemiplegia, dizziness and headache, and chest bi with heart pain

contraindications_zh: 胃寒呕吐、表虚多汗者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in stomach cold with vomiting and exterior vacuity with excessive sweating.

dosage_range.notes: 解肌退热、透疹、生津、通经活络宜用生葛根；升阳止泻（脾虚泄泻）宜用煨葛根。

processing_methods.name: 生葛根
processing_methods.effect: 解肌退热，生津止渴，透疹，通经活络

processing_methods.name: 煨葛根
processing_methods.effect: 缓其升散之性，增强升阳止泻之功，用于脾虚泄泻

safety_notes_zh: 表虚自汗、胃寒者不宜大量使用；葛根异黄酮有类雌激素样作用，特殊人群应在指导下使用。
safety_notes_en: Not suitable in large doses for exterior vacuity with spontaneous sweating and stomach cold; puerarin isoflavones have estrogen-like effects and special populations should use under guidance.

classical_references.passage: 太阳病，项背强几几，无汗恶风，葛根汤主之。
味甘，平。主消渴，身大热，呕吐，诸痹，起阴气，解诸毒。

description_zh: 豆科植物野葛的干燥根。归脾、胃、肺经。性凉味甘辛，升散之力较缓，既能解肌发表退热，又可生津止渴、升发清阳、透疹止泻，为治项背强痛及脾虚泄泻之良药，葛根汤、葛根芩连汤之君药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 葛根主含异黄酮类（葛根素、大豆苷元、大豆苷），药理证实其扩张冠脉与脑血管、改善微循环、降糖、降压及解肌退热作用。
summary.en: Gegen contains isoflavones (puerarin, daidzein, daidzin); pharmacology confirms coronary and cerebral vasodilation, microcirculation improvement, antidiabetic, antihypertensive and antipyretic actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 缺血性脑卒中与颈椎病

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Exterior fever with neck and upper-back stiffness

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以葛根素为含量测定指标；葛根素注射液曾广泛应用（后因溶血报告调整适应证）。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses puerarin as the assay marker; puerarin injection widely used historically (indications later adjusted due to hemolytic reaction reports).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 葛根汤、桂枝加葛根汤治疗项背拘急经典应用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Gegen Tang and Guizhi Jia Gegen Tang are classical for neck/upper-back stiffness.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论总结其心脑血管适应证的临床证据。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph summarizes clinical evidence for cardiovascular and cerebrovascular indications.

description_en: The dried root of Pueraria lobata (Fabaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Lung channels. Sweet, pungent, and cool, its ascending and dispersing action is relatively gentle. It releases the muscle layer and reduces fever, generates fluids to relieve thirst, raises clear yang, vents rashes, and stops diarrhea. It is the chief medicinal in Ge Gen Tang and Ge Gen Qin Lian Tang.

actions.en: Cool the blood and resolve toxicity

indications.en: Febrile disease with heart vexation, oppression, and restlessness
Damp-heat jaundice
Blood-heat hematemesis, epistaxis, and hematuria
Red painful eyes and fire-toxin sores
Sprains and contusions (topical application)

contraindications_zh: 脾虚便溏、食少者忌服。栀子苦寒，脾胃虚寒无湿热实火者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen vacuity with loose stools and poor appetite. Zhi zi is bitter and cold; not suitable in spleen-stomach vacuity cold without damp-heat or repletion fire.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤6–10g；外用生品研末调敷治跌打损伤。清热泻火多用生栀子，凉血止血常用焦栀子。

processing_methods.name: 生栀子
processing_methods.effect: 泻火除烦、清热利湿、凉血解毒力强，多用于热病心烦、湿热黄疸

processing_methods.name: 炒栀子
processing_methods.effect: 苦寒之性略减，除烦而不伤中，用于心烦而脾胃不甚虚者

processing_methods.name: 焦栀子
processing_methods.effect: 长于凉血止血，用于血热吐衄、尿血

safety_notes_zh: 苦寒伤胃，不宜过量或久服。脾虚便溏者忌用。现代研究提示大剂量或长期使用可能影响肝功能，临床应辨证使用、中病即止。
safety_notes_en: Bitter and cold, may injure the stomach; not suitable for excessive or prolonged use. Contraindicated in spleen vacuity with loose stools. Modern research suggests high doses or prolonged use may affect liver function; clinical use should be pattern-differentiated and discontinued once the condition improves.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主五内邪气，胃中热气，面赤酒疱皶鼻，白癞赤癞疮疡。

description_zh: 茜草科植物栀子的干燥成熟果实。归心、肺、三焦经。为清泻三焦火邪、除烦解郁之要药，善治热病心烦郁闷之证，生用走气分而泻火，焦用入血分而止血。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 栀子主含栀子苷、藏红花素（crocin）等环烯醚萜及类胡萝卜素成分，具有保肝利胆、解热、抗炎、镇静及降压作用，为清热泻火除烦的药理依据。
summary.en: Gardenia fruit contains iridoid glycosides (geniposide) and carotenoids (crocin, crocetin) with hepatoprotective, choleretic, antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, sedative and hypotensive effects, providing the basis for its heat-clearing, fire-draining and restlessness-resolving actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Vexation and insomnia in febrile disease

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以栀子苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses geniposide as the assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述栀子苷在动物模型中显著降低 ALT 并改善胆汁淤积。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite geniposide markedly lowering ALT and improving cholestasis in animal models.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Gardenia jasminoides (Rubiaceae). Enters the Heart, Lung, and Triple Burner channels. Bitter and cold, it is the key herb for draining fire from all three burners and eliminating vexation. Used raw it courses the qi level and drains fire; when scorched it enters the blood level and stops bleeding. Featured in Zhi Zi Chi Tang for heat-induced vexation and restlessness.

indications.en: Febrile disease with irritability and thirst
Stomach heat with nausea and hiccup
Lung-heat cough and lung abscess with purulent expectoration
Heat strangury with painful urination
Early-stage measles with incomplete eruption

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒者忌服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold.

dosage_range.notes: 干品15–30g；鲜品用量加倍（60–120g），生津止渴、清透热邪之力尤佳。

processing_methods.name: 鲜芦根
processing_methods.effect: 清热生津、除烦止渴力强，凡温热病津伤口渴、胃热呕吐多用鲜品

processing_methods.name: 干芦根
processing_methods.effect: 作用与鲜品相似而药力稍缓，便于储存，煎汤内服常用

safety_notes_zh: 质轻味淡，药性平和，虽性寒而不甚伤胃。大剂量鲜品榨汁服用时，脾虚便溏者慎之。
safety_notes_en: Light in texture and bland in flavor, mild in nature; though cold, it does not greatly injure the stomach. When taking large doses of fresh juice, use with caution in spleen vacuity with loose stools.

classical_references.passage: 太阴温病，但热不恶寒而渴者，辛凉平剂银翘散主之。

description_zh: 禾本科植物芦苇的干燥或新鲜根茎。归肺、胃经。甘寒质轻，清热而不伤胃，生津而不恋邪，为温病津伤、胃热呕吐之良药。吴鞠通银翘散以鲜芦根煎汤代水，即取其清透热邪、生津止渴之功。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 芦根含多糖、薏苡素及氨基酸，具清热生津、止呕、解热及利尿作用。
summary.en: Phragmites rhizome contains polysaccharides, coixol, and amino acids with heat-clearing, fluid-generating, antiemetic, antipyretic, and diuretic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Lung-heat cough and lung abscess adjunct

evidence_notes.note_zh: 芦根甘寒入肺胃，清热生津止呕，温病常用。
