evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists gualou, gualou pi and gualou ren separately with distinct quality standards.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 瓜蒌薤白白酒汤为治疗胸痹经典方。
evidence_notes.note_en: Gualou Xiebai Baijiu Tang is the classical formula for chest bi (angina-like pain).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 十八反：瓜蒌不可与乌头、附子同用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Classical eighteen-antagonism: gualou incompatible with wutou and fuzi.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Trichosanthes kirilowii or T. rosthornii (Cucurbitaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet, bitter, and cold, it clears the Lung and transforms phlegm for phlegm-heat cough, expands the chest and dissipates nodules for chest impediment (xiong bi), and moistens the intestines for constipation. It is the key herb for chest impediment, commonly combined with xie bai and ban xia as in Gua Lou Xie Bai Bai Jiu Tang.

actions.en: Cool the blood and calm the fetus
Clear the Heart and flush phlegm

indications.en: Cough from phlegm-heat with thick yellow sputum
Gallbladder fire with phlegm causing vexation and insomnia
Vomiting from stomach heat and morning sickness in pregnancy
Phlegm-heat palpitations and epilepsy
Hematemesis, epistaxis, and uterine bleeding from heat

contraindications_zh: 寒痰咳嗽及胃寒呕吐者不宜。脾胃虚寒者慎用。凡与乌头类药物配伍仍应参照十八反慎用含竹沥之剂。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in cold-phlegm cough and stomach cold with vomiting. Use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold. When combining with aconite-type herbs, formulas containing zhu li should still be used with caution per the Eighteen Antagonisms.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–10g；止呕宜用姜汁炙；清热化痰宜生用。

processing_methods.name: 生竹茹
processing_methods.effect: 长于清热化痰、凉血

processing_methods.name: 姜竹茹
processing_methods.effect: 增强降逆止呕之功，用于胃热呕吐

safety_notes_zh: 性偏凉，不耐寒凉者及脾胃虚寒证不宜使用。鲜品与陈久者效力有异，临床宜辨。
safety_notes_en: Cool in nature; not suitable for those intolerant of cold or in spleen-stomach vacuity cold patterns. Fresh and aged products differ in potency; clinical differentiation is advisable.

classical_references.passage: 竹茹，甘微寒，主治呕啘，温气寒热，吐血崩中，溢筋。

description_zh: 禾本科植物青秆竹、大头典竹或淡竹的茎秆的干燥中间层。归肺、胃、心、胆经。功专清热化痰、除烦止呕，为治痰热咳嗽、胃热呕逆及胆郁痰扰之常用药，常与半夏、陈皮、枳实相配（温胆汤）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 竹茹含三萜类及酚酸类成分，具有抗炎、止吐、抗菌及轻度镇静作用，为清热化痰、除烦止呕的药理基础。
summary.en: Bamboo shavings contain triterpenes and phenolic acids with anti-inflammatory, antiemetic, antimicrobial and mild sedative effects, underlying their phlegm-clearing, vexation-resolving and antiemetic actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Cough and chest oppression from phlegm-heat

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 称竹茹清热化痰、除烦止呕，尤宜胃热呕逆。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Zhu Ru clears heat, transforms phlegm and stops vomiting, particularly in stomach-heat nausea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 介绍竹茹配伍半夏、陈皮（温胆汤）用于痰热扰心之失眠呕吐。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen describe Zhu Ru combined with Ban Xia and Chen Pi in Wen Dan Tang for insomnia and vomiting from phlegm-heat disturbing the heart.

description_en: The dried middle layer of the stem of Bambusa tuldoides, Sinocalamus beecheyanus, or Phyllostachys nigra var. henonis (Poaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, Heart, and Gallbladder channels. Sweet and cool, it clears heat and transforms phlegm, eliminates vexation and stops vomiting, and cools blood and calms the fetus. It is a key herb for phlegm-heat cough, Stomach-heat vomiting, and Gallbladder constraint with phlegm disturbance, commonly paired with ban xia, chen pi, and zhi shi in Wen Dan Tang.

actions.en: Drain the Lung and calm wheezing

indications.en: Cough and wheezing from Lung heat with yellow phlegm
Edema of the skin, face, and eyes
Dysuria with wind-water clashing (superficial edema)
Hemoptysis from Lung vacuity with heat
Hypertension with ascendant Liver yang

contraindications_zh: 肺虚无火，风寒咳嗽者忌用。脾虚便溏者慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in lung vacuity without fire and wind-cold cough. Use with caution in spleen vacuity with loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g；泻肺利水生用，肺虚咳嗽蜜炙用。

processing_methods.name: 生桑白皮
processing_methods.effect: 泻肺平喘、利水消肿之力较强

processing_methods.name: 蜜桑白皮
processing_methods.effect: 润肺止咳，减缓寒泻之性，宜于肺虚咳嗽

safety_notes_zh: 性寒泻肺，不宜长期大剂量服用以免伤肺气。外层粗皮须刮净后入药，以免刺激咽喉。
safety_notes_en: Cold in nature and drains the lung; not suitable for prolonged high-dose use to avoid damaging lung qi. The outer coarse bark must be scraped clean before medicinal use to avoid irritating the throat.

classical_references.passage: 桑根白皮，味甘寒。主伤中，五劳六极，羸瘦，崩中，脉绝，补虚益气。

description_zh: 桑科植物桑的干燥根皮。归肺经。甘寒入肺，既能泻肺火以平喘，又能通调水道以利水消肿，尤宜于肺热壅盛之咳喘及风水、皮水之浮肿，为《金匮要略》五皮饮、《小儿药证直诀》泻白散之主药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桑白皮含桑皮苷、桑根皮素类黄酮及降糖多肽（Moran A），现代研究显示其有平喘、利尿、降血糖及降血压作用，呼应传统泻肺平喘、利水消肿之功。
summary.en: Mulberry root bark contains stilbene glycosides (mulberroside A), prenylated flavonoids (sanggenons), and the hypoglycemic glycoprotein moran A, with preclinical data on bronchodilation, diuresis, blood-glucose lowering, and hypotensive effects that parallel its traditional lung-draining and edema-reducing use.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出桑白皮蜜炙可减其寒性，专用于肺热咳喘。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes honey-fried Sang Bai Pi tempers the cold nature and is preferred for lung-heat cough and wheezing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述桑白皮提取物具利尿与降压作用，与其传统利水消肿相合。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize diuretic and hypotensive effects of mulberry root bark extracts, matching its traditional water-regulating use.

description_en: The dried root bark of Morus alba (Moraceae). Enters the Lung channel. Sweet and cold, it drains Lung fire to calm wheezing and regulates the water passages to promote urination and reduce edema. It is particularly suited for Lung-heat congestion with cough and dyspnea, and for wind-water or skin-water edema. Featured as a primary herb in Wu Pi Yin and Xie Bai San.

actions.en: Moisten the Lung and direct qi downward
Warm and moisten without being drying
Diffuse the Lung and expel phlegm

indications.en: Cough with phlegm, whether cold or hot in nature
Acute or chronic cough with copious phlegm and counterflow qi
Consumptive cough from Lung vacuity with blood-streaked sputum
Cough and throat itch from wind-cold fettering the Lung
Whooping cough and paroxysmal cough

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、肺热咳血者慎用（需与清肺润燥药同用，不宜单用）。实热壅肺者不宜单用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with effulgent fire and lung heat with hemoptysis (should be combined with lung-clearing and dryness-moistening herbs, not suitable for sole use). Not suitable for sole use in repletion heat congesting the lung.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–10g；外感风寒生用，内伤肺虚蜜炙用。

processing_methods.name: 生紫菀
processing_methods.effect: 长于宣肺散邪，用于外感新咳

processing_methods.name: 蜜紫菀
processing_methods.effect: 增强润肺止咳之功，用于肺虚久咳

safety_notes_zh: 性质温润平和，寒热咳嗽皆可配伍，但单用力薄，常与款冬花相须为用。含微量吡咯里西啶生物碱，不宜长期大量服用。
safety_notes_en: Warm, moistening, and mild in nature; can be combined for both cold and heat coughs, but weak when used alone and often paired with kuan dong hua in mutual enhancement. Contains trace amounts of pyrrolizidine alkaloids; not suitable for prolonged high-dose use.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，温。主咳逆上气，胸中寒热结气，去蛊毒，痿蹶，安五脏。

description_zh: 菊科植物紫菀的干燥根及根茎。归肺经。味苦辛而性温润，温而不热，润而不腻，善开肺郁、化痰浊而止咳逆，为治一切咳嗽之要药，寒热虚实咸宜，常与款冬花相须为用（紫菀汤）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 紫菀含紫菀酮、三萜皂苷及紫菀环肽等成分，具有祛痰、镇咳、抗菌及抗肿瘤的药理活性，为润肺下气止咳的依据。
summary.en: Aster tataricus root contains shionone, triterpenoid saponins and astin cyclopeptides with expectorant, antitussive, antimicrobial and preclinical antitumor activities, underlying its lung-moistening and cough-stopping actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 外感风寒或内伤咳嗽有痰
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Productive cough from wind-cold or internal causes

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出紫菀性温润而不燥，寒热咳嗽皆可配伍使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Zi Wan is warming and moistening without being drying, suitable in both cold and hot cough patterns when properly combined.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以紫菀酮为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses shionone as the assay marker.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Aster tataricus (Asteraceae). Enters the Lung channel. Bitter, pungent, sweet, and warm, yet warm without being hot and moist without being cloying. It excels at opening Lung constraint, transforming phlegm-turbidity, and stopping cough and counterflow. Suitable for cough of any etiology—cold, heat, vacuity, or repletion—it is commonly paired with kuan dong hua in Zi Wan Tang.

actions.en: Moisten the Lung and direct qi downward
Warm the Lung and dissipate cold

indications.en: Acute or chronic cough with counterflow qi ascending
Cough and rapid breathing from wind-cold attacking the Lung
Consumptive cough with blood-tinged sputum
Wheezing asthma with copious phlegm
Chronic cough from Lung vacuity with throat itch and hoarseness

contraindications_zh: 阴虚燥咳、肺火壅盛之咳血者不宜单用。含吡咯里西啶生物碱，不宜久服。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for sole use in yin-deficient dry cough and hemoptysis from exuberant lung fire. Contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids; not suitable for prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–10g；内伤久咳宜蜜炙；外感咳嗽宜生用。

processing_methods.name: 生款冬花
processing_methods.effect: 宣肺解表力强，用于外感咳嗽

processing_methods.name: 蜜款冬花
processing_methods.effect: 润肺止咳之功增强，用于内伤久咳

safety_notes_zh: 含吡咯里西啶类生物碱（senkirkine 等），大剂量或久服对肝有潜在毒性，临床宜控制疗程与剂量。常与紫菀相须为用，一宣一降，相得益彰。
safety_notes_en: Contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids (senkirkine, etc.); high doses or prolonged use has potential hepatotoxicity; clinical use should control duration and dosage. Often paired with zi wan in mutual enhancement — one disperses and one descends, complementing each other.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主咳逆上气善喘，喉痹，诸惊痫，寒热邪气。

description_zh: 菊科植物款冬的干燥花蕾。归肺经。辛温润肺，止咳化痰，为治咳嗽要药，尤宜于风寒及虚寒咳嗽，凡咳无问寒热虚实皆可配伍应用，与紫菀相须配对（紫菀散、百花膏）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 吡咯里西啶生物碱（克氏千里光碱、千里光碱）

summary.zh: 款冬花含款冬酮、黄酮及吡咯里西啶生物碱，具止咳、祛痰、升压及抗炎作用。
summary.en: Tussilago contains tussilagone, flavonoids, and pyrrolizidine alkaloids with antitussive, expectorant, pressor, and anti-inflammatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 款冬酮具明显止咳和短暂升压作用，并呈现抗炎活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tussilagone produces notable antitussive and transient pressor effects and shows anti-inflammatory activity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 含肝毒性吡咯里西啶生物碱；孕妇、哺乳期及肝病患者禁用；不宜长期或大剂量使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Contains hepatotoxic pyrrolizidine alkaloids — contraindicated in pregnancy, lactation, and liver disease; avoid long-term or high-dose use.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以款冬酮含量（不少于 0.070%）为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies tussilagone (≥0.070%) as the quality marker.

description_en: The dried flower bud of Tussilago farfara (Asteraceae). Enters the Lung channel. Pungent, bitter, sweet, and warm, it moistens the Lung, directs qi downward, stops cough, and transforms phlegm. A key cough-stopping herb, especially suitable for wind-cold and vacuity-cold cough, it can be used for cough regardless of cold, heat, vacuity, or repletion with appropriate combinations. Classically paired with zi wan as in Zi Wan San and Bai Hua Gao.

actions.en: Nourish the Heart and supplement the Liver
Quiet the Heart and calm the spirit

indications.en: Insomnia and vexation due to Heart-Liver blood vacuity
Palpitations, fright, and excessive dreaming
Spontaneous or night sweats from constitutional vacuity
Thirst from damaged fluids
Menopausal hot flashes and insomnia

contraindications_zh: 有实邪郁火及患有滑泄症者慎服。凡肝胆实热、肝阳上亢之不寐不宜单用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in repletion pathogens with suppressed fire and in slippery diarrhea. Not suitable for sole use in insomnia from liver-gallbladder repletion heat and liver yang hyperactivity.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服10–15g；研末吞服每次1.5–3g；大剂量可用至30g。打碎入煎效佳。

processing_methods.name: 生酸枣仁
processing_methods.effect: 养肝宁心、敛汗止汗

processing_methods.name: 炒酸枣仁
processing_methods.effect: 香气醒脾，安神作用增强，多用于虚烦不眠

safety_notes_zh: 炒用与生用皆可安神，历代多用炒品。过量（>30g）或可致嗜睡、乏力。与镇静催眠类药物合用需注意相加效应。
safety_notes_en: Both fried and raw forms can calm the spirit; historically, the fried form is more commonly used. Excessive doses (>30g) may cause drowsiness and fatigue. When combining with sedative-hypnotic medications, be aware of additive effects.

classical_references.passage: 味酸，平。主心腹寒热，邪结气聚，四肢酸疼，湿痹。久服安五脏，轻身延年。

description_zh: 鼠李科植物酸枣的干燥成熟种子。归心、肝、胆经。甘酸质润，入心、肝经而养血安神，为治虚烦不眠之要药，《金匮要略》酸枣仁汤即以之为君，配知母、川芎、茯苓、甘草治肝血不足、虚烦不得眠。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 酸枣仁主含皂苷类（酸枣仁皂苷A/B）和黄酮类（斯皮诺素），具有镇静催眠、抗焦虑及心脏保护作用。
summary.en: Zizyphus seed contains jujubosides A/B and the flavone spinosin, with sedative-hypnotic, anxiolytic and cardioprotective activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Vexation and sleeplessness from heart-yin vacuity

evidence_notes.note_zh: 养心安神、敛汗生津，为酸枣仁汤君药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Nourishes the heart, calms spirit, and restrains sweating; sovereign herb of Suan Zao Ren Tang.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 多项小样本临床试验支持酸枣仁提取物改善睡眠质量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Multiple small clinical trials support Zizyphus extract for improving sleep quality.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以斯皮诺素为含量测定指标，不得少于0.080%。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses spinosin as the assay marker, requiring not less than 0.080%.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Ziziphus jujuba var. spinosa (Rhamnaceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, and Gallbladder channels. Sweet, sour, and neutral, its sweet-sour and moist qualities nourish Heart blood and Liver yin, making it the premier herb for vacuity-vexation insomnia. Zhang Zhongjing's Suan Zao Ren Tang uses it as chief with zhi mu, chuan xiong, fu ling, and gan cao for Liver-blood insufficiency with inability to sleep.

actions.en: Nourish the Heart and calm the spirit
Moisten the intestines and unblock the bowels

indications.en: Insomnia and vexation due to Heart blood vacuity
Palpitations, fright throbbing, and forgetfulness
Night sweats from yin vacuity

indications.zh: 肠燥便秘，老人产后便秘
indications.en: Constipation from intestinal dryness, especially in the elderly or postpartum
Childhood fright epilepsy

contraindications_zh: 便溏及痰多者不宜。脾虚湿盛者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in loose stools and copious phlegm. Use with caution in spleen vacuity with dampness repletion.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；大便溏者用柏子仁霜（去油）以防滑泻。

processing_methods.name: 生柏子仁
processing_methods.effect: 养心安神、润肠通便并重

processing_methods.name: 柏子仁霜
processing_methods.effect: 减其滑润之性，用于便溏而需安神者

safety_notes_zh: 含脂肪油较多，滑肠作用明显，脾虚便溏者宜用霜品。久置易走油变质，当藏之阴凉干燥处。
safety_notes_en: Contains significant fatty oils with notable intestinal-lubricating effects; in spleen vacuity with loose stools, the defatted (shuang) form is preferred. Deteriorates easily with oil rancidity over time; store in a cool, dry place.

classical_references.passage: 柏实，味甘，平。主惊悸，安五脏，益气，除风湿痹。久服令人润泽美色，耳目聪明，不饥不老，轻身延年。

description_zh: 柏科植物侧柏的干燥成熟种仁。归心、肾、大肠经。甘平质润，养心血以安心神，润肠燥以通便秘，尤宜于心血亏虚之虚烦不眠、惊悸健忘，常与酸枣仁相配（天王补心丹、柏子养心丸）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 柏子仁富含脂肪油、皂苷及挥发油，具有润肠通便、镇静安神作用；动物实验显示其提取物可延长戊巴比妥睡眠时间。
summary.en: Platycladi Semen is rich in fatty oil, saponins, and volatile components, with emollient laxative and mild sedative/hypnotic effects; extracts prolong pentobarbital-induced sleep in animal studies.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 心阴血不足型失眠、心悸
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Insomnia and palpitations from heart yin/blood vacuity

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 老年及产后津亏肠燥便秘
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Constipation from fluid vacuity in elderly and postpartum

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载柏子仁用于心血不足之心悸失眠及肠燥便秘，常与酸枣仁、当归同用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky documents use for insomnia/palpitations from heart blood vacuity and dry-intestine constipation, typically paired with suan zao ren and dang gui.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学提到柏子仁油脂含量较高，大便溏泄者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen caution against use in patients with loose stools due to the high fatty-oil content.

description_en: The dried ripe seed kernel of Platycladus orientalis (Cupressaceae). Enters the Heart, Kidney, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet, neutral, and moist, it nourishes Heart blood to calm the spirit and moistens intestinal dryness to unblock the bowels. It is particularly suited for Heart-blood vacuity with vacuity-vexation insomnia, palpitations, and forgetfulness. Commonly paired with suan zao ren in Tian Wang Bu Xin Dan and Bai Zi Yang Xin Wan.

actions.en: Calm the spirit and benefit intellect
Expel phlegm and open the orifices
Disperse and reduce abscesses and swellings

indications.en: Insomnia with dream-disturbed sleep from Heart-Kidney disharmony
Palpitations, fright throbbing, and forgetfulness
Epilepsy and mania from phlegm obstructing the Heart orifices
Cough with copious sticky phlegm difficult to expectorate
Abscesses, sores, and breast swelling with pain

contraindications_zh: 凡实热、阴虚火旺者，及有胃炎、胃溃疡者慎服。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in repletion heat, yin vacuity with effulgent fire, and in gastritis and peptic ulcer. Use with caution during pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；研末服1–3g；制用较为常见以缓其对胃黏膜的刺激。

processing_methods.name: 生远志
processing_methods.effect: 祛痰开窍、消痈散肿力强

processing_methods.name: 制远志
processing_methods.effect: 缓和燥性与对胃的刺激，长于安神益智

safety_notes_zh: 含远志皂苷，对胃黏膜有刺激，可引起恶心呕吐，故多用制品。不宜空腹大剂量服用。大剂量可引起溶血及反射性增加支气管腺体分泌。
safety_notes_en: Contains polygala saponins that irritate the gastric mucosa and may cause nausea and vomiting; hence processed products are mostly used. Not suitable for large doses on an empty stomach. High doses may cause hemolysis and reflexively increase bronchial gland secretion.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，温。主咳逆伤中，补不足，除邪气，利九窍，益智慧，耳目聪明，不忘，强志，倍力。

description_zh: 远志科植物远志或卵叶远志的干燥根。归心、肾、肺经。辛苦性温，入心肾以交通心肾而安神益智，入肺以祛痰开窍而治咳喘癫痫，为交通心肾、安神定志之要药，《千金方》定志丸、《医学心悟》安神定志丸皆用之。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 远志主含三萜皂苷（远志皂苷、细叶远志皂苷），具有镇静安神、改善学习记忆、祛痰及抗抑郁作用；但皂苷对胃黏膜有刺激性，胃炎、溃疡者慎用。
summary.en: Polygala root contains triterpenoid saponins (onjisaponins, tenuifolin) with sedative, cognition-enhancing, expectorant and antidepressant effects; saponins are gastric irritants, so caution is needed in gastritis or ulcer patients.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Insomnia and forgetfulness from lack of heart-kidney communication
Disordered consciousness from phlegm obstructing the heart orifices

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出远志兼通心肾、化痰开窍，为健忘失眠要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Yuan Zhi connects heart and kidney and transforms phlegm, a key herb for forgetfulness and insomnia.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述动物实验证实远志皂苷改善学习记忆，相关成分开发为保健品。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite animal studies confirming memory-enhancing effects of onjisaponins, with related compounds developed into supplements.

description_en: The dried root of Polygala tenuifolia or P. sibirica (Polygalaceae). Enters the Heart, Kidney, and Lung channels. Bitter, pungent, and warm, it enters the Heart and Kidney to facilitate Heart-Kidney communication and calm the spirit while sharpening intellect, and enters the Lung to expel phlegm and open the orifices. Featured in Ding Zhi Wan and An Shen Ding Zhi Wan as the key herb for communicating Heart and Kidney and stabilizing the mind.

actions.en: Settle fright and calm the spirit
Pacify the Liver and subdue yang

indications.en: Restlessness of spirit with palpitations and insomnia
Fright epilepsy, mania, and withdrawal
Ascendant Liver yang with dizziness and vertigo
Seminal emission, uterine bleeding, and vaginal discharge
Spontaneous and night sweats
Chronic non-healing sores (topical)

contraindications_zh: 湿热积滞者不宜。有实邪者慎用。质重碍胃，脾胃虚弱者久服宜配健脾和胃之品。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in damp-heat accumulation. Use with caution in repletion pathogens. Heavy in quality and may impede the stomach; for prolonged use in spleen and stomach vacuity, combine with spleen-strengthening and stomach-harmonizing herbs.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服15–30g，宜打碎先煎；外用适量，研末撒或调敷。镇惊安神宜生用，收敛固涩宜煅用。

processing_methods.name: 生龙骨
processing_methods.effect: 长于镇惊安神、平肝潜阳

processing_methods.name: 煅龙骨
processing_methods.effect: 收敛固涩作用增强，多用于滑脱诸证及外用敛疮

safety_notes_zh: 矿物类药，质重难化，宜打碎先煎；久服宜适度配伍健脾和胃之品。煅品慎用于外疡脓液未净之创面以防留邪。现代野外采集龙骨属化石类资源，临床亦可以煅牡蛎部分替代。
safety_notes_en: A mineral herb, heavy and difficult to dissolve; should be crushed and decocted first; for prolonged use, moderately combine with spleen-strengthening and stomach-harmonizing herbs. The calcined form should be used with caution on wound surfaces where pus from external sores has not been fully drained, to prevent trapping pathogens. Modern field-collected long gu is a fossil resource; clinically, calcined mu li can partially substitute.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主心腹鬼注，精物老魅，咳逆，泄利脓血，女子漏下，癥瘕坚结，小儿热气惊痫。

description_zh: 古代哺乳动物如象类、犀牛类、三趾马等骨骼的化石。归心、肝、肾经。质重性涩，重可镇怯，涩能固脱，既能重镇安神以治惊悸失眠、癫狂，又能平肝潜阳以治眩晕，兼收敛固涩以治滑脱诸证，常与牡蛎相须为用（桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 龙骨为古脊椎动物化石，主含碳酸钙和磷酸钙，具镇静、中和胃酸、收敛及止血作用。
summary.en: Dragon bone (fossilized vertebrate bone) consists chiefly of calcium carbonate and phosphate, providing sedative, antacid, astringent, and hemostatic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 胃酸过多及胃溃疡辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 龙骨质重镇心安神、平肝潜阳、收敛固涩，生用与煅用各有偏重。
evidence_notes.note_en: Heavy and settling — calms the spirit, anchors liver yang, and astringes; raw vs calcined forms have different emphases.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 钙盐中和胃酸并具收敛作用；煅龙骨外用可收敛生肌。
evidence_notes.note_en: Calcium salts neutralize gastric acid and have astringent effects; calcined form applied topically promotes healing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以外观性状和重金属限量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia relies on macroscopic identification and heavy-metal limits for quality control.

description_en: Fossilized bones of ancient vertebrates including elephants, rhinoceroses, and horses. Enters the Heart, Liver, and Kidney channels. Sweet, astringent, and neutral, its heavy quality settles fright while its astringent quality secures leakage. It heavily settles the spirit for palpitations, insomnia, and mania; pacifies Liver yang for dizziness; and astringes to secure for seminal emission, sweating, and other discharge patterns. Classically paired with mu li in Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and subdue yang

indications.en: Restlessness with palpitations and insomnia
Ascendant Liver yang with dizziness and tinnitus
Phlegm nodules, scrofula, goiter, and abdominal masses
Sweating, seminal emission, uterine bleeding, and vaginal discharge
Epigastric pain with acid regurgitation

contraindications_zh: 虚而有寒、肾虚无火、精寒自出者忌用。质重碍胃，脾胃虚弱者久服宜配健脾和胃之品。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in vacuity with cold, kidney vacuity without fire, and spontaneous seminal emission from cold essence. Heavy in quality and may impede the stomach; for prolonged use in spleen and stomach vacuity, combine with spleen-strengthening and stomach-harmonizing herbs.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服15–30g，宜打碎先煎；制酸止痛宜煅用研末冲服每次1–3g。

processing_methods.name: 生牡蛎
processing_methods.effect: 长于平肝潜阳、软坚散结

processing_methods.name: 煅牡蛎
processing_methods.effect: 收敛固涩与制酸止痛作用增强

safety_notes_zh: 海洋贝壳类矿物药，含碳酸钙，长期大量服用宜监测胃肠功能及钙代谢。过敏体质者少数可见海产品过敏反应。
safety_notes_en: A marine shell mineral herb containing calcium carbonate; long-term high-dose use should include monitoring of gastrointestinal function and calcium metabolism. Those with allergic constitution may occasionally experience seafood allergy reactions.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，平。主伤寒寒热，温疟洒洒，惊恚怒气，除拘缓鼠瘘，女子带下赤白。久服强骨节，杀邪鬼，延年。

description_zh: 牡蛎科动物长牡蛎、大连湾牡蛎或近江牡蛎的贝壳。归肝、胆、肾经。咸寒质重，既能重镇安神以治惊悸失眠，又能平肝潜阳以治眩晕耳鸣，兼软坚散结、收敛固涩，与龙骨相须为用，为仲景桂枝加龙骨牡蛎汤、柴胡加龙骨牡蛎汤之主药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 微量氨基酸与贝壳硬蛋白

summary.zh: 牡蛎壳主含碳酸钙及微量元素，具中和胃酸、镇静安神、软坚散结及收敛固涩作用。
summary.en: Oyster shell is chiefly calcium carbonate with trace minerals, providing antacid, sedative, soften-hardness, and astringent effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 胃酸过多与消化性溃疡
甲状腺肿和淋巴结核（软坚散结）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 碳酸钙中和胃酸并具吸附收敛作用；煅牡蛎钙溶解度高。
evidence_notes.note_en: Calcium carbonate neutralizes gastric acid and has adsorbent-astringent action; calcined oyster shell has higher calcium solubility.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 牡蛎平肝潜阳、重镇安神、软坚散结，煅用敛汗涩精。
evidence_notes.note_en: Anchors liver yang, calms spirit, softens hardness; calcined form astringes sweat and essence.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 与四环素、喹诺酮等药物同服可降低吸收，应间隔 2 小时。
evidence_notes.note_en: Calcium may reduce absorption of tetracyclines and fluoroquinolones — separate dosing by at least 2 hours.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以碳酸钙含量（不少于 94.0%）为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies calcium carbonate content (≥94.0%) as the quality marker.

description_en: The shell of Crassostrea gigas, C. talienwhanensis, or C. rivularis (Ostreidae). Enters the Liver, Gallbladder, and Kidney channels. Salty and cool, its heavy quality settles the spirit for palpitations and insomnia, pacifies Liver yang for dizziness and tinnitus, softens hardness and dissipates nodules for scrofula and goiter, and astringes to secure for sweating, emission, and leukorrhea. Classically paired with long gu in Gui Zhi Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang and Chai Hu Jia Long Gu Mu Li Tang.

actions.en: Open the orifices and flush phlegm
Awaken the spirit and benefit intellect
Transform damp and harmonize the stomach

indications.en: Clouded consciousness from phlegm veiling the orifices
Epilepsy, palpitations, forgetfulness, and insomnia
Damp obstruction in the middle jiao with focal distention and poor appetite
Lockjaw dysentery with inability to eat
Tinnitus, deafness, dizziness, and forgetfulness

contraindications_zh: 阴虚阳亢、烦躁汗多、咳嗽吐血、滑精者慎服。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with yang hyperactivity, restlessness with excessive sweating, cough with hemoptysis, and seminal efflux.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；鲜品加倍。研末入丸散，每次1–2g。

processing_methods.name: 生石菖蒲
processing_methods.effect: 开窍醒神、化湿辟秽力强

processing_methods.name: 鲜石菖蒲
processing_methods.effect: 开窍化痰之力尤胜，用于急症神昏

safety_notes_zh: 含β-细辛醚等挥发油成分，大剂量或久服对肝脏及神经系统有潜在毒性，不宜长期超量服用。孕妇慎用。不宜与镇静类西药合用以防相加作用。
safety_notes_en: Contains beta-asarone and other volatile oil components; high doses or prolonged use has potential toxicity to the liver and nervous system; prolonged excessive use should be avoided. Use with caution during pregnancy. Should not be combined with sedative Western medications to prevent additive effects.

classical_references.passage: 菖蒲，味辛，温。主风寒湿痹，咳逆上气，开心孔，补五脏，通九窍，明耳目，出音声。久服轻身，不忘，不迷惑，延年。

description_zh: 天南星科植物石菖蒲的干燥根茎。归心、胃经。辛香苦温，芳香走窜，既能开心窍、豁痰浊以治神昏癫痫，又能化湿浊、醒脾胃以治湿阻中焦，为开窍宁神、化湿和胃之要药，常与远志、茯苓相配（开心散、安神定志丸）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 石菖蒲主含挥发油（β-细辛醚、α-细辛醚），具有镇静抗惊、改善记忆及抗抑郁的中枢作用。
summary.en: Acorus rhizome contains essential oils (alpha- and beta-asarone) with sedative, anticonvulsant, cognition-enhancing and antidepressant-like central actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Forgetfulness and phlegm-clouding of the orifices

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 癫痫风痰阻窍辅助治疗

evidence_notes.note_zh: 开窍豁痰、醒神益智、化湿开胃，主治痰蒙心窍之神志不清。
evidence_notes.note_en: Opens the orifices, transforms phlegm, and awakens the spirit; principal for phlegm-clouded consciousness.

evidence_notes.note_zh: β-细辛醚被报告有潜在基因毒性和肝毒性，长期高剂量使用应注意。
evidence_notes.note_en: Beta-asarone has been reported as potentially genotoxic and hepatotoxic; caution with long-term high dosing.

description_en: The dried rhizome of Acorus tatarinowii (Araceae). Enters the Heart and Stomach channels. Pungent, bitter, and warm, its aromatic and penetrating nature opens the Heart orifices, expels phlegm-turbidity for spirit clouding and epilepsy, and transforms dampness-turbidity to awaken the Spleen for dampness obstructing the middle burner. A key herb for opening orifices and calming the spirit, commonly paired with yuan zhi and fu ling in Kai Xin San and An Shen Ding Zhi Wan.

actions.en: Dispel wind and unblock the collaterals

indications.en: Internal Liver wind with convulsions and epileptic seizures
Liver yang ascending with headache and dizziness
Wind-phlegm disturbing the head causing dizziness and headache

indications.zh: 中风手足不遂，肢体麻木
indications.en: Wind-stroke with hemiplegia and limb numbness

indications.zh: 风湿痹痛，关节屈伸不利
indications.en: Wind-damp painful obstruction with restricted joint movement

contraindications_zh: 气血虚甚者慎用。津液衰少、血虚、阴虚者，非真有风邪者勿用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in severe qi and blood vacuity. In fluid depletion, blood vacuity, and yin vacuity, do not use unless there is true wind pathogen.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；研末冲服每次1–1.5g。本品久煎或后下均可，无毒峻之虞。

processing_methods.name: 生天麻
processing_methods.effect: 息风止痉，平肝潜阳之力较强

processing_methods.name: 煨天麻
processing_methods.effect: 缓和药性，增强祛风通络之效

safety_notes_zh: 本品药性平和，无毒。但血虚、阴虚而无风邪者慎用，以免助燥伤阴。现代研究偶见过敏反应，应注意观察。
safety_notes_en: This herb is mild in nature and nontoxic. However, use with caution in blood vacuity and yin vacuity without wind pathogen, to avoid promoting dryness and damaging yin. Modern research shows occasional allergic reactions; observation is advised.

classical_references.passage: 赤箭，味辛，温。主杀鬼精物、蛊毒、恶气。久服益气力，长阴肥健，轻身增年。一名离母，一名鬼督邮。

description_zh: 兰科植物天麻的干燥块茎。归肝经。本品甘平柔润，专入肝经，既能平肝息风以治内风诸证，又能祛外风通经络。古称赤箭，《神农本草经》列为上品；李时珍《本草纲目》始定名天麻。为治眩晕头痛、肝风抽搐之要药，无论寒热虚实皆可配伍应用。
description_en: The dried tuber of Gastrodia elata (Orchidaceae). Enters the Liver channel. Sweet and neutral, it both extinguishes internal wind and dispels external wind, making it a key herb for dizziness, headache, convulsions, and wind-stroke regardless of cold/heat or vacuity/repletion presentation.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 天麻主含天麻素及其苷元对羟基苄醇，具有抗惊厥、镇静、改善脑循环及神经保护作用。
summary.en: Gastrodia rhizome contains gastrodin and its aglycone 4-hydroxybenzyl alcohol, with anticonvulsant, sedative, cerebral circulation-enhancing and neuroprotective effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 眩晕头痛（尤其椎-基底动脉供血不足）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Vertigo and headache, including vertebrobasilar insufficiency

evidence_notes.note_zh: 平肝熄风、止痉通络，主治肝风内动之眩晕、抽搐、头痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Calms Liver wind, arrests convulsions, and unblocks channels; principal for Liver-wind vertigo, convulsions and headache.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 天麻素注射液及口服制剂在中国广泛用于眩晕和头痛，有临床研究支持。
evidence_notes.note_en: Gastrodin injection and oral preparations are widely used in China for vertigo and headache with supporting clinical studies.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以天麻素和对羟基苄醇总量（不得少于0.25%）为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia requires the combined content of gastrodin plus 4-hydroxybenzyl alcohol to be not less than 0.25%.

actions.en: Clear heat and pacify the Liver
Cool the Liver and calm fright
Relax sinews and free the collaterals

indications.en: Stirring of Liver wind with convulsions and seizures
Acute childhood convulsions with high fever
Liver yang ascendant with headache and dizziness
Liver fire flaring upward with throbbing headache
Eclampsia of pregnancy and restless fetus

contraindications_zh: 无实热及肝阳上亢者不宜使用；脾胃虚寒者慎用。气血虚而非有热者忌用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable when there is no repletion heat or liver yang hyperactivity; use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold. Contraindicated in qi and blood vacuity without heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–12g；不宜久煎，应后下，煎煮时间不超过20分钟，以免有效成分（钩藤碱）破坏而降低降压息风之效。

processing_methods.name: 生钩藤
processing_methods.method: 拣净杂质，剪去残茎，干燥
processing_methods.effect: 息风止痉，清热平肝，多生用后下

safety_notes_zh: 本品所含钩藤碱久煎易破坏，故必须后下。降压作用明确，与降压药并用应监测血压，避免低血压。无明显毒性，但脾胃虚寒者过量可致便溏。
safety_notes_en: The rhynchophylline alkaloids in this herb are easily destroyed by prolonged decoction; therefore it must be added near the end. Has definite blood pressure-lowering effects; when used with antihypertensive medications, blood pressure should be monitored to avoid hypotension. No significant toxicity, but excessive use in spleen-stomach vacuity cold may cause loose stools.

classical_references.passage: 钩藤，微寒，无毒。主小儿寒热，十二惊痫。
classical_references.source_chapter: 《名医别录》（陶弘景辑录），钩藤始见于此书。

description_zh: 茜草科植物钩藤、大叶钩藤、毛钩藤、华钩藤或无柄果钩藤的干燥带钩茎枝。归肝、心包经。本品甘凉，清轻透达，既清肝热以平肝阳，又息肝风以止惊搐，为治疗肝热生风、热极动风之要药。常与天麻相须为用，是天麻钩藤饮、羚角钩藤汤之主药。
description_en: The dried hook-bearing stem of Uncaria rhynchophylla and related species (Rubiaceae). Enters the Liver and Pericardium channels. Sweet and cool, it clears Liver heat, pacifies Liver yang, and extinguishes Liver wind, making it a key herb for childhood convulsions, hypertension, and wind-stirring patterns. Commonly paired with tian ma in Tian Ma Gou Teng Yin and Ling Jiao Gou Teng Tang.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 钩藤主含吲哚类生物碱（钩藤碱、异钩藤碱、毛钩藤碱），药理证实其降压、镇静、抗惊厥、神经保护及钙拮抗作用。
summary.en: Gouteng contains indole alkaloids (rhynchophylline, isorhynchophylline, hirsutine); pharmacology confirms antihypertensive, sedative, anticonvulsant, neuroprotective and calcium-antagonist actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 血管性痴呆、帕金森病神经保护

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以钩藤碱与异钩藤碱作为含量测定指标；久煎可破坏有效成分，入药宜后下。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses rhynchophylline and isorhynchophylline as assay markers; prolonged boiling destroys actives—add near end of decoction.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 天麻钩藤饮为经典平肝熄风方，广泛用于高血压与头痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tianma Gouteng Yin is a classical liver-calming wind-extinguishing formula widely used for hypertension and headache.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 无实热、肝火、肝风者慎用；无毒性报告。
evidence_notes.note_en: Use cautiously without heat or wind signs; generally low toxicity.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and subdue ascendant yang
Heavily settle and direct rebellious qi downward
Direct Stomach qi downward and stop vomiting

indications.en: Liver yang ascending with dizziness and vertigo
Rebellious qi with wheezing, vomiting, and hiccup
Frequent belching from upward-rebelling Stomach qi
Reckless movement of hot blood with hematemesis and epistaxis
Uterine flooding and spotting

contraindications_zh: 孕妇慎用。中气不足、下元虚寒者忌用。本品质重，脾胃虚弱者不宜久服。所含微量铅、砷，故不宜过量长期服用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution during pregnancy. Contraindicated in middle qi insufficiency and lower origin vacuity cold. This herb is heavy; not suitable for prolonged use in spleen and stomach vacuity. Contains trace amounts of lead and arsenic; therefore not suitable for excessive or prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–30g，宜打碎先煎30分钟以上，便于有效成分析出；入丸散每次1–3g。降逆平肝宜生用，止血宜煅用。

processing_methods.name: 生代赭石
processing_methods.effect: 平肝潜阳，重镇降逆之力较强

processing_methods.name: 煅代赭石
processing_methods.effect: 增强收敛止血之功，便于粉碎入药

safety_notes_zh: 本品为氧化铁矿物，含微量铅、砷等重金属，孕妇慎用，不宜长期大量服用，以防蓄积中毒。质重沉降，中气虚弱、脾胃虚寒者慎用。必须先煎以利有效成分析出。
safety_notes_en: This herb is an iron oxide mineral containing trace amounts of lead, arsenic, and other heavy metals; use with caution during pregnancy; not suitable for prolonged high-dose use to prevent cumulative poisoning. Heavy with a sinking nature; use with caution in middle qi weakness and spleen-stomach vacuity cold. Must be decocted first to facilitate the release of active constituents.

classical_references.passage: 代赭，味苦，寒。主鬼注、贼风、蛊毒，杀精物恶鬼，腹中毒邪气，女子赤沃漏下。

description_zh: 氧化物类矿物刚玉族赤铁矿的矿石。归肝、心、肺、胃经。本品味苦性寒，质重沉降，为重镇降逆之要药。既能平肝潜阳以治眩晕，又能降胃止呕、降肺平喘，更能凉血止血。张锡纯《医学衷中参西录》尤善用之，配旋覆花为旋覆代赭汤之主药。
description_en: Hematite ore (iron oxide mineral). Enters the Liver, Heart, Lung, and Stomach channels. Bitter, cold, and heavy, it is the principal heavy-settling herb for descending rebellious qi: it pacifies Liver yang, stops vomiting and hiccup, calms wheezing, and cools blood to stop bleeding. A key ingredient in Xuan Fu Dai Zhe Tang.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 代赭石为天然赤铁矿，主含三氧化二铁，现代药理示其具镇静、抗胃酸与轻度补铁作用；煎液含少量可溶性铁与微量元素。
summary.en: Daizheshi is natural hematite composed mainly of ferric oxide; modern studies show sedative, gastric acid neutralizing and mild iron-supplementing effects, with small amounts of soluble iron and trace elements entering decoction.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 眩晕、肝阳上亢型高血压辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定代赭石以三氧化二铁（Fe2O3）含量计不得少于 45.0%，宜先煎。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia requires Fe2O3 content of not less than 45.0%; decoct first.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 本草传统认为其重镇降逆、平肝潜阳，现代应用包括镇吐与止呃。
evidence_notes.note_en: Classically heavy and descending, used to subdue rebellious qi and anchor liver yang; modern use includes antiemetic and antihiccup roles.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 因含微量砷、铅等杂质，长期大剂量应慎用，孕妇忌服。
evidence_notes.note_en: May contain trace arsenic or lead impurities; avoid long-term high doses and contraindicated in pregnancy.

actions.en: Unblock the collaterals and alleviate pain
Search out wind and scour the collaterals

indications.en: Internal Liver wind with seizures and convulsions

indications.zh: 中风口眼歪斜，半身不遂
indications.en: Wind-stroke with facial deviation and hemiplegia
Tetanus with opisthotonos
Stubborn migraines and chronic headache
Stubborn wind-damp painful obstruction with joint pain
Sores, scrofula, and phlegm-toxin nodules

contraindications_zh: 本品有毒，孕妇禁用。血虚生风者慎用。不宜过量服用，以防中毒。心肝血虚而无风者忌用。
contraindications_en: This herb is toxic; contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution in blood vacuity generating wind. Should not be taken in repletion to prevent poisoning. Contraindicated in heart-liver blood vacuity without wind.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–6g；研末冲服，每次0.6–1g，宜入丸散；外用适量。本品有毒，剂量不可过大，应严格控制。

processing_methods.name: 全蝎
processing_methods.method: 春末至秋初捕捉，洗净，置沸盐水中煮至全身僵硬，捞出，置阴凉处干燥
processing_methods.effect: 降低毒性，便于贮藏与配伍

safety_notes_zh: 本品含蝎毒素（类神经毒），有毒，过量可致呼吸麻痹、抽搐、血压升高甚至死亡。必须严格控制剂量，不宜久服。孕妇禁用。儿童及肝肾功能不全者慎用。研末服用更要严控用量。
safety_notes_en: This herb contains scorpion venom (a neurotoxin-type substance); it is toxic, and overdose may cause respiratory paralysis, convulsions, elevated blood pressure, and even death. Dosage must be strictly controlled; not suitable for prolonged use. Contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution in children and those with hepatic or renal insufficiency. When taken as powder, dosage control must be even stricter.

classical_references.passage: 蝎，味甘辛，有毒。主诸风瘾疹及中风半身不遂，口眼喎斜，语涩，手足抽掣。
classical_references.source_chapter: 《开宝本草》（开宝六年973），全蝎入药始载于此。

description_zh: 钳蝎科动物东亚钳蝎的干燥体。归肝经。本品辛平有毒，专入肝经，善搜风通络、息风止痉，为治痉挛抽搐之要药。无论外风内风，新病久病，皆可应用。常与蜈蚣相须为用，组成止痉散。其攻毒散结之力，又可治疮疡瘰疬、顽固头痛。
description_en: The dried body of Buthus martensii (scorpion). Enters the Liver channel. Pungent, neutral, and toxic, it specifically enters the Liver to extinguish wind, stop convulsions, and search out wind from the collaterals. A primary herb for spasms whether from external or internal wind, acute or chronic. Commonly paired with wu gong (centipede) in Zhi Jing San.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: heat-labile; whole dried animal used in TCM

summary.zh: 全蝎为东亚钳蝎干燥体，主含神经毒性多肽，现代研究显示抗癫痫、抗肿瘤及镇痛的临床前活性，但毒性明显，须严格控制剂量。
summary.en: Whole scorpion (Buthus martensii) contains a mixture of neurotoxic peptides with preclinical antiepileptic, antitumor, and analgesic activity; toxicity is notable and dosing must be strictly controlled.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 中风后半身不遂、顽固性头痛
神经病理性疼痛（临床前）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载全蝎有毒，常用量仅 1–3 g（入煎剂），散剂更小；过量可致呼吸麻痹、溶血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky lists whole scorpion as toxic, usual decoction dose only 1–3 g (powder smaller); overdose can cause respiratory paralysis and hemolysis.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述蝎毒肽类对癫痫动物模型有效，但治疗窗窄，孕妇及血虚生风者禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize efficacy of scorpion toxin peptides in animal models of epilepsy, with a narrow therapeutic window; contraindicated in pregnancy and blood-vacuity wind.

actions.en: Unblock the collaterals and relieve pain
Search out wind and free painful obstruction

indications.en: Internal Liver wind with seizures and convulsions
Acute and chronic childhood convulsions

indications.zh: 破伤风证，痉挛角弓反张
indications.en: Tetanus with opisthotonos and rigidity

indications.zh: 中风口眼歪斜，半身不遂
indications.en: Wind-stroke with facial paralysis and hemiplegia
Stubborn wind-damp painful obstruction

indications.zh: 疮疡肿毒，瘰疬结核，毒蛇咬伤
indications.en: Sores, scrofula, tubercular lesions, and snakebite

contraindications_zh: 本品有毒，孕妇禁用。血虚生风者及阴虚血燥者慎用。不可过量。
contraindications_en: This herb is toxic; contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution in blood vacuity generating wind and yin vacuity with blood dryness. Do not exceed the proper dosage.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–5g（约1–3条）；研末冲服，每次0.6–1g。外用适量，研末调敷。本品有毒，应严格控制剂量。

processing_methods.name: 蜈蚣
processing_methods.method: 春夏捕捉，竹片插入头尾，绷直晒干或烘干
processing_methods.effect: 便于贮藏，去除部分毒性

safety_notes_zh: 本品含组胺样物质及溶血蛋白质，有毒。过量可致溶血、过敏、肝肾损害。孕妇禁用。心肝血虚者慎用。临床使用应严格控制剂量，不可久服。研末服用更须谨慎。
safety_notes_en: This herb contains histamine-like substances and hemolytic proteins; it is toxic. Overdose may cause hemolysis, allergic reactions, and liver-kidney damage. Contraindicated during pregnancy. Use with caution in heart-liver blood vacuity. Clinical use must strictly control dosage; not suitable for prolonged use. Even greater caution is needed when taken as powder.

classical_references.passage: 蜈蚣，味辛，温。主鬼注蛊毒，啖诸蛇虫鱼毒，杀鬼物老精温疟，去三虫。

description_zh: 蜈蚣科动物少棘巨蜈蚣的干燥体。归肝经。本品辛温有毒，性善走窜，搜风通络之力甚强，与全蝎相须为用，为治疗痉挛抽搐、顽固头痛、风湿顽痹之常用药对（止痉散）。又能攻毒散结，治瘰疬、毒蛇咬伤。
description_en: The dried body of Scolopendra subspinipes (centipede). Enters the Liver channel. Pungent, warm, and toxic, it is strongly mobilizing and excels at searching out wind and unblocking the collaterals. Often paired with quan xie (scorpion) in Zhi Jing San for convulsions, stubborn headaches, and wind-damp impediment. Also attacks toxin to treat scrofula and snakebite.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 蜈蚣为整体虫类药，含组胺样物质及多种蛋白毒素，具有抗惊、镇痛、抗肿瘤研究等活性，有毒性需控制剂量。
summary.en: Scolopendra (whole centipede) contains histamine-like toxins and venom peptides, with anticonvulsant, analgesic and investigational antitumor effects; it is toxic and requires dose control.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肝风抽搐、破伤风、小儿惊风
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Liver-wind convulsions, tetanus and childhood convulsions
Intractable headache and wind-damp painful obstruction

evidence_notes.note_zh: 有毒品种，祛风止痉、通络止痛、攻毒散结；孕妇禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Toxic substance; extinguishes wind, arrests spasm, unblocks collaterals and resolves toxic accumulations; contraindicated in pregnancy.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》列为毒性中药，规定用量通常3–5g，研末吞服0.6–1g。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists it as a toxic medicinal, with typical dosage of 3–5 g, or 0.6–1 g powdered.

actions.en: Resolve toxin and benefit the throat

indications.zh: 肝风内动夹痰，惊痫抽搐
indications.en: Internal Liver wind with phlegm causing seizures and convulsions
Wind-stroke with facial deviation

indications.zh: 风热头痛、目赤、咽喉肿痛
indications.en: Wind-heat headache, red eyes, and sore swollen throat
Wind rash with itching
Scrofula, phlegm nodules, mumps, and erysipelas

contraindications_zh: 心虚不宁、血虚生风者慎用。无风邪而属虚火者不宜。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in heart vacuity with restlessness and blood vacuity generating wind. Not suitable when there is no wind pathogen and the condition is due to vacuity fire.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g；研末吞服，每次1–1.5g。散风热宜生用，余皆炒用。

processing_methods.name: 生僵蚕
processing_methods.effect: 祛风止痉，化痰散结，疏散风热之力较强

processing_methods.name: 炒僵蚕
processing_methods.effect: 缓和药性，矫正气味，便于内服

safety_notes_zh: 本品系蚕受白僵菌感染而僵死的虫体，含菌丝及代谢产物，少数人可有过敏反应。性味平和，但血虚发痉者不宜单用。质量以条直、色白、断面平滑者为佳。
safety_notes_en: This herb consists of silkworm larvae killed by Beauveria bassiana infection, containing fungal hyphae and metabolites; some individuals may have allergic reactions. Mild in nature, but not suitable for sole use in blood vacuity with spasms. Best quality specimens are straight, white, and smooth in cross-section.

classical_references.passage: 白僵蚕，味咸。主小儿惊痫夜啼，去三虫，灭黑黯，令人面色好，男子阴疡病。

description_zh: 蚕蛾科昆虫家蚕的幼虫感染白僵菌而僵死的干燥体。归肝、肺、胃经。本品咸辛平，既能息肝风以止惊搐，又能祛外风、化痰热以疗头面诸疾。其化痰散结之功，可治瘰疬痰核。常配伍全蝎、蜈蚣、天麻治痉挛抽搐；配伍桔梗、薄荷治咽喉肿痛。
description_en: The dried body of silkworm larvae (Bombyx mori) that have died of infection by Beauveria bassiana fungus. Enters the Liver, Lung, and Stomach channels. Salty, pungent, and neutral, it both extinguishes internal Liver wind and dispels external wind-heat, while transforming phlegm and dissipating nodules. Used for convulsions, facial paralysis, sore throat, and scrofula.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 僵蚕为白僵菌感染家蚕干燥体，含蛋白质、草酸铵和真菌代谢产物，具抗惊厥、抗凝及抗菌作用。
summary.en: Silkworm infected by Beauveria bassiana contains proteins, ammonium oxalate, and fungal metabolites with anticonvulsant, anticoagulant, and antimicrobial activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 中风后语言障碍与面神经麻痹辅助
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Post-stroke speech disorder and facial palsy adjunct

evidence_notes.note_zh: 僵蚕息风止痉、化痰散结，用于惊痫、破伤风、中风失语。
evidence_notes.note_en: Extinguishes wind, stops spasm, and dissipates phlegm-nodules; used for epilepsy, tetanus, and post-stroke aphasia.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 煎剂具抗惊厥与抗凝活性；白僵菌素显示体外抗菌作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Decoction shows anticonvulsant and anticoagulant activity; beauvericin exhibits in vitro antimicrobial effect.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以外观性状及总灰分为主要质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia relies on macroscopic identification and total-ash limits as quality controls.

actions.en: Unblock the collaterals and stop convulsions
Free the channels and quicken the collaterals

indications.en: High fever with delirium, seizures, and convulsions

indications.zh: 中风半身不遂，气虚血瘀
indications.en: Wind-stroke hemiplegia from qi vacuity with blood stasis
Wheezing and asthma due to Lung heat
Heat accumulation in Bladder with dysuria

indications.zh: 风湿热痹，关节红肿热痛
indications.en: Wind-damp-heat painful obstruction with red, swollen, hot joints
Headache and dizziness from hypertension

contraindications_zh: 本品性寒，脾胃虚寒者慎用。阳虚无热者及孕妇慎用。寒证抽搐者忌用。
contraindications_en: This herb is cold in nature; use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold. Use with caution in yang vacuity without heat and during pregnancy. Contraindicated in convulsions from cold patterns.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服5–10g；研末吞服，每次1–2g；鲜品10–20g。外用适量。性寒，脾胃虚寒者不宜久服。

processing_methods.name: 广地龙
processing_methods.method: 夏秋捕捉，剖腹去内脏，洗净泥土，晒干或低温干燥
processing_methods.effect: 息风通络，清热平喘

processing_methods.name: 沪地龙
processing_methods.method: 捕捉后用草木灰呛死，剖腹除去内脏，洗净晒干
processing_methods.effect: 通络利尿，作用类同广地龙

safety_notes_zh: 本品性咸寒，脾胃虚寒及孕妇慎用，无热之抽搐者忌用。少数人服用后可有过敏反应或胃肠不适。补阳还五汤中常用以通络治半身不遂。
safety_notes_en: This herb is salty and cold; use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and during pregnancy; contraindicated in convulsions without heat. Some individuals may experience allergic reactions or gastrointestinal discomfort after use. Commonly used in Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang to free the network vessels and treat hemiplegia.

classical_references.passage: 白颈蚯蚓，味咸，寒。主蛇瘕，去三虫，伏尸鬼注蛊毒，杀长虫。

description_zh: 钜蚓科动物参环毛蚓（广地龙）或缟蚯蚓等的干燥体。归肝、脾、膀胱经。本品咸寒走下，既能清热息风以治惊痫抽搐、热极生风，又能通络平喘、利尿降压。是王清任《医林改错》补阳还五汤治疗中风偏瘫之要药。
description_en: The dried body of Pheretima aspergillum and related earthworm species. Enters the Liver, Spleen, and Bladder channels. Salty and cold, it clears heat and extinguishes wind for convulsions arising from extreme heat, unblocks the collaterals for wind-stroke hemiplegia, calms wheezing in Lung heat asthma, and promotes urination. A key herb in Wang Qing-ren's Bu Yang Huan Wu Tang.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 地龙含蚓激酶（一组纤溶酶）、次黄嘌呤与多种氨基酸，药理证实其溶栓、抗凝、降压、解痉平喘与抗惊厥作用。
summary.en: Dilong contains lumbrokinase (a family of fibrinolytic enzymes), hypoxanthine and amino acids; pharmacology confirms thrombolytic, anticoagulant, antihypertensive, bronchodilatory and anticonvulsant activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 缺血性脑卒中及后遗症

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收录地龙原粉及蚓激酶制剂（如蚓激酶肠溶胶囊）用于缺血性心脑血管疾病。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists dilong powder and lumbrokinase enteric capsules for ischemic cardiovascular-cerebrovascular disease.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 热证惊风、中风偏瘫及哮喘为主要传统适应症。
evidence_notes.note_en: Traditional indications include heat-pattern convulsions, poststroke hemiplegia and asthma.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 与抗凝、抗血小板药物合用可能增加出血风险。
evidence_notes.note_en: May increase bleeding risk when combined with anticoagulants or antiplatelet agents.

actions.en: Open the orifices and revive the spirit
Reduce swelling and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Loss of consciousness from febrile disease with phlegm-heat blocking the orifices
Wind-stroke with phlegm collapse and orifice closure
Red swollen painful eyes, throat painful obstruction, and mouth sores
Sores and ulcers with swelling, pain, or non-healing after rupture
Chest impediment and heart pain from qi stagnation and blood stasis

contraindications_zh: 本品辛香走窜，开泄力强，气血阴阳虚衰而无邪闭者禁用；孕妇禁用。久服耗气伤阴。寒闭神昏须配伍温开药使用，不宜单用。
contraindications_en: This herb is acrid, aromatic, and strongly penetrating with powerful opening action; contraindicated when qi, blood, yin, and yang are debilitated without pathogenic blockage; contraindicated during pregnancy. Prolonged use consumes qi and damages yin. In cold-blockage unconsciousness, must be combined with warm-opening herbs; not suitable for sole use.

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散每次0.03–0.1g，不入煎剂（受热升华失效）。外用研末撒或调敷适量。剂量极小，须严格控制。

processing_methods.name: 合成冰片
processing_methods.method: 由樟脑、松节油等经化学方法合成所得
processing_methods.effect: 开窍醒神，清热止痛，作用类同天然龙脑冰片

safety_notes_zh: 本品辛香走窜，为强力开窍药，孕妇禁用。气血亏虚而无邪闭实证者忌用，以免耗气伤正。剂量极微，超量可致恶心呕吐、头晕、过敏。不入煎剂，因受热挥发升华即失效。心肌梗死急救常用含冰片之苏合香丸、安宫牛黄丸。
safety_notes_en: This herb is acrid, aromatic, and strongly penetrating; a powerful consciousness-opening herb; contraindicated during pregnancy. Contraindicated in qi and blood vacuity without pathogenic blockage repletion patterns, to avoid consuming qi and damaging the zheng qi. Dosage is extremely small; exceeding it may cause nausea, vomiting, dizziness, and allergic reactions. Not added to decoctions, as it loses efficacy through volatilization and sublimation upon heating. In myocardial infarction emergency treatment, Su He Xiang Wan and An Gong Niu Huang Wan (containing bing pian) are commonly used.

classical_references.passage: 龙脑香及膏香，味辛苦，微寒，无毒。主心腹邪气，风湿积聚，耳聋。明目，去目赤肤翳。
classical_references.source_chapter: 《新修本草》（唐·苏敬等，659年）；李时珍《本草纲目·木部》龙脑香条详述其开窍止痛之用。

description_zh: 由樟脑、松节油等化学合成所得的右旋龙脑或异龙脑。归心、脾、肺经。本品辛苦微寒，气芳香走窜，为开窍醒神、清热止痛之要药，与麝香同为凉开代表药。常用于热闭神昏，配麝香、牛黄等组成安宫牛黄丸、至宝丹；外用治目赤喉痹、疮疡溃烂；现代亦用于心绞痛急救（速效救心丸）。
description_en: Synthetic borneol (d-borneol or isoborneol), produced from camphor and turpentine. Enters the Heart, Spleen, and Lung channels. Pungent, bitter, and slightly cool, with intensely aromatic and mobilizing qualities, it is a key cool-opening herb that opens the orifices, revives consciousness, clears heat, and stops pain. Used in Angong Niuhuang Wan and Zhibao Dan for febrile coma; topically for red eyes, sore throat, and ulcers; and in modern emergency formulas for angina.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal constituent of natural Bing Pian

summary.zh: 冰片主要成分为右旋龙脑及异龙脑，具有局部麻醉、抗炎、抗菌及开窍醒神作用；现代研究显示其可短暂开放血脑屏障，增强中枢药物递送。
summary.en: Borneolum consists primarily of d-borneol with some isoborneol, providing local anesthetic, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and orifice-opening activity; modern studies demonstrate transient blood-brain barrier modulation that enhances CNS drug delivery.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 中风昏迷的急救开窍（安宫牛黄丸组分）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Stroke coma emergency resuscitation (component of An Gong Niu Huang Wan)

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 口腔溃疡、咽喉肿痛（外用）
冠心病心绞痛（复方丹参滴丸等制剂）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Coronary artery disease with angina (compound danshen preparations)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出冰片为开窍药，多入丸散或外用，不宜煎煮，因其易挥发升华。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes that Bing Pian is an orifice-opening herb, used in pills, powders, or externally rather than decocted, due to its volatility.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学提到冰片可短暂开放血脑屏障，在中枢递送研究中作为佐剂被广泛探讨。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen note that borneol transiently opens the blood-brain barrier and has been widely studied as an adjuvant for CNS drug delivery.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and fortify yang
Warm the Kidney, assist yang, and augment essence

indications.en: Kidney yang vacuity with impotence and seminal emission
Soreness and weakness of the lower back and knees

indications.zh: 风寒湿痹，肢体麻木拘挛
indications.en: Wind-cold-damp bi syndrome with numbness and contracture of the limbs
Infertility from cold womb and irregular menstruation
Wheezing and cough due to Kidney vacuity

indications.zh: 更年期高血压、骨质疏松
indications.en: Menopausal hypertension and osteoporosis

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者忌服。相火易动、梦遗滑精及阳事易举者不宜。久服或过量可致口干、鼻衄、头晕等动火伤阴之弊。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Not suitable when ministerial fire is easily stirred, in nocturnal emission with seminal efflux, and easy erection. Prolonged or excessive use may cause dry mouth, nosebleed, dizziness, and other manifestations of stirred fire damaging yin.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g。亦可浸酒、熬膏或入丸散。

processing_methods.name: 生淫羊藿
processing_methods.effect: 祛风除湿之力较强

processing_methods.name: 炙淫羊藿
processing_methods.effect: 增强补肾壮阳之功

safety_notes_zh: 属温燥之品，阴虚火旺者忌用。现代研究显示有一定肝毒性报道，不宜长期超量服用，肝功能异常者慎用。
safety_notes_en: A warm and drying substance; contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Modern research shows some reports of hepatotoxicity; prolonged excessive use should be avoided; use with caution in those with abnormal liver function.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，寒。主阴痿绝伤，茎中痛，利小便，益气力，强志。一名刚前。生山谷。
淫羊藿，味甘气香，性温不寒，能益精气，乃手足阳明、三焦、命门药也，真阳不足者宜之。

description_zh: 小檗科植物淫羊藿、箭叶淫羊藿、柔毛淫羊藿或朝鲜淫羊藿的干燥叶。归肝、肾经。又名仙灵脾。为温补肾阳之要药，善治肾阳虚衰之阳痿遗精、腰膝痿软；兼能祛风湿、强筋骨，治风寒湿痹。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal marker; PDE5 inhibitory and bone-anabolic preclinical activities

summary.zh: 淫羊藿主含淫羊藿苷及朝藿定等异戊烯基黄酮类成分，具有拟雄激素样、抑制 PDE5、促进成骨、免疫调节及心血管保护作用。
summary.en: Epimedium contains prenylated flavonoids including icariin and epimedins, exhibiting androgen-like, PDE5-inhibitory, osteogenic, immunomodulatory and cardiovascular-protective actions.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肾阳虚骨质疏松辅助治疗

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Adjunct for erectile dysfunction and reduced sexual function

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述淫羊藿苷体外显示 PDE5 抑制活性，提示与西地那非相似作用机制。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite in vitro PDE5 inhibition by icariin, suggesting a sildenafil-like mechanism.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以淫羊藿苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses icariin as the assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 提示淫羊藿温燥，阴虚火旺者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky cautions that Yin Yang Huo is warming and drying; use with care in yin vacuity with flaring fire.

description_en: The dried leaf of Epimedium brevicornu, E. sagittatum, E. pubescens, or E. koreanum (Berberidaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Pungent, sweet, and warm, also known as xian ling pi (fairy spirit spleen). It is the key herb for warming and tonifying Kidney yang, treating Kidney-yang vacuity with impotence, seminal emission, and lumbar-knee weakness. It additionally dispels wind-dampness and strengthens sinews and bones for wind-cold-damp impediment.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and assist yang
Warm the womb and check vaginal discharge

indications.en: Impotence due to Kidney yang vacuity

indications.zh: 宫冷不孕，月经不调，少腹冷痛
indications.en: Infertility from cold womb, irregular menses, and cold lower abdominal pain
Frequent urination, enuresis, and incontinence
Aching lower back and knees with weak sinews and bones
Wind-cold-damp bi and damp leg edema

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺及有湿热者不宜服。大便燥结、口干舌红者忌用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in yin vacuity with effulgent fire and damp-heat. Contraindicated in dry, bound stool and dry mouth with red tongue.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g。亦可入丸散或浸酒。

processing_methods.name: 巴戟肉
processing_methods.effect: 去木心后入药，免燥伤阴

processing_methods.name: 盐巴戟天
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，增强补肾助阳之功

processing_methods.name: 制巴戟天
processing_methods.effect: 缓和药性，专补肾阳

safety_notes_zh: 本品温润不燥，但仍属温补之品，阴虚火旺者不宜。需去木心后入药。
safety_notes_en: This herb is warm and moistening without being drying, but still belongs to the warm-supplementing category; not suitable in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. The woody core must be removed before medicinal use.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，微温。主大风邪气，阴痿不起，强筋骨，安五脏，补中增志益气。

description_zh: 茜草科植物巴戟天的干燥根。归肾、肝经。补肾阳而不燥，温肾助阳之要药；兼能强筋骨、祛风湿，常用于肾阳虚兼风湿痹痛之证。常与淫羊藿、肉苁蓉同用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: minor fraction compared to true purgative herbs
implicated in immunomodulatory and anti-fatigue effects in animal models

summary.zh: 巴戟天含环烯醚萜苷（如车叶草苷、水晶兰苷）、少量蒽醌及多糖，动物实验显示具有抗疲劳、抗骨质疏松和类雄激素样作用。
summary.en: Morindae officinalis Radix contains iridoid glycosides (monotropein, asperuloside), minor anthraquinones, and polysaccharides, with animal data suggesting anti-fatigue, anti-osteoporotic, and mild androgen-like activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Kidney yang vacuity impotence and infertility

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 绝经后骨质疏松辅助治疗

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 记录巴戟天传统上用于肾阳虚腰膝酸软、阳痿早泄及风湿痹痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky documents traditional use for kidney yang vacuity presenting as weak low back and knees, impotence, and wind-damp bi patterns.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学提到巴戟天水提物在去卵巢大鼠模型中可改善骨密度。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen report that aqueous extracts improve bone density in ovariectomized rat models.

description_en: The dried root of Morinda officinalis (Rubiaceae). Enters the Kidney and Liver channels. Pungent, sweet, and warm, it tonifies Kidney yang without causing dryness, making it a key warming yang tonic. It also strengthens sinews and bones and dispels wind-dampness, and is commonly used for Kidney-yang vacuity complicated by wind-damp impediment pain. Frequently combined with yin yang huo and rou cong rong.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and assist yang
Moisten the intestines and unblock the bowels

indications.zh: 肾阳不足，精血亏虚之阳痿不孕
indications.en: Impotence and infertility from Kidney yang and essence-blood vacuity
Sore weak lower back and knees with feeble sinews and bones
Constipation due to dry intestines and depleted fluids

indications.zh: 老人、产后及病后津枯便秘
indications.en: Constipation in the elderly, postpartum, and after illness from depleted fluids
Infertility from cold womb and irregular menstruation

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、大便溏泄、实热便秘者忌服。胃弱便溏者慎用。本品润肠滑下，泄泻者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire, loose stools and diarrhea, and repletion heat constipation. Use with caution in weak stomach with loose stools. This herb moistens the intestines with a sliding-downward action; not suitable in diarrhea.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g，大剂量可至15g。

processing_methods.name: 生肉苁蓉
processing_methods.effect: 润肠通便之力较强

processing_methods.name: 酒苁蓉
processing_methods.effect: 增强补肾助阳益精之功，减其滑润之性

safety_notes_zh: 本品味咸性温质润，能滑肠通便，故大便溏泄者不宜服用。阴虚火旺及实热便秘者忌用。
safety_notes_en: This herb is salty in flavor, warm in nature, and moist in quality, with intestinal-lubricating and stool-promoting effects; therefore not suitable in loose stools and diarrhea. Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire and repletion heat constipation.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，微温。主五劳七伤，补中，除茎中寒热痛，养五脏，强阴，益精气，多子，妇人癥瘕。久服轻身。
肉苁蓉，补而不峻，故有从容之号。从容，和缓之貌。

description_zh: 列当科植物肉苁蓉或管花肉苁蓉的干燥带鳞叶的肉质茎。归肾、大肠经。素有沙漠人参之称。补肾阳、益精血之佳品，温而不燥、补而不峻；兼能润肠通便，治肠燥津枯之便秘。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 肉苁蓉富含苯乙醇苷（松果菊苷、毛蕊花糖苷）及环烯醚萜苷，现代研究显示其具神经保护、抗氧化、免疫调节及缓泻作用，与传统补肾阳、益精血、润肠通便之功相合。
summary.en: Cistanche contains phenylethanoid glycosides (echinacoside, acteoside) and iridoids, with preclinical evidence for neuroprotection, antioxidant effects, immunomodulation, and mild laxative action, aligning with its traditional kidney-yang tonifying and bowel-moistening use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Kidney-yang vacuity with cold lumbar pain and impotence

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 认知功能下降（临床前神经保护）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出肉苁蓉性润不燥，适用于虚人便秘，但湿热泄泻者忌用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Cistanche is moistening and non-drying, suitable for constipation in deficient patients but contraindicated in damp-heat diarrhea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述松果菊苷在帕金森及阿尔茨海默动物模型中显示神经保护活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize echinacoside's neuroprotective activity in animal models of Parkinson's and Alzheimer's disease.

description_en: The dried fleshy stem with scale leaves of Cistanche deserticola or C. tubulosa (Orobanchaceae). Enters the Kidney and Large Intestine channels. Sweet, salty, and warm, known as the 'ginseng of the desert.' It is an excellent tonic for Kidney yang and essence-blood that is warm without being drying and supplementing without being harsh. It additionally moistens the intestines and unblocks the bowels for fluid-depleted intestinal-dryness constipation.

indications.en: Aching lower back and knees from Liver-Kidney vacuity
Weakness of sinews and bones with feeble lower limbs
Threatened miscarriage and restless fetus from Kidney vacuity
Vaginal bleeding during pregnancy

indications.zh: 肝阳上亢之高血压、头晕目眩
indications.en: Hypertension, dizziness, and vertigo from ascending Liver yang
Frequent urination and dribbling from Kidney vacuity

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者慎用。生杜仲偏于降压、强筋骨；炒杜仲（盐炒）则补肝肾、安胎之力强，二者不可混用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Raw du zhong tends toward lowering blood pressure and strengthening sinews and bones; fried du zhong (salt-fried) has stronger liver-kidney tonifying and fetus-calming effects; the two should not be used interchangeably.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g。盐炙后入药为多。

processing_methods.name: 生杜仲
processing_methods.effect: 偏于降血压、强筋骨

processing_methods.name: 盐杜仲
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，增强补肝肾、强筋骨、安胎之功，临床多用此

processing_methods.name: 炒杜仲
processing_methods.effect: 易于煎出有效成分，破坏胶丝便于煎服

safety_notes_zh: 炮制时须炒至断丝，方便有效成分煎出。阴虚火旺者慎用。生品与盐炙品功效有别，临床须区分。
safety_notes_en: During processing, it must be fried until the threads break to facilitate the extraction of active constituents. Use with caution in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Raw and salt-processed forms differ in efficacy; clinical differentiation is necessary.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，平。主腰脊痛，补中，益精气，坚筋骨，强志，除阴下痒湿，小便余沥。久服轻身耐老。

description_zh: 杜仲科植物杜仲的干燥树皮。归肝、肾经。为补肝肾、强筋骨之要药，善治肝肾不足之腰膝酸痛、胎动不安；兼能降压，常用于肝肾不足之高血压。临床多盐炙后用，引药入肾。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 杜仲胶（反式聚异戊二烯）

summary.zh: 杜仲含木脂素类（松脂醇二葡萄糖苷）、环烯醚萜（桃叶珊瑚苷）及绿原酸，药理确证其降压、骨代谢调节与免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Duzhong contains lignans (pinoresinol diglucoside), iridoids (aucubin) and chlorogenic acid; pharmacology confirms antihypertensive, bone-metabolism and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以松脂醇二葡萄糖苷作为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses pinoresinol diglucoside as the assay marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 传统为补肝肾、强筋骨、安胎要药；现代以炒杜仲降压作用较佳。
evidence_notes.note_en: Classical herb to tonify liver-kidney, strengthen sinews and calm fetus; salt-fried form preferred for hypertension.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 收录本品降压作用证据与传统使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph reviews antihypertensive evidence and traditional use.

description_en: The dried bark of Eucommia ulmoides (Eucommiaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet and warm, it is the key herb for supplementing the Liver and Kidney, strengthening sinews and bones, and calming the fetus. It treats Liver-Kidney insufficiency with lumbar-knee soreness and threatened miscarriage, and additionally lowers blood pressure. Clinically it is usually salt-processed (yan du zhong) to direct its action to the Kidney.

actions.en: Warm the Kidney and assist yang
Warm the Spleen and stop diarrhea
Externally dispel wind and treat vitiligo

indications.en: Impotence and seminal emission from Kidney yang vacuity
Cold pain in the lower back and knees with enuresis and frequent urination
Wheezing and cough from Kidney failing to grasp qi
Daybreak diarrhea from Spleen-Kidney yang vacuity

indications.zh: 外用治白癜风、斑秃、银屑病
indications.en: Externally applied for vitiligo, alopecia areata, and psoriasis

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、大便秘结者忌服。本品性温燥，阴虚有热者不宜。外用或内服后需避光，以防光敏性皮炎。现代报道有肝毒性，不宜长期或大剂量服用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire and constipation with dry, bound stool. This herb is warm and drying in nature; not suitable in yin vacuity with heat. Avoid sun exposure after external application or internal use to prevent photosensitive dermatitis. Modern reports indicate hepatotoxicity; not suitable for prolonged or high-dose use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g。外用适量，酒浸涂患处。

processing_methods.name: 生补骨脂
processing_methods.effect: 温肾助阳作用较强，外用治白癜风多用生品

processing_methods.name: 盐补骨脂
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，温肾纳气、固精缩尿之力增强，并缓和辛燥之性

safety_notes_zh: 含补骨脂素等呋喃香豆素类成分，具光敏性，服用或外用后须避免阳光暴晒，以防光敏性皮炎、色素沉着。现代有肝损害报道，肝功能异常者忌用，不宜长期超量服用。
safety_notes_en: Contains psoralen and other furanocoumarin compounds with photosensitizing properties; avoid direct sunlight after internal or external use to prevent photosensitive dermatitis and pigmentation. Modern reports indicate liver injury; contraindicated in those with abnormal liver function; prolonged excessive use should be avoided.

classical_references.passage: 补骨脂，治肾泄、通命门、暖丹田、敛精神。能使心包之火与命门之火相通，故元阳坚固，骨髓充实，涩以固脱也。
补骨脂主五劳七伤，风虚冷，骨髓伤败，肾冷精流。又主妇人血气堕胎。

description_zh: 豆科植物补骨脂的干燥成熟果实。归肾、脾经。又名破故纸。温肾壮阳、纳气平喘、温脾止泻之要药，为治脾肾阳虚五更泄泻（四神丸）之主药；外用治白癜风。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 补骨脂含呋喃香豆素（补骨脂素、异补骨脂素）、补骨脂酚及黄酮类，具有光敏、补肾助阳、抗骨质疏松及色素沉着作用；近年临床报告显示其内服可能引起药物性肝损伤。
summary.en: Psoraleae Fructus contains furanocoumarins (psoralen, isopsoralen), bakuchiol, and flavonoids, with photosensitizing, kidney yang-tonifying, antiosteoporotic, and pro-pigmentation activity; drug-induced liver injury has been reported with internal use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 白癜风（补骨脂素联合紫外线光化学疗法 PUVA）
肾阳虚型腰膝冷痛、遗精遗尿
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Kidney yang vacuity with cold lumbar pain, spermatorrhea, and enuresis

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载补骨脂素为经典的 PUVA 光敏剂，国际上长期用于白癜风和银屑病的治疗。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky documents psoralen as a classic PUVA photosensitizer, used internationally for vitiligo and psoriasis.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Brinker 总结了多个国家关于补骨脂（包括中成药壮骨关节丸等）引起药物性肝损伤的病例报告，建议避免长期高剂量使用并监测肝功能。
evidence_notes.note_en: Brinker summarizes case reports from multiple countries of drug-induced liver injury associated with Psoralea (including proprietary products such as Zhuang Gu Guan Jie Wan), advising against prolonged high-dose use and recommending liver monitoring.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学提醒使用补骨脂制剂后应避免过度日晒，以防光敏性皮炎。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen advise avoidance of excessive sun exposure after use to prevent photosensitizing dermatitis.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Psoralea corylifolia (Fabaceae). Enters the Kidney and Spleen channels. Pungent, bitter, and warm, also known as po gu zhi. It is the key herb for warming Kidney yang, grasping qi to calm wheezing, and warming the Spleen to stop diarrhea. It serves as the chief in Si Shen Wan for Spleen-Kidney yang vacuity with dawn diarrhea (wu geng xie). Applied externally it treats vitiligo.

actions.en: Warm the Kidney, secure essence, and reduce urination
Warm the Spleen, open the appetite, and check salivation
Warm the middle and stop diarrhea
Warm the Kidney and stop enuresis

indications.en: Spermatorrhea and premature ejaculation from Kidney yang vacuity
Enuresis and frequent urination
Spleen-Stomach cold vacuity with abdominal pain, vomiting, and diarrhea

indications.zh: 口多涎唾，小儿流涎不止
indications.en: Excessive salivation, including persistent drooling in children
Cold diarrhea and poor digestion from cold Spleen

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、热盛遗精、血热崩漏者忌服。阴虚血燥所致之尿频、遗精，非本品所宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire, seminal emission from exuberant heat, and uterine flooding from blood heat. Not suitable for frequent urination and seminal emission caused by yin vacuity with blood dryness.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g。入丸散酌减。

processing_methods.name: 生益智仁
processing_methods.effect: 温脾摄唾、温中止泻

processing_methods.name: 盐益智仁
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，增强固精缩尿之功

safety_notes_zh: 本品辛温，阴虚火旺者忌用。临床固精缩尿多用盐炙品。
safety_notes_en: This herb is acrid and warm; contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. For clinical use in securing essence and reducing urination, the salt-processed form is mostly used.

classical_references.passage: 益智，行阳退阴之药也。三焦、命门气弱者宜之。脾主智，此物能益脾胃故也。
益智子，止呕哕，摄涎唾，缩小便。

description_zh: 姜科植物益智的干燥成熟果实。归脾、肾经。温肾固精缩尿、温脾开胃摄唾之要药。常与乌药、山药同用（缩泉丸）治肾虚遗尿、小便频数；与山药、茯苓同用治小儿流涎。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 益智仁挥发油含诺卡酮、桉叶素及益智酮等成分，具有抗胆碱、改善学习记忆、温肾固精、缩尿止泻的药理作用。
summary.en: Alpinia oxyphylla volatile oil contains nootkatone, cineole and yakuchinones with anticholinergic, memory-enhancing, kidney-warming and antidiuretic/antidiarrheal effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Enuresis and urinary frequency from kidney yang vacuity
Diarrhea and drooling from spleen-kidney cold vacuity

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出益智仁温脾肾、摄津液，传统用于遗尿、多涎。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Yi Zhi Ren warms spleen and kidney and contains fluids, traditionally used for enuresis and excessive salivation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述动物研究显示益智仁提取物改善东莨菪碱所致记忆障碍。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite animal studies showing Yi Zhi Ren extracts reverse scopolamine-induced memory impairment.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Alpinia oxyphylla (Zingiberaceae). Enters the Spleen and Kidney channels. Pungent and warm, it is the key herb for warming the Kidney to secure essence and reduce urination, and for warming the Spleen to open the appetite and check salivation. Combined with wu yao and shan yao in Suo Quan Wan for Kidney-vacuity enuresis and urinary frequency; combined with shan yao and fu ling for pediatric drooling.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and augment essence
Nourish the Liver and brighten the eyes
Externally dispel wind and treat vitiligo

indications.en: Lumbar pain, impotence, and seminal emission from Kidney vacuity
Frequent urination, enuresis, turbid urine, and leukorrhea
Blurred vision from Liver-Kidney vacuity
Loose stools and diarrhea from Spleen-Kidney vacuity

indications.zh: 肾虚胎漏、胎动不安、滑胎
indications.en: Threatened miscarriage and habitual abortion from Kidney vacuity
Externally applied for vitiligo

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、大便燥结及小便短赤者不宜服。孕妇有热者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in yin vacuity with effulgent fire, dry bound stool, and scanty dark urine. Use with caution during pregnancy with heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g。入丸散尤宜，或捣碎入煎。

processing_methods.name: 生菟丝子
processing_methods.effect: 外用治白癜风多用生品

processing_methods.name: 盐菟丝子
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，增强补肾固精缩尿之功

processing_methods.name: 酒菟丝子
processing_methods.effect: 便于煎出有效成分，并增强补肾益精之力

safety_notes_zh: 本品平补阴阳，性较和缓，但阴虚火旺者仍不宜用。质坚硬，宜捣碎或制饼后入药。
safety_notes_en: This herb mildly supplements both yin and yang with a gentle nature, but it is still not suitable in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Hard in texture; should be crushed or made into cakes before medicinal use.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，平。主续绝伤，补不足，益气力，肥健人。汁去面皯。久服明目，轻身延年。

description_zh: 旋花科植物南方菟丝子或菟丝子的干燥成熟种子。归肝、肾、脾经。性平和，平补阴阳，为补肾益精、养肝明目、安胎之要药。常与枸杞子、覆盆子等同用（五子衍宗丸）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 菟丝子主含黄酮、多糖及木脂素类成分，具有雌激素样作用、免疫调节、抗氧化及保肝作用。
summary.en: Cuscuta seed contains flavonoids, polysaccharides and lignans, with mild estrogen-modulating, immunomodulatory, antioxidant and hepatoprotective activity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Kidney-deficient lumbar pain, impotence and spermatorrhea

evidence_notes.note_zh: 补肾益精、养肝明目、安胎，平补阴阳，不偏温燥。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tonifies Kidney essence, nourishes Liver and brightens the eyes, and calms the fetus; balances yin and yang without being overly warming.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 菟丝子黄酮在动物模型中显示雌激素样及抗骨质疏松活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Cuscuta flavonoids show estrogen-like and anti-osteoporotic activity in animal models.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Cuscuta chinensis or C. australis (Convolvulaceae). Enters the Liver, Kidney, and Spleen channels. Pungent, sweet, and neutral, its mild nature balances yin and yang supplementation, making it the key herb for tonifying the Kidney, augmenting essence, nourishing the Liver, brightening the eyes, and calming the fetus. Featured with gou qi zi and fu pen zi in Wu Zi Yan Zong Wan.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and secure essence
Nourish the Liver and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Lumbar pain, seminal emission, and premature ejaculation from Kidney vacuity
Turbid urine, leukorrhea, frequent urination, and enuresis

indications.zh: 肝肾不足之目暗不明、视物昏花
indications.en: Blurred and dim vision from Liver-Kidney vacuity
Dizziness, vertigo, and weak aching lower back and knees
Infertility from Kidney vacuity

contraindications_zh: 相火炽盛、阳强易举者忌服。阴虚火旺、小便不利者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated when ministerial fire is blazing and in easy erection from strong yang. Not suitable in yin vacuity with effulgent fire and difficult urination.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–15g。入丸散酌减。

processing_methods.name: 生沙苑子
processing_methods.effect: 补肝明目作用为主

processing_methods.name: 盐沙苑子
processing_methods.effect: 引药入肾，增强补肾固精缩尿之功

safety_notes_zh: 本品甘温固涩，相火旺、阳事易举者忌用。又名沙苑蒺藜、潼蒺藜，应与白蒺藜（刺蒺藜）相区别，二者功效不同。
safety_notes_en: This herb is sweet, warm, and astringent; contraindicated when ministerial fire is exuberant and in easy erection. Also known as sha yuan ji li or tong ji li; should be distinguished from bai ji li (ci ji li), as the two have different effects.

classical_references.passage: 沙苑蒺藜，补肾，治腰痛泄精，虚损劳乏。

description_zh: 豆科植物扁茎黄芪的干燥成熟种子。又名沙苑蒺藜、潼蒺藜。归肝、肾经。性温质润，补肾固精、养肝明目兼能缩尿止带，为治肾虚遗精、白浊带下、目暗昏花之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 紫云英苷（山柰酚-3-葡萄糖苷）

summary.zh: 沙苑子（潼蒺藜）为豆科扁茎黄芪种子，含黄酮苷（沙苑子苷、紫云英苷）及甾醇，现代研究显示其有降压、降血脂、保肝及免疫调节作用，对应传统补肾固精、养肝明目之功。
summary.en: Flatstem milkvetch seed contains flavonoid glycosides (complanatuside, astragalin) and phytosterols, with preclinical reports of antihypertensive, lipid-lowering, hepatoprotective, and immunomodulatory effects that align with its traditional kidney-tonifying, essence-securing, and vision-brightening use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肾虚腰痛、遗精早泄、尿频
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Kidney vacuity with low-back pain, spermatorrhea, and frequent urination

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）强调沙苑子温润不燥，然相火旺、阳强者忌用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Sha Yuan Zi is warming yet moistening, but contraindicated in cases of repletion ministerial fire or yang repletion.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 记载沙苑子总黄酮在动物模型中显示降压与保肝作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen report antihypertensive and hepatoprotective effects of total flavonoids from Sha Yuan Zi in animal models.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Astragalus complanatus (Fabaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet and warm, also known as sha yuan ji li or tong ji li, warm and moist in quality. It tonifies the Kidney, secures essence, nourishes the Liver, and brightens the eyes while also consolidating urine and checking vaginal discharge. It is a key herb for Kidney-vacuity seminal emission, turbid urine, leukorrhea, and blurred vision.

actions.en: Nourish yin and clear the Lung
Augment the Stomach and generate fluids
Moisten the Lung and stop cough

indications.zh: 肺阴虚之干咳少痰，咽干音哑
indications.en: Lung yin vacuity with dry cough, scanty sputum, dry throat, and hoarseness
Dryness-heat damaging the Lung with consumptive cough and blood-streaked sputum

indications.zh: 胃阴不足之口燥咽干、舌红少苔
indications.en: Stomach yin vacuity with dry mouth and throat, red tongue with scanty coating
Febrile disease damaging fluids with dull epigastric pain
Vacuity heat with thirst and dry stools

contraindications_zh: 风寒咳嗽及脾胃虚寒、寒饮喘咳者忌服。反藜芦（十八反）。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in wind-cold cough, spleen-stomach vacuity cold, and cold-fluid dyspnea cough. Antagonizes li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma) per the Eighteen Antagonisms (shiba fan).

dosage_range.notes: 煎服常用5–12g；鲜品可用至15–30g。

processing_methods.name: 生北沙参
processing_methods.method: 去须根，洗净，润透切段，干燥
processing_methods.effect: 养阴清肺、益胃生津

safety_notes_zh: 属十八反，不宜与藜芦同用。性偏凉润，脾虚便溏者慎用。临床上北沙参（伞形科）与南沙参（桔梗科）功效相近但来源不同，本经所载沙参实指今之南沙参。
safety_notes_en: Classified under the Eighteen Antagonisms; should not be used concurrently with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma). Cool and moistening in nature; use with caution in spleen vacuity with loose stools. Clinically, bei sha shen (Apiaceae) and nan sha shen (Campanulaceae) have similar effects but different sources; the sha shen recorded in the Bencao Jing actually refers to today's nan sha shen.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，微寒。主血积惊气，除寒热，补中，益肺气。久服利人。

description_zh: 伞形科植物珊瑚菜的干燥根。归肺、胃经。性味甘、微苦，微寒，为养阴清肺、益胃生津之要药。常用于肺胃阴虚之燥咳、咽干、口渴诸证。需注意：《神农本草经》所载沙参指今之南沙参（桔梗科），北沙参之名始见于《本草汇言》。
description_en: The dried root of Glehnia littoralis (Apiaceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Sweet and slightly bitter in flavor, slightly cold in nature; a key herb to nourish Lung yin, generate Stomach fluids, and moisten dryness. Note: the 'sha shen' of the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing refers to what is today called Nan Sha Shen (Adenophora, Campanulaceae); 'Bei Sha Shen' as a separate name appears later in Ben Cao Hui Yan.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 沙参有南北之分：北沙参（Glehnia）与南沙参（Adenophora）均含多糖与三萜/香豆素类，现代研究报道免疫调节、化痰、祛痰及解热作用，对应传统养阴清肺、益胃生津之功。
summary.en: Sha Shen comes in Northern (Glehnia littoralis) and Southern (Adenophora) forms, both containing polysaccharides and triterpenoid or coumarin constituents. Preclinical work reports immunomodulatory, expectorant, and antipyretic effects consistent with its traditional lung-yin and stomach-yin nourishing use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Stomach-yin vacuity with dry mouth and tongue

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）强调沙参反藜芦（十八反），且风寒咳嗽与脾虚便溏者忌用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Sha Shen antagonizes Li Lu (Veratrum, 'Eighteen Antagonisms') and is inappropriate in wind-cold cough or spleen-deficient loose stools.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述北沙参多糖具免疫调节活性，并有镇咳祛痰动物实验报告。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize immunomodulatory activity of Glehnia polysaccharides and animal evidence for antitussive/expectorant effects.

actions.en: Nourish yin and moisten the Lung
Augment the Stomach and generate fluids
Clear the Heart and eliminate irritability
Moisten the intestines and unblock the bowels

indications.zh: 肺阴不足之燥咳痰粘，劳嗽咯血
indications.en: Lung yin vacuity with dry cough, sticky sputum, and consumptive cough with hemoptysis

indications.zh: 胃阴不足之舌干口渴，胃脘灼痛
indications.en: Stomach yin vacuity with dry tongue, thirst, and burning epigastric pain
Heat-damaged fluids with intestinal dryness and constipation

indications.zh: 心阴不足之心烦失眠，心悸
indications.en: Heart yin vacuity with irritability, insomnia, and palpitations

indications.zh: 温热病后期，余热未清，烦渴不寐
indications.en: Late-stage warm disease with lingering heat, thirst, and sleeplessness
