contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒泄泻、胃有痰饮湿浊及风寒表证咳嗽者均忌服。外感初起、表邪未解者不宜单用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with diarrhea, stomach phlegm-fluid with turbid dampness, and wind-cold exterior pattern cough. Not suitable for sole use in early-stage external contraction when exterior pathogens remain unresolved.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服常用6–12g；养阴生津、清心除烦可用至15g。

processing_methods.name: 去心麦冬
processing_methods.effect: 传统认为去心可避免令人烦闷，然现代研究显示心与不去心功效相近

processing_methods.name: 朱麦冬
processing_methods.effect: 增强清心安神之效，用于心烦失眠

safety_notes_zh: 性偏寒润，脾胃虚寒便溏者慎用。外感风寒咳嗽不宜，恐恋邪不解。朱麦冬含朱砂（硫化汞），不宜久服。
safety_notes_en: Cool and moistening in nature; use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with loose stools. Not suitable in wind-cold cough, as it may trap pathogens and prevent resolution. Zhu mai dong contains cinnabar (mercuric sulfide); not suitable for prolonged use.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主心腹结气，伤中伤饱，胃络脉绝，羸瘦短气。久服轻身不老不饥。

description_zh: 百合科植物麦冬的干燥块根。归肺、胃、心经。甘、微苦，微寒，为养阴润肺、益胃生津、清心除烦之要药。生脉散、麦门冬汤、增液汤皆以本品为君药。
description_en: The dried tuber of Ophiopogon japonicus (Liliaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Heart channels. Sweet and slightly bitter, slightly cold; a cardinal herb for nourishing Lung yin, generating Stomach fluids, and clearing Heart-fire irritability. It is the chief herb in Sheng Mai San, Mai Men Dong Tang, and Zeng Ye Tang.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 麦冬含甾体皂苷、高异黄酮和多糖，具强心、抗心律失常、抗氧化、免疫调节及降糖作用。
summary.en: Ophiopogon contains steroidal saponins, homoisoflavonoids, and polysaccharides with cardiotonic, antiarrhythmic, antioxidant, immunomodulatory, and hypoglycemic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 冠心病与心律失常辅助（生脉制剂）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Coronary heart disease and arrhythmia adjunct (Sheng Mai preparations)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 麦冬皂苷改善心肌供血，动物实验显示抗心律失常及抗心肌缺血作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Ophiopogonins improve myocardial perfusion and show antiarrhythmic and anti-ischemic effects in animal models.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 麦冬养阴润肺、益胃生津、清心除烦，为生脉散主药之一。
evidence_notes.note_en: Nourishes yin, moistens lungs, benefits stomach, generates fluids, and clears heart irritability; a key herb of Sheng Mai San.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以浸出物和总皂苷含量为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses extractives and total saponin content as quality markers.

actions.en: Augment the Stomach and generate fluids
Brighten the eyes and strengthen the lower back

indications.zh: 胃阴虚之口干烦渴，食少干呕
indications.en: Stomach yin vacuity with dry mouth, irritable thirst, poor appetite, and dry retching
Febrile disease damaging fluids with a glossy tongue and scanty coating

indications.zh: 肾阴不足之目暗不明，视物昏花
indications.en: Kidney yin vacuity with dim vision and blurred sight

indications.zh: 阴虚火旺之骨蒸劳热，夜热早凉
indications.en: Yin vacuity with effulgent fire causing steaming-bone tidal fever and night fever cooling at dawn
Weakness of the lower back and knees with sinew-bone atrophy

contraindications_zh: 温热病早期、邪未化燥者及湿温尚未化燥者忌服。脾胃虚寒便溏者慎用。能敛邪助湿，故温热病初期不宜过早使用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in early-stage warm-heat disease when pathogens have not yet transformed into dryness, and in damp-warmth not yet transformed into dryness. Use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with loose stools. May trap pathogens and promote dampness; therefore not suitable for premature use in early-stage warm-heat disease.

dosage_range.notes: 干品煎服6–12g，宜久煎；鲜石斛15–30g，鲜品养阴生津之力更胜。

processing_methods.name: 鲜石斛
processing_methods.effect: 清热生津力强，多用于热病伤津、舌干口渴

processing_methods.name: 干石斛
processing_methods.method: 采收后去叶，烘软揉搓，反复至干
processing_methods.effect: 滋阴养胃力胜，多用于胃阴久虚

processing_methods.name: 枫斗（耳环石斛）
processing_methods.method: 新鲜茎边烘边扭成螺旋状
processing_methods.effect: 霍山石斛上品，滋阴生津、补虚强身

safety_notes_zh: 石斛能敛邪助湿，温热病初期、湿温未化燥者均不宜使用，恐留邪不解。本品宜久煎以充分释出有效成分。
safety_notes_en: Shi hu may trap pathogens and promote dampness; not suitable in early-stage warm-heat disease and damp-warmth not yet transformed into dryness, as it may retain pathogens without resolution. This herb should be decocted for a prolonged time to fully release active constituents.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主伤中，除痹，下气，补五脏虚劳羸瘦，强阴。久服厚肠胃，轻身延年。

description_zh: 兰科植物金钗石斛、鼓槌石斛、流苏石斛或铁皮石斛的栽培品及其同属植物近似种的新鲜或干燥茎。归胃、肾经。甘，微寒，长于养胃阴、生津液、退虚热、明目强腰。鲜品偏于清热生津，干品偏于滋阴养胃。
description_en: The fresh or dried stem of Dendrobium nobile, D. chrysotoxum, D. fimbriatum, or D. officinale (Orchidaceae). Enters the Stomach and Kidney channels. Sweet and slightly cold; excels at nourishing Stomach yin, generating fluids, reducing vacuity heat, and brightening the eyes. The fresh form leans toward clearing heat and generating fluids, while the dried form is stronger at nourishing Stomach yin.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 石斛主含石斛多糖、石斛碱及联苄类化合物，具有免疫调节、养胃生津、抗氧化及抗肿瘤活性研究。
summary.en: Dendrobium contains polysaccharides, the alkaloid dendrobine, and bibenzyls (erianin, gigantol) with immunomodulatory, fluid-generating, antioxidant and investigational antitumor effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Febrile fluid damage with dry mouth and thirst

evidence_notes.note_zh: 益胃生津、滋阴清热，用于热病伤阴及胃阴虚证。
evidence_notes.note_en: Nourishes stomach fluids and clears deficient heat; used for febrile yin damage and stomach-yin vacuity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 毛兰素（erianin）及相关联苄类在体外和动物模型中显示抗肿瘤活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Erianin and related bibenzyls show antitumor activity in vitro and in animal models.

actions.en: Strengthen the Spleen and moisten the Lung
Augment the Kidney and supplement essence

indications.zh: 脾胃气虚之倦怠乏力，食少口干
indications.en: Spleen-Stomach qi vacuity with fatigue, poor appetite, and dry mouth

indications.zh: 肺阴不足之燥咳少痰，劳嗽久咳
indications.en: Lung yin vacuity with dry cough, scanty sputum, and chronic consumptive cough

indications.zh: 肾精亏虚之腰膝酸软，须发早白
indications.en: Kidney essence vacuity with sore weak lower back and knees, premature graying of hair
Internal heat wasting-thirst (xiaoke) with dual injury of qi and yin
Dizziness, blurred vision, and emaciation due to vacuity

contraindications_zh: 中寒泄泻、痰湿痞满气滞者忌服。脾虚有湿、咳嗽痰多者不宜使用，恐助湿生痰。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in cold in the middle with diarrhea, phlegm-dampness with epigastric fullness, and qi stagnation. Not suitable in spleen vacuity with dampness and cough with copious phlegm, as it may promote dampness and generate phlegm.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–15g；鲜品可用至30–60g。生品质润，久服宜制。

processing_methods.name: 生黄精
processing_methods.effect: 麻味较强，有刺激咽喉之性，不宜直接服用

processing_methods.name: 制黄精（九蒸九晒）
processing_methods.method: 经九次蒸制九次晒制（或反复蒸晒）
processing_methods.effect: 去除麻味及刺激性，色黑味甘，补益肝肾、填精强身之力倍增

processing_methods.name: 酒黄精
processing_methods.effect: 增强补益肝肾、强筋壮骨之效

safety_notes_zh: 生黄精含黏液质及刺激性成分，直接服用可致咽喉麻木、刺痒，必须经蒸制（九蒸九晒）后方可使用。脾虚湿盛、痰浊壅肺者不宜，以免恋湿助痰。
safety_notes_en: Raw huang jing contains mucilage and irritating components; direct consumption may cause throat numbness and itching; it must undergo steaming and sun-drying (nine times each) before use. Not suitable in spleen vacuity with dampness repletion and turbid phlegm congesting the lung, to avoid trapping dampness and promoting phlegm.

classical_references.passage: 黄精，味甘，平，无毒。主补中益气，除风湿，安五脏。久服轻身延年不饥。

description_zh: 百合科植物滇黄精、黄精或多花黄精的干燥根茎。归脾、肺、肾经。甘，平。气阴双补，补脾润肺、益肾填精，为平补三焦之佳品。首载于《雷公炮炙论》《名医别录》，《神农本草经》未载。九蒸九晒后药性更醇，服食养生家多用之。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Polygonatum kingianum, P. sibiricum, or P. cyrtonema (Liliaceae). Enters the Spleen, Lung, and Kidney channels. Sweet and neutral; tonifies both qi and yin, strengthens the Spleen, moistens the Lung, and supplements Kidney essence — a gentle three-burner tonic. First recorded in Lei Gong Pao Zhi Lun and Ming Yi Bie Lu (not in the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing). The 'nine-steamings, nine-sunnings' processing renders the herb mellower and is favored by practitioners of dietary cultivation.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 黄精主含黄精多糖、甾体皂苷与高异黄酮类，药理示其免疫调节、降糖、降脂、抗疲劳与抗氧化作用；生品刺激咽喉，须经九蒸九晒炮制后方可内服。
summary.en: Huangjing contains Polygonatum polysaccharides, steroidal saponins and homoisoflavonoids; pharmacology shows immunomodulatory, hypoglycemic, lipid-lowering, antifatigue and antioxidant activity. Raw material irritates the throat and must be steamed/sun-dried repeatedly before oral use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Spleen-stomach qi vacuity and lung-yin insufficiency

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载滇黄精、黄精与多花黄精三种基源，并以黄精多糖含量作为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists three source species (P. kingianum, P. sibiricum, P. cyrtonema) with Polygonatum polysaccharide content as quality marker.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 脾虚有湿、痰湿壅盛者不宜；须炮制后使用以减少咽喉刺激。
evidence_notes.note_en: Avoid in spleen-damp and phlegm-damp patterns; must be processed to reduce throat irritation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 多与枸杞子、黄芪等配伍用于气阴两虚。
evidence_notes.note_en: Commonly combined with gouqizi and huangqi for dual qi-yin vacuity.

actions.en: Nourish yin and moisten the Lung
Clear the Heart and calm the spirit

indications.zh: 阴虚肺燥之干咳少痰，痰中带血
indications.en: Yin-deficient Lung dryness with dry cough, scanty sputum, and blood-streaked sputum
Chronic consumptive cough with dry throat and hoarseness

indications.zh: 热病余邪未清，虚烦惊悸，失眠多梦
indications.en: Lingering heat after febrile disease with vacuity vexation, palpitations, insomnia, and excessive dreaming

indications.zh: 百合病（精神恍惚，情绪不宁，口苦尿赤）
indications.en: Bai He disease (mental disorientation, emotional restlessness, bitter taste, dark urine)
Menopausal irritability and insomnia

contraindications_zh: 风寒咳嗽及中寒便溏者忌服。脾胃虚寒、痰湿壅盛者慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in wind-cold cough and cold in the middle with loose stools. Use with caution in spleen-stomach vacuity cold and phlegm-dampness repletion.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g；蜜炙润肺止咳力增；鲜品用量加倍。

processing_methods.name: 生百合
processing_methods.method: 鳞叶剥下，沸水稍烫后晒干
processing_methods.effect: 清心安神，退虚热

processing_methods.name: 蜜百合
processing_methods.effect: 润肺止咳之力增强，多用于肺虚久咳

safety_notes_zh: 性偏寒润，风寒外感咳嗽及脾虚便溏者不宜。百合病所用本品，张仲景《金匮要略》有百合知母汤、百合地黄汤等方。
safety_notes_en: Cool and moistening in nature; not suitable in wind-cold external contraction cough and spleen vacuity with loose stools. This herb is used for 'bai he disease'; Zhang Zhongjing's Jin Gui Yao Lue contains Bai He Zhi Mu Tang, Bai He Di Huang Tang, and other formulas.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主邪气腹胀心痛，利大小便，补中益气。

description_zh: 百合科植物卷丹、百合或细叶百合的干燥肉质鳞叶。归心、肺经。甘，微寒。养阴润肺以治虚劳燥咳，清心安神以治虚烦不寐。仲景《金匮要略》立百合病专篇，以本品为主药。
description_en: The dried fleshy scale leaves of Lilium lancifolium, L. brownii var. viridulum, or L. pumilum (Liliaceae). Enters the Heart and Lung channels. Sweet and slightly cold; nourishes Lung yin to treat vacuity-cough and dryness, and clears the Heart to calm vacuity-vexation and insomnia. Zhang Zhongjing devoted a chapter of the Jin Gui Yao Lue to 'bai he disease,' for which this herb is the principal remedy.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: present in trace amounts; fresh bulbs should be cooked before use

summary.zh: 百合富含甾体皂苷、多糖及微量生物碱，具有润肺止咳、镇静及免疫调节作用；动物实验显示其水提物有抗抑郁样效果。
summary.en: Lilii Bulbus is rich in steroidal saponins, polysaccharides, and trace alkaloids, with demulcent antitussive, sedative, and immunomodulatory activity; aqueous extracts show antidepressant-like effects in animal models.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Yin-deficient dry cough and chronic pharyngitis

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 描述百合主治肺阴虚燥咳及心阴虚烦躁失眠。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky describes use for lung yin vacuity dry cough and heart yin vacuity with restlessness and insomnia.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 陈氏药理学指出百合多糖可增强免疫功能，水提物在小鼠强迫游泳实验中显示抗抑郁活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen note that Lilium polysaccharides enhance immune function and extracts show antidepressant activity in the mouse forced-swim test.

actions.en: Augment essence and brighten the eyes
Moisten the Lung and stop cough

indications.zh: 肝肾阴虚之腰膝酸软，眩晕耳鸣
indications.en: Liver-Kidney yin vacuity with sore weak lower back and knees, dizziness, and tinnitus

indications.zh: 精血不足之视物昏花，目暗不明
indications.en: Essence-blood vacuity with blurred vision and dim eyesight
Kidney vacuity with seminal emission, impotence, and premature ejaculation
Lung-Kidney yin vacuity with chronic consumptive cough
Wasting-thirst with dry mouth and premature graying of hair

contraindications_zh: 外邪实热、脾虚有湿及泄泻者忌服。性温润滋腻，外感发热及脾虚湿盛便溏者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in repletion external pathogens with heat, spleen vacuity with dampness, and diarrhea. Warm, moistening, and enriching-cloying; not suitable in external contraction with fever and spleen vacuity with dampness repletion and loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g；亦可嚼食、泡茶或入丸散。

processing_methods.name: 生枸杞子
processing_methods.method: 果实成熟时采收，热风烘干或晾晒
processing_methods.effect: 滋补肝肾、益精明目

safety_notes_zh: 本品性平偏润，外感实热、脾虚湿盛者忌用。糖尿病患者大量服用需注意其含糖量。与某些抗凝药（华法林）可能存在相互作用，长期服用者需告知医师。
safety_notes_en: This herb is neutral, tending toward moistening; contraindicated in repletion external heat and spleen vacuity with dampness repletion. Diabetic patients should be aware of its sugar content when taking large doses. May interact with certain anticoagulants (warfarin); those using long-term should inform their physician.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主五内邪气，热中消渴，周痹。久服坚筋骨，轻身不老。

description_zh: 茄科植物宁夏枸杞的干燥成熟果实。归肝、肾经。甘，平。为平补肝肾、益精养血、明目之要药，宁夏中宁所产为道地。《本经》列为上品，原称「枸杞」，后世以根皮（地骨皮）与果实分用。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Lycium barbarum (Solanaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet and neutral; a cardinal balanced tonic for the Liver and Kidney that augments essence, nourishes blood, and brightens the eyes. The variety from Zhongning, Ningxia is considered the daodi (geo-authentic) source. Listed as a superior-grade herb in the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing under the name 'gou qi'; later authors split usage between the root bark (di gu pi) and the fruit.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 枸杞子主含枸杞多糖（LBP）、类胡萝卜素（玉米黄质）与甜菜碱，药理示其免疫调节、抗氧化、保肝、改善视网膜功能与降糖作用。
summary.en: Gouqizi contains Lycium barbarum polysaccharides, carotenoids (zeaxanthin) and betaine; pharmacology shows immunomodulatory, antioxidant, hepatoprotective, retinal-supporting and hypoglycemic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Liver-kidney yin vacuity with blurred vision

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 糖尿病与代谢综合征辅助

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以枸杞多糖与甜菜碱作为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses LBP and betaine as quality markers.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 可能增强华法林作用；含 CYP2C9 抑制成分，已有国际病例报告。
evidence_notes.note_en: May potentiate warfarin; case reports of INR increase; possible CYP2C9 inhibition.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 外感实热、脾虚有湿及腹泻者不宜多食。
evidence_notes.note_en: Avoid excessive intake in exterior heat, damp-spleen vacuity or diarrhea.

actions.en: Brighten the eyes and darken the hair
Strengthen the lower back and knees

indications.zh: 肝肾阴虚之眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软
indications.en: Liver-Kidney yin vacuity with dizziness, tinnitus, and sore weak lower back and knees
Premature graying and loss of hair
Dim eyesight and blurred vision
Yin-deficient fever with steaming-bone tidal fever
Insomnia, excessive dreaming, and seminal emission

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒泄泻及阳虚者忌服。性凉滑利，便溏腹泻者慎用，恐滑肠致泻加重。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with diarrhea and yang vacuity. Cool and slippery in nature; use with caution in loose stools and diarrhea, as it may lubricate the intestines and worsen diarrhea.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g。生用清热力胜，酒制补肝肾力强。

processing_methods.name: 生女贞子
processing_methods.effect: 清虚热、明目力胜

processing_methods.name: 酒女贞子
processing_methods.effect: 增强补肝肾、乌须发之效，缓和滑肠之性

safety_notes_zh: 本品性凉而润滑，脾胃虚寒、便溏腹泻者忌用，可加重泄泻。临床多与旱莲草配伍组成二至丸，相须为用，补益力胜而不滋腻。生品有缓和通便之效，故便秘阴虚者用生品，便溏者宜酒制或慎用。
safety_notes_en: This herb is cool and slippery; contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold with loose stools and diarrhea, as it may worsen diarrhea. Clinically often combined with han lian cao to form Er Zhi Wan, used in mutual enhancement with superior tonifying power without being cloying. The raw form has mild laxative effects; for constipation in yin vacuity, use the raw form; for loose stools, use the wine-processed form or use with caution.

classical_references.passage: 女贞实，味苦，平。主补中，安五脏，养精神，除百疾。久服肥健，轻身不老。

description_zh: 木犀科植物女贞的干燥成熟果实。归肝、肾经。甘、苦，凉。为补肝肾阴、清虚热、明目乌发之常用药。《本经》原称「女贞实」，列为上品。常与墨旱莲配伍组成二至丸，为补阴名方。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Ligustrum lucidum (Oleaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, bitter, and cool; a commonly used herb to enrich Liver-Kidney yin, clear vacuity heat, brighten the eyes, and darken the hair. Listed as a superior-grade herb in the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing under the name 'nü zhen shi.' Frequently paired with Mo Han Lian (Eclipta) in the famous Er Zhi Wan, a classic yin-tonic formula.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 女贞子含齐墩果酸、特女贞苷等三萜与环烯醚萜类，现代研究报道免疫调节、保肝、降血糖血脂及抗氧化作用，与传统滋补肝肾之功相应。
summary.en: Ligustrum fruit contains oleanolic acid and secoiridoid glycosides such as specnuezhenide, with reported immunomodulatory, hepatoprotective, hypoglycemic, lipid-lowering, and antioxidant effects in line with its traditional liver-kidney yin tonifying use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肝肾阴虚之头晕、耳鸣、须发早白
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Liver-kidney yin vacuity with dizziness, tinnitus, premature graying

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 化疗后白细胞减少辅助

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Chronic hepatitis with abnormal liver function

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载女贞子性平，为平补肝肾之佳品，与旱莲草合用（二至丸）。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky describes Ligustrum as a neutral, gentle liver-kidney tonic classically paired with Eclipta (Er Zhi Wan).

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 综述齐墩果酸具保肝降酶及抗氧化作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen summarize oleanolic acid's hepatoprotective, transaminase-lowering, and antioxidant activity.

actions.en: Tonify the blood and nourish yin
Nourish yin and moisten the Lung
Calm the fetus and nourish blood

indications.en: Blood vacuity with sallow complexion, dizziness, and palpitations
Hematemesis, epistaxis, blood in the stool, and uterine bleeding
Threatened miscarriage with vaginal bleeding
Yin vacuity with vexation and insomnia
Dry cough with blood-streaked sputum from Lung dryness
Yin damaged by febrile disease with internal stirring of vacuity wind

contraindications_zh: 阿胶滋腻碍胃，脾胃虚弱、纳差便溏、湿浊中阻、痰湿内盛者忌用或慎用。外感初起者亦不宜单用。
contraindications_en: E jiao is enriching-cloying and may impede the stomach; contraindicated or use with caution in spleen and stomach vacuity, poor appetite with loose stools, turbid dampness obstructing the middle, and phlegm-dampness repletion. Not suitable for sole use in early-stage external contraction.

dosage_range.notes: 入汤剂宜烊化兑服；亦可入丸散膏剂。

processing_methods.name: 阿胶
processing_methods.method: 取驴皮经漂泡去毛后，加水煎煮浓缩而成胶块，阴凉处干燥
processing_methods.effect: 补血滋阴，润燥止血

processing_methods.name: 阿胶珠
processing_methods.effect: 矫其滋腻，便于入丸散；蛤粉炒长于润肺化痰，蒲黄炒长于止血

safety_notes_zh: 阿胶性质滋腻，长期或大量服用易碍脾胃运化，宜配伍陈皮、砂仁等行气化湿之品。脾虚湿盛者非宜。
safety_notes_en: E jiao is enriching-cloying in nature; prolonged or high-dose use may impede spleen and stomach transportation; combine with chen pi, sha ren, and other qi-moving dampness-transforming herbs. Not suitable in spleen vacuity with dampness repletion.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主心腹内崩，劳极洒洒如疟状，腰腹痛，四肢酸疼，女子下血，安胎。久服轻身益气。

description_zh: 马科动物驴的干燥皮经煎煮浓缩制成的固体胶。归肺、肝、肾经。为补血止血、滋阴润燥之要药，妇科调经安胎常用，与熟地、当归、白芍同为补血四要。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 甘氨酸、脯氨酸、羟脯氨酸

summary.zh: 阿胶为驴皮熬制胶块，主含胶原水解肽、多种氨基酸与微量元素，药理示其促进造血、止血、免疫调节与抗贫血作用。
summary.en: Ejiao is gelatin prepared from donkey hide, rich in collagen-derived peptides, amino acids and trace minerals; pharmacology shows hematopoietic support, hemostatic, immunomodulatory and antianemic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 血虚萎黄、缺铁性贫血辅助
化疗后血小板、白细胞减少

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定阿胶须以驴皮熬制，并以特征肽段 DNA/肽组学方法进行真伪鉴别。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia requires donkey-hide origin; species identification by characteristic peptide or DNA markers.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 为补血止血要药，常与当归、熟地配伍；脾胃虚弱者宜配健脾药以防滋腻。
evidence_notes.note_en: Key blood-tonifying and hemostatic herb; often paired with danggui and shudi; combine with spleen-supporting herbs if digestion is weak.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 性黏腻，脾胃虚弱、呕吐泄泻者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Cloying nature; use cautiously in weak digestion, vomiting or diarrhea.

description_en: A solid gelatin prepared by decocting the dried hide of Equus asinus (Equidae). Enters the Lung, Liver, and Kidney channels. Sweet and neutral, it is the essential herb for tonifying blood, nourishing yin, moistening dryness, and stopping bleeding. A key gynecological medicinal for regulating menstruation and calming the fetus, it belongs alongside shu di huang, dang gui, and bai shao as one of the four principal blood-supplementing substances.

actions.en: Tonify Liver and Kidney, augment essence and blood (prepared form)
Darken hair and strengthen sinews and bones
Resolve turbidity and reduce blood lipids

actions.zh: 解毒消痈，截疟，润肠通便（生用）
actions.en: Resolve toxicity and reduce sores, interrupt malaria, and moisten the intestines (raw form)

indications.zh: 肝肾不足，精血亏虚，眩晕耳鸣
indications.en: Liver-Kidney insufficiency with essence-blood vacuity, dizziness and tinnitus
Premature graying of hair, soreness and weakness of the lower back and knees
Numbness of the limbs, uterine bleeding and abnormal vaginal discharge
Hyperlipidemia (prepared form)

indications.zh: 久疟体虚，痈疽瘰疬（生何首乌）
indications.en: Chronic malaria with bodily depletion, carbuncles and scrofula (raw form)
Constipation due to intestinal dryness (raw form)

contraindications_zh: 大便溏泄、湿痰内盛者不宜用。生何首乌有滑肠润下之力，脾虚便溏者忌生用。生品有肝毒性报告，临床补益用必须用制何首乌（黑豆汁九蒸九晒），不可混用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in loose stools and diarrhea and internal phlegm-dampness repletion. Raw he shou wu has intestinal-lubricating and downward-directing effects; contraindicated in raw form for spleen vacuity with loose stools. Raw form has hepatotoxicity reports; for clinical tonifying use, processed he shou wu (steamed nine times with black bean juice and sun-dried nine times) must be used; the two must not be mixed.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g。补益用制何首乌；解毒、润肠、截疟用生何首乌。不可长期超量服用。

processing_methods.name: 生何首乌
processing_methods.effect: 解毒消痈，截疟，润肠通便

processing_methods.name: 制何首乌
processing_methods.method: 黑豆汁拌匀，九蒸九晒（传统制法），或高压蒸制至黑润内外一致
processing_methods.effect: 去其滑肠之性，转为补肝肾、益精血、乌须发之要药

safety_notes_zh: 现代药理及临床报告显示何首乌（尤其是生品及未规范炮制品）可引起药物性肝损伤（DILI），表现为转氨酶升高、黄疸甚至肝衰竭。临床应严格区分生制，使用规范炮制的制何首乌，避免长期大剂量服用，肝功能异常者禁用，服药期间应监测肝功能。
safety_notes_en: Modern pharmacological and clinical reports show that he shou wu (especially raw and improperly processed forms) may cause drug-induced liver injury (DILI), manifesting as elevated transaminases, jaundice, and even liver failure. Clinical use must strictly distinguish between raw and processed forms; use properly processed zhi he shou wu; avoid prolonged high-dose use; contraindicated in abnormal liver function; liver function should be monitored during administration.

classical_references.passage: 何首乌，气温味苦涩，苦补肾，温补肝，能收敛精气，所以养血益肝，固精益肾，健筋骨，乌髭发，为滋补良药，不寒不燥，功在地黄、天门冬诸药之上。

description_zh: 蓼科植物何首乌的干燥块根。归肝、心、肾经。生用解毒、润肠、截疟；制用补肝肾、益精血、乌须发。首载于唐《何首乌录》及《开宝本草》，李时珍《本草纲目》详述其制法与功用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 何首乌主含二苯乙烯苷（THSG）与蒽醌类（大黄素、大黄素甲醚）；制首乌经黑豆汁九蒸九晒后蒽醌降低，补肝肾、益精血作用增强；生首乌蒽醌含量高，偏于解毒通便。
summary.en: Heshouwu contains stilbene glycoside (THSG) and anthraquinones (emodin, physcion); processed heshouwu (steamed with black-bean juice) has lower anthraquinones and tonifies liver-kidney and essence; raw heshouwu retains higher anthraquinones and is used to resolve toxin and move stool.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Liver-kidney yin vacuity, premature graying and alopecia

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以二苯乙烯苷与结合蒽醌含量作为质量指标，并区分生首乌与制首乌用量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses stilbene glycoside and combined anthraquinone content as quality markers and distinguishes dosages for raw vs processed forms.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 多国监管机构（中、英、加、澳等）发出何首乌肝毒性警示，尤以生品与长期大剂量风险较高。
evidence_notes.note_en: Regulators in China, UK, Canada, Australia and elsewhere have issued hepatotoxicity warnings, especially for raw form and prolonged high-dose use.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 肝病患者禁用；出现转氨酶升高、黄疸时应立即停药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Contraindicated in hepatic disease; discontinue immediately with rising transaminases or jaundice.

description_en: The dried tuberous root of Polygonum multiflorum (syn. Fallopia multiflora) (Polygonaceae). Enters the Liver, Heart, and Kidney channels. Bitter, sweet, astringent, and slightly warm. The raw form (sheng shou wu) resolves toxicity, moistens the intestines, and interrupts malaria; the prepared form (zhi shou wu), processed by steaming with black soybean liquid, supplements the Liver and Kidney, augments essence and blood, and darkens hair. First recorded in the Tang dynasty He Shou Wu Lu.

actions.en: Nourish blood and calm the spirit

indications.en: Dual vacuity of Heart and Spleen with qi and blood insufficiency
Palpitations, insomnia, and forgetfulness
Sallow complexion from blood vacuity
Excessive worry damaging the Heart and Spleen
Women with uterine bleeding and qi-blood depletion

contraindications_zh: 性温味甘助湿生热，脾胃湿盛、痰饮停滞、舌苔厚腻、内有郁火、外感未解、小儿疳积及糖尿病患者均不宜服。
contraindications_en: Warm in nature and sweet in flavor, may promote dampness and generate heat; not suitable in spleen-stomach dampness repletion, phlegm-fluid retention, thick greasy tongue coating, suppressed internal fire, unresolved external contraction, childhood malnutrition, and diabetes.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–15g；大剂量可至30g。亦可入膏剂、酒剂、单味泡服。

processing_methods.name: 龙眼肉
processing_methods.method: 取龙眼成熟果实，去壳去核，焙干或晒干假种皮（果肉）
processing_methods.effect: 补心脾，益气血，安神

safety_notes_zh: 甘温滋腻，过量易助湿生痰、动火上炎，糖尿病患者及湿热体质慎用。
safety_notes_en: Sweet, warm, and enriching-cloying; excessive use may easily promote dampness, generate phlegm, and stir fire flaring upward; use with caution in diabetes and damp-heat constitution.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主五脏邪气，安志厌食。久服强魂聪明，轻身不老，通神明。一名益智。生山谷。

description_zh: 无患子科植物龙眼的假种皮。归心、脾经。为补益心脾、养血安神之佳品，归脾汤中与人参、黄芪、当归同用，治思虑伤脾、心血不足之心悸失眠。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 维生素（B、C 族）和氨基酸

summary.zh: 龙眼肉富含糖类、多糖及微量生物活性成分，具补血养心、安神及温和免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Longan aril is rich in sugars, polysaccharides, and minor bioactives that nourish blood, calm the spirit, and provide mild immunomodulation.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 产后及病后气血不足调理

evidence_notes.note_zh: 龙眼肉甘温补益心脾、养血安神，归脾汤主要药味。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet and warm — tonifies heart and spleen and nourishes blood to calm the spirit; key ingredient of Gui Pi Tang.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 多糖具抗氧化及免疫调节活性；腺苷可能参与安神作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Polysaccharides show antioxidant and immunomodulatory activity; adenosine may contribute to the calming effect.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以性状和浸出物为质量指标，糖尿病患者慎用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses macroscopic and extractive quality markers; caution in diabetic patients due to sugar content.

description_en: The dried arillus of Dimocarpus longan (Sapindaceae). Enters the Heart and Spleen channels. Sweet and warm, it is an excellent tonic for the Heart and Spleen that nourishes blood and calms the spirit. In Gui Pi Tang it is combined with ren shen, huang qi, and dang gui to treat overthinking damaging the Spleen with Heart-blood insufficiency causing palpitations and insomnia.

actions.en: Moisten the Lung and stop cough
Calm the spirit and benefit cognition

indications.en: Dual injury of qi and yin with fatigue, vexation, and thirst

indications.zh: 热病后期，余热未清，气津两伤
indications.en: Late-stage febrile disease with lingering heat and dual injury of qi and fluids
Chronic cough from Lung vacuity, hemoptysis
Internal heat wasting-thirst with dryness of the mouth and tongue
Vacuity heat with vexation, fatigue, and shortness of breath

contraindications_zh: 性凉，中阳衰微、胃有寒湿、阳气不足、寒证泄泻者忌服。不宜与藜芦同用（十八反）。
contraindications_en: Cool in nature; contraindicated in decline of middle yang, stomach cold-dampness, yang qi insufficiency, and diarrhea from cold patterns. Should not be used concurrently with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma) per the Eighteen Antagonisms (shiba fan).

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–6g，另煎兑服为佳；或研末吞服，每次0.5–1g。

processing_methods.name: 西洋参
processing_methods.method: 原药材切薄片晾干，生用
processing_methods.effect: 补气养阴，清火生津

safety_notes_zh: 凉润之品，阳虚体质及寒湿内盛者不宜。服药期间忌饮浓茶及食萝卜，以免减弱补益之效。
safety_notes_en: Cool and moistening; not suitable in yang-deficient constitution and internal cold-dampness repletion. During administration, avoid strong tea and radish to prevent reducing tonifying effects.

classical_references.passage: 西洋参，苦微甘，寒。味厚气薄，补肺降火，生津液，除烦倦。虚而有火者相宜。

description_zh: 五加科植物西洋参的干燥根，原产北美，清乾隆年间传入中国。归心、肺、肾经。性凉而补，为气阴两虚有热者要药；与人参（性温）相对，凉补不温燥，适用于火盛阴伤之虚证。首载于《本草从新》（吴仪洛，1757）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 西洋参主含人参皂苷Rb1、Re、Rg1及拟人参皂苷F11（区别于人参的标志物），具有补气养阴、抗疲劳、免疫调节及降血糖作用。
summary.en: American ginseng contains ginsenosides Rb1, Re, Rg1 and pseudoginsenoside F11 (distinguishing it from Asian ginseng), with qi-and-yin tonifying, anti-fatigue, immunomodulatory and hypoglycemic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 气阴两虚之口干乏力、虚热烦倦
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Qi-and-yin vacuity with dry mouth, fatigue and deficient heat

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO专论收录Radix Panacis Quinquefolii，用于气阴两虚及作为补益剂。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists Radix Panacis Quinquefolii as a qi-and-yin tonic.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 可能影响华法林药效；与降糖药合用应监测血糖。
evidence_notes.note_en: May alter warfarin effect; monitor blood glucose when combined with hypoglycemic agents.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 拟人参皂苷F11为西洋参特征性成分，可用于与人参鉴别。
evidence_notes.note_en: Pseudoginsenoside F11 is a characteristic marker distinguishing American ginseng from Asian ginseng.

description_en: The dried root of Panax quinquefolius (Araliaceae), originally from North America and introduced to China during the Qing Qianlong era. Enters the Heart, Lung, and Kidney channels. Sweet, slightly bitter, and cool, it supplements qi while nourishing yin. In contrast to ren shen (warm in nature), xi yang shen provides cool supplementation without warm dryness, making it appropriate for vacuity patterns with fire exuberance and yin damage. First recorded in Ben Cao Cong Xin (Wu Yiluo, 1757).

actions.en: Augment qi and strengthen the Spleen
Generate fluids and moisten the Lung
Provide clear, gentle tonification without dryness

indications.en: Spleen vacuity with fatigue and poor appetite
Post-illness debility with qi and yin insufficiency
Dual injury of qi and yin with spontaneous sweating and thirst
Dry cough from Lung dryness, shortness of breath
Spontaneous sweating and malnutrition in children

contraindications_zh: 性平偏凉，作用平和，无明显禁忌；表邪未解、湿盛中满者不宜。不宜与藜芦同用。
contraindications_en: Neutral, tending toward cool, with mild action and no significant contraindications; not suitable when exterior pathogens remain unresolved and in dampness repletion with epigastric fullness. Should not be used concurrently with li lu (Veratri Radix et Rhizoma).

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–30g。作用较人参、党参平和，剂量可适当加大。

processing_methods.name: 太子参
processing_methods.method: 夏季茎叶大部分枯萎时采挖，洗净，除去须根，置沸水中略烫后晒干
processing_methods.effect: 益气健脾，生津润肺

safety_notes_zh: 性味平和，补力较弱，适用于不耐温补峻补者，尤宜小儿、热病后及气阴两虚之轻证。
safety_notes_en: Mild in flavor and nature with weaker supplementing power; suitable for those who cannot tolerate warm or drastic supplementation, especially children, post-febrile conditions, and mild qi-yin dual vacuity.

classical_references.passage: 太子参，气味甘、微苦，无毒。补气生津，体润性和，治脾虚倦怠，肺虚咳嗽，最宜小儿。

description_zh: 石竹科植物孩儿参的干燥块根，又名孩儿参。归脾、肺经。补气生津，性味平和，作用清淡，被誉为清补之品，最宜于气阴两虚之轻证及小儿、热病后调理。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 太子参主含多糖和环肽类化合物（太子参环肽），具有补气生津、免疫调节及抗疲劳作用，性较人参平和。
summary.en: Pseudostellaria root contains polysaccharides and cyclic peptides (heterophyllins), with qi-tonifying, fluid-generating, immunomodulatory and anti-fatigue effects; gentler than Panax ginseng.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 脾肺气阴两虚、倦怠乏力
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Spleen-Lung qi and yin vacuity with fatigue
Gentle tonic for children and frail patients

evidence_notes.note_zh: 补气生津，性平不燥，常代人参用于气阴两虚且不耐温补者。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tonifies qi and generates fluids; neutral and non-drying, often substituted for ginseng in patients intolerant of warming tonics.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 太子参环肽类为其特征性成分，显示免疫调节活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Characteristic cyclic peptides (heterophyllins) demonstrate immunomodulatory activity in pharmacology studies.

description_en: The dried tuberous root of Pseudostellaria heterophylla (Caryophyllaceae), also known as hai er shen (child ginseng). Enters the Spleen and Lung channels. Sweet, slightly bitter, and neutral, it augments qi and generates fluids with a mild and clear action, making it the ideal clear-supplementing medicinal. It is most suitable for mild qi-yin dual vacuity, pediatric patients, and post-febrile recovery.

actions.en: Astringe the Lung and stop cough
Bind the intestines and stop diarrhea

indications.en: Chronic cough from Lung vacuity with little phlegm
Chronic diarrhea and dysentery
Roundworm-induced abdominal pain and vomiting
Vacuity-heat wasting-thirst
Bloody stool, hematuria, and uterine bleeding

contraindications_zh: 酸收敛邪，外感风寒咳嗽、湿热泻痢、积滞内停未清者忌服。胃酸过多者亦慎用。
contraindications_en: Sour and astringent, may trap pathogens; contraindicated in wind-cold cough, damp-heat dysentery, and internal accumulation and stagnation not yet cleared. Also use with caution in excessive gastric acid.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g，大剂量可用至30g。止血宜炒炭用。安蛔常用乌梅丸方。

processing_methods.name: 乌梅
processing_methods.method: 夏季果实近成熟时采收，低温烘干后闷至色变黑
processing_methods.effect: 敛肺涩肠，安蛔生津

processing_methods.name: 乌梅炭
processing_methods.effect: 增强涩肠止泻、止血之功

safety_notes_zh: 酸涩收敛之品，凡邪盛实证、表邪未解者忌用，以防闭门留寇。
safety_notes_en: A sour-astringent and astringent substance; contraindicated in repletion pathogen patterns and unresolved exterior pathogens, to prevent trapping pathogens inside (closing the door on the thief).

classical_references.passage: 味酸，平。主下气，除热烦满，安心，肢体痛，偏枯不仁，死肌，去青黑痣，恶疾。

description_zh: 蔷薇科植物梅的干燥近成熟果实。归肝、脾、肺、大肠经。酸涩平和，敛肺止咳，涩肠止泻，安蛔生津；为治蛔厥之要药，张仲景乌梅丸即以本品为君。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 乌梅富含多种有机酸（柠檬酸、苹果酸）及三萜酸，具有抑菌、驱蛔、收敛止泻及生津止渴作用。
summary.en: Mume fruit is rich in organic acids (citric, malic) and triterpene acids with antimicrobial, ascaricidal, astringent antidiarrheal and thirst-relieving effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Roundworm colic (as in Wu Mei Wan)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 敛肺止咳、涩肠止泻、安蛔止痛、生津止渴，为乌梅丸君药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Astringes the Lung, binds intestines, calms roundworms, and generates fluids; sovereign herb in Wu Mei Wan.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 乌梅水煎液在体外对多种肠道致病菌有抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Mume decoction inhibits multiple enteric pathogens in vitro.

description_en: The dried nearly ripe fruit of Prunus mume (Rosaceae). Enters the Liver, Spleen, Lung, and Large Intestine channels. Sour, astringent, and neutral, it astringes the Lung to stop cough, binds the intestines to stop diarrhea, calms roundworms, and generates fluids. It is the key herb for roundworm reversal (hui jue), and Zhang Zhongjing's Wu Mei Wan uses it as chief for this condition.

actions.en: Astringe the Lung and direct fire downward
Bind the intestines and stop diarrhea
Secure essence and stop seminal emission
Absorb dampness and constrain sores (external use)

indications.en: Chronic cough from Lung vacuity, spontaneous and night sweats
Chronic diarrhea, dysentery, and rectal prolapse
Seminal emission, spermatorrhea, and abnormal vaginal discharge
Uterine bleeding, blood in the stool, and hemorrhoidal bleeding

indications.zh: 湿疮流水，痈肿疮毒（外用）
indications.en: Weeping eczema and toxic sores (topical use)

contraindications_zh: 酸涩收敛之力较强，外感咳嗽、湿热泻痢、积滞未清者忌服。内服剂量不宜过大，以免引起恶心呕吐。
contraindications_en: Has relatively strong sour-astringent action; contraindicated in external contraction cough, damp-heat dysentery, and accumulation not yet cleared. Internal dosage should not be excessive to avoid causing nausea and vomiting.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎汤3–6g，或入丸散，每次1–1.5g。外用适量，研末撒或煎汤洗。

processing_methods.name: 五倍子
processing_methods.method: 秋季采收虫瘿，蒸至表面呈灰色、内部蚜虫死后晒干
processing_methods.effect: 敛肺涩肠，固精止血

safety_notes_zh: 含大量鞣酸（约60–70%），不宜与铁剂、生物碱、蛋白类药物同服。大剂量内服可刺激胃肠，引起恶心呕吐及肝肾损害，应严格控制剂量。
safety_notes_en: Contains large amounts of tannic acid (approximately 60-70%); should not be taken concurrently with iron preparations, alkaloids, or protein-based medications. High internal doses may stimulate the gastrointestinal tract, causing nausea, vomiting, and liver-kidney damage; dosage must be strictly controlled.

classical_references.passage: 五倍子，咸酸，平，无毒。敛肺降火，化痰饮，止咳嗽，消渴盗汗，呕吐失血久痢，黄病心腹痛，小儿夜啼，治眼赤湿烂，消肿毒喉痹，敛溃疮金疮，收脱肛子肠坠下。

description_zh: 漆树科植物盐肤木、青麸杨等叶上由五倍子蚜寄生形成的虫瘿。归肺、大肠、肾经。酸涩性寒，既能敛肺降火，又能涩肠固精止血，内服外用皆宜，为收涩要药。首载于《本草拾遗》，《本草纲目》详记其功。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 五倍子含丰富鞣质（60%以上）及其水解产物没食子酸，具有收敛、止血、抗菌、抗溃疡及抗病毒作用。
summary.en: Chinese gall contains abundant gallotannins (>60%) and gallic acid, with astringent, hemostatic, antibacterial, anti-ulcer and antiviral effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 局部外用治烧伤、口疮、痔疮出血
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Topical use for burns, mouth ulcers and hemorrhoidal bleeding

evidence_notes.note_zh: 敛肺降火、涩肠止泻、固精止遗、敛汗止血，为主要收涩药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Astringes the Lung, binds intestines, secures essence, restrains sweat and stops bleeding; a principal astringent.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鞣质能与蛋白沉淀形成保护膜，广泛用于创面及黏膜收敛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tannins precipitate proteins to form a protective coat, underlying its wound and mucosal astringent applications.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定五倍子含鞣质（以没食子酸计）不得少于50.0%。
evidence_notes.note_en: The Chinese Pharmacopoeia requires not less than 50.0% tannins (calculated as gallic acid) in Chinese gall.

description_en: Insect galls formed on leaves of Rhus chinensis, R. potaninii, and related species (Anacardiaceae) by parasitic aphids of the genus Schlechtendalia. Enters the Lung, Large Intestine, and Kidney channels. Sour, astringent, and cold, it astringes the Lung and directs fire downward, binds the intestines and secures essence, stops sweating and bleeding. Suitable for both internal administration and external application, it is a key astringent-securing herb.

actions.en: Warm the middle and move qi
Bind the intestines and stop diarrhea
Open the appetite and disperse food stagnation

indications.en: Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold with chronic, unrelenting diarrhea
Daybreak diarrhea (Kidney diarrhea)
Epigastric and abdominal distension and pain, poor appetite, vomiting
Undigested food retention
Diarrhea with undigested food

contraindications_zh: 湿热泻痢、肠胃实热、阴虚火旺者忌服。生肉豆蔻含挥发油（肉豆蔻醚等），过量服用可致中毒，必须煨制后入药；不可生服，不可超量。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in damp-heat dysentery, gastrointestinal repletion heat, and yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Raw rou dou kou contains volatile oils (myristicin, etc.); overdose may cause poisoning; it must be roasted before medicinal use; raw consumption and excessive doses are prohibited.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–9g，入丸散每次0.5–1g。必须煨用，去油后入药。

processing_methods.name: 煨肉豆蔻
processing_methods.method: 面粉加水拌和，包裹肉豆蔻，置热麸皮中煨至面皮焦黄，取出去面，碾去外壳
processing_methods.effect: 煨制可去除大部分挥发油，减轻刺激性与毒性，增强涩肠止泻之功

safety_notes_zh: 生肉豆蔻含肉豆蔻醚（myristicin）等挥发油成分，过量可致幻、恶心、呕吐、心动过速，甚至昏迷。临床须用煨制品，控制剂量在常用范围内，严禁生用或大剂量服用。孕妇慎用。
safety_notes_en: Raw rou dou kou contains myristicin and other volatile oil components; overdose may cause hallucinations, nausea, vomiting, tachycardia, and even coma. Clinical use must employ the roasted form, with dosage controlled within the standard range; raw use or high doses are strictly prohibited. Use with caution during pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 肉豆蔻，辛，温，无毒。暖脾胃，固大肠，止虚泻冷痢、心腹胀痛、宿食不消、小儿乳霍。

description_zh: 肉豆蔻科植物肉豆蔻的干燥种仁。归脾、胃、大肠经。辛温芳香，温中涩肠，为治脾肾虚寒久泻、五更泄泻之要药，常与补骨脂、五味子、吴茱萸同用（四神丸）。临床必须煨制以减毒。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 三肉豆蔻酸甘油酯（固定油）

summary.zh: 肉豆蔻含挥发油（肉豆蔻醚、榄香素）及固定油，现代研究报道抗腹泻、抗菌、抗炎及中枢作用；过量有神经毒性及幻觉风险，故多煨用并严格控制剂量。
summary.en: Nutmeg (Myristica) contains volatile oil rich in myristicin and elemicin plus a fixed oil (trimyristin), with antidiarrheal, antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and central effects in preclinical work. Overdose risks neurotoxicity and hallucinations, so it is usually dry-roasted (wei) and dosed conservatively.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Chronic diarrhea from spleen/kidney-yang vacuity (including daybreak diarrhea)
Cold epigastric pain and poor appetite

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）强调肉豆蔻须煨去油方可内服以减毒，每日 3–6 g。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky emphasizes that nutmeg should be dry-roasted to remove repletion oil before oral use, daily dose 3–6 g.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Brinker 记载肉豆蔻醚具单胺氧化酶抑制活性，大剂量（>5 g 粉末）可致幻觉、心动过速及肝毒性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Brinker records that myristicin has MAO-inhibiting activity; large doses (>5 g powder) can cause hallucinations, tachycardia, and hepatotoxicity.

description_en: The dried seed kernel of Myristica fragrans (Myristicaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Pungent, warm, and aromatic, it warms the middle, moves qi, binds the intestines, and stops diarrhea. It is the key herb for Spleen-Kidney vacuity-cold chronic diarrhea and dawn diarrhea, combined with bu gu zhi, wu wei zi, and wu zhu yu in Si Shen Wan. It must be processed by baking (wei rou dou kou) to reduce toxicity.

actions.en: Bind the intestines and stop diarrhea
Augment the Kidney and secure the root

indications.en: Seminal emission and spermatorrhea
Enuresis and frequent urination
Uterine bleeding and abnormal vaginal discharge
Chronic diarrhea, dysentery, and rectal prolapse
Various conditions of Kidney vacuity with failure to consolidate

contraindications_zh: 酸涩收敛之品，有实火、实邪及小便不利者忌服。外感未解、湿热下注者亦不宜用。
contraindications_en: A sour-astringent substance; contraindicated in repletion fire, repletion pathogens, and difficult urination. Also not suitable when exterior pathogens remain unresolved and in damp-heat pouring downward.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g。亦可熬膏（金樱子膏）或入丸散。常与芡实同用为水陆二仙丹。

processing_methods.name: 金樱子
processing_methods.method: 10–11月果实成熟变红时采收，晒干，除去毛刺
processing_methods.effect: 固精缩尿，涩肠止泻

processing_methods.name: 金樱子膏
processing_methods.method: 去毛刺净果实加水熬煮，浓缩成膏
processing_methods.effect: 便于久服，长于固肾涩精

safety_notes_zh: 酸涩之性较强，凡有实邪者忌服。表证未解或湿热未清者用之恐留邪。
safety_notes_en: Has relatively strong sour-astringent properties; contraindicated in repletion pathogens. Using it when exterior patterns remain unresolved or damp-heat is not yet cleared may trap pathogens.

classical_references.passage: 金樱子，酸涩，平，无毒。脾泄下利，止小便利，涩精气，久服令人耐寒轻身。

description_zh: 蔷薇科植物金樱子的干燥成熟果实。归肾、膀胱、大肠经。酸涩收敛，善能固精缩尿、涩肠止泻，为治肾虚滑脱诸证之要药，常与芡实相配（水陆二仙丹）治遗精、白浊、带下。首载于《蜀本草》。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 三萜类（委陵菜酸、野鸦椿酸）

summary.zh: 金樱子含鞣质、三萜及多糖，通过收敛固涩作用用于遗精、尿频、带下、久泻久痢等滑脱证。
summary.en: Rosa laevigata contains tannins, triterpenes, and polysaccharides, with astringent/stabilizing action used for spermatorrhea, frequent urination, leukorrhea, and chronic diarrhea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 金樱子酸涩收敛，固精缩尿止带止泻。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sour and astringent — stabilizes essence, reduces urination, checks leukorrhea and diarrhea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鞣质沉淀黏膜蛋白形成保护膜，三萜成分显示抗氧化及免疫调节活性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Tannins precipitate mucosal proteins forming a protective layer; triterpenes show antioxidant and immunomodulatory activity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以多糖和鞣质含量为质量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses polysaccharide and tannin content as quality markers.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Rosa laevigata (Rosaceae). Enters the Kidney, Bladder, and Large Intestine channels. Sour, sweet, astringent, and neutral, its astringent and securing action is powerful, making it the key herb for Kidney-vacuity slippery discharge patterns including seminal emission, turbid urine, and leukorrhea. Classically paired with qian shi (Euryale seed) in Shui Lu Er Xian Dan. First recorded in Shu Ben Cao.

actions.en: Promote urination and leach out dampness
Separate and discharge damp-heat via the urine

indications.en: Dysuria with edema and distension
Diarrhea from dampness
Painful urinary dribbling, turbid urine, and leukorrhea
Damp-heat jaundice

indications.zh: 水热互结伤阴之小便不利
indications.en: Dysuria from water and heat binding with yin injury

contraindications_zh: 无水湿证者不宜。阴虚津液亏损而无水湿者慎用，以免耗伤阴液。
contraindications_en: Not suitable when there is no water-dampness pattern. Use with caution in yin vacuity with fluid depletion without water-dampness, to avoid consuming yin fluids.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g；利水作用较茯苓强而无补益之功，不宜久服，以防伤阴。

processing_methods.name: 生猪苓
processing_methods.effect: 利水渗湿通淋，为临床常用形式

safety_notes_zh: 本品利水作用较强而无补益，阴虚无湿者及无水湿实证者不宜久用，以防耗伤津液。
safety_notes_en: This herb has strong water-draining action without tonifying effects; not suitable for prolonged use in yin vacuity without dampness and without water-dampness repletion patterns, to prevent consuming fluids.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主痎疟，解毒蛊注不祥，利水道。久服轻身耐老。

description_zh: 多孔菌科真菌猪苓的干燥菌核。归肾、膀胱经。甘淡渗利，专走水道，利水渗湿之力较茯苓为胜，但无健脾补中之功，故专于祛邪而不补正。为《伤寒论》五苓散、猪苓汤等利水方的核心药物。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 猪苓主含猪苓多糖、麦角甾醇及猪苓酮等，药理示其利尿、免疫调节及辅助抗肿瘤作用，临床用于水肿、淋证及肿瘤辅助治疗。
summary.en: Polyporus contains polyporus polysaccharide (PPS), ergosterol and polyporusterones; pharmacology shows diuretic, immunomodulatory and adjunctive antitumor effects, clinically used for edema, dysuria and as an oncology adjunct.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Adjunctive immunotherapy in hepatitis and oncology

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以麦角甾醇为含量测定指标，规定不得少于0.070%。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses ergosterol as the quality assay marker (≥0.070%).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出猪苓利水力峻而不补，与茯苓相须时常用于水湿内停之剂。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes polyporus has strong diuretic action without tonification, and is commonly paired with Fu Ling in water-dampness formulas.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述猪苓多糖作为免疫调节剂用于慢性肝炎和肿瘤辅助治疗的临床研究。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite clinical studies of polyporus polysaccharide as an immunomodulator in chronic hepatitis and cancer adjunct therapy.

description_en: The dried sclerotium of the fungus Polyporus umbellatus (Polyporaceae). Enters the Kidney and Bladder channels. Sweet, bland, and neutral, it specializes in reaching the water passages, with a stronger diuretic action than fu ling but without fu ling's Spleen-fortifying and qi-supplementing capacity. It purely drains pathogenic factors without supplementing the upright. A core herb in Zhang Zhongjing's Wu Ling San and Zhu Ling Tang.

actions.en: Enrich yin and subdue ascendant yang
Reduce fever and eliminate steaming bone
Search out and dislodge pathogens lurking in the yin level

indications.en: Yin-vacuity fever and steaming-bone taxation heat

indications.zh: 温病后期邪伏阴分，夜热早凉
indications.en: Late-stage warm disease with heat hidden in the yin aspect — fever at night, cool by morning
Yin injury from febrile disease with internal stirring of vacuity wind
Abdominal masses and chronic malarial splenomegaly （疟母）
Amenorrhea or scanty menses from blood stasis

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒、食少便溏及孕妇忌用。无阴虚发热或血瘀癥瘕之实证者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold, poor appetite with loose stools, and pregnancy. Not suitable when there is no yin-deficient fever or blood stasis masses.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–24g，宜打碎先煎；滋阴潜阳多生用，软坚散结多醋炙。

processing_methods.name: 生鳖甲
processing_methods.effect: 长于滋阴潜阳、退热除蒸

processing_methods.name: 醋鳖甲
processing_methods.effect: 增强入肝软坚散结之功，用于癥瘕积聚、疟母

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源药材，须使用合法养殖或经认证来源以避免野生种资源问题。质重滋腻，脾胃虚寒、痰湿内盛及孕妇忌用。必先煎以利有效成分溶出。
safety_notes_en: An animal-sourced medicinal material; must use legally farmed or certified sources to avoid wild species resource issues. Heavy and enriching-cloying; contraindicated in spleen-stomach vacuity cold, internal phlegm-dampness repletion, and pregnancy. Must be decocted first to facilitate the release of active constituents.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，平。主心腹癥瘕坚积，寒热，去痞息肉、阴蚀、痔恶肉。
青蒿不能直入阴分，有鳖甲领之入也；鳖甲不能独出阳分，赖青蒿领之出也。

description_zh: 鳖科动物中华鳖的背甲。归肝、肾经。咸寒入阴，既能滋阴潜阳、退虚热除骨蒸，又善搜剔阴分之伏邪以治温病后期夜热早凉之证，复能软坚散结以消癥瘕、疟母。吴鞠通青蒿鳖甲汤以青蒿、鳖甲相须为用，取「先入后出」之妙。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 鳖甲主含动物胶原蛋白、碳酸钙、多种氨基酸和微量元素，药理示其免疫调节、抗纤维化（肝纤维化）、软坚散结与提高血浆蛋白作用。
summary.en: Turtle carapace contains collagen, calcium salts, free amino acids and trace elements; pharmacology shows immunomodulatory, anti-hepatic-fibrosis, mass-softening and plasma-protein-raising effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肝硬化及肝纤维化辅助（鳖甲软肝片、鳖甲煎丸）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Adjunct in hepatic fibrosis and cirrhosis (Bie Jia Ruan Gan Pian, Bie Jia Jian Wan)
Yin-vacuity heat and steaming-bone tidal fever

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载鳖甲及鳖甲胶，规定来源为鳖科动物鳖的背甲。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists Bie Jia and Bie Jia Jiao with Trionyx sinensis carapace as the official source.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）强调鳖甲咸寒入肝肾，既滋阴潜阳又软坚散结，是青蒿鳖甲汤及鳖甲煎丸的核心药物。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky emphasizes that Bie Jia is salty-cool entering Liver and Kidney, enriching yin, subduing yang and softening masses — the core herb of Qing Hao Bie Jia Tang and Bie Jia Jian Wan.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述临床研究示鳖甲制剂在肝纤维化逆转中的辅助作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite clinical studies of Bie Jia preparations as adjuncts in reversing hepatic fibrosis.

description_en: The carapace of the Chinese soft-shelled turtle Trionyx sinensis (Trionychidae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Salty and cool, it enriches yin and subdues yang, reduces vacuity fever and eliminates steaming bone heat, and searches out pathogens lurking at the yin level for late-stage warm disease with night fever and morning coolness. It also softens hardness and dissipates nodules for concretions and malarial masses. Wu Jutong's Qing Hao Bie Jia Tang employs the 'entering first, exiting after' synergy between bie jia and qing hao.

actions.en: Tonify the middle and augment qi
Moisten the Lung and stop cough
Construct the middle and tonify vacuity

indications.zh: 中焦虚寒，脘腹拘急疼痛
indications.en: Middle-jiao vacuity cold with cramping abdominal pain
Taxation vacuity with internal urgency
Dry cough from Lung vacuity
Qi-vacuity fatigue with reduced appetite and loose stools
Pediatric Spleen vacuity with poor appetite

contraindications_zh: 湿热内蕴、中满气滞、呕吐、湿盛脘腹胀满及糖尿病（消渴）者不宜；牙疳、小儿疳积患者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable in damp-heat brewing internally, epigastric fullness with qi stagnation, vomiting, dampness repletion with epigastric abdominal distention, and diabetes (xiao ke); use with caution in oral gangrene and childhood malnutrition.

dosage_range.notes: 入汤剂宜烊化冲服或去渣后兑入再煎片刻；一般用量15–60g。小建中汤原方用饴糖一升（约30g）为君。

processing_methods.name: 饴糖
processing_methods.method: 糯米或粳米经麦芽发酵熬制而成的糖浆
processing_methods.effect: 甘温质润，建中缓急，为补虚缓痛专品

safety_notes_zh: 饴糖含麦芽糖与葡萄糖，糖尿病及肥胖者忌用；助湿生痰，湿痰盛、舌苔厚腻者不宜。入汤剂须烊化，避免久煎焦化。
safety_notes_en: Yi tang contains maltose and glucose; contraindicated in diabetes and obesity; promotes dampness and generates phlegm; not suitable in phlegm-dampness repletion and thick greasy tongue coating. In decoctions, must be melted and dissolved (yang hua); avoid prolonged decoction that causes caramelization.

classical_references.passage: 虚劳里急，悸，衄，腹中痛，梦失精，四肢酸疼，手足烦热，咽干口燥，小建中汤主之。

description_zh: 以糯米、粳米、小麦等富含淀粉的谷物，经麦芽（或发芽大麦）水解发酵熬制而成的糖浆。归脾、胃、肺经。甘温质润，味最甜而性和缓，为甘温建中之首品，最能补脾虚、缓肝急而止腹痛，为张仲景小建中汤、大建中汤、黄芪建中汤之君药。兼能润肺止咳，用于虚劳燥咳。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 饴糖主含麦芽糖、葡萄糖、糊精等可快速吸收的糖类，具有补充能量、缓解腹痛与保护胃黏膜作用，甘温质润最善建中缓急。
summary.en: Maltose syrup contains maltose, glucose and dextrins — rapidly absorbed sugars providing energy, alleviating abdominal cramping and coating the gastric mucosa; sweet, warm and moistening, it is foremost in constructing the middle.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 脾胃虚寒之腹痛（如功能性消化不良）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Abdominal pain of Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold (e.g. functional dyspepsia)

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 将饴糖列为补气甘温建中的代表药，强调其为小建中汤、大建中汤的君药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky lists Yi Tang as the representative sweet-warm middle-constructing tonic, emphasizing its role as sovereign in Xiao Jian Zhong Tang and Da Jian Zhong Tang.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Chen & Chen）指出饴糖甘温质润，与单纯蔗糖不同，所含麦芽糖及糊精吸收较缓，不易骤然升高血糖，但糖尿病患者仍应禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen note that Yi Tang, unlike plain sucrose, contains maltose and dextrins with slower absorption, yet diabetic patients should still avoid it.

description_en: Maltose syrup (malt sugar) prepared by hydrolyzing and fermenting starch-rich grains such as glutinous rice, non-glutinous rice, or wheat with malted barley. Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Lung channels. Sweet, warm, and moist, it is the premier warming-middle constructing agent, excelling at supplementing Spleen vacuity, moderating Liver urgency, and relieving abdominal pain. It serves as the chief in Zhang Zhongjing's Xiao Jian Zhong Tang, Da Jian Zhong Tang, and Huang Qi Jian Zhong Tang.

name_latin: Ephedrae Radix et Rhizoma (Ephedra sinica, root)

actions.en: Secure the exterior and stop sweating

indications.en: Spontaneous sweating
Night sweats
Postpartum vacuity sweating
Profuse sweating from constitutional weakness
Unremitting sweating from yin or yang vacuity

contraindications_zh: 有表邪者忌用——麻黄根专于固表敛汗，若表邪未解、汗为驱邪之途时误用之，可致闭门留寇，使邪气内传。本品功效与麻黄茎相反：麻黄发汗，麻黄根止汗，临床必严格区分，绝不可互代。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated when exterior pathogens are present — ma huang gen specializes in securing the exterior and constraining sweat; if exterior pathogens remain unresolved and sweating is the pathway for expelling pathogens, mistaken use may trap pathogens inside (closing the door on the thief), causing pathogens to transmit inward. The effects of this herb are opposite to those of ma huang stem: ma huang promotes sweating while ma huang gen stops sweating; clinical use must strictly distinguish between the two, which must never be substituted for each other.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–9g；外用可研末扑身。古方牡蛎散用至30g（三钱以上）配伍牡蛎、黄芪、浮小麦同煎。

processing_methods.name: 生麻黄根
processing_methods.effect: 固表止汗，为临床常用形式

safety_notes_zh: 【安全重点】麻黄根为麻黄科植物草麻黄、中麻黄的干燥根及根茎，与其地上部分的麻黄茎（ma_huang）为同一植物的不同药用部位，药性与功效完全相反——麻黄茎辛温发汗解表，麻黄根甘平固表止汗。临床处方及配药时必须严格区分，不可代换。本品几乎不含麻黄碱（ephedrine），无心血管兴奋作用，但仍应避免用于表邪未解者。
safety_notes_en: [Safety focus] Ma huang gen is the dried root and rhizome of Ephedraceae plants Ephedra sinica and E. intermedia; it is a different medicinal part of the same plant as the aerial ma huang stem, with completely opposite properties and effects — ma huang stem is acrid-warm for inducing sweating and releasing the exterior, while ma huang gen is sweet-neutral for securing the exterior and stopping sweat. Clinical prescriptions and dispensing must strictly distinguish between them; they must not be interchanged. This herb contains virtually no ephedrine and has no cardiovascular stimulant effects, but it should still be avoided when exterior pathogens remain unresolved.

classical_references.passage: 麻黄发汗之气，驶不能御；而根节止汗，效如影响，物理之妙，不可测度者如此。

description_zh: 麻黄科植物草麻黄 Ephedra sinica 或中麻黄 Ephedra intermedia 的干燥根及根茎。归肺经。甘涩性平，专走肌表以固腠理、敛汗液，为治自汗、盗汗之要药。与麻黄（茎）为同株异效之典型——茎发汗，根止汗——是中药「一物两用、性效相反」最著名的例子之一。常与牡蛎、黄芪、浮小麦配伍（牡蛎散）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: hypotensive and antihidrotic markers; distinct from stem ephedrine

summary.zh: 麻黄根主含麻黄根碱（ephedradines）、麻黄宁等大环精胺类生物碱及鞣质、黄酮等，药理示其降压、抑汗及收敛作用，与麻黄茎所含麻黄碱类拟交感作用完全不同。
summary.en: Ephedra root contains macrocyclic spermine alkaloids (ephedradines A–D, maokonine), tannins and flavonoids; pharmacology shows hypotensive, antihidrotic (sweat-suppressing) and astringent effects — pharmacologically distinct from the sympathomimetic ephedrine of the stem.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 明确区分麻黄茎（发汗）与麻黄根（止汗），强调二者不可互代，并将牡蛎散列为经典止汗方。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky explicitly distinguishes Ma Huang stem (diaphoretic) from Ma Huang Gen root (antihidrotic), emphasizing they are not interchangeable, and lists Mu Li San as the classical sweat-arresting formula.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Chen & Chen 引述药理研究示麻黄根碱具降压作用，与麻黄碱升压作用相反。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen cite pharmacology studies showing ephedradines have hypotensive activity — opposite to the pressor effect of stem ephedrine.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》将麻黄根与麻黄分别立条，规定其来源、性状与功效截然不同，处方时须严格区分。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists Ma Huang Gen and Ma Huang as separate monographs with distinct sources, characteristics and indications; prescriptions must strictly distinguish them.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Ephedra sinica or E. intermedia (Ephedraceae). Enters the Lung channel. Sweet, astringent, and neutral, it exclusively reaches the muscle layer to secure the interstices and check sweating, making it the key herb for spontaneous sweating and night sweats. It provides the most celebrated example of 'one plant, two uses with opposite effects' in Chinese materia medica: the stem (ma huang) promotes sweating, while the root stops it. Commonly combined with mu li, huang qi, and fu xiao mai in Mu Li San.

actions.en: Release the exterior and eliminate vexation

indications.zh: 外感表证，发热恶寒，头痛
indications.en: Exterior pattern with fever, chills and headache

indications.zh: 热病胸中烦闷、虚烦不眠
indications.en: Vexation and insomnia from heat disease （栀子豉汤证）
Early-stage warm disease
Incomplete eruption of measles and pox
Chest and epigastric stuffiness from food stagnation

contraindications_zh: 胃虚易呕者慎用。单品力薄，多与金银花、连翘、栀子等配伍。孕妇慎用大剂量。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in stomach vacuity with easy vomiting. Weak when used alone; often combined with jin yin hua, lian qiao, zhi zi, etc.. Use large doses with caution during pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–12g。根据加工不同性味稍异：桑叶、青蒿同制者偏凉，用于风热与温病；麻黄、苏叶同制者偏温，用于风寒；本条目以吴鞠通银翘散所用之辛凉制品为准。

processing_methods.name: 淡豆豉
processing_methods.method: 大豆以桑叶、青蒿煎汁浸渍发酵，加盐少许或不加盐
processing_methods.effect: 辛凉解表，除烦透邪，为银翘散所用

processing_methods.name: 咸豆豉
processing_methods.method: 以麻黄、苏叶等煎汁浸渍发酵，加盐
processing_methods.effect: 辛温解表，作调味品而非正品入药

safety_notes_zh: 本品以大豆 Glycine max 发酵加工而成，入药须用依《中国药典》之发酵工艺制成的淡豆豉，不可用日常食用的咸豆豉或纳豆代替。辛凉或辛温品须依处方需要选用。
safety_notes_en: This herb is made by fermenting soybeans (Glycine max); medicinal use must employ dan dou chi prepared according to the Chinese Pharmacopoeia fermentation process; it cannot be substituted with everyday salty fermented soybeans or natto. The acrid-cool or acrid-warm variety should be selected according to prescription requirements.

classical_references.passage: 发汗后，水药不得入口为逆；若更发汗，必吐下不止。发汗吐下后，虚烦不得眠；若剧者，必反复颠倒，心中懊憹，栀子豉汤主之。

description_zh: 豆科植物大豆 Glycine max 的成熟种子经发酵加工品。归肺、胃经。辛开苦降，既能解表散邪又能宣发胸中郁热而除烦，为治外感表证及热病后虚烦不眠之要药。吴鞠通银翘散以之配淡竹叶，共助金银花、连翘轻清宣透；张仲景栀子豉汤以之配栀子，专治虚烦懊憹。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 大豆异黄酮（大豆苷元、染料木素）

summary.zh: 淡豆豉为大豆经桑叶、青蒿煎汁发酵加工品，主含大豆异黄酮、皂苷及发酵生成的游离氨基酸与B族维生素，药理示其解热、轻度发汗与助消化作用。
summary.en: Dan Dou Chi is soybean fermented with mulberry leaf and Artemisia decoction; it contains soy isoflavones, saponins and fermentation amino acids / B-vitamins; pharmacology shows antipyretic, mild diaphoretic and digestive effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Common cold fever and post-febrile vexation

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定淡豆豉以大豆经桑叶、青蒿汁发酵而成，所含大豆异黄酮等作为质量参考。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies Dan Dou Chi as soybean fermented with mulberry leaf and Artemisia decoction, with soy isoflavones as quality reference constituents.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）记载淡豆豉既可辛凉解表，又能治热病后虚烦，为栀子豉汤之臣药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky records Dan Dou Chi as an acrid-cool exterior-releaser and treatment for post-febrile vexation — minister herb of Zhi Zi Chi Tang.

description_en: Fermented soybean, the processed mature seed of Glycine max (Fabaceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Bitter, pungent, and cool, it both releases the exterior to dispel pathogens and vents constrained heat from the chest to eliminate vexation. Wu Jutong's Yin Qiao San combines it with dan zhu ye to assist jin yin hua and lian qiao in light, clear venting; Zhang Zhongjing's Zhi Zi Chi Tang pairs it with zhi zi for vacuity-vexation and restless insomnia.

actions.en: Promote urination and unblock painful dribbling
Guide heat downward through the urine

indications.en: Vexation and thirst in febrile disease
Sores on the mouth and tongue
Dark scanty urination and heat-lin with painful dribbling
Heart fire transferred to the Small Intestine
Wei-level warm disease with fever and thirst

contraindications_zh: 无实热及阴虚火旺者不宜。孕妇及体虚无热者慎用。本品与竹茹（zhu_ru，竹秆中间层）来源不同，不可混淆。
contraindications_en: Not suitable when there is no repletion heat and in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Use with caution during pregnancy and in constitutional vacuity without heat. This herb has a different source from zhu ru (the middle layer of bamboo culm); the two must not be confused.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–10g；鲜品加倍。本品为禾本科淡竹叶属植物，与竹类植物（竹叶、竹茹）来源不同，须严格区分。

processing_methods.name: 淡竹叶
processing_methods.effect: 清热除烦、利尿通淋

safety_notes_zh: 【辨识要点】本品为禾本科淡竹叶属多年生草本 Lophatherum gracile 的干燥茎叶，与真正的竹类（禾本科竹亚科）植物来源不同，不可与竹叶（鲜竹叶，Phyllostachys spp. 叶）或竹茹（zhu_ru，竹类茎秆中间层）混淆。现代药典明确区分三者。
safety_notes_en: [Identification key] This herb is the dried stems and leaves of Lophatherum gracile (Poaceae, Lophatherum genus), a perennial grass; it has a different plant source from true bamboo (Poaceae, Bambusoideae); it must not be confused with zhu ye (fresh bamboo leaves, Phyllostachys spp. leaves) or zhu ru (the middle layer of bamboo culm). The modern pharmacopoeia clearly distinguishes among the three.

classical_references.passage: 淡竹叶，处处原野有之，春生苗，高数寸，细茎绿叶，俨如竹米落地所生，其根一窠十数须，须上结子。味甘、淡，性寒，能清心火，利小便。

description_zh: 禾本科植物淡竹叶 Lophatherum gracile 的干燥茎叶。归心、胃、小肠经。甘淡性寒，上清心胃之热以除烦止渴，下利小肠之湿以导热下行，为治热病烦渴、口舌生疮、小便赤涩之常用药。与竹茹（竹类茎秆中间层）及真正竹叶（竹类叶片）来源不同，常易混淆。吴鞠通银翘散、吴鞠通三仁汤均用之。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 淡竹叶黄酮（牡荆素、荭草素）

summary.zh: 淡竹叶主含C-糖苷黄酮（牡荆素、荭草素）、三萜类及钾盐，药理示其利尿、解热与抗氧化作用，临床用于热病烦渴及热淋涩痛。
summary.en: Lophatherum contains C-glycosyl flavonoids (vitexin, orientin), triterpenoids and potassium salts; pharmacology shows diuretic, antipyretic and antioxidant effects, clinically used for febrile vexation-thirst and heat-lin dysuria.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定淡竹叶来源为禾本科淡竹叶 Lophatherum gracile 的干燥茎叶，与竹类植物区别。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies Dan Zhu Ye as Lophatherum gracile (Poaceae), distinct from true bamboo species.

evidence_notes.note_zh: Bensky 将淡竹叶列入清热泻火药，强调与竹叶（Phyllostachys）及竹茹来源不同，不可混淆。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky classifies Dan Zhu Ye among heat-clearing fire-draining herbs and emphasizes it is not the same plant as Zhu Ye (Phyllostachys leaves) or Zhu Ru.

description_en: The dried stem and leaf of Lophatherum gracile (Poaceae). Enters the Heart, Stomach, and Small Intestine channels. Sweet, bland, and cold, it clears Heart and Stomach heat above to eliminate vexation and relieve thirst, and drains Small Intestine dampness below to guide heat downward through the urine. It must be distinguished from zhu ru (the inner bamboo stem layer) and true bamboo leaves (zhu ye). Featured in Wu Jutong's Yin Qiao San and San Ren Tang.

actions.en: Tonify the middle and augment qi
Fortify the Spleen and harmonize the Stomach
Protect Stomach qi and preserve fluids

indications.en: Spleen-Stomach qi vacuity with reduced appetite and fatigue
Febrile vexation-thirst
Diarrhea and dysentery
Convalescence and recovery
Protecting Stomach qi within cold-draining formulas (e.g. Bai Hu Tang)

contraindications_zh: 本品为常用食品，一般无明显禁忌。糖尿病患者需控制用量。
contraindications_en: This is a common food item with generally no significant contraindications. Diabetic patients should control the dosage.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–30g；入汤剂煮至米熟汤成即可，古方白虎汤用6合（约90ml干米）。可煮粥单用。

processing_methods.name: 粳米
processing_methods.effect: 补中益气、护胃存津，入汤剂时与他药同煎至米熟

safety_notes_zh: 常用食品，安全。入汤剂须确认米粒熟透方得药效。糖尿病患者需计入碳水化合物总量。
safety_notes_en: A common food item; safe. In decoctions, the rice grains must be confirmed fully cooked for medicinal effect. Diabetic patients should count it toward total carbohydrate intake.

classical_references.passage: 服桂枝汤，大汗出后，大烦渴不解，脉洪大者，白虎加人参汤主之。（白虎汤方：知母六两，石膏一斤，甘草二两，粳米六合。）

description_zh: 禾本科植物稻 Oryza sativa 的去壳种仁（非糯性品种）。归脾、胃、肺经。甘平补中，为天下之主食，既能补脾胃之气以健运化，又能生津护胃以存津液，在白虎汤等大寒剂中与石膏、知母同煎，用以顾护胃气防其苦寒伤中，为张仲景方中的护胃佐使。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 粳米为大米主食，主含淀粉、蛋白质与B族维生素，能供给能量、健脾养胃、生津存液。大寒药中同煎粳米可在液面形成米汤胶质层，延缓石膏等矿物类药溶出，保护胃黏膜。
summary.en: Geng Mi is staple rice containing starch, proteins and B-vitamins; it supplies energy, fortifies the Spleen and Stomach, and engenders fluids. When decocted with cold mineral drugs, the rice decoction forms a protective mucilaginous layer that slows mineral extraction and shields the gastric mucosa.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 脾胃虚弱病后调养（米粥食养）
胃黏膜保护（伴石膏等矿物类药）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Gastric mucosal protection with mineral herbs

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出白虎汤方中粳米与甘草同为顾护胃气之佐使，防石膏、知母大寒伤中。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes that in Bai Hu Tang, Geng Mi and Gan Cao together protect Stomach qi, preventing the cold nature of Shi Gao and Zhi Mu from injuring the middle.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Chen & Chen）指出粳米与石膏同煎时，米中淀粉可与石膏表面形成胶体层，稍缓其寒性。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chen & Chen note that when decocted with Shi Gao, rice starch forms a colloidal coating moderating the mineral's cold nature.

description_en: The dehusked, non-glutinous grain of Oryza sativa (Poaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Lung channels. Sweet and neutral, it is the staple food of China, tonifying the middle and augmenting qi while generating fluids and protecting the Stomach. In strongly cold formulas like Bai Hu Tang, it is decocted together with shi gao and zhi mu to safeguard Stomach qi and prevent bitter-cold damage to the middle burner, serving as a protective adjuvant.

actions.en: Warm the middle and stop vomiting
Open the appetite and disperse food stagnation
Diffuse and transform dampness in the middle and upper burners

indications.zh: 湿浊阻滞中焦，胸脘痞闷
indications.en: Damp-turbidity obstructing the middle burner with chest and epigastric stuffiness
Early-stage damp-warmth with smoldering fever
Food stagnation with vomiting
Vomiting from Stomach cold
Epigastric distension and belching

contraindications_zh: 阴虚血燥及无寒湿者慎用。本品辛温香燥，久煎则香气散失，宜后下。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with blood dryness and absence of cold-dampness. This herb is acrid, warm, aromatic, and drying; prolonged decoction causes loss of aroma; should be added near the end.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–6g；入煎剂宜打碎后下，以免香气挥发。常与砂仁、藿香、佩兰等同用。

processing_methods.name: 白豆蔻
processing_methods.effect: 保存其挥发油有效成分，长于化湿行气

processing_methods.name: 白豆蔻壳
processing_methods.effect: 力缓，长于宽中行气，用于脘腹轻度胀满

safety_notes_zh: 本品含挥发油（主成分桉叶素），久煎则药效挥发散失，入煎剂必须后下（最后3–5分钟入煎）。阴虚内热及无湿邪者不宜。
safety_notes_en: This herb contains volatile oils (primarily cineole); prolonged decoction causes the medicinal components to evaporate; in decoctions, it must be added near the end (last 3-5 minutes). Not suitable in yin vacuity with internal heat and absence of dampness pathogens.

classical_references.passage: 头痛恶寒，身重疼痛，舌白不渴，脉弦细而濡，面色淡黄，胸闷不饥，午后身热，状若阴虚，病难速已，名曰湿温……三仁汤主之。（方：杏仁五钱，飞滑石六钱，白通草二钱，白蔻仁二钱，竹叶二钱，厚朴二钱，生薏仁六钱，半夏五钱。）

description_zh: 姜科植物白豆蔻 Amomum kravanh 或爪哇白豆蔻 Amomum compactum 的干燥成熟果实。归肺、脾、胃经。辛温芳香，上入肺经以宣化上焦湿浊，中入脾胃以化湿行气、温中止呕，为三仁汤「三仁」之一（与杏仁、薏苡仁并列），主司中焦宣化。入煎剂宜打碎后下，以免久煎有效挥发油散失。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 白豆蔻主含挥发油（桉叶素、α-松油醇、蒎烯、樟脑等），药理示其促进胃肠蠕动、抗菌、助消化及止呕作用；久煎有效成分散失，故入煎剂须后下。
summary.en: Bai Dou Kou contains volatile oils (1,8-cineole, α-terpineol, pinenes, camphor); pharmacology shows prokinetic, antimicrobial, digestive and antiemetic effects. Active volatiles are lost on prolonged decoction, so it should be added near the end of cooking.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 功能性消化不良、食欲不振

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Nausea and vomiting (Stomach cold, morning sickness)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以桉叶素含量为白豆蔻质量指标，规定含挥发油不得少于4.0%（ml/g）。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses 1,8-cineole content as the quality marker, requiring ≥4.0% (ml/g) volatile oil.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出白豆蔻与砂仁同为芳香化湿要药，白豆蔻偏于宣化上中焦湿浊，砂仁偏于温化下焦。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Bai Dou Kou and Sha Ren are both aromatic damp-transformers; Bai Dou Kou diffuses upper-middle burner dampness while Sha Ren warms the lower burner.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Amomum kravanh or A. compactum (Zingiberaceae). Enters the Lung, Spleen, and Stomach channels. Pungent and warm, its aromatic nature reaches the upper burner Lung to diffuse dampness-turbidity above and the middle-burner Spleen and Stomach to transform dampness, move qi, and stop vomiting below. It is one of the 'three kernels' in San Ren Tang (with xing ren and yi yi ren), responsible for opening and transforming the middle burner. Must be crushed and added near the end of decoction.

actions.en: Clear the Lung and open the orifices of water passages

indications.zh: 湿热淋证、小便短赤涩痛
indications.en: Damp-heat lin with dark scanty painful urination
Edema with scanty urination

indications.zh: 产后乳汁不下、乳汁稀少
indications.en: Postpartum insufficient lactation
Damp-warmth disease with chest oppression and dysuria
Damp-heat with generalized heaviness

contraindications_zh: 孕妇及气阴两虚、中寒无湿者忌用。本品与木通（含马兜铃酸的关木通历史使用争议）不同，通草质轻通利，无肾毒性。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated during pregnancy and in dual qi-yin vacuity and cold in the middle without dampness. This herb is different from mu tong (the historically controversial guan mu tong containing aristolochic acid); tong cao is light in quality and facilitates flow without nephrotoxicity.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–5g；力薄量轻。本品质轻性平和，与古方中之「木通」不同，现代临床常用通草替代木通以避免马兜铃酸肾毒性风险。

processing_methods.name: 通草
processing_methods.effect: 清热利水，通乳

safety_notes_zh: 【重要说明】通草为五加科植物通脱木 Tetrapanax papyrifer 的干燥茎髓，不含马兜铃酸，与马兜铃科关木通（Aristolochia manshuriensis，含马兜铃酸、有肾毒性）完全不同。古籍「木通」在近代时期存在关木通误用情况，现《中国药典》已撤销关木通入药资格，临床通利剂宜选用通草或木通（Akebia quinata 系）。孕妇禁用。
safety_notes_en: [Important note] Tong cao is the dried stem pith of Tetrapanax papyrifer (Araliaceae); it does not contain aristolochic acid and is completely different from guan mu tong (Aristolochia manshuriensis, Aristolochiaceae, which contains aristolochic acid and is nephrotoxic). The classical 'mu tong' was historically misused as guan mu tong in modern times; the current Chinese Pharmacopoeia has revoked guan mu tong's medicinal qualification; clinical urination-facilitating formulas should use tong cao or mu tong (Akebia quinata type). Contraindicated during pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 通草（通脱木），味甘、淡，性寒。气味俱薄，清肺热、利小便，通乳汁。

description_zh: 五加科植物通脱木 Tetrapanax papyrifer 的干燥茎髓。归肺、胃经。甘淡性微寒，质轻气薄，上入肺以清肺热开水之上源，下入胃以利水渗湿通淋；兼能通乳。吴鞠通三仁汤以之配滑石、淡竹叶清利湿热于下焦。与马兜铃科之关木通来源、毒性完全不同，现代临床多以通草代木通以防肾毒风险。孕妇禁用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 通草主含多糖、三萜皂苷及钾盐，药理示轻度利尿作用。与含马兜铃酸的关木通来源及毒性完全不同，不含肾毒性成分，现代临床取代关木通。
summary.en: Tong Cao contains polysaccharides, triterpenoid saponins and potassium salts with mild diuretic action. It is botanically and toxicologically distinct from Aristolochia-type Guan Mu Tong (which contains nephrotoxic aristolochic acid) and is used today to replace that deprecated herb.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载通草为五加科植物通脱木的干燥茎髓，已于2005年起撤销关木通入药，强调二者不可混淆。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists Tong Cao as the dried stem pith of Tetrapanax papyrifer (Araliaceae). Guan Mu Tong (Aristolochia) was removed from the pharmacopoeia in 2005 — the two must not be confused.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中药学》（Bensky）指出通草性平和利水而不伤正，为产后通乳及湿温病轻清利水之常用药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Tong Cao is a mild diuretic that does not damage upright qi — commonly used for postpartum lactation support and light damp-warmth formulas.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 植物药物安全性参考强调必须区分通草（Tetrapanax，安全）与马兜铃科关木通（有肾毒性），处方用名宜明确。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO herbal medicine safety references stress the distinction between Tetrapanax-type Tong Cao (safe) and Aristolochia-type Guan Mu Tong (nephrotoxic); prescribers should disambiguate.

description_en: The dried stem pith of Tetrapanax papyrifer (Araliaceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Sweet, bland, and slightly cold, light and thin in substance, it enters the Lung above to clear Lung heat and open the upper source of the water passages, and enters the Stomach below to promote urination, percolate dampness, and relieve strangury. It also promotes lactation. Wu Jutong's San Ren Tang combines it with hua shi and dan zhu ye to clear and drain lower-burner damp-heat. Must not be confused with nephrotoxic guan mu tong (Aristolochia). Contraindicated in pregnancy.

actions.en: Unblock the collaterals and stop pain

indications.en: Wind-cold headache, especially vertex headache
Wind-damp impediment pain
Cold-damp abdominal pain

description_zh: 伞形科植物藁本或辽藁本的干燥根茎及根。性温味辛，归膀胱经。善治太阳经巅顶头痛，为治风寒头痛之要药，尤以巅顶疼痛为其特长。
description_en: The dried rhizome and root of Ligusticum sinense or L. jeholense (Apiaceae). Warm and pungent, entering the Bladder channel. A key herb for wind-cold headache, especially vertex pain along the Taiyang channel. Often combined with Qiang Huo for exterior wind-cold with headache and body aches.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal volatile constituent, also in Ligusticum chuanxiong

summary.zh: 藁本主含挥发油（以苯酞类化合物为主），具镇痛、解热、抗炎、抑制前列腺素合成作用。
summary.en: Gao Ben contains phthalide-rich volatile oils with analgesic, antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and prostaglandin-inhibitory activity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 藁本辛温，归膀胱经，为太阳经巅顶头痛要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; enters Bladder channel; principal herb for Taiyang vertex headache.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 现代研究显示藁本挥发油具镇痛、解热、镇静作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Modern research shows Gao Ben volatile oil produces analgesic, antipyretic, and sedative effects.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主妇人疝瘕，阴中寒，肿痛，腹中急，除风头痛，长肌肤，悦颜色。

actions.en: Clear and benefit the head and eyes

indications.en: Wind-heat headache with dizziness
Red, swollen, painful eyes
Wind-damp impediment pain with stiffness of the limbs

description_zh: 马鞭草科植物单叶蔓荆或蔓荆的干燥成熟果实。性凉味辛苦，归膀胱、肝、胃经。长于疏散风热、清利头目，为治风热头痛及目疾之常用药。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Vitex trifolia var. simplicifolia or V. trifolia (Verbenaceae). Cool in nature, pungent and bitter, entering the Bladder, Liver, and Stomach channels. Particularly effective for wind-heat headache and eye disorders, it clears the head and sharpens vision.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 蔓荆子主含黄酮类、环烯醚萜苷和挥发油，具镇痛、解热、抗炎、抑制内耳前庭活性作用。
summary.en: Man Jing Zi contains flavonoids, iridoid glycosides, and volatile oils with analgesic, antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and vestibular-modulating effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 蔓荆子辛苦凉，疏散风热，清利头目。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and cool, disperses wind-heat and clears the head and eyes.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，微寒。主筋骨间寒热，湿痹拘挛，明目坚齿，利九窍，去白虫。

indications.en: Wind-cold headache with nasal congestion and turbid discharge
Wind-damp impediment pain
Wind rash with itching

description_zh: 菊科植物苍耳的干燥成熟带总苞的果实。性温味辛苦，有小毒，归肺经。善通鼻窍，为治鼻渊头痛之要药，常与辛夷配伍使用。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit with involucre of Xanthium sibiricum (Asteraceae). Warm, pungent and bitter, slightly toxic, entering the Lung channel. Best known for opening the nasal passages, it is a key herb for nasal congestion and sinusitis, commonly paired with Xin Yi (magnolia flower).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: includes xanthatin and xanthinosin; hepatotoxic components
principal hepatotoxin; concentrated in unripe fruit

summary.zh: 苍耳子含苍术苷等毒性二萜苷及苍耳子苷类倍半萜内酯，具抗炎、抗过敏作用，但过量或生用可致严重肝毒性。
summary.en: Cang Er Zi contains toxic kaurane diterpene glycosides (atractyloside/carboxyatractyloside) and xanthanolide sesquiterpenes with anti-inflammatory and anti-allergic activity, but raw or overdose use can cause severe hepatotoxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 苍耳子辛苦温有毒，散风通鼻窍，除湿止痒；过量可致肝肾损伤，需炒制去刺。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and warm with toxicity; dispels wind, opens the nasal passages, dries damp, and stops itching; overdose causes hepato-renal toxicity; must be dry-fried to remove spines.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定入药用炒苍耳子，并设有毒性限量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies use of dry-fried Cang Er Zi with toxicity limits.

classical_references.passage: （枲耳实）味甘，温。主风头寒痛，风湿周痹，四肢拘挛痛，恶肉死肌。久服益气，耳目聪明，强志轻身。

actions.en: Open and unblock the nasal passages

indications.en: Wind-cold common cold with nasal obstruction
Deep-source nasal congestion with headache (sinusitis)
Persistent turbid nasal discharge

description_zh: 木兰科植物望春花、玉兰或武当玉兰的干燥花蕾。性温味辛，归肺、胃经。芳香上达，善通鼻窍，为治鼻渊鼻塞之专药，宜包煎以防绒毛刺激咽喉。
description_en: The dried flower bud of Magnolia biondii, M. denudata, or M. sprengeri (Magnoliaceae). Warm and pungent, entering the Lung and Stomach channels. Its aromatic nature ascends to open nasal passages, making it the premier herb for nasal obstruction and sinusitis. Should be wrapped in cloth when decocted to prevent irritation from fine hairs.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 辛夷主含挥发油和木脂素类，具收缩鼻黏膜血管、抗炎、抗过敏和轻度降压作用，为治鼻渊要药。
summary.en: Xin Yi contains volatile oils and lignans with nasal-vasoconstrictor, anti-inflammatory, anti-allergic, and mild hypotensive effects; a principal herb for sinusitis and nasal congestion.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 辛夷辛温，散风寒通鼻窍，专治鼻渊头痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; dispels wind-cold and opens nasal orifices; specific for sinus congestion and frontal headache.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主五脏身体寒热，风头脑痛，面皯。久服下气，轻身明目，增年耐老。

indications.en: Nasal obstruction with sinusitis and nasal discharge
Wind-cold headache
Phlegm-rheum cough and wheezing

description_zh: 菊科植物鹅不食草的干燥全草。性温味辛，归肺经。善通鼻窍、祛风散寒，可内服亦可研末吹鼻取嚏，为治鼻塞鼻渊之常用民间草药。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Centipeda minima (Asteraceae). Warm and pungent, entering the Lung channel. Opens the nasal passages and disperses wind-cold; can be taken internally or ground into powder and insufflated to induce sneezing, a traditional folk remedy for nasal obstruction and sinusitis.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 鹅不食草挥发油和倍半萜内酯具通鼻窍、抗炎、抗过敏、平喘作用。
summary.en: E Bu Shi Cao's volatile oil and sesquiterpene lactones have nasal-decongestant, anti-inflammatory, anti-allergic, and bronchodilator effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鹅不食草辛温，通鼻塞，化痰止咳，外用治疮。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; unblocks nasal congestion, transforms phlegm, and is used topically for sores.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）石胡荽，上通于脑顶，解毒，通鼻气，乃通鼻窍之要药。

actions.en: Brighten the eyes and remove superficial visual obstruction

indications.en: Red eyes with superficial visual obstruction
Wind-heat red eyes with excessive tearing
Intestinal wind with rectal bleeding, hemorrhoidal bleeding

description_zh: 木贼科植物木贼的干燥地上部分。性平味甘苦，归肺、肝经。善疏风散热、明目退翳，为治目赤翳障之要药，兼能止血，用于肠风痔血。
