description_en: The dried aerial part of Equisetum hyemale (Equisetaceae). Neutral, sweet and bitter, entering the Lung and Liver channels. Disperses wind-heat and removes superficial visual obstruction from the eyes. A key herb for red eyes with pterygium; also stops bleeding for hemorrhoidal and intestinal bleeding.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: 5-8% of dry weight; gives the herb its abrasive 'scouring rush' texture

summary.zh: 木贼富含硅酸、黄酮和皂苷类，具收敛、利尿、抗炎及轻度降压作用，为疏风退翳常用药。
summary.en: Mu Zei is rich in silica, flavonoids, and saponins with astringent, diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and mild hypotensive effects; commonly used to dispel wind and remove corneal opacity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 木贼甘苦平，疏风散热，明目退翳。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bitter and neutral; disperses wind-heat and resolves corneal opacity.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）木贼与麻黄同形同性，故亦能发汗解肌，升散火郁风湿，治眼目诸血疾也。

indications.en: Wind-heat exterior pattern with incomplete measles eruption
Wind rash with itching (urticaria)
Edema with inhibited urination

description_zh: 浮萍科植物紫萍的干燥全草。性寒味辛，归肺经。体轻上浮，善宣散风热、透疹止痒，又能利水消肿，为治风热表证、麻疹不透及风疹瘙痒之良药。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Spirodela polyrrhiza (Lemnaceae). Cold and pungent, entering the Lung channel. Light and floating in nature, it excels at disseminating wind-heat, venting rashes, and stopping itch; also promotes urination to reduce edema. Effective for wind-heat exterior patterns, incomplete measles eruption, and urticaria.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 浮萍含黄酮、钾盐及多糖，具发汗、利尿、解热和抗炎作用。
summary.en: Fu Ping contains flavonoids, potassium salts, and polysaccharides with diaphoretic, diuretic, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 浮萍辛寒，发汗解表，透疹利尿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-cold; induces sweating, releases the exterior, vents rashes, and promotes urination.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，寒。主暴热身痒，下水气，胜酒长须发，止消渴。久服轻身。

indications.en: Febrile disease with vexation and thirst
Mouth sores and tongue pain
Scanty, dark, painful urination

description_zh: 禾本科植物淡竹的干燥茎叶。性寒味甘淡，归心、胃、小肠经。清热除烦、生津利尿，尤善清心经之热而导热下行，为治口疮尿赤之佳品。
description_en: The dried stem and leaf of Lophatherum gracile (Poaceae). Cold in nature, sweet and bland, entering the Heart, Stomach, and Small Intestine channels. Clears heat, eliminates vexation, generates fluids, and promotes urination. Especially effective at clearing Heart fire and directing heat downward through urination.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 竹叶含黄酮碳苷、三萜和酚酸，具抗氧化、利尿、解热作用。
summary.en: Zhu Ye contains C-glycoside flavonoids, triterpenes, and phenolic acids with antioxidant, diuretic, and antipyretic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 竹叶甘淡寒，清热除烦，生津利尿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bland and cold; clears heat, relieves irritability, generates fluids, and promotes urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）竹叶味甘淡，气平而寒，能清上焦烦热，生津止渴。

indications.en: Febrile disease with thirst, wasting-thirst from internal heat
Lung-heat dry cough
Carbuncles, abscesses, and sores

description_zh: 葫芦科植物栝楼或双边栝楼的干燥根。性寒味甘微苦，归肺、胃经。善清热生津止渴，为治消渴之要药，又能消肿排脓，用于疮痈肿毒。孕妇忌用。
description_en: The dried root of Trichosanthes kirilowii or T. rosthornii (Cucurbitaceae). Cold, sweet and slightly bitter, entering the Lung and Stomach channels. Excels at clearing heat and generating fluids to relieve thirst; a key herb for wasting-thirst syndrome. Also reduces swelling and expels pus for sores and abscesses. Contraindicated in pregnancy.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: abortifacient; used historically in medical abortion research

summary.zh: 天花粉主含蛋白质（天花粉蛋白）、多糖和葫芦素，具抗病毒、降血糖、抗肿瘤及终止妊娠作用。
summary.en: Tian Hua Fen contains proteins (trichosanthin), polysaccharides, and cucurbitacins with antiviral, hypoglycemic, antineoplastic, and abortifacient activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 天花粉甘微苦微寒，清热生津，消肿排脓；孕妇忌用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-slightly bitter and cool; clears heat, generates fluids, and reduces swelling; contraindicated in pregnancy.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 天花粉蛋白可致过敏、发热及心肺不良反应，孕妇绝对禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Trichosanthin may cause allergic reactions, fever, and cardiopulmonary events; absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: （栝楼根）味苦，寒。主消渴身热，烦满大热，补虚安中，续绝伤。

actions.en: Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes
Moisten the intestines and free the stool

indications.en: Red, swollen, painful eyes with photophobia and tearing
Headache and dizziness from Liver yang rising
Intestinal dryness constipation

description_zh: 豆科植物决明或小决明的干燥成熟种子。性凉味甘苦咸，归肝、大肠经。善清肝火而明目，为治目赤肿痛之常用药，又能润肠通便、平抑肝阳，兼治头目眩晕及便秘。
description_en: The dried ripe seed of Cassia obtusifolia or C. tora (Fabaceae). Cool, sweet, bitter and salty, entering the Liver and Large Intestine channels. Excels at clearing Liver fire to brighten the eyes; widely used for red, swollen, painful eyes. Also moistens the intestines, promotes bowel movement, and calms Liver yang for headache and dizziness.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 决明子富含蒽醌和萘并吡喃酮苷，具缓泻、降血脂、降血压及保肝作用。
summary.en: Jue Ming Zi contains anthraquinones and naphthopyrone glycosides with mild laxative, hypolipidemic, hypotensive, and hepatoprotective effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 决明子甘苦咸微寒，清肝明目，润肠通便。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bitter-salty and slightly cold; clears liver heat, improves vision, and moistens the intestines.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，平。主青盲，目淫肤，赤白膜，眼赤痛，泪出。久服益精光，轻身。

indications.en: Damp-heat dysentery and jaundice
Damp sores, eczema, and pruritus
Damp-heat vaginal discharge

description_zh: 豆科植物苦参的干燥根。性寒味苦，归心、肝、胃、大肠、膀胱经。功善清热燥湿、杀虫止痒，内服治湿热泻痢黄疸，外用治湿疮疥癣，为皮肤科常用药。
description_en: The dried root of Sophora flavescens (Fabaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Heart, Liver, Stomach, Large Intestine, and Bladder channels. Excels at clearing heat, drying dampness, killing parasites, and stopping itch. Taken internally for damp-heat dysentery and jaundice, applied externally for eczema, scabies, and fungal infections.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 苦参富含苦参碱类喹诺里西啶生物碱和异戊烯基黄酮，具抗心律失常、抗肿瘤、抗炎及杀虫作用。
summary.en: Ku Shen contains matrine-type quinolizidine alkaloids and prenylated flavonoids with antiarrhythmic, antineoplastic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 苦参苦寒，清热燥湿，杀虫利尿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, dries dampness, kills parasites, and promotes urination.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 苦参碱具抗心律失常、抑制肿瘤细胞生长作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Matrine exhibits antiarrhythmic activity and inhibits tumor cell proliferation.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主心腹结气，癥瘕积聚，黄疸，溺有余沥，逐水，除痈肿，补中明目止泪。

actions.en: Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Damp-heat dysentery with tenesmus
Red, swollen, painful eyes with pterygium
Damp-heat vaginal discharge

description_zh: 木犀科植物苦枥白蜡树、白蜡树、尖叶白蜡树或宿柱白蜡树的干燥枝皮或干皮。性寒味苦涩，归肝、胆、大肠经。善清热燥湿止痢，兼能清肝明目，为治湿热痢疾及目疾之良药。
description_en: The dried branch bark or trunk bark of Fraxinus rhynchophylla, F. chinensis, F. szaboana, or F. stylosa (Oleaceae). Cold, bitter and astringent, entering the Liver, Gallbladder, and Large Intestine channels. Clears heat, dries dampness, and stops dysentery; also clears the Liver and brightens the eyes for eye disorders.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 秦皮富含香豆素类（秦皮苷、秦皮素）和鞣质，具抗炎、抗菌、镇痛及利尿作用。
summary.en: Qin Pi is rich in coumarins (esculin, esculetin) and tannins with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, analgesic, and diuretic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 秦皮苦涩寒，清热燥湿，收涩止痢。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-astringent and cold; clears heat, dries dampness, and astringes to stop diarrhea.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，微寒。主风寒湿痹，洗洗寒气，除热，目中青翳白膜。久服头不白，轻身。

indications.en: Damp-heat sores, eczema, and pruritus
Jaundice with dark urine
Wind rash and damp sores

description_zh: 芸香科植物白鲜的干燥根皮。性寒味苦，归脾、胃、膀胱经。善清热燥湿、祛风止痒，为治湿热疮疹瘙痒之要药，亦治黄疸及风湿热痹。
description_en: The dried root bark of Dictamnus dasycarpus (Rutaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Spleen, Stomach, and Bladder channels. Excels at clearing heat, drying dampness, dispelling wind, and stopping itch. A principal herb for damp-heat skin conditions with itching; also treats jaundice and damp-heat impediment.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 白鲜皮含呋喃喹啉生物碱和柠檬苦素类，具抗菌、抗真菌、抗炎、利胆作用，但生物碱类有肝毒性风险。
summary.en: Bai Xian Pi contains furoquinoline alkaloids and limonoids with antimicrobial, antifungal, anti-inflammatory, and choleretic effects; alkaloids carry hepatotoxic risk at high doses.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 白鲜皮苦寒，清热燥湿，祛风解毒，为治湿热疮疹要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, dries damp, dispels wind, and resolves toxin; a key herb for damp-heat skin lesions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 已有白鲜皮致肝损害病例报告，长期或大剂量使用须监测肝功能。
evidence_notes.note_en: Case reports of Bai Xian Pi-associated hepatotoxicity; monitor liver function with prolonged or high-dose use.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主头风，黄疸，咳逆，淋沥，女子阴中肿痛，湿痹死肌，不可屈伸起止行步。

actions.en: Cool the blood and dissipate macules
Benefit the throat and reduce swelling

indications.en: Warm disease with high fever, clouded consciousness, and macules
Swollen, sore throat
Mumps and erysipelas

description_zh: 十字花科植物菘蓝的干燥叶。性寒味苦，归心、胃经。与板蓝根同源，善清热解毒、凉血消斑，为治温病发斑、咽喉肿痛之常用药。
description_en: The dried leaf of Isatis indigotica (Brassicaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Heart and Stomach channels. From the same plant as Ban Lan Gen (the root), it clears heat, resolves toxicity, cools the blood, and dissipates macules. Commonly used for warm disease with eruptions, sore throat, and mumps.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: CDK inhibitor; used in CML research

summary.zh: 大青叶富含靛蓝、靛玉红及色胺酮等吲哚类成分，具抗病毒、抗菌、抗炎和抗白血病细胞作用。
summary.en: Da Qing Ye contains indigo, indirubin, and tryptanthrin indoles with antiviral, antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antileukemic activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 大青叶苦寒，清热解毒，凉血消斑。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and eliminates maculopapular eruptions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）大青气寒味微苦咸，能解心胃热毒，故治伤寒大热狂躁阳毒之疾。

indications.en: Lung abscess with purulent sputum, Lung-heat cough
Heat-toxin sores and abscesses
Damp-heat strangury (urinary tract infection)

description_zh: 三白草科植物蕺菜的干燥地上部分。性微寒味辛，归肺经。善清肺热、消痈排脓，为治肺痈之要药，有天然抗生素之称。鲜品捣汁或煎服均可，亦可外用。
description_en: The dried aerial part of Houttuynia cordata (Saururaceae). Slightly cold and pungent, entering the Lung channel. Excels at clearing Lung heat and draining abscesses; the premier herb for lung abscess. Known as a natural antibiotic in Chinese folk medicine. Can be used fresh or dried, internally or externally.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal antibacterial volatile; unstable, converted to sodium houttuyfonate in manufacturing

summary.zh: 鱼腥草以鱼腥草素（癸酰乙醛）和黄酮苷为主要抗菌成分，具广谱抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎、增强免疫作用。
summary.en: Yu Xing Cao's principal antibacterials are houttuynin (decanoyl acetaldehyde) and flavonol glycosides, producing broad-spectrum antimicrobial, antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and immune-enhancing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鱼腥草辛微寒，清热解毒，消痈排脓，利尿通淋。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid and slightly cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, reduces abscess, and promotes urination.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列鱼腥草用于急性上呼吸道感染、肺脓肿辅助治疗。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monographs list Houttuynia for adjunctive treatment of acute upper respiratory infection and lung abscess.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）蕺菜辛，微温，有小毒。散热毒痈肿，疮痔脱肛，断痁疾，解硇毒。

indications.en: Abscesses, toxic sores, and sore throat
Venomous snakebite
Damp-heat jaundice and dribbling urination

description_zh: 茜草科植物白花蛇舌草的干燥全草。性寒味苦甘，归胃、大肠、小肠经。善清热解毒、消痈散结、利湿通淋，为民间治毒蛇咬伤及肿瘤的常用草药，近年在肿瘤辅助治疗中应用广泛。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Hedyotis diffusa (Rubiaceae). Cold, bitter and sweet, entering the Stomach, Large Intestine, and Small Intestine channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, disperses masses, and drains dampness. A folk remedy for snakebite; in modern practice widely used as an adjunct in oncological support.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 车叶草苷、鸡屎藤次苷甲酯

summary.zh: 白花蛇舌草含环烯醚萜苷、三萜酸、蒽醌和多糖，具抗肿瘤、抗炎、免疫调节和抗菌作用。
summary.en: Bai Hua She She Cao contains iridoid glycosides, triterpene acids, anthraquinones, and polysaccharides with antineoplastic, anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antibacterial effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 白花蛇舌草常用于肿瘤辅助治疗，有抑制多种肿瘤细胞增殖的实验证据。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bai Hua She She Cao is used adjunctively in oncology with experimental evidence of tumor cell growth inhibition.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 白花蛇舌草苦甘寒，清热解毒，利湿通淋。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-sweet and cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, drains damp, and relieves painful urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍载）蛇舌草味苦，性寒，能清热解毒消痈。

indications.en: Syphilis and mercury poisoning
Damp-heat strangury with turbid discharge, leukorrhea
Abscesses, toxic sores, eczema, and itching

description_zh: 百合科植物光叶菝葜的干燥根茎。性平味甘淡，归肝、胃经。善解毒除湿、通利关节，明代为治杨梅疮（梅毒）之要药，今广泛用于湿热疮疹及关节肿痛。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Smilax glabra (Liliaceae/Smilacaceae). Neutral, sweet and bland, entering the Liver and Stomach channels. Resolves toxicity, eliminates dampness, and frees the joints. Historically the primary herb for syphilis in the Ming dynasty; now broadly used for damp-heat skin conditions and joint swelling.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 菝葜皂苷元、萨尔萨皂苷元

summary.zh: 土茯苓主含落新妇苷、甾体皂苷和鞣质，具抗炎、利尿、解汞毒和改善梅毒螺旋体所致皮损作用。
summary.en: Tu Fu Ling contains astilbin, steroidal saponins, and tannins with anti-inflammatory, diuretic, mercury-detoxifying, and anti-treponemal effects historically used in syphilis management.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 土茯苓甘淡平，解毒除湿，通利关节，为治梅毒要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bland and neutral; resolves toxin, drains damp, and frees the joints; traditional principal herb for syphilitic lesions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）土茯苓治杨梅毒疮，及服轻粉药毒而致筋骨挛痛、恶疮溃烂者，其功甚伟。

actions.en: Cool the blood and stop dysentery

indications.zh: 热毒血痢，腹痛里急后重
indications.en: Heat-toxin bloody dysentery with abdominal pain and tenesmus
Amoebic dysentery
Sores, abscesses, and toxic swelling

description_zh: 毛茛科植物白头翁的干燥根。性寒味苦，归胃、大肠经。善清热解毒、凉血止痢，为治热毒血痢之要药，以白头翁汤最为著名。
description_en: The dried root of Pulsatilla chinensis (Ranunculaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Stomach and Large Intestine channels. Excels at clearing heat-toxin and cooling the blood to stop dysentery; the premier herb for heat-toxin bloody dysentery, most famously used in Bai Tou Weng Tang (Pulsatilla Decoction).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: converts to protoanemonin, which is irritant in fresh plant

summary.zh: 白头翁含三萜皂苷和原白头翁素等内酯，具抗阿米巴、抗菌、抗炎和止痢作用。
summary.en: Bai Tou Weng contains triterpene saponins and protoanemonin-type lactones with amoebicidal, antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antidiarrheal effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 白头翁苦寒，清热解毒，凉血止痢，为治热毒血痢要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and stops dysenteric disorder; a principal herb for heat-toxin bloody dysentery.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，温。主温疟，狂易寒热，癥瘕积聚，瘿气，逐血，止痛。

actions.en: Cool the blood and reduce swelling

indications.en: Abscesses, boils, mastitis, and intestinal abscess
Erysipelas
Venomous snakebite

description_zh: 堇菜科植物紫花地丁的干燥全草。性寒味苦辛，归心、肝经。善清热解毒、消痈散结，尤擅治疔疮痈肿，常与蒲公英、金银花等配伍组成五味消毒饮。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Viola yedoensis (Violaceae). Cold, bitter and pungent, entering the Heart and Liver channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, and disperses abscesses, especially boils and deep-rooted sores. Commonly combined with Pu Gong Ying and Jin Yin Hua in Wu Wei Xiao Du Yin (Five-Ingredient Toxin-Dispersing Decoction).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 紫花地丁含环肽、黄酮、香豆素等成分，具抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎及抗肿瘤作用。
summary.en: Zi Hua Di Ding contains cyclotides, flavonoids, and coumarins with antibacterial, antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antineoplastic activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 紫花地丁苦辛寒，清热解毒，凉血消肿，主治疔疮痈肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and reduces swelling; used for furuncles and abscesses.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）紫花地丁处处有之，主治一切痈疽发背，疔肿瘰疬，无名肿毒。

actions.en: Cool the blood and reduce swelling

indications.en: Exterior wind-heat and early-stage warm disease
Lung-heat cough and sore throat
Damp-heat dysentery

description_zh: 爵床科植物穿心莲的干燥地上部分。性寒味苦，归心、肺、大肠、膀胱经。善清热解毒、凉血燥湿，为治上呼吸道感染、胃肠炎之常用药，其有效成分穿心莲内酯已广泛开发为中成药。
description_en: The dried aerial part of Andrographis paniculata (Acanthaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Heart, Lung, Large Intestine, and Bladder channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, cools the blood, and dries dampness. Widely used for upper respiratory infections and gastroenteritis; its active compound andrographolide has been developed into numerous proprietary medicines.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 穿心莲以穿心莲内酯等二萜内酯为主要活性成分，具抗炎、抗病毒、免疫调节、保肝和抗肿瘤作用。
summary.en: Chuan Xin Lian's principal bioactives are andrographolide-type diterpene lactones with anti-inflammatory, antiviral, immunomodulatory, hepatoprotective, and antineoplastic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列穿心莲用于上呼吸道感染、腹泻等症状性治疗。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists Andrographis for symptomatic treatment of upper respiratory infection and diarrhea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 穿心莲苦寒，清热解毒，凉血消肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and reduces swelling.

classical_references.passage: 穿心莲味苦性寒，清热解毒，凉血消肿，近代广用于热毒诸证。

actions.en: Cool the blood and stop bleeding

indications.en: Heat-toxin dysentery, especially bloody dysentery
Abscesses, boils, eczema, and dermatitis
Uterine bleeding and bloody stool

description_zh: 马齿苋科植物马齿苋的干燥地上部分。性寒味酸，归肝、大肠经。善清热解毒、凉血止痢，为治热毒血痢之常用药，鲜品捣敷可治痈疮湿疹，亦可作蔬菜食用。
description_en: The dried aerial part of Portulaca oleracea (Portulacaceae). Cold and sour, entering the Liver and Large Intestine channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, cools the blood, and stops dysentery. A common remedy for heat-toxin bloody dysentery; fresh herb poulticed externally treats sores and eczema. Also edible as a vegetable.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: unusually high for a land plant

summary.zh: 马齿苋富含 α-亚麻酸、儿茶酚胺类和生物活性多糖，具抗炎、降血糖、抗菌、凉血止血作用。
summary.en: Ma Chi Xian is rich in α-linolenic acid, catecholamines, and polysaccharides with anti-inflammatory, hypoglycemic, antibacterial, and hemostatic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 马齿苋酸寒，清热解毒，凉血止痢，止血通淋。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sour-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, arrests dysentery, and relieves painful urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）马齿苋散血消肿，利肠滑胎，解毒通淋，治产后虚汗。

indications.en: Abscesses, boils, and venomous snakebite
Tumors (adjunctive use)
Traumatic injury with bleeding

description_zh: 唇形科植物半枝莲的干燥全草。性寒味辛苦，归肺、肝、肾经。善清热解毒、散瘀利水，为民间抗肿瘤草药，常与白花蛇舌草配伍使用，现代研究亦提示其抗肿瘤活性。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Scutellaria barbata (Lamiaceae). Cold, pungent and bitter, entering the Lung, Liver, and Kidney channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, disperses stasis, and drains water. A folk anticancer herb commonly paired with Bai Hua She She Cao; modern research supports potential antitumor activity.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 半枝莲主含黄酮类和半枝莲二萜，具抗肿瘤、抗炎、抗菌和免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Ban Zhi Lian contains flavonoids and scutebarbatine-type clerodane diterpenes with antineoplastic, anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 半枝莲常与白花蛇舌草同用以抗肿瘤。
evidence_notes.note_en: Ban Zhi Lian is commonly combined with Bai Hua She She Cao in oncologic formulations.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 半枝莲辛苦寒，清热解毒，化瘀利尿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, transforms stasis, and promotes urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）半枝莲清热解毒，散瘀止痛，治疔疮痈肿蛇伤。

actions.en: Benefit the throat and reduce swelling
Clear the Lung and benefit the throat

indications.en: Swollen sore throat with fire-toxin accumulation
Swollen, painful gums
Damp-heat jaundice

description_zh: 豆科植物越南槐的干燥根及根茎。性寒味苦，有毒，归肺、胃经。善清热解毒、利咽消肿，为治咽喉肿痛之要药。因含苦参碱有一定毒性，用量宜小，不可过量。
description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Sophora tonkinensis (Fabaceae). Cold and bitter, toxic, entering the Lung and Stomach channels. Excels at clearing heat-toxin and reducing throat swelling; a key herb for severe sore throat. Contains matrine and is somewhat toxic; dosage must be kept small.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 山豆根富含苦参碱类生物碱和异戊烯基黄酮，具抗炎、抗病毒、抗肿瘤和局部麻醉作用；过量可致严重中枢及肝脏毒性。
summary.en: Shan Dou Gen is rich in matrine-type alkaloids and prenylated flavonoids with anti-inflammatory, antiviral, antineoplastic, and local anesthetic effects; overdose can produce severe CNS and hepatic toxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 山豆根苦寒有毒，清热解毒，利咽消肿，用量须严格控制。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold with toxicity; clears heat, resolves toxin, and benefits the throat; dosage must be strictly limited.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 山豆根过量可致呕吐、腹泻、震颤、抽搐及肝损害，禁用大剂量或长期服用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Shan Dou Gen overdose causes vomiting, diarrhea, tremor, convulsions, and liver injury; avoid high doses and chronic use.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）山豆根解诸药毒，止痛消疮肿，治喉痛齿肿，含之咽汁。

indications.en: Swollen sore throat, cough with loss of voice
Hematemesis and epistaxis
Traumatic bleeding (external application)

description_zh: 灰包科植物脱皮马勃、大马勃或紫色马勃的干燥子实体。性平味辛，归肺经。善清肺利咽、止血，为治咽喉肿痛失音之良药，外用研末敷创口可止血。宜包煎。
description_en: The dried fruiting body of Lasiosphaera fenzlii, Calvatia gigantea, or C. lilacina (Lycoperdaceae). Neutral and pungent, entering the Lung channel. Clears the Lung, benefits the throat, and stops bleeding. A valued remedy for sore throat with hoarseness; applied externally as powder to stop wound bleeding. Should be wrapped in cloth when decocted.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 马勃含马勃酸、蛋白质及氨基酸，具抗菌、抗炎、止血作用，外用收敛止血。
summary.en: Ma Bo contains calvatic acid, proteins, and amino acids with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and hemostatic effects; topically used as astringent hemostatic powder.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 马勃辛平，清肺利咽，止血，外用治创口出血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-neutral; clears the lung and throat and arrests bleeding; topical use for wound hemostasis.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）马勃轻虚，上焦肺经药也。能清肺热咳嗽，喉痹咽痛，鼻衄失音，外用敷诸疮良。

indications.en: Intestinal abscess with abdominal pain (appendicitis)
Lung abscess with purulent bloody sputum
Postpartum abdominal pain from blood stasis

description_zh: 败酱科植物黄花败酱或白花败酱的干燥全草。性微寒味辛苦，归胃、大肠、肝经。善清热解毒、消痈排脓，尤擅治肠痈（阑尾炎），为薏苡附子败酱散之主药。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Patrinia scabiosaefolia or P. villosa (Valerianaceae). Slightly cold, pungent and bitter, entering the Stomach, Large Intestine, and Liver channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, and drains abscesses; especially effective for intestinal abscess (appendicitis). The key herb in Yi Yi Fu Zi Bai Jiang San.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 败酱草含皂苷、环烯醚萜和挥发油，具抗菌、抗炎、镇静和促进组织修复作用，为排脓消痈要药。
summary.en: Bai Jiang Cao contains saponins, iridoids, and volatile oils with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, sedative, and tissue-repair effects; a principal herb for draining pus.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 败酱草辛苦微寒，清热解毒，消痈排脓，祛瘀止痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and slightly cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, expels pus, and invigorates blood to stop pain.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主暴热火疮，赤气，疥瘙，疽痔，马鞍热气。

actions.en: Cool the blood and dissipate macules
Clear the Liver and drain fire

indications.en: Warm disease with intense heat, macules, hematemesis, or epistaxis
Pediatric convulsions and epilepsy
Mouth sores and sore throat

description_zh: 爵床科植物马蓝、蓼科植物蓼蓝或十字花科植物菘蓝叶经加工制得的干燥粉末或团块。性寒味咸，归肝、肺经。善清热解毒、凉血消斑，多入丸散或外用，不宜入汤剂久煎。
description_en: A dried powder or mass processed from the leaves of Baphicacanthus cusia, Polygonum tinctorium, or Isatis indigotica. Cold and salty, entering the Liver and Lung channels. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, cools the blood, and dissipates macules. Usually taken in pill or powder form or applied externally; not suitable for prolonged decoction.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: CDK2 inhibitor; used in research for chronic myeloid leukemia

summary.zh: 青黛由蓼蓝等加工制成，富含靛蓝、靛玉红和色胺酮，具抗白血病、抗炎、抗菌和凉血退热作用。
summary.en: Qing Dai, processed from Persicaria tinctoria and related species, contains indigo, indirubin, and tryptanthrin with antileukemic, anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antipyretic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 青黛所含靛玉红用于慢性粒细胞白血病的临床研究。
evidence_notes.note_en: Indirubin from Qing Dai has been investigated clinically for chronic myeloid leukemia.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 青黛咸寒，清热解毒，凉血消斑，清肝泻火。
evidence_notes.note_en: Salty-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and drains liver fire.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）青黛解诸药毒，小儿诸热惊痫，天行头痛寒热，煎水服之；小儿丹热，和水研服。

indications.en: Heat-toxin bloody dysentery
Malaria
Corns and warts (external application)

dosage_range.notes: 用龙眼肉包裹吞服，每次10–15粒，不宜入煎剂

description_zh: 苦木科植物鸦胆子的干燥成熟果实。性寒味苦，有小毒，归大肠、肝经。善清热解毒、截疟止痢，内服以龙眼肉包裹吞服，不可嚼碎，外用腐蚀赘疣。因有毒性，用量宜严格控制。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Brucea javanica (Simaroubaceae). Cold and bitter, slightly toxic, entering the Large Intestine and Liver channels. Clears heat-toxin, intercepts malaria, and stops dysentery. Taken orally wrapped in longan flesh; must not be chewed. Applied externally to cauterize warts. Dosage must be strictly controlled due to toxicity.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: cytotoxic; principal antimalarial and antineoplastic bioactives

summary.zh: 鸦胆子富含鸦胆子苦素类苦木素（quassinoids），具抗疟、抗阿米巴、抗肿瘤作用；内服有毒，临床多用其油制剂。
summary.en: Ya Dan Zi contains bruceolide-type quassinoids with antimalarial, antiamoebic, and antineoplastic activity; the raw seed is toxic so oil emulsions are preferred clinically.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鸦胆子苦寒有小毒，清热解毒，止痢截疟，外治鸡眼赘疣。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold with toxicity; clears heat, resolves toxin, arrests dysentery and malaria; topically used for corns and warts.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鸦胆子含高毒性苦木素，过量致恶心呕吐、肝肾损害、溶血；须严格控制剂量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Ya Dan Zi contains highly toxic quassinoids; overdose causes vomiting, hepatorenal damage, and hemolysis; dosage must be strictly controlled.

classical_references.passage: 鸦胆子味苦性寒有小毒，清热燥湿，止痢截疟，为久痢阿米巴痢要药。

indications.en: Lung abscess with purulent bloody sputum
Swollen, sore throat
Abscesses and toxic sores

description_zh: 蓼科植物金荞麦的干燥根茎。性凉味辛苦，归肺经。善清热解毒、排脓消痈，尤擅治肺痈脓血，现代常用于呼吸系统感染及肺脓肿。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Fagopyrum dibotrys (Polygonaceae). Cool, pungent and bitter, entering the Lung channel. Clears heat, resolves toxicity, and drains pus from abscesses. Particularly effective for lung abscess with purulent sputum; commonly used in modern practice for respiratory infections and pulmonary abscess.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 金荞麦富含黄酮、儿茶素类和鞣质，具抗炎、抗菌、化痰止咳和抑制肿瘤细胞作用，主治肺痈咳吐脓痰。
summary.en: Jin Qiao Mai is rich in flavonoids, catechins, and tannins with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, expectorant, and tumor-inhibiting effects; used for lung abscess with purulent sputum.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 金荞麦微辛涩凉，清热解毒，排脓祛瘀。
evidence_notes.note_en: Slightly acrid-astringent and cool; clears heat, resolves toxin, expels pus, and transforms stasis.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）苦荞麦（金荞麦）味苦甘，性寒，能实肠胃，益气力，续精神，利耳目，炼五脏滓秽。

actions.en: Cool the blood and invigorate blood

indications.zh: 温病血热毒盛，斑疹紫暗
indications.en: Warm disease with blood-heat toxin repletion and dark purple macules
Incomplete eruption of measles
Eczema and burns

description_zh: 紫草科植物新疆紫草或紫草的干燥根。性寒味甘，归心、肝经。善凉血活血、解毒透疹，为治血热毒盛之斑疹及麻疹不透之良药，外用紫草油广泛用于烫伤湿疹。
description_en: The dried root of Arnebia euchroma or Lithospermum erythrorhizon (Boraginaceae). Cold and sweet, entering the Heart and Liver channels. Cools and invigorates the blood, resolves toxicity, and vents rashes. A valued herb for blood-heat macules and incomplete measles eruption; externally, purple gromwell oil is widely used for burns and eczema.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal red pigment; anti-inflammatory and wound-healing

summary.zh: 紫草的红色萘醌类（紫草素及其酯）具抗炎、抗菌、抗病毒、促进伤口愈合和抗肿瘤作用。
summary.en: Zi Cao's red naphthoquinones (shikonin and its esters) have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, antiviral, wound-healing, and antineoplastic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 紫草甘咸寒，凉血活血，解毒透疹，为麻疹热毒常用药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-salty and cold; cools blood, invigorates blood, resolves toxin, and vents rashes; used for measles heat-toxin.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主心腹邪气，五疸，补中益气，利九窍，通水道。

actions.en: Clear heat and cool the blood

indications.en: Warm disease with high fever, clouded consciousness, and delirium
Blood-heat with hematemesis, epistaxis, macules, and papules
Pediatric convulsions

description_zh: 牛科动物水牛的角。性寒味苦，归心、肝、胃经。为犀角的代用品，善清热凉血、解毒定惊，功似犀角而力稍逊，用量须大。先煎或磨汁冲服。
description_en: The horn of the water buffalo Bubalus bubalis (Bovidae). Cold and bitter, entering the Heart, Liver, and Stomach channels. The standard modern substitute for rhinoceros horn; clears heat, cools the blood, resolves toxicity, and settles fright. Similar in action but less potent, requiring larger doses. Must be decocted first or ground and taken as a slurry.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 游离氨基酸（胱氨酸、亮氨酸、精氨酸）

summary.zh: 水牛角主含角蛋白水解物、多种氨基酸及微量元素，具镇静、解热、抗惊厥、止血和强心作用，常作犀角代用品。
summary.en: Shui Niu Jiao consists of keratin hydrolysates, amino acids, and mineral salts with sedative, antipyretic, anticonvulsant, hemostatic, and cardiotonic effects; it is the CITES-compliant substitute for rhinoceros horn.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 水牛角咸寒，清热凉血，解毒定惊，为犀角之替代品。
evidence_notes.note_en: Salty-cold; clears heat, cools blood, resolves toxin, and stops convulsions; used as a substitute for rhinoceros horn.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）水牛角凉血解毒，治时气寒热头痛，烦闷，风毒热气，斑痘烦渴。

actions.en: Cool the blood and abate steaming
Clear the Lung and direct fire downward

indications.en: Yin-vacuity fever with bone-steaming and night sweats
Lung-heat cough with hemoptysis
Internal heat with wasting-thirst

description_zh: 茄科植物枸杞或宁夏枸杞的干燥根皮。性寒味甘，归肺、肝、肾经。善清虚热、退骨蒸，兼能清肺降火，为治阴虚发热之佳品，与枸杞子同源而功用迥异。
description_en: The dried root bark of Lycium chinense or L. barbarum (Solanaceae). Cold and sweet, entering the Lung, Liver, and Kidney channels. Excels at clearing vacuity heat and abating bone-steaming; also clears Lung fire. From the same plant as Gou Qi Zi (the berry) but with entirely different functions.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 地骨皮含地骨皮胺、环肽和甜菜碱，具降血压、降血糖、解热、抗炎及调节免疫作用。
summary.en: Di Gu Pi contains kukoamine alkaloids, cyclic peptides, and betaine with hypotensive, hypoglycemic, antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 地骨皮甘寒，凉血退蒸，清肺降火，为阴虚发热要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cold; cools blood to relieve steaming heat and clears lung fire; a key herb for yin-vacuity fever.

classical_references.passage: （枸杞）味苦，寒。主五内邪气，热中消渴，周痹。久服坚筋骨，轻身不老。

indications.en: Yin-vacuity fever with bone-steaming consumptive heat
Pediatric gan-accumulation fever
Persistent postpartum vacuity fever

description_zh: 石竹科植物银柴胡的干燥根。性凉味甘，归肝、胃经。功专清虚热、退骨蒸，为治阴虚发热之常用药，虽名含柴胡，但与柴胡科属功效均不同，不可混淆。
description_en: The dried root of Stellaria dichotoma var. lanceolata (Caryophyllaceae). Cool and sweet, entering the Liver and Stomach channels. Specifically clears vacuity heat and abates bone-steaming. Despite sharing 'Chai Hu' in its name, it belongs to an entirely different botanical family and has distinct functions from Bupleurum.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 银柴胡含皂苷、植物甾醇和环肽，具退虚热、解热、抗炎作用，为阴虚骨蒸、小儿疳热常用药。
summary.en: Yin Chai Hu contains saponins, phytosterols, and cyclic peptides with steaming-heat-relieving, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory effects; used for yin-vacuity steaming bone and pediatric gan-heat.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 银柴胡甘微寒，清虚热，除疳热。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-slightly cold; clears vacuity heat and relieves pediatric gan-accumulation heat.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）银州柴胡者，乃西北所产，长而白软者，名银柴胡，最为良品，治虚劳发热为专。

actions.en: Clear heat and cool the blood

indications.en: Yin-vacuity fever and postpartum vacuity fever
Heat strangury and bloody strangury
Abscesses and toxic sores

description_zh: 萝藦科植物白薇或蔓生白薇的干燥根及根茎。性寒味苦咸，归胃、肝、肾经。善清虚热、凉血，又能利尿通淋，为治阴虚发热及产后虚热之良药。
description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Cynanchum atratum or C. versicolor (Asclepiadaceae). Cold, bitter and salty, entering the Stomach, Liver, and Kidney channels. Clears vacuity heat, cools the blood, and promotes urination. Effective for yin-vacuity fever and postpartum vacuity fever, as well as urinary tract heat conditions.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 白薇富含 C21 甾体苷及强心苷，具退虚热、抗炎、利尿作用，过量有心脏毒性。
summary.en: Bai Wei contains C21 steroidal glycosides and cardiac glycosides with heat-relieving, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects; cardiotoxic at overdose.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 白薇苦咸寒，清热凉血，利尿通淋，退虚热。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-salty and cold; clears heat, cools blood, promotes urination, and relieves vacuity heat.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主暴中风，身热肢满，忽忽不知人，狂惑邪气，寒热酸疼，温疟洗洗，发作有时。

indications.en: Bone-steaming tidal fever
Pediatric gan-accumulation fever
Damp-heat dysentery

description_zh: 玄参科植物胡黄连的干燥根茎。性寒味苦，归肝、胃、大肠经。善退虚热、除疳热，兼能清湿热，虽名含黄连，但与毛茛科黄连无关，功偏退虚热而非泻实火。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Picrorhiza scrophulariiflora (Scrophulariaceae). Cold and bitter, entering the Liver, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Abates vacuity heat and eliminates gan-accumulation fever; also clears damp-heat. Despite sharing 'Huang Lian' in its name, it is botanically unrelated to Coptis and focuses on clearing vacuity heat rather than draining repletion fire.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 胡黄连以胡黄连苷 I、II 为代表性环烯醚萜苷，具保肝、利胆、抗炎、免疫调节和抗溃疡作用。
summary.en: Hu Huang Lian's principal bioactives are picroside I and II (iridoid glycosides) with hepatoprotective, cholagogic, anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antiulcer effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 胡黄连苦寒，退虚热，除疳热，清湿热。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; relieves vacuity heat, resolves pediatric gan-heat, and clears damp-heat.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 胡黄连保肝作用已于多种化学性肝损伤模型证实。
evidence_notes.note_en: Hu Huang Lian has demonstrated hepatoprotection across multiple chemical-injury models.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）胡黄连性寒味苦，治骨蒸劳热，小儿疳热惊痫，妇人胎蒸虚热，诸痢疟疾黄疸。

indications.en: Damp-heat jaundice
Sandy and stone strangury (urolithiasis)
Abscesses, toxic sores, and traumatic injuries

description_zh: 唇形科植物活血丹的干燥地上部分。性凉味辛苦，归肝、肾、膀胱经。善清热利湿、通淋排石，为治石淋砂淋之民间要药，兼能解毒消肿，鲜品捣敷外用亦效。
description_en: The dried aerial part of Glechoma longituba (Lamiaceae). Cool, pungent and bitter, entering the Liver, Kidney, and Bladder channels. Clears heat, drains dampness, and frees strangury to expel stones; a folk remedy for urolithiasis. Also resolves toxicity and reduces swelling; fresh herb poultice is effective externally for sores and bruises.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 连钱草含挥发油、三萜酸、黄酮和酚酸，具利胆、排石、利尿、抗炎和抗菌作用，主治砂石淋。
summary.en: Lian Qian Cao contains volatile oils, triterpene acids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids with choleretic, stone-expelling, diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects; used for urinary calculi.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 连钱草辛苦微寒，利湿通淋，清热解毒，散瘀消肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and slightly cold; drains damp, clears heat toxin, disperses swelling, and promotes stone passage.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）积雪草（连钱草）利小便，通淋涩，散血热，治痢疾黄疸，痰嗽金疮。

actions.en: Purge downward and free the stool

indications.en: Constipation due to heat bind
Ascites with abdominal distention
Food accumulation with abdominal bloating

dosage_range.notes: 后下或泡服。缓下用1.5–3g，攻下用5–10g

description_zh: 豆科植物狭叶番泻或尖叶番泻的干燥小叶。归大肠经。苦寒沉降，善泻下通便，为治热结便秘之要药。
description_en: The dried leaflets of Cassia angustifolia or C. acutifolia (Fabaceae). Enters the Large Intestine channel. Bitter and cold with a descending nature, it is a key herb for treating heat-bound constipation through its strong purgative action.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal anthraquinone laxatives, activated by colonic microbiota

summary.zh: 番泻叶主含番泻苷类二蒽酮苷，经肠道菌转化为大黄酸蒽酮，刺激结肠蠕动产生缓泻。
summary.en: Fan Xie Ye contains sennosides (dianthrone glycosides) that are activated by colonic microbiota to rheinanthrone, stimulating colonic motility for laxative effect.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列番泻叶用于短期便秘治疗，长期使用可致电解质紊乱。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists Senna for short-term constipation; chronic use may cause electrolyte imbalance.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 番泻叶长期使用致结肠黑变病、钾丢失；孕妇哺乳期及严重电解质紊乱者禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Prolonged Senna use causes melanosis coli and potassium depletion; contraindicated in pregnancy, lactation, and severe electrolyte imbalance.

classical_references.passage: 番泻叶味甘苦性寒，泻热行滞通便，近代多用治热结便秘。

actions.en: Drain water and expel retained fluid

indications.en: Edema with abdominal distention
Retained fluid in the chest and hypochondria
Epilepsy due to phlegm clouding

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散。有毒，醋制减毒。反甘草（十八反）

description_zh: 大戟科植物甘遂的干燥块根。归肺、肾、大肠经。峻下逐水之力最强，为逐水要药。有毒，反甘草。
description_en: The dried tuberous root of Euphorbia kansui (Euphorbiaceae). Enters the Lung, Kidney, and Large Intestine channels. Among the strongest water-draining purgatives; toxic and antagonistic to licorice root (Eighteen Antagonisms).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 甘遂含巨大戟醇型二萜酯类为主要泻水逐饮活性成分，同时产生强烈刺激和毒性，醋制可减毒。
summary.en: Gan Sui's principal bioactives are ingenane-type diterpene esters providing potent cathartic water-driving action with marked irritancy and toxicity; vinegar processing reduces toxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 甘遂苦寒有毒，泻水逐饮，消肿散结；孕妇及体弱者禁用；不宜与甘草同用（十八反）。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold and toxic; drains water and thin-mucus accumulation, disperses masses; contraindicated in pregnancy and debility; incompatible with Gan Cao (18 antagonisms).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 甘遂所含二萜酯类为强烈促炎和致肿瘤佐剂，仅可短期醋制后入药，严格监控。
evidence_notes.note_en: Gan Sui's diterpene esters are potent tumor promoters; only vinegar-processed use is permitted, short-term and strictly monitored.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主大腹疝瘕，腹满，面目浮肿，留饮宿食，破癥坚积聚，利水谷道。

actions.en: Drain water and expel retained fluid
Purge downward and free the stool

indications.en: Edema and drum-like distention
Fluid accumulation in the chest and hypochondria
Sores, carbuncles, and toxic swellings

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散。有毒，醋制减毒。反甘草（十八反）

description_zh: 大戟科植物大戟的干燥根。归肺、脾、肾经。泻水逐饮力猛，兼能消肿散结。有毒，反甘草。
description_en: The dried root of Euphorbia pekinensis (Euphorbiaceae). Enters the Lung, Spleen, and Kidney channels. A potent water-draining purgative that also reduces swelling and dissipates nodulations. Toxic; antagonistic to licorice root.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 京大戟含大戟二萜酯类和三萜，为峻下逐水主要活性成分，毒性明显，醋制后减毒。
summary.en: Jing Da Ji (Euphorbia pekinensis) contains diterpene esters and triterpenes as principal cathartic water-driving bioactives with marked toxicity; vinegar processing mitigates toxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 大戟苦寒有毒，泻水逐饮，消肿散结；禁与甘草同用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold and toxic; drains water, reduces swelling, and disperses masses; incompatible with Gan Cao.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 大戟所含二萜酯致严重胃肠刺激，剂量须严格限制并只用制品。
evidence_notes.note_en: Da Ji diterpene esters cause severe GI irritation; dosage must be strictly limited and only processed material used.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主蛊毒十二水，腹满急痛积聚，中风皮肤疼痛，吐逆。

actions.en: Drain water and expel retained fluid

indications.en: Edema and drum-like distention
Retained fluid in the chest and hypochondria
Cough and wheezing with copious phlegm

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散。有毒，醋制减毒。反甘草（十八反）

description_zh: 瑞香科植物芫花的干燥花蕾。归肺、脾、肾经。泻水逐饮，又善祛痰止咳。有毒，反甘草。
description_en: The dried flower buds of Daphne genkwa (Thymelaeaceae). Enters the Lung, Spleen, and Kidney channels. Drains water and expels fluid while also dispelling phlegm and stopping cough. Toxic; antagonistic to licorice root.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 芫花含达芙妮型二萜酯（芫花酯甲乙）和黄酮，具强烈泻水、抗生育、抗肿瘤作用，毒性显著。
summary.en: Yuan Hua contains daphnane diterpene esters (yuanhuacine, yuanhuadine) and flavonoids with potent cathartic, abortifacient, and antineoplastic activity, all with marked toxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 芫花苦辛温有毒，泻水逐饮，祛痰止咳，外用杀虫疗疮；孕妇禁用，不宜与甘草同用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and warm with toxicity; drains water, transforms phlegm, relieves cough, and is used topically; contraindicated in pregnancy and with Gan Cao.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主咳逆上气，喉鸣喘，咽肿短气，蛊毒鬼疟，疝瘕痈肿。

actions.en: Dispel phlegm and cleanse retained fluid

indications.en: Edema and drum-like distention
Wheezing due to phlegm congestion
Abdominal pain from parasitic accumulation

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散。炒用，生用毒大。有小毒

description_zh: 旋花科植物裂叶牵牛或圆叶牵牛的干燥成熟种子。归肺、肾、大肠经。泻下逐水，兼能去积杀虫。有小毒。
description_en: The dried ripe seeds of Pharbitis nil or P. purpurea (Convolvulaceae). Enters the Lung, Kidney, and Large Intestine channels. Purges downward to drain water while also eliminating accumulation and killing parasites. Slightly toxic.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal cathartic; related to jalap resin

summary.zh: 牵牛子含牵牛子苷（树脂苷类）为主要峻泻成分，并含微量麦角类生物碱，具泻下、利尿、驱虫作用。
summary.en: Qian Niu Zi's principal cathartic is pharbitin (resin glycoside) with trace ergot-type indole alkaloids; produces drastic purgation, diuresis, and anthelmintic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 牵牛子苦寒有毒，泻水通便，消痰涤饮，杀虫攻积；孕妇禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold and toxic; drains water, moves stool, transforms phlegm, and kills parasites; contraindicated in pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）牵牛子泻气分湿热，一切气壅滞者用之，通大小肠。

actions.en: Dissolve bone obstructions in the throat

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Numbness of the limbs
Bone stuck in the throat

dosage_range.notes: 消骨鲠用量可加大至30g，醋煎服

description_zh: 毛茛科植物威灵仙、棉团铁线莲或东北铁线莲的干燥根及根茎。归膀胱经。性猛善走，通行十二经，为治风湿痹痛之要药。
description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Clematis chinensis, C. hexapetala, or C. manshurica (Ranunculaceae). Enters the Bladder channel. Fierce and mobile in nature, it courses through all twelve channels and is a key herb for wind-damp impediment pain.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 威灵仙含三萜皂苷和原白头翁素类内酯，具抗炎、镇痛、利胆、松弛平滑肌和抗风湿作用。
summary.en: Wei Ling Xian contains triterpene saponins and protoanemonin-type lactones with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, choleretic, smooth-muscle relaxant, and antirheumatic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 威灵仙辛咸温，祛风湿，通经络，止痹痛，为治风湿顽痹要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-salty and warm; dispels wind-damp, frees the channels, and stops impediment pain; a principal herb for stubborn wind-damp bi.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）威灵仙气温味微辛咸，其性善走，故能宣疏五脏，通行十二经络。

actions.en: Invigorate blood and unblock the collaterals

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Epigastric and abdominal pain
Urticaria with itching, eczema

dosage_range.notes: 不宜久煎，后下

description_zh: 萝藦科植物徐长卿的干燥根及根茎。归肝、胃经。辛散温通，祛风止痛力强，兼能活血止痒。
description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Cynanchum paniculatum (Asclepiadaceae). Enters the Liver and Stomach channels. Pungent and warm with a dispersing and unblocking nature, it strongly dispels wind and stops pain while also invigorating blood and relieving itch.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 徐长卿含丹皮酚及 C21 甾苷，具镇痛、抗炎、抗过敏、降血压和抗心律失常作用。
summary.en: Xu Chang Qing contains paeonol and C21 steroidal glycosides with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, antiallergic, hypotensive, and antiarrhythmic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 徐长卿辛温，祛风除湿，行气活血，止痛止痒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; dispels wind-damp, moves qi, invigorates blood, and alleviates pain and itching.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主鬼物百精蛊毒，疫疾邪恶气，温疟。久服强悍轻身。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Soreness of the lower back and knees with weak sinews and bones
Edema with inhibited urination

dosage_range.notes: 可浸酒服。注意区分南五加皮与北五加皮（香加皮有毒）

description_zh: 五加科植物细柱五加的干燥根皮。归肝、肾经。祛风湿而强筋骨，又能利水，善治痹证兼肝肾不足者。
description_en: The dried root bark of Acanthopanax gracilistylus (Araliaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Dispels wind-dampness and strengthens sinews and bones while also disinhibiting water, especially suited for impediment patterns with Liver-Kidney insufficiency.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 五加皮挥发油（含异秦皮啶）

summary.zh: 五加皮含五加苷类、紫丁香苷和香豆素，具祛风湿、强筋骨、抗疲劳、免疫调节及适应原样作用。
summary.en: Wu Jia Pi contains eleutherosides, syringin, and coumarins with wind-damp dispelling, tonic, anti-fatigue, immunomodulatory, and adaptogenic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 五加皮辛苦温，祛风湿，强筋骨，利水消肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and warm; dispels wind-damp, strengthens sinews and bones, and promotes urination to reduce edema.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，温。主心腹疝气，腹痛，益气疗躄，小儿不能行，疽疮阴蚀。

actions.en: Strengthen the lower back and knees

indications.en: Soreness and pain of the lower back
Weakness of the lower limbs
Wind-damp impediment pain with knee joint soreness

dosage_range.notes: 砂烫去毛用

description_zh: 蚌壳蕨科植物金毛狗脊的干燥根茎。归肝、肾经。温补肝肾，祛风湿，强腰膝，善治肝肾不足之腰痛脊强。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Cibotium barometz (Dicksoniaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Warmly supplements the Liver and Kidney, dispels wind-dampness, and strengthens the lower back and knees, especially for lumbar pain and spinal stiffness from Liver-Kidney insufficiency.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 狗脊含淀粉、贯众素类倍半萜、植物甾醇和鞣质，具补肝肾、强腰膝和止血作用。
summary.en: Gou Ji contains starches, pterosin-type sesquiterpenes, phytosterols, and tannins with liver-kidney tonifying, lumbar-strengthening, and hemostatic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 狗脊苦甘温，祛风湿，补肝肾，强腰膝。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-sweet and warm; dispels wind-damp, tonifies liver and kidney, and strengthens lumbus and knees.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主腰背强，关机缓急，周痹寒湿，膝痛，颇利老人。

indications.zh: 风湿痹痛，肩臂关节酸痛
indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain with shoulder and arm joint soreness
Numbness of the upper limbs
Edema and leg qi

description_zh: 桑科植物桑的干燥嫩枝。归肝经。善达四肢经络，尤以上肢痹痛为佳，性平不燥。
description_en: The dried young twigs of Morus alba (Moraceae). Enters the Liver channel. Excels at reaching the channels of the four limbs, particularly suited for upper-limb impediment pain, and is neutral in nature without being drying.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桑枝含异戊烯基苯并呋喃、黄酮和芪类，具抗炎、降糖、扩张血管和抗风湿作用。
summary.en: Sang Zhi contains prenylated benzofurans, flavonoids, and stilbenes with anti-inflammatory, hypoglycemic, vasodilator, and antirheumatic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 桑枝苦平，祛风湿，利关节，行水气。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-neutral; dispels wind-damp, frees the joints, and moves water.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）桑枝治一切风湿痹痛，脚气四肢拘挛。

actions.en: Unblock the menses and promote lactation

indications.en: Strangury with painful inhibited urination
Mouth and tongue sores with vexation and dark urine
Blocked lactation

dosage_range.notes: 现多用川木通或白木通代替关木通（含马兜铃酸，已禁用）

description_zh: 木通科植物白木通或三叶木通的干燥藤茎。归心、小肠、膀胱经。苦寒清降，上清心火，下利小便，善治心火下移小肠之口疮尿赤。
description_en: The dried caulis of Akebia quinata or A. trifoliata (Lardizabalaceae). Enters the Heart, Small Intestine, and Bladder channels. Bitter-cold and downward-draining, it clears Heart fire above and disinhibits urination below, especially for oral sores with dark urine from Heart fire transferring to the Small Intestine.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 木通（五叶木通）含三萜皂苷和钾盐，具利尿、抗炎、免疫调节作用；须注意与关木通（含马兜铃酸）区别，后者已禁用。
summary.en: Akebia Mu Tong contains triterpene saponins and potassium salts with diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects; must be distinguished from Guan Mu Tong (Aristolochia manshuriensis) which contains nephrotoxic aristolochic acids and is banned.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 木通苦寒，利尿通淋，清心火，通经下乳。必须使用五叶木通，禁用关木通。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; promotes urination, clears heart fire, frees channels, and promotes lactation. Only five-leaf Akebia Mu Tong is to be used; Aristolochia Guan Mu Tong is banned due to aristolochic acid nephrotoxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 关木通（马兜铃科）含马兜铃酸，可致不可逆肾损害和尿路上皮癌，国际多国已禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Guan Mu Tong (Aristolochia) contains aristolochic acids causing irreversible nephropathy and urothelial carcinoma; banned in most jurisdictions.

classical_references.passage: （通草）味辛，平。主去恶虫，除脾胃寒热，通利九窍血脉关节，令人不忘。

actions.en: Break blood stasis and unblock the menses

indications.en: Heat strangury with painful inhibited urination
Blood strangury
Amenorrhea and blocked menses

dosage_range.notes: 孕妇禁用

description_zh: 石竹科植物瞿麦或石竹的干燥地上部分。归心、小肠经。苦寒降泄，利尿通淋力强，又能破血通经。
description_en: The dried aerial parts of Dianthus superbus or D. chinensis (Caryophyllaceae). Enters the Heart and Small Intestine channels. Bitter-cold with a descending nature, it strongly disinhibits urination and frees strangury while also breaking blood stasis and unblocking the menses.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 瞿麦含皂苷、黄酮苷和钾盐，具利尿、抗炎和兴奋子宫作用，孕妇忌用。
summary.en: Qu Mai contains saponins, flavonoid glycosides, and potassium salts with diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and uterotonic effects; contraindicated in pregnancy.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 瞿麦苦寒，利尿通淋，破血通经。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; promotes urination, breaks blood stasis, and frees menses.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主关格诸癃结，小便不通，出刺，决痈肿，明目去翳，破胎堕子，下闭血。

indications.en: Heat strangury with painful inhibited urination
Scanty dark urination
Pinworm infection, genital dampness with itching

description_zh: 蓼科植物萹蓄的干燥地上部分。归膀胱经。苦泄下行，利尿通淋，又善杀虫止痒，常与瞿麦配伍治热淋。
description_en: The dried aerial parts of Polygonum aviculare (Polygonaceae). Enters the Bladder channel. Bitter and downward-draining, it disinhibits urination and frees strangury while also killing parasites and relieving itching. Often paired with qu mai for heat strangury.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 萹蓄富含黄酮苷、鞣质和硅酸，具利尿、抗菌、止血、降血压和止痒作用。
summary.en: Bian Xu is rich in flavonoid glycosides, tannins, and silica with diuretic, antibacterial, hemostatic, hypotensive, and antipruritic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 萹蓄苦微寒，利尿通淋，杀虫止痒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-slightly cold; promotes urination, kills parasites, and relieves itch.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主浸淫，疥瘙，疽痔，杀三虫。

actions.en: Clear the Heart and descend fire
Quiet the spirit and settle fright

indications.en: Strangury with inhibited urination
Vexation and insomnia
Infantile night crying

description_zh: 灯心草科植物灯心草的干燥茎髓。归心、肺、小肠经。质轻气薄，善清心火，利尿通淋，为治心火上炎之口疮、心烦要药。
description_en: The dried pith of Juncus effusus (Juncaceae). Enters the Heart, Lung, and Small Intestine channels. Light in substance and thin in qi, it excels at clearing Heart fire and disinhibiting urination, a key herb for mouth sores and vexation from flaring Heart fire.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 灯心草含木犀草素类黄酮和菲类化合物，具利尿、镇静、抗菌和抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Deng Xin Cao contains luteolin-type flavonoids and phenanthrene derivatives with diuretic, sedative, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 灯心草甘淡微寒，利尿通淋，清心降火，为心烦失眠夜啼常用药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bland and slightly cold; promotes urination and clears heart fire; used for irritability, insomnia, and pediatric night-crying.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）灯心草降心火，止血通气，散肿止渴。烧灰入轻粉少许，吹喉治急喉痹甚捷。

actions.en: Clear the Lung and stop cough

indications.en: Heat strangury and stone strangury
Blood strangury with painful inhibited urination
Cough due to Lung heat

description_zh: 水龙骨科植物庐山石韦、石韦或有柄石韦的干燥叶。归肺、膀胱经。利尿通淋，善治石淋；又清肺止咳，凉血止血。
description_en: The dried leaves of Pyrrosia lingua, P. sheareri, or P. petiolosa (Polypodiaceae). Enters the Lung and Bladder channels. Disinhibits urination and frees strangury, especially effective for stone strangury; also clears Lung heat, stops cough, cools blood, and stops bleeding.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 石韦富含芒果苷等黄酮碳苷和鞣质，具利尿、抗菌、抗炎、止血和止咳作用。
summary.en: Shi Wei is rich in xanthone C-glycosides (mangiferin, isomangiferin) and tannins with diuretic, antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, hemostatic, and antitussive effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 石韦苦甘微寒，利尿通淋，清肺止咳，凉血止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-sweet and slightly cold; promotes urination, clears lung, stops cough, and cools blood to arrest bleeding.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主劳热邪气，五癃闭不通，利小便水道。

actions.en: Disinhibit urination, free strangury, and expel stones

indications.en: Stone strangury, urinary calculi
Damp-heat jaundice
Gallstones

dosage_range.notes: 排石时用量宜大，可用至60g

description_zh: 报春花科植物过路黄的干燥全草。归肝、胆、肾、膀胱经。善利尿排石，为治石淋之要药；又善退黄疸。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Lysimachia christinae (Primulaceae). Enters the Liver, Gallbladder, Kidney, and Bladder channels. Excels at disinhibiting urination and expelling stones, a key herb for stone strangury; also effective at abating jaundice.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 金钱草黄酮（山柰酚、槲皮素苷）

summary.zh: 金钱草含黄酮苷、酚酸和三萜皂苷，具排石、利胆、利尿、抗炎和抗菌作用，为治砂石淋、胆结石要药。
summary.en: Jin Qian Cao contains flavonoid glycosides, phenolic acids, and triterpene saponins with lithiasis-resolving, choleretic, diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects; a principal herb for urinary and biliary calculi.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 金钱草甘淡微寒，利湿退黄，利尿通淋，排石。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bland and slightly cold; drains damp, resolves jaundice, promotes urination, and expels stones.

classical_references.passage: 金钱草味微苦甘性凉，清热利湿，通淋排石，散瘀消肿，近代广用于胆石症、尿路结石。

indications.en: Edema with distention and fullness
Inhibited urination
Summerheat with thirst

description_zh: 葫芦科植物冬瓜的干燥外层果皮。归脾、小肠经。甘淡而凉，善利水消肿，药力平和，为治水肿常用之品。
description_en: The dried outer peel of Benincasa hispida (Cucurbitaceae). Enters the Spleen and Small Intestine channels. Sweet, bland, and cool, it gently disinhibits water and reduces swelling with a mild action, commonly used for treating edema.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 冬瓜皮含三萜皂苷、钾盐和甘露醇，具利尿消肿、清暑作用。
summary.en: Dong Gua Pi contains triterpene saponins, potassium salts, and mannitol with diuretic and summer-heat-clearing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 冬瓜皮甘微寒，利尿消肿，清热解暑。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-slightly cold; promotes urination, reduces edema, and relieves summer heat.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）白瓜皮，即冬瓜皮，味甘微寒，利小便，消水肿，主治水胀。

actions.en: Separate the clear from the turbid

indications.en: Unctuous strangury with turbid urination
Wind-damp impediment pain
Profuse vaginal discharge

description_zh: 薯蓣科植物粉背薯蓣或绵萆薢的干燥根茎。归肾、胃经。善分清泌浊，为治膏淋白浊之要药。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Dioscorea hypoglauca or D. septemloba (Dioscoreaceae). Enters the Kidney and Stomach channels. Excels at separating the clear from the turbid, a key herb for unctuous strangury and turbid urine.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 萆薢富含甾体皂苷和薯蓣皂苷元，具利湿、抗炎、降血脂和分清化浊作用。
summary.en: Bi Xie is rich in steroidal saponins and diosgenin with damp-draining, anti-inflammatory, hypolipidemic, and turbidity-clearing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 萆薢苦平，利湿浊，祛风湿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-neutral; drains damp turbidity and dispels wind-damp.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主腰脊痛强，骨节风寒湿周痹，恶疮不瘳，热气。

indications.en: Strangury with painful inhibited urination
Genital itching with vaginal discharge
Eczema and urticaria with itching

dosage_range.notes: 外用适量，煎汤熏洗

description_zh: 藜科植物地肤的干燥成熟果实。归肾、膀胱经。利尿通淋，又善祛风止痒，为治皮肤湿疹瘙痒之常用药。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Kochia scoparia (Chenopodiaceae). Enters the Kidney and Bladder channels. Disinhibits urination and frees strangury while also excelling at dispelling wind and relieving itching, commonly used for eczema and skin itching.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 地肤子皂苷（苦瓜苷 I, Ic）

summary.zh: 地肤子含三萜皂苷和黄酮苷，具利尿、抗真菌、止痒、降血糖作用，主治湿热皮肤瘙痒。
summary.en: Di Fu Zi contains triterpene saponins and flavonoid glycosides with diuretic, antifungal, antipruritic, and hypoglycemic effects; used for damp-heat skin pruritus.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 地肤子苦寒，清热利湿，祛风止痒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, drains damp, dispels wind, and stops itching.

classical_references.passage: （地肤子）味苦，寒。主膀胱热，利小便，补中益精气。久服耳目聪明，轻身耐老。

indications.en: Heat strangury and stone strangury
Blood strangury with painful inhibited urination
Inhibited urination

dosage_range.notes: 布包煎

description_zh: 海金沙科植物海金沙的干燥成熟孢子。归膀胱、小肠经。质轻善降，利尿通淋力佳，善治诸淋，尤以石淋、血淋为宜。
description_en: The dried mature spores of Lygodium japonicum (Lygodiaceae). Enters the Bladder and Small Intestine channels. Light in substance with a descending nature, it effectively disinhibits urination and frees all types of strangury, especially stone and blood strangury.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 海金沙含黄酮苷、脂肪油和钾盐，具利尿、排石、抗菌和解痉作用，常用于石淋热淋。
summary.en: Hai Jin Sha contains flavonoid glycosides, fatty oil, and potassium salts with diuretic, stone-expelling, antibacterial, and antispasmodic effects; used for stone-type and heat-type painful urinary dribbling.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 海金沙甘寒，利尿通淋，为沙石热淋专药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cold; promotes urination and dissolves stones; a specific remedy for sand-stone and heat-type strangury.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）海金沙除小肠膀胱血分湿热。治湿热肿满，五淋茎痛，解热毒气。

actions.en: Warm the center and stop vomiting
Open the Stomach and promote digestion

indications.en: Cold-dampness obstructing internally with epigastric distention and fullness
Vomiting and diarrhea
Lack of appetite

dosage_range.notes: 后下

description_zh: 姜科植物草豆蔻的干燥近成熟种子。归脾、胃经。辛温香燥，善燥湿行气、温中止呕。
description_en: The dried nearly ripe seeds of Alpinia katsumadai (Zingiberaceae). Enters the Spleen and Stomach channels. Pungent, warm, aromatic, and drying, it excels at drying dampness, moving qi, warming the center, and stopping vomiting.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 草豆蔻含挥发油（桉叶素、樟脑）和黄酮，具促消化、抗菌、解痉和止吐作用。
summary.en: Cao Dou Kou contains essential oils (cineole, camphor) and flavonoids with digestive-stimulant, antibacterial, antispasmodic, and antiemetic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 草豆蔻辛温，燥湿化痰，行气温中，主治寒湿气滞脘腹胀痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; dries damp, moves qi, warms the middle, and relieves cold-damp epigastric distension.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）草豆蔻除寒燥湿，开郁破气，消食宽膨，治霍乱腹痛。

actions.en: Dry dampness and warm the center

indications.en: Cold-dampness obstructing the center with epigastric distention and pain
Malaria with alternating chills and fever
Vomiting and diarrhea

dosage_range.notes: 去壳取仁用

description_zh: 姜科植物草果的干燥成熟果实。归脾、胃经。辛香温烈，善燥湿温中，为治寒湿中阻及截疟要药。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Amomum tsao-ko (Zingiberaceae). Enters the Spleen and Stomach channels. Pungent, aromatic, and intensely warm, it excels at drying dampness and warming the center. A key herb for cold-damp obstruction and for interrupting malaria.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 草果富含挥发油，具抗疟、抗菌、解痉、镇吐和兴奋消化作用，为截疟要药。
summary.en: Cao Guo is rich in volatile oils with antimalarial, antibacterial, antispasmodic, antiemetic, and digestive-stimulant effects; a principal herb for intermittent fever (malaria).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 草果辛温，燥湿温中，截疟除痰。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; dries damp, warms the middle, and interrupts malarial disorders.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）草果辛热浮而升，入足太阴阳明经，除寒湿痰疟，治瘴疠寒热。

actions.en: Warm the Stomach and disperse cold

indications.en: Cold pain of the epigastrium and abdomen
Vomiting due to Stomach cold
Belching and acid regurgitation

description_zh: 姜科植物高良姜的干燥根茎。归脾、胃经。辛热散寒止痛，善治胃寒脘痛，常与香附配伍为良附丸。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Alpinia officinarum (Zingiberaceae). Enters the Spleen and Stomach channels. Pungent-hot, it disperses cold and stops pain, especially suited for epigastric pain from Stomach cold. Classically paired with xiang fu in Liang Fu Wan.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 高良姜挥发油（桉叶素、肉桂酸甲酯）

summary.zh: 高良姜含挥发油、高良姜素和二芳基庚烷，具温胃止痛、抗溃疡、抗炎和抗菌作用。
summary.en: Gao Liang Jiang contains volatile oil, galangin, and diarylheptanoids with stomach-warming, antiulcer, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 高良姜辛热，散寒止痛，温胃止呕。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-hot; disperses cold, alleviates pain, warms the stomach, and stops vomiting.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）高良姜，健脾胃，宽噎膈，破冷癖，除瘴疟。

actions.en: Warm the center and stop pain

indications.en: Cold epigastric pain with vomiting and diarrhea
Abdominal pain from parasitic accumulation
Eczema with itching

dosage_range.notes: 外用适量，煎汤熏洗

description_zh: 芸香科植物花椒的干燥成熟果皮。归脾、胃、肾经。辛温燥烈，善温中散寒止痛，又能杀虫止痒。
description_en: The dried mature pericarp of Zanthoxylum bungeanum (Rutaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, and Kidney channels. Pungent, warm, and intensely drying, it excels at warming the center, dispersing cold, and stopping pain while also killing parasites and relieving itch.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 花椒含山椒素类酰胺和挥发油，具温中止痛、驱虫、局麻、抗菌和止痒作用。
summary.en: Hua Jiao contains sanshool-type fatty acid amides and volatile oil with middle-warming, analgesic, anthelmintic, local anesthetic, antibacterial, and antipruritic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 花椒辛温，温中止痛，杀虫止痒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; warms the middle, stops pain, and kills parasites.

classical_references.passage: （秦椒）味辛，温。主风邪气，温中，除寒痹，坚齿发，明目。

actions.en: Warm the center and direct counterflow downward
Warm the Kidney and assist yang

indications.en: Vomiting and hiccup due to Stomach cold
Cold pain of the epigastrium and abdomen
Kidney yang insufficiency with impotence and cold uterus

dosage_range.notes: 畏郁金（十九畏）

description_zh: 桃金娘科植物丁香的干燥花蕾。归脾、胃、肺、肾经。辛温芳香，善温中降逆止呃，为治胃寒呃逆之要药。
description_en: The dried flower buds of Syzygium aromaticum (Myrtaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Lung, and Kidney channels. Pungent, warm, and aromatic, it excels at warming the center and directing counterflow downward to stop hiccup. A key herb for hiccup due to Stomach cold.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 丁香以丁香酚为主要挥发油成分，具局麻、抗菌、抗真菌、促消化、止吐和止痛作用。
summary.en: Ding Xiang's volatile oil is >80% eugenol with local anesthetic, antibacterial, antifungal, digestive, antiemetic, and analgesic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 丁香辛温，温中降逆，补肾助阳，为治胃寒呃逆要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; warms the middle, descends counterflow, and tonifies kidney yang; a principal herb for cold-stomach hiccup.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列丁香用于牙痛局部镇痛、消化不良及恶心。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists Clove for topical dental analgesia, dyspepsia, and nausea.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）丁香温胃，故能疗呕逆不食，霍乱泻痢诸证，气血盛者不可服。

actions.en: Warm the center and disperse cold

indications.en: Cold pain of the epigastrium and abdomen
Vomiting and hiccup
Abdominal pain from cold congealing qi stagnation

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散效佳

description_zh: 胡椒科植物荜拨的干燥近成熟或成熟果穗。归胃、大肠经。辛热行散，善温中散寒止痛，专治胃寒脘腹冷痛。
description_en: The dried nearly ripe or ripe fruit spike of Piper longum (Piperaceae). Enters the Stomach and Large Intestine channels. Pungent-hot with a dispersing action, it excels at warming the center, dispersing cold, and stopping pain, specifically for cold epigastric pain.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 荜拨含胡椒碱类酰胺生物碱和挥发油，具温中止痛、抗炎、抗溃疡和抗肿瘤作用。
summary.en: Bi Ba contains piperine-type amide alkaloids and volatile oil with middle-warming, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, antiulcer, and antineoplastic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 荜拨辛热，温中散寒，下气止痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-hot; warms the middle, disperses cold, descends qi, and alleviates pain.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）荜拨大温，下气消食，除胃冷，治呕吐霍乱，冷痢虚泻。

actions.en: Warm the center and disperse cold

indications.en: Vomiting and counterflow due to Stomach cold
Cold pain of the epigastrium and abdomen
Cold-type mounting pain in the abdomen

description_zh: 樟科植物山鸡椒的干燥成熟果实。归脾、胃、肾、膀胱经。辛温芳香，善温中散寒行气止痛。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Litsea cubeba (Lauraceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Kidney, and Bladder channels. Pungent, warm, and aromatic, it excels at warming the center, dispersing cold, moving qi, and stopping pain.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 荜澄茄挥发油（柠檬醛、柠檬烯）

summary.zh: 荜澄茄含以柠檬醛为主的挥发油，具温中散寒、行气止痛、抗菌和平喘作用。
summary.en: Bi Cheng Qie's citral-rich volatile oil produces middle-warming, qi-regulating, analgesic, antibacterial, and bronchodilator effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 荜澄茄辛温，温中散寒，行气止痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; warms the middle, disperses cold, moves qi, and alleviates pain.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）荜澄茄暖脾胃，止呃逆反胃，治冷气奔豚，肾气疝气，脘腹冷痛。

actions.en: Dispel wind and unblock the collaterals
Invigorate blood and unblock the menses

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain with limb numbness
Edema with inhibited urination
Irregular menstruation and amenorrhea

dosage_range.notes: 孕妇忌用

description_zh: 金缕梅科植物枫香树的干燥成熟果序。归肝、肾经。以通为用，善祛风通络、利水活血，通行十二经。
description_en: The dried mature infructescence of Liquidambar formosana (Hamamelidaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Named for its ability to 'unblock all paths,' it dispels wind, unblocks the collaterals, disinhibits water, and invigorates blood throughout all twelve channels.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 路路通含三萜酸和挥发油，具抗炎、利尿、解痉和通络作用。
summary.en: Lu Lu Tong contains triterpene acids and volatile oil with anti-inflammatory, diuretic, antispasmodic, and collateral-freeing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 路路通苦平，祛风活络，利水通经。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-neutral; dispels wind, frees the collaterals, and promotes urination and menstruation.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）枫木（枫香果即路路通）能祛风湿，通经活络，利水消肿。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain with joint swelling
Numbness of the limbs
Edema and leg qi

description_zh: 防己科植物青藤的干燥藤茎。归肝、脾经。苦辛通利，善祛风湿、通经络，又能利水，常用于风湿关节肿痛。
description_en: The dried caulis of Sinomenium acutum (Menispermaceae). Enters the Liver and Spleen channels. Bitter-pungent and unblocking, it dispels wind-dampness, unblocks channels and collaterals, and disinhibits water, commonly used for wind-damp joint swelling and pain.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 青风藤以青藤碱为主要活性成分，具抗炎、镇痛、免疫调节作用，为治风湿类风湿关节炎常用药；释放组胺可致皮肤反应。
summary.en: Qing Feng Teng's principal bioactive is sinomenine with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and immunomodulatory effects used in rheumatoid arthritis; histamine release can cause skin reactions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 青风藤苦辛平，祛风除湿，通络止痛，利尿消肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and neutral; dispels wind-damp, frees the collaterals, alleviates pain, and promotes urination.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 青藤碱已用于类风湿关节炎治疗，有免疫抑制作用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sinomenine is used clinically for rheumatoid arthritis with documented immunosuppressive activity.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）青藤治风湿，流注历节，鹤膝风麻痹瘙痒，损伤疮肿入药。

actions.en: Dispel wind and unblock the collaterals

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain with sinew and vessel contracture
Chest and hypochondriac pain
Blocked lactation

description_zh: 葫芦科植物丝瓜的干燥成熟果实的维管束。归肺、胃、肝经。性善通络，为治胸胁痛及乳汁不通常用之品。
description_en: The dried vascular bundle of the mature fruit of Luffa cylindrica (Cucurbitaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Liver channels. Its nature excels at unblocking collaterals, commonly used for chest and hypochondriac pain and blocked lactation.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 丝瓜络含三萜皂苷和黄酮，具抗炎、镇痛、通络和抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Si Gua Luo contains triterpene saponins and flavonoids with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, collateral-freeing, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 丝瓜络甘平，祛风通络，活血化痰。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-neutral; dispels wind, frees collaterals, and transforms phlegm-stasis.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）丝瓜经络贯串，房隔联属，故能通人经络脏腑，治血气壅滞，诸痹肿痛。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Edema and ascites
Inhibited urination

dosage_range.notes: 注意与粉防己区分

description_zh: 防己科植物木防己的干燥根。归膀胱、脾、肺经。苦寒清泄，祛风除湿，利水消肿。
description_en: The dried root of Cocculus orbiculatus (Menispermaceae). Enters the Bladder, Spleen, and Lung channels. Bitter-cold and clearing, it dispels wind, eliminates dampness, disinhibits water, and reduces swelling.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 木防己（防己科 Cocculus）含双苄基异喹啉生物碱，具镇痛、抗炎、降压作用。须与汉防己（粉防己 Stephania tetrandra）区分，与广防己（Aristolochia 马兜铃科，含马兜铃酸，已禁用）区分。
summary.en: Mu Fang Ji (Cocculus, Menispermaceae) contains bisbenzylisoquinoline alkaloids with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and hypotensive effects. Must be distinguished from Han Fang Ji (Stephania tetrandra) and from the banned Guang Fang Ji (Aristolochia, nephrotoxic aristolochic acids).

evidence_notes.note_zh: 木防己苦辛寒，祛风止痛，利水消肿。使用时须确认为防己科，避免使用含马兜铃酸之广防己。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and cold; dispels wind, alleviates pain, and promotes urination. Use only verified Menispermaceae material; avoid aristolochic-acid-containing Guang Fang Ji.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 广防己（马兜铃科）含马兜铃酸致肾损害和尿路上皮癌，国际多地已禁用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Guang Fang Ji (Aristolochia) contains aristolochic acids causing nephropathy and urothelial carcinoma; banned in multiple jurisdictions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）防己，祛风除湿通络，为治风湿痹痛水肿要药，古今分木防己、汉防己，主治稍异。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Numbness of the limbs
Diarrhea and dysentery

dosage_range.notes: 可浸酒

description_zh: 牻牛儿苗科植物牻牛儿苗或老鹳草的干燥地上部分。归肝、脾经。善祛风湿、通经络、止泻痢，药性平和。
description_en: The dried aerial parts of Erodium stephanianum or Geranium wilfordii (Geraniaceae). Enters the Liver and Spleen channels. Dispels wind-dampness, unblocks channels and collaterals, and stops diarrhea and dysentery with a mild, neutral nature.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 老鹳草富含鞣花鞣质（老鹳草素、鞣花酸），具抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎、止泻和抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Lao Guan Cao is rich in ellagitannins (geraniin, corilagin) with antibacterial, antiviral, anti-inflammatory, antidiarrheal, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 老鹳草辛苦平，祛风湿，通经络，止泻痢。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and neutral; dispels wind-damp, frees the channels, and arrests dysentery.

classical_references.passage: （附考）老鹳草味微辛性平，祛风活血，清热解毒，通经止痢，为治风湿筋骨疼痛、泄痢常用之药。

actions.en: Dispel wind and unblock the collaterals

indications.en: Stubborn wind-damp impediment
Limb numbness after wind-stroke
Skin itching, scabies and tinea

dosage_range.notes: 研末吞服每次2–3g。也可浸酒

description_zh: 游蛇科动物乌梢蛇的干燥体。归肝经。甘平无毒，善搜风通络，为治风湿顽痹之佳品。
description_en: The dried body of Zaocys dhumnades (Colubridae). Enters the Liver channel. Sweet and neutral without toxicity, it excels at searching out wind and unblocking collaterals, a fine remedy for stubborn wind-damp impediment.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 乌梢蛇富含蛋白质、氨基酸及微量元素，具抗炎、镇痛、抗过敏和增强免疫作用，为祛风通络止痉常用药。
summary.en: Wu Shao She is rich in proteins, amino acids, and trace elements with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, antiallergic, and immune-enhancing effects; used for wind-damp impediment and convulsions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 乌梢蛇甘平，祛风通络，定惊止痉。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-neutral; dispels wind, frees the collaterals, and arrests convulsions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）乌蛇性善无毒，功专祛风，主治大风疥癞，顽痹瘫痪，诸风瘙痒癣疮。

actions.en: Harmonize the Stomach and transform turbidity
Invigorate blood and unblock the channels

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Vomiting and diarrhea with leg cramps
Urticaria with itching

dosage_range.notes: 布包煎

description_zh: 蚕蛾科昆虫家蚕蛾幼虫的干燥粪便。归肝、脾、胃经。善祛风湿、和胃化浊，为治湿浊中阻之吐泻转筋要药。
description_en: The dried droppings of Bombyx mori larvae (Bombycidae). Enters the Liver, Spleen, and Stomach channels. Excels at dispelling wind-dampness and harmonizing the Stomach to transform turbidity, a key herb for vomiting and diarrhea with leg cramps due to damp turbidity obstructing the center.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_en: lysine, leucine and other amino acids
active_constituents.name_zh: 赖氨酸、亮氨酸等氨基酸

summary.zh: 蚕沙含叶绿素及其衍生物、氨基酸和植物甾醇，具抗炎、抗氧化、促造血和改善微循环作用。
summary.en: Can Sha contains chlorophyll derivatives, amino acids, and phytosterols with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, hematopoietic-supporting, and microcirculation-improving effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 蚕沙甘辛温，祛风除湿，和胃化浊。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-acrid and warm; dispels wind-damp and harmonizes the stomach to transform turbidity.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）蚕沙性温无毒，治湿痹瘫痪，皮肤瘙痒，肠鸣下痢，妇人血崩。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain with cold pain in the lower back and knees
Contracture and numbness of the lower limbs
Elderly weakness and atrophy of sinews and bones

dosage_range.notes: 可浸酒服

description_zh: 天南星科植物千年健的干燥根茎。归肝、肾经。辛温气香，善祛风湿、壮筋骨，尤宜老人筋骨痹痛。
description_en: The dried rhizome of Homalomena occulta (Araceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Pungent, warm, and aromatic, it excels at dispelling wind-dampness and strengthening sinews and bones, especially suited for elderly patients with impediment pain and weak sinews.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 千年健含倍半萜类和挥发油成分，具抗炎、镇痛、抗凝和抗风湿作用。
summary.en: Qian Nian Jian contains sesquiterpenoids and volatile oil components with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, anticoagulant, and antirheumatic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 千年健苦辛温，祛风湿，壮筋骨。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and warm; dispels wind-damp and strengthens sinews and bones.

classical_references.passage: （附录）千年健苦辛温，入肝肾，祛风湿，壮筋骨，能治老人筋骨痿痹。

indications.en: Wind-damp impediment pain
Traumatic injury
Toothache

dosage_range.notes: 大毒！外用为主，内服须严格控制剂量。仅入丸散

description_zh: 毛茛科植物短柄乌头的干燥块根。归肝经。辛热有大毒，祛风止痛力极强，多外用，内服须极小量。
description_en: The dried tuberous root of Aconitum brachypodum (Ranunculaceae). Enters the Liver channel. Pungent-hot and very toxic, with extremely strong wind-dispelling and pain-stopping action. Primarily for external use; internal dosage must be strictly controlled.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 雪上一枝蒿甲素（高乌甲素）

summary.zh: 雪上一枝蒿含乌头碱类二萜生物碱（包括强效止痛成分高乌甲素），具镇痛、抗炎作用，但毒性极大，须严格限量入药。
summary.en: Xue Shang Yi Zhi Hao contains aconitine-type diterpene alkaloids (including the potent analgesic bulleyaconitine A) with analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects; extremely toxic with narrow therapeutic index.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 雪上一枝蒿苦辛温，有大毒，祛风止痛，活血散瘀；内服须严格控制剂量，多以酊剂外用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and warm with severe toxicity; dispels wind, alleviates pain, and invigorates blood; internal use requires strict dose control and is usually as tincture/external preparation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 高乌甲素类过量可致严重心律失常、呼吸抑制甚至死亡，需专业监管下使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Aconitine-family overdose causes severe arrhythmia, respiratory depression, and death; requires strict professional oversight.

classical_references.passage: 附子毒草之类，雪上一枝蒿为云南所出，性大热有毒，祛风止痛，治跌打风寒湿痹。

actions.en: Clear the Lung and transform phlegm

indications.en: Lung abscess with coughing up purulent sputum
Intestinal abscess
Damp-heat vaginal discharge

description_zh: 葫芦科植物冬瓜的干燥成熟种子。归肺、大肠经。善清肺化痰、利湿排脓，为治肺痈、肠痈常用之品。
description_en: The dried ripe seeds of Benincasa hispida (Cucurbitaceae). Enters the Lung and Large Intestine channels. Excels at clearing the Lung, transforming phlegm, disinhibiting dampness, and expelling pus, commonly used for lung and intestinal abscesses.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 冬瓜仁含脂肪油、三萜和皂苷，具排脓、润肺化痰、利湿作用，为肺痈、肠痈常用药。
summary.en: Dong Gua Ren contains fatty oil, triterpenes, and saponins with pus-expelling, lung-moistening, phlegm-transforming, and damp-draining effects; used for lung and intestinal abscess.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 冬瓜仁甘微寒，清肺化痰，消痈排脓，利湿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-slightly cold; clears the lung, transforms phlegm, reduces abscess, expels pus, and drains damp.

classical_references.passage: （白瓜子）味甘，平。令人悦泽，好颜色，益气不饥。久服轻身耐老。

actions.en: Move qi and relax the center
Direct qi downward and eliminate distention

indications.en: Edema with distention and fullness
Epigastric distention and oppression
Leg qi with swelling

description_zh: 棕榈科植物槟榔的干燥果皮。归脾、胃、大肠、小肠经。辛散行气，善宽中利水，为治水肿脚气之常用药。
description_en: The dried pericarp of Areca catechu (Arecaceae). Enters the Spleen, Stomach, Large Intestine, and Small Intestine channels. Pungent and dispersing, it moves qi and excels at relaxing the center and disinhibiting water, commonly used for edema and leg qi.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: trace in pericarp; concentrated in seed

summary.zh: 大腹皮含微量槟榔碱、鞣质和黄酮，具促胃肠蠕动、利尿、抗寄生虫作用。
summary.en: Da Fu Pi contains trace arecoline, tannins, and flavonoids with prokinetic, diuretic, and anthelmintic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 大腹皮辛微温，行气宽中，利水消肿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-slightly warm; moves qi, loosens the middle, and promotes urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）大腹皮降逆气，消肌肤水气，为妇人产后败血恶血要药。

actions.en: Regulate qi and relax the middle
Transform phlegm and eliminate focal distention

indications.en: Qi stagnation of the chest and hypochondria with distending fullness and pain
Food accumulation with sour belching and acid regurgitation
Internal obstruction by turbid phlegm
Organ prolapse (gastroptosis, rectal prolapse)

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚弱、气虚下陷者慎用。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen and Stomach vacuity or qi vacuity with downward sinking. Use with caution during pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g。炒用行气力缓，生用力峻。

processing_methods.name: 生枳壳
processing_methods.effect: 行气力猛，多用于气滞实证

processing_methods.name: 麸炒枳壳
processing_methods.effect: 缓和燥性，适合脾胃虚弱者

safety_notes_zh: 过量易伤脾胃正气。孕妇不宜大量使用。
safety_notes_en: Excessive dosage may damage Spleen and Stomach upright qi. Avoid large doses during pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主大风在皮肤中，如麻豆苦痒，除寒热结，止痢，长肌肉，利五脏。

description_zh: 芸香科植物酸橙及其栽培变种的干燥未成熟果实。归脾、胃经。枳壳性较枳实缓和，善宽中除胀，为理气宽胸、消胀除痞之常用药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 枳壳含柚皮苷、新橙皮苷、辛弗林等，能促进胃肠蠕动、升高胃肠平滑肌张力，并有轻度升压作用，与其行气消胀功效相对应。
summary.en: Zhike contains naringin, neohesperidin, and synephrine, which promote gastrointestinal motility, increase smooth muscle tone, and exert mild pressor effects, corresponding to its qi-moving and distention-reducing actions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以柚皮苷、新橙皮苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses naringin and neohesperidin as assay markers.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 枳壳作用较枳实缓和，偏于行气宽中，适合气滞而不耐猛攻者。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bensky notes Zhike is milder than Zhishi, better suited for qi stagnation in patients who cannot tolerate strong purgation.
