Pungent and warm, it excels at directing qi downward, transforming phlegm, stopping cough, and calming wheezing, while also moistening the intestines. A key herb for phlegm congestion with qi counterflow. San Zi Yang Qin Tang combines it with bai jie zi and lai fu zi for elderly patients with phlegm-qi counterflow.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 苏子富含α-亚麻酸和迷迭香酸，具有镇咳、平喘、润肠及抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Perilla seed is rich in alpha-linolenic acid and rosmarinic acid, with antitussive, anti-asthmatic, intestine-moistening, and antioxidant activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 降气化痰、止咳平喘、润肠通便。为三子养亲汤组成药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Directs qi downward and transforms phlegm, stops cough and calms wheezing, moistens the intestines. One of three herbs in San Zi Yang Qin Tang.

actions.en: Drain the Lung and calm wheezing

indications.en: Wheezing fullness from phlegm-rheum with Lung qi congestion
Facial puffiness and swelling
Pleural effusion and ascites
Inhibited urination

contraindications_zh: 肺虚喘咳者忌用。脾虚便溏者不宜。本品攻泻力较强，不宜过量久用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in Lung-vacuity wheezing and cough. Not suitable in Spleen vacuity with loose stools. Has strong draining action; avoid excessive or prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服3–10g。宜包煎。

processing_methods.name: 炒葶苈子
processing_methods.effect: 缓和泻肺力度

safety_notes_zh: 泻肺力较猛，肺虚者禁用，不宜大量久服。
safety_notes_en: Has a strong Lung-draining action; contraindicated in Lung vacuity. Not for excessive or prolonged use.

classical_references.passage: 味辛苦寒。主癥瘕积聚结气，饮食寒热，破坚逐邪，通利水道。

description_zh: 十字花科植物独行菜或播娘蒿的干燥成熟种子。归肺、膀胱经。苦辛大寒，善泻肺平喘、利水消肿，为治痰壅肺实喘满、水饮停聚之要药。《金匮要略》葶苈大枣泻肺汤以之配大枣泻肺中水饮。
description_en: The dried ripe seed of Lepidium apetalum or Descurainia sophia (Brassicaceae). Enters the Lung and Bladder channels. Bitter, pungent, and strongly cold, it drains the Lung, calms wheezing, disinhibits water, and reduces swelling. A key herb for Lung repletion with phlegm congestion and fluid retention. Ting Li Da Zao Xie Fei Tang from the Jin Gui Yao Lue pairs it with da zao to drain Lung fluid retention.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 葶苈子含硫代葡萄糖苷等，具有强心、利尿、平喘及祛痰作用。
summary.en: Lepidium seed contains glucosinolates with cardiotonic, diuretic, anti-asthmatic, and expectorant activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 泻肺平喘、利水消肿。葶苈大枣泻肺汤为经方代表。
evidence_notes.note_en: Drains the Lung and calms wheezing, disinhibits water and reduces swelling. Ting Li Da Zao Xie Fei Tang is the representative classical formula.

indications.en: Acute and chronic cough with copious phlegm and wheezing
Damp-heat jaundice
Traumatic injuries

contraindications_zh: 一般无明显禁忌。
contraindications_en: No notable contraindications.

processing_methods.name: 矮地茶
processing_methods.effect: 化痰止咳

safety_notes_zh: 安全性好，临床使用中未见严重不良反应报告。
safety_notes_en: Good safety profile; no serious adverse reactions reported in clinical use.

classical_references.passage: 紫金牛味辛苦，性平。能化痰止咳，去湿消肿。

description_zh: 紫金牛科植物紫金牛的干燥全株。归肺、肝经。辛苦平，功擅化痰止咳，兼利湿、活血。为治慢性支气管炎之常用药，已开发为多种现代制剂（矮地茶片、紫金牛糖浆等）。
description_en: The dried whole plant of Ardisia japonica (Primulaceae / Myrsinaceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Pungent, bitter, and neutral, it transforms phlegm and stops cough, while also disinhibiting dampness and invigorating blood. A commonly used herb for chronic bronchitis, developed into multiple modern preparations (Aidicha tablets, Zijinniu syrup, etc.).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 矮地茶含岩白菜素和三萜皂苷，具有镇咳祛痰、抗炎及抗菌作用。
summary.en: Japanese ardisia herb contains bergenin and triterpenoid saponins, with antitussive, expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以岩白菜素为含量测定指标。多种制剂用于慢性支气管炎。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses bergenin as assay marker. Multiple preparations used for chronic bronchitis.

indications.en: Asthma and cough
Cold pain of the epigastrium and abdomen, wind-damp impediment pain
Surgical anesthesia (historical use)

contraindications_zh: 本品有大毒（含莨菪碱等托品类生物碱），严格控制剂量。青光眼、前列腺增生、心动过速者禁用。孕妇禁用。哺乳期禁用。不宜与其他抗胆碱药合用。
contraindications_en: Highly toxic (contains tropane alkaloids including hyoscyamine). Dosage must be strictly controlled. Contraindicated in glaucoma, prostatic hyperplasia, and tachycardia. Contraindicated in pregnancy and lactation. Should not be combined with other anticholinergic agents.

dosage_range.notes: 内服每日0.3–0.6g，宜入丸散。卷烟吸入法每日不超过1.5g。严格控制剂量。

processing_methods.name: 洋金花
processing_methods.effect: 平喘止咳、解痉止痛

safety_notes_zh: 严重警告：本品有大毒，含莨菪碱（天仙子碱）、东莨菪碱等托品类生物碱，中毒症状为口干、瞳孔散大、心跳加速、皮肤潮红、幻觉、谵妄、惊厥，严重可致死。华佗麻沸散据传含此药。青光眼、前列腺肥大、心动过速者绝对禁用。老人及儿童尤须慎用。服药期间不宜驾车或操作机械。须严格遵医嘱使用。
safety_notes_en: SEVERE WARNING: Highly toxic, containing tropane alkaloids (hyoscyamine, scopolamine). Toxicity symptoms include dry mouth, mydriasis, tachycardia, flushed skin, hallucinations, delirium, and convulsions; severe poisoning can be fatal. Hua Tuo's legendary anesthetic Ma Fei San reportedly contained this herb. Absolutely contraindicated in glaucoma, prostatic hypertrophy, and tachycardia. Use with particular caution in the elderly and children. Do not drive or operate machinery while taking this medicine. Must be used strictly under medical supervision.

classical_references.passage: 曼陀罗花有毒。入酒饮，令人麻痹无知。诸风痛及寒湿脚气，煎汤洗之。

description_zh: 茄科植物白花曼陀罗或毛曼陀罗的干燥花。归肺、肝经。辛温，有大毒。功能平喘止咳、解痉止痛、麻醉。为治哮喘之有效药物，但因毒性大，须严格控制剂量。历史上华佗麻沸散据传含此药。现代中成药中少量配方仍含其制品。
description_en: The dried flower of Datura metel or D. innoxia (Solanaceae). Enters the Lung and Liver channels. Pungent, warm, and highly toxic. It calms wheezing, relieves spasms, and provides anesthesia and analgesia. An effective anti-asthmatic but requires strict dosage control due to high toxicity. Hua Tuo's legendary Ma Fei San anesthetic reportedly contained this herb. A small number of modern proprietary formulas still include it.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 洋金花含托品类生物碱（莨菪碱、东莨菪碱、阿托品），具有解痉、平喘、镇痛和麻醉作用，同时具有显著的抗胆碱毒性。
summary.en: Datura flower contains tropane alkaloids (hyoscyamine, scopolamine, atropine) with antispasmodic, anti-asthmatic, analgesic, and anesthetic effects, along with significant anticholinergic toxicity.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 支气管哮喘（严格管控使用）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》将洋金花列为毒性药材，限定生物碱含量和用量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists Daturae Flos as a toxic medicinal, with limits on alkaloid content and dosage.

actions.en: Resolve constraint and calm the spirit
Harmonize the will of the Heart

indications.en: Depression, melancholy, vexation, and insomnia
Restless spirit with forgetfulness and excessive dreaming
Traumatic injuries with fractures, swelling, and pain
Lung abscess and sores with toxic swelling

contraindications_zh: 孕妇慎用（活血之性）。
contraindications_en: Use with caution during pregnancy (due to blood-invigorating nature).

processing_methods.name: 合欢皮
processing_methods.effect: 解郁安神、活血消肿

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。因有活血之性，孕妇慎用。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe. Use with caution in pregnancy due to blood-invigorating properties.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主安五脏，和心志，令人欢乐无忧。

description_zh: 豆科植物合欢的干燥树皮。归心、肝经。甘平，善解郁安神，为治忧郁失眠之良药。《神农本草经》谓其"令人欢乐无忧"，故名合欢。兼能活血消肿，可治跌打伤痛。
description_en: The dried bark of Albizia julibrissin (Fabaceae). Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Sweet and neutral, it excels at resolving constraint and calming the spirit, making it a fine herb for depression and insomnia. The Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing states it 'makes people joyful and worry-free,' hence the name 'he huan' (collectively joyful). It also invigorates blood and reduces swelling for traumatic injuries.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 合欢皮含三萜皂苷（合欢皂苷）和黄酮类，具有镇静、抗抑郁、抗炎及促进骨折愈合等作用。
summary.en: Silk tree bark contains triterpenoid saponins (julibroside) and flavonoids, with sedative, antidepressant, anti-inflammatory, and fracture-healing-promoting activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 解郁安神、活血消肿。为治忧郁失眠之良药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Resolves constraint and calms the spirit, invigorates blood and reduces swelling. A fine herb for depression and insomnia.

actions.en: Nourish blood and calm the spirit
Dispel wind and free the collaterals
Nourish the Heart and supplement yin

indications.en: Restless spirit with insomnia and excessive dreaming
Generalized pain from blood vacuity
Wind-damp impediment pain
Skin itching

contraindications_zh: 一般无明显禁忌。多用无碍。
contraindications_en: No notable contraindications. Safe for generous use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服9–15g。外用适量，煎汤洗。

processing_methods.name: 夜交藤
processing_methods.effect: 养血安神、祛风通络

safety_notes_zh: 安全性好，临床常用药。
safety_notes_en: Good safety profile; commonly used clinically.

classical_references.passage: 夜交藤味甘，平。养血安神，祛风通络。治失眠、多梦。

description_zh: 蓼科植物何首乌的干燥藤茎。归心、肝经。甘平，善养血安神，为治虚烦失眠多梦之常用药。兼能祛风通络，治风湿痹痛、皮肤瘙痒。与酸枣仁功效相近而力缓。
description_en: The dried vine stem of Polygonum multiflorum (Polygonaceae). Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Sweet and neutral, it nourishes blood and calms the spirit, making it a commonly used herb for vacuity-vexation insomnia with excessive dreaming. It also dispels wind and frees the collaterals for impediment pain and itching. Similar to suan zao ren in effect but milder.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 夜交藤含二苯乙烯苷等，具有镇静安神和改善睡眠质量的作用。
summary.en: Polygonum vine contains stilbene glycosides (THSG), with sedative and sleep-quality-improving activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 养血安神、祛风通络。为治失眠之常用辅药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Nourishes blood and calms the spirit; a commonly used adjuvant for insomnia.

actions.en: Suppress fright and calm the spirit

indications.en: Fright wind and epilepsy, palpitations and insomnia
Blood stasis obstruction with amenorrhea and concretions
Strangury and urinary blockage

contraindications_zh: 阴虚内热而无瘀滞者慎用。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with internal heat and without blood stasis. Use with caution in pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 研末冲服每次1.5–3g，不入煎剂。

processing_methods.name: 琥珀粉
processing_methods.effect: 镇惊安神、散瘀利水

safety_notes_zh: 不入煎剂，须研末冲服或入丸散。孕妇慎用（活血散瘀之性）。
safety_notes_en: Not added to decoctions; must be taken as powder or in pills. Use with caution in pregnancy due to blood-invigorating properties.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主安五脏，定魂魄，消瘀血，通五淋。

description_zh: 古代松科植物树脂的化石。归心、肝、膀胱经。甘平，质重镇降，善镇惊安神、散瘀止血、利水通淋。为治惊悸失眠、血淋之良药。不入煎剂，须研末冲服。
description_en: Fossilized resin from ancient coniferous trees (Pinaceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, and Bladder channels. Sweet, neutral, and heavy, it settles the spirit, dissipates stasis, stops bleeding, and frees strangury. A fine medicinal for palpitations, insomnia, and bloody strangury. Not added to decoctions; taken as powder.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 琥珀主含琥珀酸和微量龙脑，传统用于镇静安神和利尿。
summary.en: Amber contains succinic acid and trace borneol, traditionally used for sedation and diuresis.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 镇惊安神、散瘀止血、利水通淋。不入煎剂。
evidence_notes.note_en: Suppresses fright and calms the spirit, dissipates stasis and stops bleeding, frees strangury. Not for decoctions.

actions.en: Clear the Heart and suppress fright
Calm the spirit and stabilize the will

indications.en: Palpitations with fright, insomnia, and excessive dreaming
Epilepsy and mania
Pediatric fright wind
Mouth sores and skin ulcers

contraindications_zh: 本品为硫化汞（HgS），含汞，有毒。不可火煅或入煎剂（加热释放游离汞）。不宜过量或久服。肝肾功能不全者禁用。孕妇禁用。婴幼儿慎用。
contraindications_en: Cinnabar is mercuric sulfide (HgS) and contains mercury; it is toxic. Must NOT be calcined or decocted (heating releases free mercury). Not for excessive or prolonged use. Contraindicated in hepatic or renal insufficiency. Contraindicated in pregnancy. Use with caution in infants.

dosage_range.notes: 研末冲服每次0.1–0.5g，或入丸散。绝不可火煅或入煎剂。外用适量。

processing_methods.name: 朱砂粉
processing_methods.effect: 去除杂质（游离汞），降低毒性

safety_notes_zh: 严重警告：本品为硫化汞（HgS），含汞元素。硫化汞本身溶解度极低，毒性较游离汞小，但以下情况可致严重汞中毒：(1) 火煅或入煎剂（加热释放游离汞蒸气）；(2) 长期服用（汞蓄积）；(3) 掺有游离汞的劣质品。汞中毒可损伤中枢神经系统、肾脏和消化系统。须经水飞法炮制以去除游离汞。现代药理建议尽量减少使用，多数含朱砂中成药（朱砂安神丸、安宫牛黄丸等）已受到更严格的安全审查。肝肾功能不全者绝对禁用。
safety_notes_en: SEVERE WARNING: Cinnabar is mercuric sulfide (HgS) and contains mercury. While HgS itself has very low solubility and lower toxicity than free mercury, serious mercury poisoning can occur from: (1) calcining or decocting (heating releases free mercury vapor); (2) prolonged use (mercury accumulation); (3) adulterated products containing free mercury. Mercury poisoning can damage the CNS, kidneys, and digestive system. Must be processed by the water-flying (shui fei) method to remove free mercury. Modern pharmacology recommends minimizing use; most cinnabar-containing proprietary medicines (Zhu Sha An Shen Wan, An Gong Niu Huang Wan, etc.) are under increasingly strict safety review. Absolutely contraindicated in hepatic or renal insufficiency.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，微寒。主身体五脏百病，养精神，安魂魄，益气明目，杀精魅邪恶鬼。久服通神明不老。

description_zh: 硫化物类矿物辰砂族辰砂，主含硫化汞（HgS）。归心经。甘微寒，质重镇降，善清心镇惊安神，为重镇安神之代表药。但因含汞有毒，须水飞法炮制，绝不可火煅或入煎剂。现代用量宜小、疗程宜短。
description_en: Cinnabar (Cinnabaris), a sulfide mineral primarily composed of mercuric sulfide (HgS). Enters the Heart channel. Sweet, slightly cool, and heavy, it is the representative heavy sedative for clearing the Heart and suppressing fright. However, because it contains mercury and is toxic, it must be processed by the water-flying method and must NEVER be calcined or decocted. Modern use calls for minimal dosage and short courses.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 朱砂主含硫化汞，具有镇静安神作用；但汞元素有神经毒性和肾毒性，须严格控制用量和炮制方法。
summary.en: Cinnabar consists mainly of mercuric sulfide with sedative properties; however, mercury is neurotoxic and nephrotoxic, requiring strict dosage control and proper processing.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 严重失眠、惊悸（短期辅助）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》严格限定朱砂含量、游离汞限量及水飞法炮制要求。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia strictly regulates cinnabar content, free mercury limits, and water-flying processing requirements.

actions.en: Suppress fright and calm the spirit
Pacify the Liver and subdue yang
Sharpen hearing and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Palpitations and insomnia
Dizziness and vertigo from Liver yang hyperactivity
Tinnitus and hearing loss
Wheezing from Kidney vacuity

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚弱者慎用。不宜大量久服。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen-Stomach weakness. Not for large-dose or prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服10–30g，宜先煎打碎。入丸散每次1–3g。

processing_methods.name: 煅磁石
processing_methods.effect: 质地酥脆易碎，便于煎出有效成分

safety_notes_zh: 质重沉降，不宜大量久服以免碍胃。煅后醋淬使用。
safety_notes_en: Heavy and descending; not for large-dose or prolonged use to avoid obstructing the Stomach. Use the calcined and vinegar-quenched form.

classical_references.passage: 味辛寒。主周痹风湿，肢节中痛，不可持物，洗洗酸痠，除大热烦满及耳聋。

description_zh: 氧化物类矿物磁铁矿（Fe₃O₄）。归肝、心、肾经。咸寒质重，善镇惊安神、平肝潜阳、聪耳明目。为治肝阳上亢眩晕、耳鸣耳聋之常用药。兼能纳气定喘治肾虚气喘。常配朱砂、六曲制磁朱丸。
description_en: The mineral magnetite (Fe3O4), an oxide mineral. Enters the Liver, Heart, and Kidney channels. Salty, cold, and heavy, it suppresses fright, calms the spirit, pacifies the Liver, subdues yang, and sharpens hearing. Commonly used for Liver-yang hyperactivity dizziness and tinnitus. Also absorbs qi to stabilize wheezing in Kidney vacuity. Often combined with zhu sha and shen qu in Ci Zhu Wan.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 磁石主含四氧化三铁，具有镇静和补充铁元素的作用。
summary.en: Magnetite consists mainly of iron(II,III) oxide (Fe3O4), providing sedative effects and supplementing iron.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 镇惊安神、平肝潜阳、聪耳明目。磁朱丸为经典方。
evidence_notes.note_en: Suppresses fright, calms the spirit, pacifies the Liver and subdues yang. Ci Zhu Wan is the classic formula.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and subdue yang
Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes
Settle the Heart and calm the spirit

indications.en: Liver-yang hyperactivity with headache and dizziness
Palpitations and insomnia
Red eyes with pterygium and visual obstruction
Fright wind and epilepsy

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服10–25g，宜先煎打碎。研末冲服每次1–3g。

processing_methods.name: 珍珠母
processing_methods.effect: 平肝潜阳、安神明目

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，须先煎打碎以煎出有效成分。质重碍胃，脾虚者不宜多用。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; must be crushed and decocted first to extract active constituents. Heavy and may obstruct the Stomach; not for generous use in Spleen vacuity.

classical_references.passage: 珍珠母味咸寒。安魂定魄，止惊除晕，去翳明目。

description_zh: 蚌科动物三角帆蚌、褶纹冠蚌或珍珠贝科动物马氏珍珠贝的贝壳（珍珠层）。归肝、心经。咸寒质重，善平肝潜阳、安神明目。为治肝阳上亢眩晕、失眠和目疾之常用药。功近牡蛎而偏于清肝明目。
description_en: The nacreous shell layer of Hyriopsis cumingii, Cristaria plicata (Unionidae), or Pteria martensii (Pteriidae). Enters the Liver and Heart channels. Salty, cold, and heavy, it pacifies the Liver, subdues yang, calms the spirit, and brightens the eyes. Commonly used for Liver-yang dizziness, insomnia, and eye diseases. Similar to mu li but with a stronger affinity for clearing the Liver and brightening the eyes.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 珍珠母主含碳酸钙（霰石型）和贝壳硬蛋白，具有镇静和抗高血压等作用。
summary.en: Nacre consists mainly of aragonite calcium carbonate and conchiolin, with sedative and antihypertensive activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 平肝潜阳、清肝明目、安神定惊。功近牡蛎。
evidence_notes.note_en: Pacifies the Liver, subdues yang, clears the Liver and brightens the eyes. Similar to mu li in function.

actions.en: Supplement qi and calm the spirit
Augment the Lung and supplement vacuity

indications.en: Restless spirit with insomnia and palpitations
Cough and wheezing from Lung vacuity
Consumptive fatigue with shortness of breath
Dizziness and fatigue

contraindications_zh: 一般无明显禁忌。实证邪盛者不宜单用补益。
contraindications_en: No notable contraindications. Not suitable as a sole tonifying agent in repletion patterns with vigorous pathogens.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–15g。研末冲服每次1.5–3g。亦可浸酒或制成提取物。

processing_methods.name: 灵芝
processing_methods.effect: 补气安神、止咳平喘

safety_notes_zh: 安全性好，长期服用未见严重不良反应。少数人初服可有口干、皮疹等暝眩反应。
safety_notes_en: Good safety profile; no serious adverse reactions from long-term use. A few individuals may experience transient dry mouth or rash (healing reaction) at the beginning of use.

classical_references.passage: 赤芝味苦，平。主胸中结，益心气，补中，增智慧，不忘。久服轻身不老延年。

description_zh: 多孔菌科真菌赤芝或紫芝的干燥子实体。归心、肺、肝、肾经。甘平，性和无毒，功擅补气安神、止咳平喘。《神农本草经》列为上品，谓之"久服轻身不老"。现代研究广泛，灵芝多糖和三萜类为主要活性成分。
description_en: The dried fruiting body of Ganoderma lucidum or G. sinense (Ganodermataceae). Enters the Heart, Lung, Liver, and Kidney channels. Sweet, neutral, and non-toxic, it supplements qi, calms the spirit, stops cough, and calms wheezing. Classified as a superior herb in the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing, described as enabling 'lightness of body and non-aging with prolonged use.' Modern research is extensive; polysaccharides and triterpenoids are the primary active constituents.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 灵芝含三萜类（灵芝酸）和β-葡聚糖多糖（灵芝多糖），具有免疫调节、抗肿瘤、保肝、镇静、降血糖、降血脂等广泛药理活性。
summary.en: Reishi contains triterpenoids (ganoderic acid) and beta-glucan polysaccharides with extensive pharmacological activities including immunomodulation, antitumor, hepatoprotective, sedative, hypoglycemic, and hypolipidemic effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肿瘤辅助治疗（免疫调节）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以灵芝多糖和三萜含量为质控指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses polysaccharide and triterpenoid content as quality control markers.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO专论认可灵芝用于改善免疫功能和缓解疲劳。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph acknowledges Ganoderma for improving immune function and alleviating fatigue.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and subdue yang
Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes
Suppress fright and calm the spirit

indications.en: Liver-yang hyperactivity with headache and dizziness
Red eyes with pterygium, blurred vision
Green-blind (optic atrophy) and night blindness

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–20g，宜先煎打碎。

processing_methods.name: 生石决明
processing_methods.effect: 平肝潜阳力强

processing_methods.name: 煅石决明
processing_methods.effect: 收敛固涩、明目退翳力增强

safety_notes_zh: 须先煎打碎以煎出有效成分。脾胃虚寒者不宜多用。
safety_notes_en: Must be crushed and decocted first. Not for generous use in Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold.

classical_references.passage: 石决明味咸，平。主目障翳痛，青盲。久服益精，轻身。

description_zh: 鲍科动物杂色鲍、皱纹盘鲍或耳鲍等的贝壳。归肝经。咸寒质重，善平肝潜阳、清肝明目，为治肝阳上亢眩晕和目疾之要药。名"石决明"即取其明目之功。
description_en: The shell of Haliotis diversicolor, H. discus hannai, or related species (Haliotidae). Enters the Liver channel. Salty, cold, and heavy, it pacifies the Liver, subdues yang, and brightens the eyes. A key herb for Liver-yang hyperactivity dizziness and eye diseases. Its name shi jue ming ('stone that brings sight') reflects its eye-brightening function.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 石决明主含碳酸钙和贝壳硬蛋白，具有降压、镇静及抗组胺作用。
summary.en: Abalone shell contains calcium carbonate and conchiolin, with antihypertensive, sedative, and antihistamine activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 平肝潜阳、清肝明目。为治肝阳眩晕和目疾之要药。
evidence_notes.note_en: Pacifies the Liver and subdues yang, clears the Liver and brightens the eyes. Key herb for Liver-yang dizziness and eye disease.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and clear heat
Lower blood pressure and calm the spirit

indications.en: Liver-yang hyperactivity with headache and dizziness
Hypertension
Palpitations and insomnia
Edema with scanty urine

contraindications_zh: 脾虚便溏者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen vacuity with loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服6–15g，或泡茶饮。

processing_methods.name: 罗布麻叶
processing_methods.effect: 平肝降压安神

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。代茶饮用亦可，但不宜以此替代正规降压药物治疗。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe. Can be used as tea, but should not replace standard antihypertensive medication.

classical_references.passage: 罗布麻甘苦凉，平肝息风，清热利尿。

description_zh: 夹竹桃科植物罗布麻的干燥叶。归肝经。甘苦凉，善平肝清热、降血压、安神。为治肝阳上亢型高血压之常用药，亦可代茶饮用。
description_en: The dried leaf of Apocynum venetum (Apocynaceae). Enters the Liver channel. Sweet, bitter, and cool, it pacifies the Liver, clears heat, lowers blood pressure, and calms the spirit. Commonly used for Liver-yang hyperactivity-type hypertension; also used as a health tea.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 罗布麻含黄酮苷类（金丝桃苷、异槲皮苷），具有降压、镇静、利尿作用。
summary.en: Dogbane leaf contains flavonoid glycosides (hyperoside, isoquercitrin) with antihypertensive, sedative, and diuretic activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以金丝桃苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses hyperoside as assay marker.

actions.en: Dispel wind and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Liver-yang hyperactivity with headache and dizziness
Red eyes with excessive tearing, itchy eyes, and visual obstruction
Distending pain of the chest and hypochondrium, blocked lactation and breast abscess
Urticaria and pruritus

contraindications_zh: 血虚气弱者慎用。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in blood vacuity and qi weakness. Use with caution in pregnancy.

processing_methods.name: 炒蒺藜
processing_methods.effect: 去刺便于服用，缓和性味

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。炒去刺后入药以免刺伤消化道黏膜。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe. Fry to remove spines before use to prevent injury to the GI mucosa.

classical_references.passage: 味苦温。主恶血，破癥瘕积聚，喉痹，乳难。久服长肌肉，明目轻身。

description_zh: 蒺藜科植物蒺藜的干燥成熟果实。归肝经。辛苦微温，善平肝疏肝、祛风明目。为治肝阳上亢头痛眩晕、目赤翳障及风疹瘙痒之常用药。亦称白蒺藜。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Tribulus terrestris (Zygophyllaceae). Enters the Liver channel. Pungent, bitter, and slightly warm, it pacifies and courses the Liver, dispels wind, and brightens the eyes. Commonly used for Liver-yang headache and dizziness, red eyes with pterygium, and wind rash. Also known as bai ji li (White Tribulus).

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 蒺藜含甾体皂苷（原薯蓣皂苷、蒺藜皂苷），具有降压、利尿、抗动脉粥样硬化及改善视力等作用。
summary.en: Tribulus fruit contains steroidal saponins (protodioscin, terrestrosin) with antihypertensive, diuretic, anti-atherosclerotic, and vision-improving activities.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 平肝疏肝、祛风明目。兼疏肝解郁之功。
evidence_notes.note_en: Pacifies and courses the Liver, dispels wind and brightens the eyes. Also courses the Liver and resolves constraint.

actions.en: Pacify the Liver and extinguish wind
Clear the Liver and brighten the eyes
Cool the blood and settle fright

indications.en: High fever with convulsions, epileptic seizures
Liver-yang hyperactivity with headache and dizziness
Liver fire flaming upward with red, swollen, painful eyes
High fever with loss of consciousness in warm-heat disease

contraindications_zh: 脾虚寒证者忌用。不宜与热药同用。价格极为昂贵。赛加羚羊（Saiga tatarica）为CITES附录II保护物种，野生种群极度濒危，临床应优先使用代用品（山羊角等）。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in Spleen vacuity cold patterns. Not to be used with hot herbs. Extremely expensive. The saiga antelope (Saiga tatarica) is a CITES Appendix II protected species and critically endangered in the wild; clinical use should prioritize substitutes (such as goat horn).

dosage_range.notes: 单煎1–3g，宜先煎2小时以上。研粉冲服每次0.3–0.6g。因资源稀缺且价昂，推荐以山羊角（每次15–30g）代替。

processing_methods.name: 羚羊角片
processing_methods.effect: 便于煎出有效成分

safety_notes_zh: 濒危物种警告：赛加羚羊（Saiga tatarica）为CITES附录II物种，野生种群在中亚地区极度濒危（2015年疫病导致超过20万头死亡）。中国现允许使用库存和人工养殖来源，但野生采集已严格禁止。临床推荐以山羊角（Caprae Cornu）为代用品，用量15–30g，功效相近但力较缓。本词条收录仅为学术完整性之目的，建议临床优先选择替代品以支持野生动物保护。
safety_notes_en: ENDANGERED SPECIES WARNING: The saiga antelope (Saiga tatarica) is a CITES Appendix II species; wild populations in Central Asia are critically endangered (a 2015 epizootic killed over 200,000 animals). China currently allows use from stockpiles and captive breeding, but wild harvesting is strictly prohibited. Clinically, goat horn (Caprae Cornu, shan yang jiao) is recommended as a substitute at 15-30g, with similar but milder effects. This entry is included for academic completeness; practitioners are encouraged to prioritize substitutes to support wildlife conservation.

classical_references.passage: 味咸寒。主明目，益气起阴，去恶血注下，安心气。

description_zh: 牛科动物赛加羚羊（Saiga tatarica）的角。归肝、心经。咸寒，善平肝熄风、清热解毒、凉血定惊，为治高热惊厥、肝阳化风之首选药。经典名方羚角钩藤汤以之为君。注意：赛加羚羊为CITES附录II极度濒危物种，临床推荐以山羊角替代。
description_en: The horn of the saiga antelope (Saiga tatarica, Bovidae). Enters the Liver and Heart channels. Salty and cold, it is the premier herb for pacifying the Liver and extinguishing wind, clearing heat, resolving toxicity, and cooling the blood to settle fright. The classical formula Ling Jiao Gou Teng Tang uses it as chief. NOTE: The saiga antelope is a CITES Appendix II critically endangered species; goat horn (shan yang jiao) is the recommended clinical substitute.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 羚羊角主含角蛋白和磷酸钙，具有镇静、抗惊厥、解热及降压作用。
summary.en: Antelope horn contains keratin and calcium phosphate, with sedative, anticonvulsant, antipyretic, and antihypertensive activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 高热惊厥、小儿热性惊厥
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: High febrile convulsions, pediatric febrile seizures

evidence_notes.note_zh: 平肝熄风、凉血定惊之首选。羚角钩藤汤为经典方。推荐山羊角替代。
evidence_notes.note_en: Premier choice for pacifying the Liver and extinguishing wind. Ling Jiao Gou Teng Tang is the classic formula. Goat horn is the recommended substitute.

actions.en: Open the orifices and revive consciousness
Invigorate blood and free the menses
Hasten labor and expel the fetus

indications.en: Wind-stroke with phlegm collapse and febrile coma
Fright epilepsy with orifice closure
Amenorrhea from blood stasis and concretions
Traumatic injuries, sores and toxic swellings
Angina pectoris and coronary heart disease

contraindications_zh: 孕妇绝对禁用（可致流产）。气血虚脱者忌用。麝（Moschus moschiferus等）为CITES附录I/II保护物种，天然麝香来源受到严格管控。现已推广使用人工麝香替代品。
contraindications_en: Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy (may cause miscarriage). Contraindicated in qi-blood collapse. The musk deer (Moschus moschiferus and related species) is CITES Appendix I/II protected; natural musk sourcing is strictly regulated. Synthetic musk substitutes are now widely promoted.

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散每次0.03–0.1g，不入煎剂。外用适量。现代多用人工麝香（代麝香）替代。

processing_methods.name: 麝香仁
processing_methods.effect: 开窍醒神、活血通经

safety_notes_zh: 濒危物种与用药安全双重警告：(1) 濒危物种：麝科动物（林麝、马麝等）为国家一级保护动物，CITES附录I/II物种。天然麝香禁止自由贸易，仅限于养殖活体取香或国家批准的库存。现已大力推广人工麝香（合成代麝香）替代天然品，临床应优先使用。(2) 用药安全：本品辛香走窜，开窍力极强。孕妇绝对禁用，可致流产或早产。气虚欲脱者忌用。不入煎剂。用量极小（0.03–0.1g），过量可致头晕、恶心。含麝香之名方：安宫牛黄丸、至宝丹、苏合香丸、六神丸、云南白药等。
safety_notes_en: DUAL WARNING — ENDANGERED SPECIES AND DRUG SAFETY: (1) Endangered species: Musk deer (Moschus berezovskii, M. sifanicus, etc.) are Class I state-protected animals in China and CITES Appendix I/II species. Trade in natural musk is prohibited except from farmed living-extraction or government-approved stocks. Synthetic musk substitutes are strongly promoted and should be prioritized clinically. (2) Drug safety: Extremely aromatic and penetrating with very strong orifice-opening power. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy — may cause miscarriage or premature labor. Contraindicated in qi depletion. Not for decoctions. Dosage is very small (0.03-0.1g); overdose may cause dizziness and nausea. Famous formulas containing musk: An Gong Niu Huang Wan, Zhi Bao Dan, Su He Xiang Wan, Liu Shen Wan, Yunnan Baiyao.

classical_references.passage: 味辛温。主辟恶气，杀鬼精物，温疟，蛊毒，痫痓。去三虫。久服除邪，不梦寤魘寐。

description_zh: 麝科动物林麝、马麝或原麝雄体香囊中的干燥分泌物。归心、脾经。辛温，芳香走窜，为开窍醒神之第一品药，通行十二经。安宫牛黄丸、至宝丹、苏合香丸均以之为要药。孕妇绝对禁用。注意：麝为CITES保护濒危物种，临床推荐使用人工麝香（合成代麝香）替代。
description_en: The dried secretion from the musk gland of the male forest musk deer (Moschus berezovskii), alpine musk deer (M. sifanicus), or Siberian musk deer (M. moschiferus). Enters the Heart and Spleen channels. Pungent, warm, and intensely aromatic, it is the supreme orifice-opening herb that courses through all twelve channels. Key ingredient in An Gong Niu Huang Wan, Zhi Bao Dan, and Su He Xiang Wan. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy. NOTE: Musk deer are CITES-protected endangered species; synthetic musk (artificial musk) is the recommended clinical substitute.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 麝香主含大环酮类（麝香酮），具有兴奋中枢神经、抗炎、强心及促进微循环等作用。人工麝香以合成麝香酮为主要成分。
summary.en: Musk contains the macrocyclic ketone muscone, with CNS-stimulating, anti-inflammatory, cardiotonic, and microcirculation-promoting activities. Synthetic musk uses manufactured muscone as its principal constituent.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 中风昏迷急救（安宫牛黄丸）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Stroke coma emergency (An Gong Niu Huang Wan)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载天然麝香和人工麝香两个品种。人工麝香已通过多项临床验证。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists both natural musk and artificial musk. Synthetic musk has passed multiple clinical validations.

actions.en: Open the orifices and revive consciousness
Warm and free qi and blood

indications.en: Cold-blockage coma, wind-stroke with phlegm collapse
Sudden collapse from qi stagnation
Sudden pain of the chest and abdomen
Fright epilepsy

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者忌用。热闭神昏者不宜（应用凉开药）。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire. Not suitable for heat-blockage coma (use cool-opening herbs instead).

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散每次0.3–1g，不入煎剂。

processing_methods.name: 苏合香
processing_methods.effect: 开窍辟秽、温通止痛

safety_notes_zh: 不入煎剂。辛温走窜，热闭证者忌用。阴虚火旺者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Not for decoctions. Pungent, warm, and penetrating; contraindicated in heat-blockage patterns and yin-vacuity fire.

classical_references.passage: 苏合香味甘温，通窍辟恶，主心腹卒痛，中风。

description_zh: 金缕梅科植物苏合香树所分泌的树脂。归心、脾经。辛温芳香，善开窍醒神、辟秽止痛，为温开之代表药。专治寒闭神昏、气滞暴厥。苏合香丸以之为主药治中风寒闭证。与麝香并列为开窍药之要品。
description_en: The resin exuded by Liquidambar orientalis (Hamamelidaceae). Enters the Heart and Spleen channels. Pungent, warm, and intensely aromatic, it is the representative warm-opening herb for reviving consciousness, repelling filth, and alleviating pain. Specifically treats cold-blockage coma and sudden qi-stagnation collapse. Su He Xiang Wan uses it as the principal herb for cold-blockage wind-stroke. Paired with musk as the two key orifice-opening substances.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 苏合香含肉桂酸及其酯类，具有兴奋中枢神经、抗心肌缺血及祛痰等作用。
summary.en: Storax contains cinnamic acid and its esters, with CNS-stimulating, anti-myocardial ischemic, and expectorant activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 冠心病心绞痛（苏合香丸）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Coronary heart disease with angina (Su He Xiang Wan)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 温开之代表药，治寒闭神昏。苏合香丸为经典方。
evidence_notes.note_en: Representative warm-opening herb for cold-blockage coma. Su He Xiang Wan is the classic formula.

actions.en: Open the orifices and revive consciousness

indications.en: Wind-stroke with phlegm collapse, sudden collapse from qi constraint
Pain of the chest and abdomen
Postpartum blood syncope

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者忌用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with effulgent fire.

dosage_range.notes: 入丸散每次0.6–1.5g，不入煎剂（受热易挥发）。

processing_methods.name: 安息香
processing_methods.effect: 开窍辟秽、行气活血

safety_notes_zh: 不入煎剂。性温辛散，阴虚火旺者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Not for decoctions. Warm and dispersing; contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire.

classical_references.passage: 安息香味辛苦，平。主心腹恶气鬼疰。

description_zh: 安息香科植物白花树或越南安息香树的树干分泌的树脂。归心、脾经。辛苦平，芳香辟秽，善开窍醒神、行气活血止痛。功同苏合香而力较缓。常配苏合香、麝香、冰片入丸剂。
description_en: The resin exuded from the trunk of Styrax tonkinensis or S. benzoin (Styracaceae). Enters the Heart and Spleen channels. Pungent, bitter, and neutral with an aromatic filth-repelling quality, it opens the orifices, revives consciousness, moves qi, and invigorates blood. Similar to su he xiang in function but milder. Often combined with su he xiang, she xiang, and bing pian in pill formulations.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 安息香含苯甲酸及其酯类（松柏醇苯甲酸酯）和香兰素，具有防腐、祛痰及中枢兴奋作用。
summary.en: Benzoin contains benzoic acid, coniferyl benzoate, and vanillin, with antiseptic, expectorant, and CNS-stimulating activities.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 中风急救辅助（配方入丸）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 开窍辟秽，行气活血。功近苏合香而力较缓。
evidence_notes.note_en: Opens orifices and repels filth, moves qi and invigorates blood. Similar to su he xiang but milder.

actions.en: Tonify the Spleen and harmonize the middle

indications.en: Spleen vacuity with dampness stagnation, poor appetite and loose stools
Summer-heat dampness with vomiting and diarrhea
Excessive leukorrhea

contraindications_zh: 寒热病者不宜服。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for patients with concurrent exterior cold-heat patterns.

dosage_range.notes: 炒用健脾止泻力强

processing_methods.name: 生白扁豆
processing_methods.effect: 消暑化湿

processing_methods.name: 炒白扁豆
processing_methods.effect: 健脾止泻

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，但生品含少量植物凝集素，宜炒熟或充分煮熟后服用。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; raw seeds contain small amounts of phytolectin and should be dry-fried or thoroughly cooked before use.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，微温。主和中下气。

description_zh: 豆科植物扁豆的干燥成熟种子。归脾、胃经。甘温和缓，善补脾化湿，为消暑和中之佳品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 白扁豆含蛋白质、淀粉及微量植物血凝素，煮熟后安全；现代研究示其有调节肠道菌群与改善消化功能的作用。
summary.en: Bai bian dou contains protein, starch, and trace phytolectin (inactivated by cooking); modern research suggests gut microbiome regulation and digestive function improvement.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载，以总灰分、水分等为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with total ash and moisture as quality control markers.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Lablab purpureus (syn. Dolichos lablab) (Fabaceae). Enters the Spleen and Stomach channels. Sweet and slightly warm, it tonifies the Spleen, harmonizes the middle, transforms dampness, and relieves summer-heat. A gentle tonic commonly used in porridges and dietary therapy.

actions.en: Augment qi and invigorate the blood
Free the vessels and calm wheezing

indications.en: Qi vacuity with blood stasis
Chest impediment and cardiac pain
Physical weakness and fatigue
High-altitude sickness

contraindications_zh: 儿童、孕妇及哺乳期妇女慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in children, pregnant women, and nursing mothers.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服或研末冲服

processing_methods.name: 红景天
processing_methods.effect: 益气活血

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，偶见胃肠不适。高血压患者谨慎使用。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; occasional gastrointestinal discomfort reported. Use cautiously in hypertensive patients.

classical_references.passage: 红景天用于补气清肺、益智养心、收涩止血、散瘀消肿。

description_zh: 景天科植物大花红景天的干燥根及根茎。归肺、心经。甘苦平，益气活血通脉，为藏药高原保健要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 红景天主含红景天苷、酪醇与洛塞维等，具有抗缺氧、抗疲劳、抗氧化及心肌保护作用，为经典适应原药物。
summary.en: Hong jing tian contains salidroside, tyrosol, and rosavin; demonstrates anti-hypoxic, anti-fatigue, antioxidant, and cardioprotective effects as a classic adaptogen.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Prevention and relief of altitude sickness

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以红景天苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses salidroside as assay marker.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Rhodiola crenulata (Crassulaceae). Enters the Lung and Heart channels. Sweet, bitter, and neutral, it augments qi, invigorates the blood, and frees the vessels. A key Tibetan medicine used for altitude acclimatization and adaptogenic support.

actions.en: Nourish yin and supplement the blood

indications.en: Liver-Kidney yin vacuity with dizziness and blurred vision
Premature graying of hair
Fluid damage with thirst
Intestinal dryness with constipation

contraindications_zh: 脾虚便溏者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen vacuity with loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 鲜品加倍，可熬膏用

processing_methods.name: 桑椹
processing_methods.effect: 滋阴补血

processing_methods.name: 桑椹膏
processing_methods.effect: 滋补力强

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，过量可致腹泻。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; excessive intake may cause diarrhea.

classical_references.passage: 桑椹，味甘酸，寒。单食，止消渴。利五脏关节，通血气。

description_zh: 桑科植物桑的干燥果穗。归心、肝、肾经。甘酸寒，善滋阴补血、生津润肠，为肝肾阴虚常用之品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桑椹富含花青素、白藜芦醇及多种维生素，具有抗氧化、降血脂、改善贫血及保护肝肾功能的作用。
summary.en: Sang shen is rich in anthocyanins, resveratrol, and vitamins; demonstrates antioxidant, lipid-lowering, anti-anemic, and hepato-renal protective effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载桑椹，规定花青素类含量指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with anthocyanin content standards.

description_en: The dried fruit spike of Morus alba (Moraceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, and Kidney channels. Sweet, sour, and cold, it nourishes yin, supplements the blood, generates fluids, and moistens the intestines. Commonly used for Liver-Kidney yin vacuity patterns and premature graying.

actions.en: Regulate the Chong and Ren vessels
Draw out toxin from sores and generate flesh

indications.zh: 肾阳不足，精血亏虚，阳痿早泄
indications.en: Kidney yang insufficiency with depleted essence-blood, impotence, and premature ejaculation
Uterine cold with infertility

indications.zh: 小儿发育不良，囟门不合
indications.en: Pediatric developmental delay with unclosed fontanelle
Weak and atrophied sinews and bones
Chronic non-healing sores

contraindications_zh: 阴虚阳亢、血热妄行、胃火盛或肺有痰热者忌服。高血压患者禁用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with yang hyperactivity, reckless blood movement from blood heat, Stomach fire or Lung phlegm-heat. Contraindicated in hypertension.

dosage_range.notes: 研末冲服，不入煎剂；宜从小量开始，逐渐增加

processing_methods.name: 鹿茸片
processing_methods.effect: 补阳益精

processing_methods.name: 鹿茸粉
processing_methods.effect: 冲服方便，利于吸收

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品。鹿茸为梅花鹿或马鹿未骨化密生茸毛的幼角。大补阳气，阴虚火旺者服之反助火伤阴。用量宜小，从0.5g起逐增。服用期间忌食辛辣。部分人群可能出现上火症状（口干、鼻出血）。高血压、出血性疾病患者禁用。涉及动物伦理与CITES规范，应选择合法来源。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (unossified pilose antler of Cervus nippon or C. elaphus). Strongly tonifies yang — contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire patterns as it may exacerbate heat symptoms. Start at 0.5 g and increase gradually. Some users may experience heat signs (dry mouth, epistaxis). Contraindicated in hypertension and hemorrhagic disorders. Subject to CITES regulations; use only legally sourced material.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，温。主漏下恶血，寒热惊痫，益气强志，生齿不老。

description_zh: 鹿科动物梅花鹿或马鹿的雄鹿未骨化密生茸毛的幼角。归肾、肝经。甘咸温，为补阳要药之首，善壮肾阳、益精血、强筋骨。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 鹿茸含多肽、氨基酸、硫酸软骨素及微量IGF-1等，药理示其促进生长发育、增强免疫、促进造血及骨修复的作用。
summary.en: Lu rong contains polypeptides, amino acids, chondroitin sulfate, and trace IGF-1; promotes growth and development, enhances immunity, stimulates hematopoiesis, and supports bone repair.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Impotence due to Kidney yang vacuity

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以总氨基酸含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses total amino acid content as quality control marker.

description_en: The unossified pilose antler of male Cervus nippon or C. elaphus (Cervidae). Enters the Kidney and Liver channels. Sweet, salty, and warm, it is the premier yang-tonifying medicinal — strengthens Kidney yang, augments essence and blood, fortifies sinews and bones, and regulates the Chong and Ren vessels. Animal-derived product subject to wildlife sourcing regulations.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and augment the Lung

indications.en: Kidney vacuity with depleted essence, impotence, and spermatorrhea
Sore and weak low back and knees
Chronic cough with vacuity wheezing
Consumptive cough with bloody phlegm

contraindications_zh: 有表邪者不宜用。实证、热证忌服。
contraindications_en: Not suitable when exterior pathogens are present. Contraindicated in repletion and heat patterns.

dosage_range.notes: 研末冲服或与鸡鸭炖服

processing_methods.name: 冬虫夏草
processing_methods.effect: 补肾益肺

safety_notes_zh: 冬虫夏草为麦角菌科真菌冬虫夏草菌寄生在蝙蝠蛾科昆虫幼虫上的子座及幼虫尸体的复合体。属于真菌-昆虫复合产品。野生品价格昂贵，市场掺伪严重，应注意鉴别。重金属（砷）含量可能偏高，长期服用需监测。
safety_notes_en: Cordyceps is a fungus-insect complex: the stroma of Ophiocordyceps sinensis parasitizing Hepialidae larvae. Wild-sourced specimens are extremely expensive and frequently adulterated — authentication is essential. Arsenic levels may be elevated; long-term use requires monitoring. Cultivated alternatives (e.g. C. militaris) are common substitutes.

classical_references.passage: 冬虫夏草，甘平，保肺益肾，止血化痰，已劳嗽。

description_zh: 麦角菌科真菌冬虫夏草菌寄生在蝙蝠蛾科昆虫幼虫上的子座及幼虫尸体的干燥复合体。归肺、肾经。甘温，补肺肾、止血化痰，为阴阳双补之珍品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 冬虫夏草含虫草素、虫草酸与虫草多糖，具有免疫调节、抗肿瘤、保护肾功能、改善呼吸功能等多重药理作用。
summary.en: Dong chong xia cao contains cordycepin, cordycepic acid, and polysaccharides; demonstrates immunomodulatory, antitumor, nephroprotective, and respiratory function-improving effects.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肿瘤放化疗后免疫力低下

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以腺苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses adenosine as assay marker.

description_en: The dried complex of the stroma of Ophiocordyceps sinensis parasitizing larvae of Hepialidae moths. Enters the Lung and Kidney channels. Sweet and warm, it tonifies both Lung and Kidney, stops bleeding, and transforms phlegm — a prized medicinal that tonifies both yin and yang.

actions.en: Moisten the intestines and free stool

indications.zh: 肾阳不足，精血亏虚，腰膝痿软
indications.en: Kidney yang insufficiency with depleted essence-blood and weak lower back and knees
Impotence and infertility
Intestinal dryness with constipation

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、脾虚泄泻、实热便秘者不宜。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for yin-vacuity fire, Spleen-vacuity diarrhea, or repletion-heat constipation.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服

processing_methods.name: 锁阳
processing_methods.effect: 补肾润肠

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，阴虚火旺者忌服。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire patterns.

classical_references.passage: 锁阳，补阴气，治痿弱。

description_zh: 锁阳科植物锁阳的干燥肉质茎。归肝、肾、大肠经。甘温，补肾阳、益精血、润肠，功似肉苁蓉而偏于温补。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 锁阳含三萜类、鞣质及多糖，具有调节内分泌、抗氧化、润肠通便等作用。
summary.en: Suo yang contains triterpenoids, tannins, and polysaccharides; regulates endocrine function, provides antioxidant effects, and lubricates the intestines.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 肾阳虚型男性性功能障碍

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载，以总灰分等为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with total ash as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried fleshy stem of Cynomorium songaricum (Cynomoriaceae). Enters the Liver, Kidney, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet and warm, it tonifies Kidney yang, augments essence and blood, and moistens the intestines. Similar to rou cong rong but more warming in nature.

actions.en: Tonify the Kidney and warm the Lung
Moisten the intestines and free stool

indications.en: Kidney vacuity with low back pain and weak legs
Vacuity-cold wheezing and cough
Intestinal dryness with constipation
Frequent urination and enuresis

contraindications_zh: 痰火积热、阴虚火旺者不宜。大便溏泄者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for phlegm-fire or accumulated heat, or yin-vacuity fire. Use with caution in loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 捣碎入煎剂或嚼服

processing_methods.name: 核桃仁
processing_methods.effect: 补肾润肠

safety_notes_zh: 食物性药材，一般安全。坚果过敏者禁用。
safety_notes_en: A food-grade medicinal; generally safe. Contraindicated in individuals with tree nut allergy.

classical_references.passage: 核桃仁，味甘，温。食之令人肥健，润肌，黑须发。

description_zh: 胡桃科植物胡桃的干燥成熟种子。归肾、肺、大肠经。甘温，补肾温肺、润肠，药食两用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 核桃仁富含不饱和脂肪酸（α-亚麻酸）、多酚类及维生素E，具有抗氧化、降脂、益脑及润肠作用。
summary.en: He tao ren is rich in unsaturated fatty acids (alpha-linolenic acid), polyphenols, and vitamin E; provides antioxidant, lipid-lowering, neuroprotective, and intestine-lubricating effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载胡桃仁，以脂肪含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with fat content as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Juglans regia (Juglandaceae). Enters the Kidney, Lung, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet and warm, it tonifies the Kidney, warms the Lung, and moistens the intestines. A dual food-medicinal substance.

actions.en: Clear the Lung and generate fluids

indications.en: Lung dryness with dry cough, yin-vacuity consumptive cough
Hemoptysis
Fluid damage with thirst
Intestinal dryness with constipation

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒、食少便溏者不宜。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold with poor appetite and loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服

processing_methods.name: 天冬
processing_methods.effect: 养阴润燥

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，性大寒，脾胃虚寒者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; very cold in nature — contraindicated in Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主诸暴风湿偏痹，强骨髓，杀三虫，去伏尸。久服轻身。

description_zh: 百合科植物天门冬的干燥块根。归肺、肾经。甘苦大寒，善滋阴润燥、清肺降火，与麦冬相须为用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 天冬含天冬酰胺、甾体皂苷及多糖，具有抗菌、抗肿瘤、镇咳祛痰及免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Tian dong contains asparagine, steroidal saponins, and polysaccharides; demonstrates antibacterial, antitumor, antitussive-expectorant, and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以天冬酰胺为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses asparagine as assay marker.

description_en: The dried tuberous root of Asparagus cochinchinensis (Liliaceae). Enters the Lung and Kidney channels. Sweet, bitter, and very cold, it nourishes yin, moistens dryness, clears the Lung, and generates fluids. Often paired with mai dong for synergistic yin-nourishing effect.

indications.en: Lung-Stomach yin damage with dry-heat cough
Dry throat and thirst
Internal heat with wasting-thirst

contraindications_zh: 痰湿内蕴、脾虚便溏者不宜。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for internal accumulation of phlegm-dampness or Spleen vacuity with loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服

processing_methods.name: 玉竹
processing_methods.effect: 养阴润燥

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，性味平和，为阴虚常用之品。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; mild in nature and commonly used for yin vacuity.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主中风暴热，不能动摇，跌筋结肉，诸不足。久服去面黑，好颜色，润泽，轻身不老。

description_zh: 百合科植物玉竹的干燥根茎。归肺、胃经。甘微寒，养阴润燥、生津止渴，药性平和，为补阴而不腻滞之品。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 玉竹含多糖、甾苷及黏液质，具有降血糖、提高免疫力、抗氧化及心肌保护作用。
summary.en: Yu zhu contains polysaccharides, steroidal glycosides, and mucilage; demonstrates hypoglycemic, immunoenhancing, antioxidant, and cardioprotective effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载玉竹，以多糖含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with polysaccharide content as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried rhizome of Polygonatum odoratum (Liliaceae). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Sweet and slightly cold, it nourishes yin, moistens dryness, generates fluids, and stops thirst. Mild and non-cloying, it is a gentle yin tonic suitable for long-term use.

actions.en: Benefit the Kidney and strengthen bones
Nourish the blood and supplement the Heart

indications.en: Yin vacuity tidal fever with steaming-bone and night sweats
Dizziness and blurred vision
Vacuity wind stirring internally
Weak and atrophied sinews and bones
Uterine flooding and spotting

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒者不宜。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold. Use with caution in pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 宜先煎；亦可熬胶或研末

processing_methods.name: 生龟甲
processing_methods.effect: 滋阴潜阳力强

processing_methods.name: 醋龟甲
processing_methods.effect: 便于粉碎，增强入肝肾之力

processing_methods.name: 龟甲胶
processing_methods.effect: 滋阴补血

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品（乌龟腹甲）。应确保合法来源，符合野生动物保护法规。大量久服可碍胃。部分物种受CITES保护。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (ventral plastron of Chinemys reevesii). Ensure legal sourcing compliant with wildlife protection regulations. Some species are CITES-protected. Prolonged heavy use may impair digestion.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，平。主漏下赤白，破症瘕痃疟，五痔，阴蚀，湿痹，四肢重弱。久服轻身不饥。

description_zh: 龟科动物乌龟的腹甲。归肝、肾、心经。咸甘寒，滋阴潜阳、益肾强骨、养血补心，为大补真阴之品。动物来源，需注意合规采购。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 龟甲含丰富胶原蛋白、碳酸钙及多种氨基酸，具有补钙强骨、调节免疫及抗衰老作用。
summary.en: Gui jia contains collagen, calcium carbonate, and amino acids; provides calcium supplementation, bone strengthening, immunomodulatory, and anti-aging effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以总灰分、钙含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses total ash and calcium content as quality control markers.

description_en: The ventral plastron of Chinemys reevesii (Geoemydidae). Enters the Liver, Kidney, and Heart channels. Salty, sweet, and cold, it nourishes yin and subdues yang, benefits the Kidney and strengthens bones, and nourishes the blood and supplements the Heart. An animal-derived product — ensure legal and ethical sourcing.

actions.en: Nourish and supplement the Liver and Kidney
Cool the blood and stop bleeding

indications.en: Liver-Kidney yin vacuity with loose teeth
Premature graying of hair and beard
Dizziness and blurred vision
Bleeding due to yin vacuity and blood heat

contraindications_zh: 脾肾虚寒者不宜。大便溏泄者慎用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for Spleen-Kidney vacuity cold. Use with caution in loose stools.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服；鲜品捣汁用量加倍

processing_methods.name: 墨旱莲
processing_methods.effect: 滋补肝肾

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味甘酸，寒。主血痢。针灸疮发，洪血不可止者，敷之立已。汁涂眉发，生速而繁。

description_zh: 菊科植物鳢肠的干燥地上部分。归肝、肾经。甘酸寒，滋补肝肾阴、凉血止血，常与女贞子合用（二至丸）。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 墨旱莲含蟛蜞菊内酯等香豆素类及皂苷，具有保肝、止血、促进毛发生长及抗炎作用。
summary.en: Mo han lian contains wedelolactone and saponins; demonstrates hepatoprotective, hemostatic, hair-growth promoting, and anti-inflammatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以蟛蜞菊内酯为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses wedelolactone as assay marker.

description_en: The dried aerial part of Eclipta prostrata (Asteraceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, sour, and cold, it nourishes and supplements Liver-Kidney yin, cools the blood, and stops bleeding. Often paired with nu zhen zi in the classic Er Zhi Wan formula.

actions.en: Tonify the Spleen and stop diarrhea
Benefit the Kidney and astringe essence
Nourish the Heart and calm the spirit

indications.en: Chronic diarrhea from Spleen vacuity
Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Palpitations and insomnia
Leukorrhea

contraindications_zh: 中满痞胀及大便燥结者忌服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in epigastric fullness and distention or dry, bound stools.

dosage_range.notes: 去心用补脾安神，连心用清心降火

processing_methods.name: 莲子
processing_methods.effect: 补脾益肾

processing_methods.name: 莲子心
processing_methods.effect: 清心降火

safety_notes_zh: 食物性药材，一般安全。
safety_notes_en: A food-grade medicinal; generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主补中养神，益气力，除百疾。久服轻身耐老，不饥延年。

description_zh: 睡莲科植物莲的干燥成熟种子。归脾、肾、心经。甘涩平，补脾止泻、益肾涩精、养心安神，药食两用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 莲子含莲心碱（胚芽部分）、淀粉、蛋白质等，莲子肉健脾益肾，莲子心（含生物碱）有降压、镇静作用。
summary.en: Lian zi contains bisbenzylisoquinoline alkaloids (in embryo), starch, and protein; the seed flesh tonifies Spleen and Kidney, while the embryo (lian zi xin) has hypotensive and sedative effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载莲子与莲子心，分别规定质量标准。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia lists both lian zi and lian zi xin with separate quality standards.

description_en: The dried ripe seed of Nelumbo nucifera (Nelumbonaceae). Enters the Spleen, Kidney, and Heart channels. Sweet, astringent, and neutral, it tonifies the Spleen, stops diarrhea, benefits the Kidney, astringes essence, and nourishes the Heart to calm the spirit. A dual food-medicinal substance.

actions.en: Benefit the Kidney and secure essence
Tonify the Spleen and stop diarrhea

indications.en: Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Enuresis and frequent urination
Chronic diarrhea from Spleen vacuity
Leukorrhea

contraindications_zh: 大小便不利者禁服。食滞不化者慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in difficult urination or constipation. Use with caution in food stagnation.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服或研末服

processing_methods.name: 生芡实
processing_methods.effect: 除湿止带力强

processing_methods.name: 炒芡实
processing_methods.effect: 补脾止泻力强

safety_notes_zh: 食物性药材，一般安全。
safety_notes_en: A food-grade medicinal; generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主湿痹，腰脊膝痛，补中，除暴疾，益精气，强志，令耳目聪明。久服轻身不饥。

description_zh: 睡莲科植物芡的干燥成熟种仁。归脾、肾经。甘涩平，益肾固精、补脾止泻、除湿止带，功似莲子而收涩力更强。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 芡实含丰富淀粉、蛋白质及微量甾醇，具有健脾止泻、收涩固精及抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Qian shi contains starch, protein, and trace phytosterols; provides Spleen-strengthening, astringent, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载芡实，以水分、总灰分为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with moisture and total ash as quality control markers.

description_en: The dried ripe seed kernel of Euryale ferox (Nymphaeaceae). Enters the Spleen and Kidney channels. Sweet, astringent, and neutral, it benefits the Kidney, secures essence, tonifies the Spleen, stops diarrhea, and eliminates dampness to stop leukorrhea. Stronger astringent action than lian zi.

actions.en: Benefit the Kidney, secure essence, and reduce urination
Nourish the Liver and brighten the eyes

indications.en: Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Enuresis and frequent urination
Impotence and premature ejaculation
Dim and unclear vision

contraindications_zh: 肾虚有火、小便短涩者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Kidney vacuity with fire or scanty, difficult urination.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服

processing_methods.name: 覆盆子
processing_methods.effect: 益肾固精

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，平。主安五脏，益精气，长阴令坚，强志倍力，有子。久服轻身不老。

description_zh: 蔷薇科植物华东覆盆子的干燥果实。归肝、肾经。甘酸温，益肾固精缩尿、养肝明目，为五子衍宗丸组成之一。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 覆盆子含鞣花酸、黄酮及有机酸，具有抗氧化、改善生殖功能及保护视力作用。
summary.en: Fu pen zi contains ellagic acid, flavonoids, and organic acids; provides antioxidant, reproductive-enhancing, and vision-protective effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以鞣花酸为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses ellagic acid as assay marker.

description_en: The dried fruit of Rubus chingii (Rosaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, sour, and warm, it benefits the Kidney, secures essence, reduces urination, nourishes the Liver, and brightens the eyes. A component of the classic Wu Zi Yan Zong Wan.

actions.en: Supplement the Kidney and assist yang

indications.en: Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Enuresis and frequent urination
Urinary incontinence

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺、膀胱湿热者不宜。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for yin-vacuity fire or Bladder damp-heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服或研末服

processing_methods.name: 桑螵蛸
processing_methods.effect: 固精缩尿

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品（螳螂卵鞘）。蒸制可杀灭虫卵，确保安全使用。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (mantis ootheca). Steaming is required to kill eggs and ensure safe use.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，平。主伤中，疝瘕，阴痿，益精生子。

description_zh: 螳螂科昆虫大刀螂、小刀螂或巨斧螳螂的干燥卵鞘。归肝、肾经。甘咸平，固精缩尿、补肾助阳，为遗尿遗精常用之品。动物来源。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 桑螵蛸含丰富蛋白质与脂质，传统认为其固精缩尿机制与补肾收涩相关，现代研究有限。
summary.en: Sang piao xiao contains protein and lipids; the essence-securing and urination-reducing mechanism is traditionally linked to Kidney supplementation and astringency. Modern research is limited.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载桑螵蛸，以蛋白质等为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with protein content as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried ootheca of Tenodera sinensis, Statilia maculata, or Hierodula patellifera (Mantidae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, salty, and neutral, it secures essence, reduces urination, and supplements the Kidney to assist yang. An animal-derived product commonly used for enuresis and spermatorrhea.

indications.en: Hematemesis, epistaxis, and uterine bleeding
Spermatorrhea and seminal emission
Red and white leukorrhea
Stomach pain with acid reflux
Eczema and skin ulcers (topical)

contraindications_zh: 阴虚多热者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in yin vacuity with repletion heat.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服或研末冲服；外用研末撒敷

processing_methods.name: 海螵蛸
processing_methods.effect: 收敛止血

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品（乌贼内壳）。矿物/碳酸钙为主要成分，大量服用可致便秘或碱中毒。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (cuttlefish endoconcha). Primarily calcium carbonate — excessive intake may cause constipation or alkalosis.

classical_references.passage: 味咸，微温。主女子漏下赤白经汁，血闭阴蚀，寒热癥瘕，无子。

description_zh: 乌贼科动物无针乌贼或金乌贼的干燥内壳。归脾、肾经。咸涩微温，收敛止血、固精止带、制酸敛疮，内服外用皆宜。动物来源。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 海螵蛸主含碳酸钙（约80-85%），具有中和胃酸、止血、促进溃疡愈合及外用收湿敛疮作用。
summary.en: Hai piao xiao is primarily calcium carbonate (~80-85%); neutralizes gastric acid, promotes hemostasis and ulcer healing, and absorbs moisture topically for wound closure.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以碳酸钙含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses calcium carbonate content as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried endoconcha of Sepiella maindroni or Sepia esculenta (Sepiidae). Enters the Spleen and Kidney channels. Salty, astringent, and slightly warm, it astringes and stops bleeding, secures essence, stops leukorrhea, neutralizes acid, and closes sores. Suitable for both internal and topical use. Animal-derived product.

actions.en: Astringe the intestines and stop diarrhea
Constrain the Lung and stop cough
Benefit the throat and restore the voice

indications.en: Chronic diarrhea and chronic dysentery
Chronic cough with loss of voice
Rectal prolapse

contraindications_zh: 外有表邪、内有湿热积滞者忌用。咳嗽初起者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated when exterior pathogens are present or in internal damp-heat accumulation. Not suitable at onset of cough.

dosage_range.notes: 涩肠止泻煨用；敛肺利咽生用

processing_methods.name: 生诃子
processing_methods.effect: 敛肺利咽

processing_methods.name: 煨诃子
processing_methods.effect: 涩肠止泻力强

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全，过量可致便秘。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe; excessive dosage may cause constipation.

classical_references.passage: 诃子，味苦。主通利津液，治腹胀满。

description_zh: 使君子科植物诃子的干燥成熟果实。归肺、大肠经。苦酸涩平，涩肠止泻、敛肺利咽，为藏药常用药材。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 诃子含丰富鞣质（诃黎勒酸、没食子酸等），具有抗菌、抗病毒、收敛止泻及抗氧化作用。
summary.en: He zi is rich in tannins (chebulagic acid, gallic acid); demonstrates antibacterial, antiviral, astringent-antidiarrheal, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以没食子酸与诃黎勒酸为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses gallic acid and chebulagic acid as assay markers.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Terminalia chebula (Combretaceae). Enters the Lung and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, sour, astringent, and neutral, it astringes the intestines, stops diarrhea, constrains the Lung, and benefits the throat. An important herb in both Chinese and Tibetan medicine.

actions.en: Dry dampness, kill parasites, and stop itching
Warm the Kidney and strengthen yang

indications.en: Genital damp-itch, eczema, and scabies
Cold-damp leukorrhea
Impotence and uterine cold

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者不宜内服。下焦湿热者不宜。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for internal use in yin-vacuity fire. Not suitable for lower-jiao damp-heat.

dosage_range.notes: 内服煎服；外用煎汤熏洗

processing_methods.name: 蛇床子
processing_methods.effect: 燥湿杀虫

safety_notes_zh: 内服不宜过量，可致恶心呕吐。外用为主要用法，一般安全。
safety_notes_en: Internal use should not exceed recommended dosage — may cause nausea and vomiting. Topical use (primary application) is generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平。主妇人阴中肿痛，男子阴痿湿痒，除痹气，利关节，癫痫恶疮。久服轻身。

description_zh: 伞形科植物蛇床的干燥成熟果实。归肾经。辛苦温，以外用为主，善燥湿杀虫止痒；内服可温肾壮阳。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 蛇床子含蛇床子素（香豆素类）等，具有抗真菌、抗菌、抗过敏止痒及改善性功能作用。
summary.en: She chuang zi contains osthole (coumarin); demonstrates antifungal, antibacterial, antipruritic, and sexual function-enhancing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以蛇床子素为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses osthole as assay marker.

description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Cnidium monnieri (Apiaceae). Enters the Kidney channel. Pungent, bitter, and warm, it primarily used topically to dry dampness, kill parasites, and stop itching; internally it warms the Kidney and strengthens yang.

actions.en: Supplement fire, assist yang, and free stool (internal)

indications.en: Scabies, eczema, and yin-type abscesses (topical)
Vacuity-cold constipation (internal)
Impotence from waning of Ming Men fire (internal)

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺及孕妇忌服。内服宜慎，不宜久服。有毒，需按规定炮制后方可使用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire and pregnancy. Internal use requires caution — not for prolonged administration. Toxic; must be properly processed before use.

dosage_range.notes: 内服须炮制后入丸散，不入汤剂；外用研末调敷

processing_methods.name: 制硫磺
processing_methods.effect: 降低毒性，供内服用

processing_methods.name: 硫磺（外用）
processing_methods.effect: 杀虫止痒

safety_notes_zh: 有毒矿物药。硫磺为自然元素矿物，含砷等杂质。内服必须经豆腐制等炮制法降毒后方可使用，仅入丸散不入汤剂。长期或过量内服可损害肝肾，引起胃肠刺激。外用亦可致接触性皮炎。孕妇禁用。
safety_notes_en: TOXIC mineral medicinal. Native sulfur may contain arsenic and other impurities. Internal use requires detoxification processing (e.g., boiling with tofu) and is only administered in pills or powder — never in decoction. Prolonged or excessive internal use may cause hepatorenal damage and gastrointestinal irritation. Topical use may cause contact dermatitis. Contraindicated in pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 味酸，温。主妇人阴蚀，疽痔，恶血，坚筋骨，除头秃。能化金银铜铁奇物。

description_zh: 自然元素类矿物硫族自然硫。归肾、大肠经。酸温有毒。外用杀虫止痒为主要用法；内服经炮制后可补火助阳、通便。有毒矿物药，使用需严格遵循炮制规范。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 硫磺外用通过氧化杀灭疥螨和真菌；内服有泻下和刺激肠道蠕动的作用。含砷等有害杂质需炮制去除。
summary.en: Topical sulfur oxidizes to kill scabies mites and fungi; internally it stimulates intestinal peristalsis. Contains harmful arsenic impurities that must be removed through processing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定砷含量限度与炮制方法。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies arsenic content limits and required processing methods.

description_en: Native sulfur (mineral). Enters the Kidney and Large Intestine channels. Sour, warm, and toxic. Primarily used topically to kill parasites and stop itching; internally (after mandatory processing) it supplements fire, assists yang, and frees stool. A toxic mineral medicinal requiring strict adherence to processing standards.

actions.en: Induce vomiting of phlegm and drool

indications.en: Malaria
Phlegm-rheum accumulation in the chest

contraindications_zh: 有毒，正气虚弱者禁用。孕妇禁用。老人、小儿慎用。不宜久服。
contraindications_en: Toxic — contraindicated in those with weak constitution. Contraindicated in pregnancy. Use with caution in the elderly and children. Not for prolonged use.

dosage_range.notes: 截疟宜酒浸炒用以减轻致吐副作用；生用涌吐力强

processing_methods.name: 生常山
processing_methods.effect: 涌吐痰涎力强

processing_methods.name: 酒常山
processing_methods.effect: 截疟，减轻致吐作用

safety_notes_zh: 有毒。常山含常山碱等生物碱，致吐作用强烈，过量可引起剧烈恶心呕吐、腹泻、腹痛。大量中毒可致脱水、电解质紊乱甚至休克。孕妇禁用（有致畸报告）。内服应严格控制剂量，酒炒可减轻致吐副作用。
safety_notes_en: TOXIC. Chang shan contains dichroine and other alkaloids with strong emetic action. Overdose causes severe nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain; serious poisoning may lead to dehydration, electrolyte imbalance, or shock. Contraindicated in pregnancy (teratogenicity reported). Dosage must be strictly controlled; wine-frying reduces emetic side effects.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主伤寒寒热，热发温疟，鬼毒，胸中痰结吐逆。

description_zh: 虎耳草科植物常山的干燥根。归肺、心、肝经。苦辛寒有毒，善截疟涌吐，为古代截疟要药。有毒药物，现代使用较少。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 常山含常山碱（鹰爪碱）等喹唑啉类生物碱，抗疟活性强（杀灭疟原虫），但致吐副作用明显，限制了临床应用。其衍生物 halofuginone 已用于现代药物研发。
summary.en: Chang shan contains quinazoline alkaloids (dichroine/febrifugine) with potent antimalarial activity (kills Plasmodium), but strong emetic side effects limit clinical use. The derivative halofuginone has entered modern drug development.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 疟疾（历史用途，现已被青蒿素替代）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Malaria (historical use, now superseded by artemisinin)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定常山碱含量限度与炮制规范。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies dichroine content limits and processing standards.

description_en: The dried root of Dichroa febrifuga (Saxifragaceae). Enters the Lung, Heart, and Liver channels. Bitter, pungent, cold, and toxic. Induces vomiting of phlegm and interrupts malaria — a classical antimalarial herb now largely superseded by artemisinin. Toxic; modern use is limited.

actions.en: Cool the blood and stop bleeding
Dispel stasis, resolve toxicity, and reduce abscesses

indications.zh: 衄血，吐血，尿血，便血，崩漏
indications.en: Epistaxis, hematemesis, hematuria, hematochezia, and uterine flooding
Abscess, swelling, and toxic sores

contraindications_zh: 脾胃虚寒无瘀滞者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold without stasis.

dosage_range.notes: 鲜品加倍；外用捣敷

processing_methods.name: 大蓟
processing_methods.effect: 凉血止血

processing_methods.name: 大蓟炭
processing_methods.effect: 止血力增强

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 大蓟，味苦。治吐血、鼻衄。

description_zh: 菊科植物蓟的干燥地上部分或根。归心、肝经。甘苦凉，凉血止血、散瘀解毒消痈，为血热出血之良药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 大蓟含黄酮类与生物碱，具有止血、降压、抗菌及抗炎作用。
summary.en: Da ji contains flavonoids and alkaloids; demonstrates hemostatic, hypotensive, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以蒙花苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses linarin as assay marker.

description_en: The dried aerial part or root of Cirsium japonicum (Asteraceae). Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Sweet, bitter, and cool, it cools the blood and stops bleeding, dispels stasis, and reduces abscesses. An effective hemostatic for blood-heat bleeding patterns.

actions.en: Warmly supplement the Liver and Kidney
Augment essence and nourish the blood

indications.en: Kidney yang insufficiency with depleted essence and blood
Vacuity taxation with emaciation
Uterine flooding and bleeding

contraindications_zh: 阴虚阳亢者忌服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin vacuity with yang hyperactivity.

dosage_range.notes: 烊化冲服，不入煎剂

processing_methods.name: 鹿角胶
processing_methods.effect: 温补精血

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品（鹿角煎熬制胶）。功似鹿茸而力缓。阴虚火旺者忌用。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (gelatin extracted from deer antler). Similar to lu rong but milder. Contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire.

classical_references.passage: 鹿角，味咸，温。主恶疮痈肿，逐邪恶气，留血在阴中。

description_zh: 鹿科动物梅花鹿或马鹿的角经煎熬而成的胶块。归肝、肾经。甘咸温，温补肝肾、益精养血、止血，功似鹿茸而力较缓。动物来源。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 鹿角胶含胶原蛋白水解物及氨基酸，具有补血止血、促进造血及增强免疫力作用。
summary.en: Lu jiao jiao contains collagen hydrolysate and amino acids; provides blood-supplementing, hemostatic, hematopoietic, and immune-enhancing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以总氨基酸含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses total amino acid content as quality control marker.

description_en: Gelatin extracted by boiling the antler of Cervus nippon or C. elaphus (Cervidae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, salty, and warm, it warmly supplements the Liver and Kidney, augments essence, nourishes the blood, and stops bleeding. Milder than lu rong. Animal-derived product.

actions.en: Tonify the Lung and benefit the Kidney

indications.en: Vacuity wheezing from Lung-Kidney dual vacuity
Kidney vacuity impotence
Cough with hemoptysis

contraindications_zh: 外感风寒咳喘者忌用。阴虚火旺者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in cough and wheezing from external wind-cold. Not suitable for yin-vacuity fire.

dosage_range.notes: 研末冲服或浸酒，多入丸散；一对蛤蚧约重10-15g

processing_methods.name: 蛤蚧
processing_methods.effect: 补肺益肾

safety_notes_zh: 动物来源产品（壁虎科动物蛤蚧全体）。为国家二级保护动物，需合法来源。市场常有伪品（以其他壁虎充替），需注意鉴别。
safety_notes_en: Animal-derived product (whole body of Gekko gecko). A Class II protected species in China — legal sourcing required. Frequently counterfeited with other gecko species; authentication is essential.

classical_references.passage: 蛤蚧，味咸，平。主久肺劳传尸，杀鬼物邪精。

description_zh: 壁虎科动物蛤蚧的干燥体。归肺、肾经。咸平，补肺益肾、纳气定喘、助阳益精，为肺肾两虚喘咳之要药。动物来源，受保护物种。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 蛤蚧含多种氨基酸、微量元素及活性多肽，具有平喘、增强免疫、调节内分泌及抗衰老作用。
summary.en: Ge jie contains amino acids, trace elements, and bioactive peptides; demonstrates antiasthmatic, immunoenhancing, endocrine-regulating, and anti-aging effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以总氨基酸含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses total amino acid content as quality control marker.

description_en: The dried body of Gekko gecko (Gekkonidae). Enters the Lung and Kidney channels. Salty and neutral, it tonifies the Lung, benefits the Kidney, grasps qi to calm wheezing, and assists yang to augment essence. An animal-derived product from a protected species — legal sourcing required.

actions.en: Warm the Kidney and supplement essence
Nourish the blood and augment qi

indications.en: Kidney qi insufficiency with depleted essence and blood
Impotence and spermatorrhea

indications.zh: 气血不足，面色萎黄，产后乳少
indications.en: Qi-blood insufficiency with sallow complexion, postpartum lactation insufficiency
Wheezing and cough from Lung-Kidney dual vacuity

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者不宜。实证、湿热者忌用。
contraindications_en: Not suitable for yin-vacuity fire. Contraindicated in repletion and damp-heat patterns.

dosage_range.notes: 研末装胶囊或入丸剂吞服

processing_methods.name: 紫河车
processing_methods.method: 反复洗净蒸制烘干研粉
processing_methods.effect: 温补精血

safety_notes_zh: 人体来源产品（人胎盘）。存在传染病（HIV、乙肝、丙肝等）传播风险，必须经严格检验与灭活处理。2015年国家卫计委已禁止医疗机构使用胎盘制品。伦理争议较大，使用日渐减少。
safety_notes_en: HUMAN-DERIVED product (placenta). Risk of transmitting infectious diseases (HIV, HBV, HCV, etc.); rigorous testing and inactivation are mandatory. China's National Health Commission prohibited placenta use in medical institutions in 2015. Significant ethical concerns; clinical use is declining.

classical_references.passage: 紫河车，主血气赢瘦，妇人劳损。

description_zh: 健康产妇的干燥胎盘。归肺、肝、肾经。甘咸温，温肾补精、养血益气，为血肉有情之品。人体来源产品，使用受严格伦理与法规约束。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 紫河车含多种免疫球蛋白、激素及生长因子，具有增强免疫、促进造血及调节内分泌作用，但传染病风险与伦理问题限制其使用。
summary.en: Zi he che contains immunoglobulins, hormones, and growth factors; provides immunoenhancing, hematopoietic, and endocrine-regulating effects, but infectious disease risk and ethical concerns limit its use.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 免疫功能低下（历史用途）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 2015年后已从部分临床使用中退出，药典仍收载但使用受限。
evidence_notes.note_en: Withdrawn from some clinical applications post-2015; still listed in Pharmacopoeia but use is restricted.

description_en: The dried placenta of a healthy parturient woman. Enters the Lung, Liver, and Kidney channels. Sweet, salty, and warm, it warms the Kidney, supplements essence, nourishes the blood, and augments qi. A human-derived product subject to strict ethical and regulatory controls; clinical use is increasingly restricted.

indications.zh: 肾阳不足，命门火衰，阳痿精冷
indications.en: Kidney yang insufficiency with waning Ming Men fire, impotence, and cold semen
Weak and atrophied sinews and bones
Cold-damp impediment pain

contraindications_zh: 阴虚火旺者忌服。有小毒，不宜过量久服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in yin-vacuity fire. Slightly toxic — do not exceed dosage or use long-term.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服或浸酒

processing_methods.name: 仙茅
processing_methods.effect: 补肾壮阳

safety_notes_zh: 有小毒。过量可致口舌麻木、恶心呕吐。长期大量使用有肝毒性报告。常与淫羊藿配伍（二仙汤）。
safety_notes_en: Slightly toxic. Overdose may cause oral numbness, nausea, and vomiting. Hepatotoxicity has been reported with prolonged high-dose use. Often paired with yin yang huo (Er Xian Tang).

classical_references.passage: 仙茅，味辛。主风，补暖腰脚，清安五脏，强筋骨，消食。

description_zh: 石蒜科植物仙茅的干燥根茎。归肾、肝、脾经。辛热有小毒，补肾壮阳、强筋骨、祛寒湿，常与淫羊藿同用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 仙茅含仙茅苷等酚苷类成分，具有雄激素样作用、抗骨质疏松、抗氧化及免疫调节作用。
summary.en: Xian mao contains curculigoside and phenolic glycosides; demonstrates androgen-like effects, anti-osteoporotic, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory actions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以仙茅苷为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses curculigoside as assay marker.

description_en: The dried rhizome of Curculigo orchioides (Amaryllidaceae). Enters the Kidney, Liver, and Spleen channels. Pungent, hot, and slightly toxic, it tonifies Kidney yang, strengthens sinews and bones, and dispels cold-dampness. Often paired with yin yang huo in the classic Er Xian Tang.

indications.en: Liver-Kidney insufficiency with sore and weak low back and knees
Traumatic injury with sinew and bone fracture
Uterine flooding and threatened miscarriage

contraindications_zh: 初期跌打瘀肿未消者暂勿补涩。
contraindications_en: Avoid astringent supplementation in acute trauma with unresolved bruising and swelling.

dosage_range.notes: 煎服

processing_methods.name: 续断
processing_methods.effect: 补肝肾强筋骨

processing_methods.name: 酒续断
processing_methods.effect: 增强活血通络作用

processing_methods.name: 盐续断
processing_methods.effect: 增强入肾之力

safety_notes_zh: 一般安全。
safety_notes_en: Generally safe.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，微温。主伤寒，补不足，金疮痈疡，折跌，续筋骨。

description_zh: 川续断科植物川续断的干燥根。归肝、肾经。苦辛微温，补肝肾、强筋骨、续折伤、止崩漏，兼有补涩之能。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 续断含三萜皂苷与环烯醚萜苷，具有促进骨折愈合、抗骨质疏松、抗炎及调节免疫作用。
summary.en: Xu duan contains triterpenoid saponins and iridoid glycosides; promotes fracture healing, provides anti-osteoporotic, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以川续断皂苷VI为含量测定指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses dipsacoside VI as assay marker.

description_en: The dried root of Dipsacus asper (Caprifoliaceae). Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Bitter, pungent, and slightly warm, it supplements the Liver and Kidney, strengthens sinews and bones, knits fractures, and stops uterine flooding. Its name literally means 'mend the broken.'

actions.en: Astringe the intestines and stop diarrhea

indications.en: Chronic diarrhea and chronic dysentery
Bloody stools and uterine flooding
Chronic non-healing sores (topical)

contraindications_zh: 湿热积滞泻痢初起者忌用。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated at onset of damp-heat accumulation diarrhea or dysentery. Use with caution in pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 布包入煎剂；外用研末撒敷

processing_methods.name: 赤石脂
processing_methods.effect: 涩肠止血

safety_notes_zh: 矿物药（含水硅酸铝）。入煎剂需布包。不宜与肉桂同用（十九畏）。矿物类药材需注意重金属含量检测。
safety_notes_en: Mineral medicinal (hydrated aluminum silicate). Must be wrapped in cloth when decocted. Avoid combining with rou gui per the Nineteen Fears (shijiuwei). Heavy metal content should be monitored.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，温。主泻痢，肠辟脓血，阴蚀下血赤白。

description_zh: 硅酸盐类矿物多水高岭土的一种红色块状体。归胃、大肠经。甘酸涩温，涩肠止泻、收敛止血、外用敛疮生肌，为矿物类收涩药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 含水硅酸铝（多水高岭土）

summary.zh: 赤石脂主含含水硅酸铝，具有吸附肠道毒素与水分、保护肠道黏膜的作用，外用可促进创面愈合。
summary.en: Chi shi zhi is primarily hydrated aluminum silicate; absorbs intestinal toxins and moisture, protects intestinal mucosa, and topically promotes wound healing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以硅铝含量及重金属限度为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses silica-alumina content and heavy metal limits as quality control markers.

description_en: A red block of halloysite, a hydrated aluminum silicate mineral. Enters the Stomach and Large Intestine channels. Sweet, sour, astringent, and warm, it astringes the intestines and stops diarrhea, stanches bleeding, and topically closes sores to generate flesh. A mineral astringent.

actions.en: Astringe the intestines and stop diarrhea

indications.en: Chronic diarrhea and chronic dysentery
Uterine flooding, spotting, and leukorrhea

contraindications_zh: 实邪积滞者禁用。孕妇慎用。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in repletion pathogen accumulation. Use with caution in pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 宜先煎或布包入煎

processing_methods.name: 禹余粮
processing_methods.effect: 涩肠止泻力增

safety_notes_zh: 矿物药（褐铁矿含水氧化铁）。需注意重金属含量检测。入煎剂宜先煎或布包。
safety_notes_en: Mineral medicinal (limonite, hydrated iron oxide). Heavy metal content should be monitored. Should be decocted first or wrapped in cloth when decocted.

classical_references.passage: 味甘，寒。主咳逆，寒热烦满，下赤白，血闭症瘕。久服轻身延年。

description_zh: 氢氧化物类矿物褐铁矿。归胃、大肠经。甘涩微寒，涩肠止泻、收敛止血止带，功似赤石脂而性偏凉。矿物药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 禹余粮主含含水氧化铁，具有吸附收敛作用，外用可覆盖保护创面。
summary.en: Yu yu liang is primarily hydrated iron oxide; provides adsorptive and astringent action, and can cover and protect wound surfaces topically.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以铁含量及重金属限度为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses iron content and heavy metal limits as quality control markers.

description_en: Limonite, a hydrated iron oxide mineral. Enters the Stomach and Large Intestine channels. Sweet, astringent, and slightly cold, it astringes the intestines, stops diarrhea, stanches bleeding, and stops leukorrhea. Similar to chi shi zhi but slightly cool in nature. A mineral astringent.

actions.en: Brighten the eyes and remove pterygium
Absorb dampness, stop itching, and close sores

indications.en: Red eyes with pterygium, blepharitis

indications.zh: 溃疡不敛，湿疮，皮肤瘙痒
indications.en: Non-healing ulcers, damp sores, and skin pruritus

contraindications_zh: 仅供外用，不可内服。
contraindications_en: For external use only — not for internal administration.

dosage_range.notes: 外用适量，水飞后研细末撒敷或调敷

processing_methods.name: 煅炉甘石
processing_methods.effect: 明目退翳，收湿敛疮

safety_notes_zh: 矿物药，仅供外用。主含碳酸锌，不可内服，误服可致恶心呕吐、腹痛。眼部使用需充分水飞研细。
safety_notes_en: Mineral medicinal for external use only. Primarily zinc carbonate — ingestion causes nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Ophthalmic use requires thorough levigation (water grinding) to ultrafine powder.

classical_references.passage: 炉甘石，甘平。治目赤涩翳，烂弦风眼。

description_zh: 碳酸盐类矿物菱锌矿。归胃、肝经。甘平，外用明目退翳、收湿止痒敛疮。仅供外用，为眼科与皮肤科常用矿物药。
