verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 炉甘石煅后主含氧化锌，具有收敛、防腐、保护创面及止痒作用，为皮肤科常用外用药。
summary.en: After calcination, lu gan shi is primarily zinc oxide; provides astringent, antiseptic, wound-protective, and antipruritic effects. A common dermatological topical agent.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 炉甘石洗剂治疗湿疹、皮炎
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Calamine lotion for eczema and dermatitis

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》以氧化锌含量为质量控制指标。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia uses zinc oxide content as quality control marker.

description_en: Smithsonite (zinc carbonate mineral), processed by calcination and levigation. Enters the Stomach and Liver channels. Sweet and neutral, used exclusively topically to brighten the eyes, remove pterygium, absorb dampness, stop itching, and close sores. A mineral medicinal for external use only.

indications.en: Sore, swollen throat and mouth ulcers
Red eyes with pterygium

contraindications_zh: 有毒，不宜内服大量或久服。孕妇禁用。
contraindications_en: Toxic — not for large-dose or prolonged internal use. Contraindicated in pregnancy.

dosage_range.notes: 多外用含化或研末吹喉；内服入丸散

processing_methods.name: 硼砂
processing_methods.effect: 清热解毒

safety_notes_zh: 有毒矿物药。硼砂为含硼矿物，大量摄入可致恶心呕吐、腹泻、皮疹，严重中毒致肝肾损害。国家已禁止在食品中添加。外用为主要用法。孕妇禁用。
safety_notes_en: TOXIC mineral medicinal. Borax (sodium borate) in large doses causes nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, and rash; severe toxicity leads to hepatorenal damage. Banned as a food additive in China. Primarily for external/topical use. Contraindicated in pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 硼砂，消痰止嗽，治骨鲠。

description_zh: 硼酸盐类矿物硼砂的结晶体。归肺、胃经。甘咸凉有毒，清热消痰、解毒防腐，外用治咽喉口腔疾患。有毒矿物药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 硼砂含四硼酸钠，具有抑菌、抗真菌及防腐作用，外用可治咽喉口腔炎症。口服有毒。
summary.en: Peng sha contains sodium tetraborate; provides antibacterial, antifungal, and antiseptic effects topically for oropharyngeal inflammation. Oral ingestion is toxic.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定硼含量与毒性限度。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies boron content and toxicity limits.

description_en: Crystalline borax (sodium tetraborate decahydrate). Enters the Lung and Stomach channels. Sweet, salty, cool, and toxic. Clears heat, dispels phlegm, resolves toxicity, and prevents putrefaction. Primarily for topical/external use in throat and oral conditions. A toxic mineral medicinal.

indications.en: Carbuncles, boils, sores, and snake/insect bites
Abdominal pain from parasitic accumulation
Malaria

contraindications_zh: 有毒，含砷化合物。内服须严格控制用量，不可久服。孕妇禁用。不可与硝石、矾石同用（十八反中某些说法）。忌火煅（加热产生剧毒三氧化二砷）。
contraindications_en: TOXIC — contains arsenic compounds. Internal dosage must be strictly controlled; not for prolonged use. Contraindicated in pregnancy. NEVER heat or calcine (produces highly toxic arsenic trioxide). Avoid combining with nitreous minerals.

dosage_range.notes: 内服0.05-0.1g入丸散；外用适量研末撒敷或调敷

processing_methods.name: 雄黄
processing_methods.effect: 减毒外用

safety_notes_zh: 剧毒矿物药。雄黄主含二硫化二砷(As₂S₂)，加热或氧化可转化为剧毒的三氧化二砷（砒霜）。严禁火煅！内服极少量入丸散用，严禁入汤剂煎煮。急性中毒表现为恶心呕吐、腹痛腹泻、肝肾损害；慢性砷中毒可致皮肤色素沉着、周围神经病变、肝硬化及多器官癌变。孕妇绝对禁用。
safety_notes_en: HIGHLY TOXIC mineral medicinal. Realgar is primarily arsenic disulfide (As₂S₂); heating or oxidation converts it to lethal arsenic trioxide (pi shuang). NEVER calcine or heat. Internal use is strictly limited to minute doses in pills/powder — NEVER decoct. Acute toxicity: nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, hepatorenal damage. Chronic arsenic poisoning causes skin pigmentation, peripheral neuropathy, cirrhosis, and multi-organ carcinogenesis. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，平，寒。主寒热，鼠瘘，恶疮，疽痔，死肌，杀百虫毒。

description_zh: 硫化物类矿物雄黄族雄黄。归肝、大肠经。苦辛温有大毒，以外用为主，解毒杀虫、燥湿祛痰。含砷化合物，严禁火煅。剧毒药物，使用需极度谨慎。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 雄黄含二硫化二砷，具有杀虫抑菌作用。现代研究发现砷化合物对急性早幼粒细胞白血病有效（复方黄黛片），但毒性极大。
summary.en: Xiong huang contains arsenic disulfide; provides antiparasitic and antibacterial effects. Modern research identified arsenic compounds as effective in acute promyelocytic leukemia (Compound Realgar-Indigo Tablets), but toxicity is extreme.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 急性早幼粒细胞白血病（复方黄黛片，专科用药）
modern_clinical_uses.indication_en: Acute promyelocytic leukemia (Compound Realgar-Indigo Tablets, specialist use)

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》严格规定砷含量限度、水飞法制备及禁止火煅。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia strictly specifies arsenic content limits, levigation preparation, and prohibition of calcination.

description_en: Realgar, an arsenic disulfide (As₂S₂) mineral. Enters the Liver and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, pungent, warm, and highly toxic. Primarily for external use to resolve toxicity and kill parasites. NEVER heat or calcine. A highly toxic mineral requiring extreme caution; modern use is largely restricted to specialist oncology applications.

indications.en: Festering sores and ulcers, syphilitic chancre
Scabies and damp sores

contraindications_zh: 剧毒含汞药物，严禁内服。孕妇、哺乳期及儿童绝对禁用。不可长期或大面积外用。
contraindications_en: HIGHLY TOXIC mercury compound — strictly for external use only, never internal. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy, lactation, and children. Do not apply long-term or to large body surface areas.

dosage_range.notes: 仅外用适量，研末调敷。严禁内服。

processing_methods.name: 轻粉
processing_methods.effect: 外用杀虫敛疮

safety_notes_zh: 剧毒含汞药物！轻粉为氯化亚汞（Hg₂Cl₂），汞离子可经皮肤吸收。严禁内服——历史上内服致汞中毒的病例极多。汞中毒可致口腔溃疡、流涎、震颤、肾损害、精神异常甚至死亡。现代仅限小面积短期外用。不可用于破损皮肤。孕妇、哺乳期及儿童绝对禁用。
safety_notes_en: EXTREMELY TOXIC mercury compound! Qing fen is mercurous chloride (Hg₂Cl₂) — mercury ions are absorbed through skin. NEVER for internal use — historical internal use caused widespread mercury poisoning. Mercury toxicity causes oral ulceration, salivation, tremor, renal damage, psychiatric disturbance, and death. Modern use is strictly limited to small-area, short-term topical application only. Never apply to broken skin. Absolutely contraindicated in pregnancy, lactation, and children.

classical_references.passage: 轻粉，味辛，寒。主治疮疡溃烂，杀虫。

description_zh: 氯化亚汞（Hg₂Cl₂）经升华法制取的白色结晶粉末。归大肠、小肠经。辛寒有大毒，仅供外用，杀虫攻毒敛疮。剧毒含汞药物，现代使用极为有限。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 轻粉含氯化亚汞，外用有杀菌、杀虫、敛疮作用。汞离子经皮吸收积蓄可致全身汞中毒。现代已基本被更安全的药物替代。
summary.en: Qing fen contains mercurous chloride; topically provides antibacterial, antiparasitic, and wound-closing effects. Percutaneous mercury absorption causes systemic mercury poisoning. Largely superseded by safer modern alternatives.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载但严格限制使用，仅限外用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia but strictly restricted to external use only.

description_en: White crystalline powder of mercurous chloride (Hg₂Cl₂) obtained by sublimation. Enters the Large and Small Intestine channels. Pungent, cold, and extremely toxic. External use only — kills parasites, attacks toxicity, and closes sores. A highly toxic mercury compound; modern use is virtually obsolete.

indications.en: Wind-stroke with phlegm obstruction, epilepsy
Throat impediment
Scabies (topical)

contraindications_zh: 剧毒，正气虚弱者禁用。孕妇禁用。不宜与诸参、芍药、细辛同用（十八反）。
contraindications_en: HIGHLY TOXIC — contraindicated in weak constitution. Contraindicated in pregnancy. Per the Eighteen Antagonisms (shiba fan), do not use with ren shen, dan shen, sha shen, xuan shen, ku shen, xi xin, or shao yao.

dosage_range.notes: 内服0.3-0.6g入丸散；外用适量研末调敷。现代极少内服。

processing_methods.name: 藜芦
processing_methods.effect: 涌吐风痰

safety_notes_zh: 剧毒药物！藜芦含多种甾体生物碱（藜芦碱、芥芬胺等），极小剂量即可引起剧烈呕吐，过量致严重心律失常（心动过缓、房室传导阻滞）、血压骤降、呼吸抑制，可致死亡。中毒救治困难。十八反明确规定不可与人参、沙参、丹参、玄参、苦参、细辛、芍药同用。现代几乎不用于内服。
safety_notes_en: HIGHLY TOXIC! Li lu contains steroidal alkaloids (veratridine, jervine, etc.); even small doses cause violent vomiting. Overdose produces severe bradycardia, AV block, precipitous hypotension, and respiratory depression — potentially fatal. Treatment of poisoning is difficult. The Eighteen Antagonisms explicitly prohibit combination with ren shen, sha shen, dan shen, xuan shen, ku shen, xi xin, and shao yao. Virtually never used internally in modern practice.

classical_references.passage: 味辛，寒。主蛊毒，咳逆，泄痢，肠辟，头疡，疥瘙，恶疮，杀诸虫毒，去死肌。

description_zh: 百合科植物黑藜芦的干燥根及根茎。归肺、胃、肝经。苦辛寒有大毒，涌吐风痰力猛，外用杀虫。十八反药物，现代极少使用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 藜芦含藜芦碱等甾体生物碱，作用于钠通道与迷走神经，致呕吐、心动过缓、低血压。环杷明为 Hedgehog 信号通路抑制剂，已用于抗肿瘤研究。
summary.en: Li lu contains steroidal alkaloids (veratridine, jervine, cyclopamine) acting on sodium channels and vagal tone, causing emesis, bradycardia, and hypotension. Cyclopamine is a Hedgehog pathway inhibitor studied in oncology.

modern_clinical_uses.indication_zh: 几乎不再临床使用（毒性大）

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》规定藜芦碱限量，并强调十八反配伍禁忌。
evidence_notes.note_en: Chinese Pharmacopoeia specifies veratridine limits and emphasizes Eighteen Antagonisms contraindications.

description_en: The dried root and rhizome of Veratrum nigrum (Liliaceae). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Liver channels. Bitter, pungent, cold, and highly toxic. Induces violent vomiting of wind-phlegm and kills parasites topically. Subject to Eighteen Antagonisms restrictions. Virtually obsolete in modern internal medicine due to extreme toxicity.

actions.en: Induce vomiting of phlegm and food

indications.en: Phlegm-drool obstruction
Food stagnation lodged in the upper epigastrium

contraindications_zh: 有毒，体虚、孕妇、失血者禁用。不可与中药乌头类合用。
contraindications_en: Toxic — contraindicated in weak constitution, pregnancy, and active bleeding. Do not use with aconite-class herbs.

dosage_range.notes: 研末吞服，得吐即止；亦可配赤小豆散用

processing_methods.name: 瓜蒂
processing_methods.effect: 涌吐力强

safety_notes_zh: 有毒。催吐作用猛烈，用量需谨慎。过量引起剧烈呕吐不止、脱水。体弱、上部出血、孕妇、心脏病患者禁用。现代极少使用。
safety_notes_en: Toxic. Powerful emetic — dosage must be carefully controlled. Overdose causes intractable vomiting and dehydration. Contraindicated in weak constitution, upper-body bleeding, pregnancy, and cardiac disease. Rarely used in modern practice.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主大水，身面四肢浮肿，下水，杀蛊毒。

description_zh: 葫芦科植物甜瓜的干燥果蒂。归胃经。苦寒有毒，涌吐痰食力猛，为古代涌吐法之常用药，现代极少使用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 瓜蒂含葫芦素B等三萜类，刺激胃黏膜引起反射性呕吐，并有保肝与抗肿瘤研究。
summary.en: Gua di contains cucurbitacin B and other triterpenoids; stimulates gastric mucosa to induce reflex vomiting. Hepatoprotective and antitumor potential under investigation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载瓜蒂，规定含量限度与毒性警示。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia with content limits and toxicity warnings.

description_en: The dried fruit pedicel of Cucumis melo (Cucurbitaceae). Enters the Stomach channel. Bitter, cold, and toxic. A powerful emetic that induces vomiting of phlegm and stagnant food. A classical emetic herb now virtually obsolete in modern clinical practice.

indications.en: Wind-phlegm obstruction
Oral sores and gingival ulcers (topical)
Blepharitis (topical)

contraindications_zh: 剧毒，不宜内服。体虚者禁用涌吐。
contraindications_en: HIGHLY TOXIC — not suitable for internal use. Emetic application contraindicated in weak constitution.

dosage_range.notes: 涌吐0.3-0.6g（极少使用）；外用适量研末调敷

processing_methods.name: 胆矾
processing_methods.effect: 涌吐解毒

safety_notes_zh: 剧毒矿物药！胆矾为硫酸铜（CuSO₄·5H₂O），内服极易致铜中毒——剧烈恶心呕吐、腹痛、血尿、溶血、肝衰竭，大量可致死。现代基本不用于内服。外用可致皮肤刺激。
safety_notes_en: EXTREMELY TOXIC mineral! Dan fan is copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O). Oral ingestion readily causes copper poisoning — violent vomiting, abdominal pain, hematuria, hemolysis, and hepatic failure; large doses are lethal. Virtually never used internally in modern practice. Topical use may cause skin irritation.

classical_references.passage: 胆矾，味酸涩，寒。主明目，目痛，金疮，诸痫痉。

description_zh: 硫酸盐类矿物胆矾的晶体。归肝、胆经。酸寒有大毒，涌吐风痰、外用解毒收湿。剧毒含铜矿物药，现代极少使用。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 胆矾含硫酸铜，低剂量刺激胃黏膜引起呕吐，外用有抑菌收敛作用。铜离子毒性极大，现代已基本弃用内服。
summary.en: Dan fan contains copper sulfate; at low doses stimulates gastric mucosa to induce vomiting. Topically has antibacterial and astringent effects. Copper ion toxicity is extreme — internal use is essentially abandoned in modern practice.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 《中国药典》收载但标注剧毒，严格限制使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Listed in Chinese Pharmacopoeia but labeled as highly toxic with strict use restrictions.

description_en: Crystal of chalcanthite, copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O). Enters the Liver and Gallbladder channels. Sour, cold, and extremely toxic. Induces vomiting of wind-phlegm; topically resolves toxicity and absorbs dampness. A highly toxic copper compound; modern clinical use is virtually obsolete.

description_zh: 蜂蜜为蜜蜂科昆虫中华蜜蜂等所酿之蜜。味甘性平，入肺、脾、大肠经，能润肠通便、润肺止咳、补中缓急。
description_en: Honey produced by Apis cerana and related species. Sweet and neutral, entering the Lung, Spleen, and Large Intestine channels. Moistens the intestines to free the stool, moistens the Lung to stop cough, and supplements the center to moderate urgency.

actions.en: Moisten the intestines and free the stool
Moisten the Lung and stop cough
Supplement the center and moderate urgency

indications.en: Intestinal dryness constipation
Lung dryness cough
Epigastric and abdominal vacuity pain

contraindications_zh: 湿热痰滞、中满痞胀者慎用。
contraindications_en: Use with caution in dampness-heat phlegm stagnation or center fullness and glomus distension.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 酚酸、黄酮（白杨素、松属素）

summary.zh: 蜂蜜主要由单糖组成，含酚类化合物和葡萄糖氧化酶，具润肠通便、抗菌、抗氧化和伤口愈合作用。
summary.en: Feng Mi consists mostly of monosaccharides with phenolic compounds and glucose oxidase, producing intestinal-moistening, antibacterial, antioxidant, and wound-healing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 蜂蜜甘平，补中，润燥，止痛，解毒；婴幼儿忌用（肉毒杆菌风险）。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-neutral; tonifies the middle, moistens dryness, alleviates pain, and resolves toxin; contraindicated in infants under 1 year due to botulism risk.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列蜂蜜用于咳嗽、轻度伤口辅助愈合。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists honey for cough and adjunctive wound care.

classical_references.passage: （石蜜）味甘，平。主心腹邪气，诸惊痫痉，安五脏诸不足，益气补中，止痛解毒，除众病，和百药。

description_zh: 松科植物红松的干燥成熟种仁。归肺、肝、大肠经。甘温质润多脂，润肺止咳、润肠通便，兼能养液息风。尤宜老年或热病后津亏肠燥之大便秘结，以及肺燥干咳少痰、虚风内动之眩晕。
description_en: The dried ripe seed kernel of Pinus koraiensis (Pinaceae). Enters the Lung, Liver, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet and warm with a rich, oily quality, Song Zi Ren moistens the lungs and stops cough, lubricates the intestines to free the stool, and nourishes fluids to extinguish internal wind. Commonly used for dry cough in elderly or post-febrile patients and for constipation due to fluid insufficiency.

actions.en: Moisten the intestines and free the stool
Moisten the Lung and stop cough

indications.en: Intestinal dryness constipation
Lung dryness cough
Dry skin

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 脂肪油（油酸、亚油酸、松油酸）
active_constituents.notes: ~70% of seed weight; pinolenic acid distinctive to pine

summary.zh: 松子仁富含脂肪油（含松油酸）、蛋白质、维生素 E 和植物甾醇，具润肠通便、养液润肺和抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Song Zi Ren is rich in fatty oil (including pinolenic acid), protein, vitamin E, and phytosterols with intestinal-moistening, lung-nourishing, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 松子仁甘温，润肠通便，养液息风，润肺止咳。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-warm; moistens the intestines, nourishes fluids, and moistens the lung to stop cough.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）松子仁味甘小温，主润五脏，不饥，治诸风温肠胃，虚秘燥咳，尤宜老人。

description_zh: 瓜蒌仁——葫芦科植物栝楼的干燥成熟种子，为瓜蒌药材中取用种子的部分（果实、皮、根分用）。归肺、胃、大肠经。甘寒滑利质润，润肠通便兼清化热痰，较全瓜蒌更偏润下。
description_en: Mature seed of Gua Lou (Trichosanthes kirilowii, Cucurbitaceae) — the seed portion of the parent herb Gua Lou (whose fruit, peel, and root are each used separately). Enters the Lung, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Sweet and cold with a slippery, oily quality; moistens the intestines to free the stool and clears and transforms heat-phlegm, emphasizing the lubricating action over the parent's broader chest-opening effect.

actions.en: Moisten the intestines and free the stool
Open the chest and dissipate binds

indications.en: Intestinal dryness constipation
Phlegm-heat cough
Chest impediment and chest oppression

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 瓜蒌仁富含脂肪油（石榴酸和栝楼酸为特征共轭脂肪酸）、蛋白质和三萜皂苷，具润肠通便、化痰和降血脂作用。
summary.en: Gua Lou Ren is rich in fatty oil with characteristic conjugated fatty acids (punicic and trichosanic acid), protein, and triterpene saponins producing intestinal-moistening, phlegm-transforming, and hypolipidemic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 瓜蒌仁甘寒，润肺化痰，润肠通便。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cold; moistens the lung, transforms phlegm, and moistens the intestines.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）栝楼仁润肺燥，降火，治咳嗽涤痰结，利咽喉，止消渴。

description_zh: 银地——即银柴胡，石竹科植物银柴胡的干燥根，完整药理见银柴胡主条。归肝、胃经。甘微寒，清虚热而不伤阴，退骨蒸潮热、除疳热，为治阴虚劳热之要药。
description_en: Alternate-slug entry for Yin Chai Hu — the dried root of Stellaria dichotoma (Caryophyllaceae); see the primary Yin Chai Hu entry for full pharmacology. Enters the Liver and Stomach channels. Sweet and slightly cold; clears vacuity-heat without damaging yin and abates infantile nutritional-impairment fever, a key medicinal for tidal fever in yin-vacuity consumption.

indications.en: Yin vacuity fever and steaming bone tidal heat
Infantile malnutrition heat
Postpartum vacuity-heat

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 银地（银柴胡别名/变体）主要成分与银柴胡类似，含植物甾醇、环肽及多糖，具退虚热、解热、抗炎作用。
summary.en: Yin Di (a local-name variant of Yin Chai Hu) shares Yin Chai Hu's principal constituents—phytosterols, cyclic peptides, and polysaccharides—with steaming-heat-relieving, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 银柴胡（含银地之异名）甘微寒，清虚热除疳热。
evidence_notes.note_en: Yin Chai Hu (including the Yin Di variant) is sweet and slightly cold, clearing vacuity heat and pediatric gan-heat.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）银州柴胡者最良，治虚劳发热为专。银地乃其别名。

description_zh: 即秦艽，龙胆科植物秦艽等的干燥根，完整药理见秦艽主条。归胃、肝、胆经。苦辛平，祛风湿、舒筋络、清虚热、退黄疸，为治风湿痹痛、骨蒸潮热之常用药。
description_en: Alternate-slug entry for Qin Jiao — the dried root of Gentiana macrophylla or related Gentiana species (Gentianaceae); see the primary Qin Jiao entry for full pharmacology. Enters the Stomach, Liver, and Gallbladder channels. Bitter, acrid, and neutral; dispels wind-damp, relaxes the sinews and network vessels, clears vacuity-heat, and abates jaundice.

indications.en: Steaming bone tidal heat
Wind-damp impediment pain
Damp-heat jaundice

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 秦艽含裂环烯醚萜苷（龙胆苦苷）和生物碱（秦艽碱甲、乙），具抗炎、镇痛、解热和降压作用。
summary.en: Qin Jiao contains secoiridoid glycosides (gentiopicroside) and pyridine alkaloids (gentianine, gentianidine) with anti-inflammatory, analgesic, antipyretic, and hypotensive effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 秦艽辛苦平，祛风湿，清湿热，止痹痛。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-bitter and neutral; dispels wind-damp, clears damp-heat, and alleviates impediment pain.

classical_references.passage: （秦艽）味苦，平。主寒热邪气，寒湿风痹，肢节痛，下水，利小便。

description_zh: 伞形科植物白花前胡或紫花前胡的干燥根。归肺经。苦辛微寒，降气化痰、散风清热，既善治肺热咳喘、痰黄稠粘、胸膈满闷，又可疏散风热，常与杏仁、桑叶等配伍治外感风热咳嗽。
description_en: The dried root of Peucedanum praeruptorum or P. decursivum (Apiaceae). Enters the Lung channel. Bitter, acrid, and slightly cold, Qian Hu downbears lung qi and transforms phlegm, and at the same time scatters wind and clears heat — a dual action that suits it particularly well for cough with profuse yellow phlegm and chest oppression from wind-heat invasion or phlegm-heat obstructing the lung. Commonly paired with Xing Ren and Sang Ye.

indications.en: Phlegm-heat cough
Externally contracted wind-heat cough
Thick difficult-to-expectorate phlegm

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 前胡含吡喃香豆素（白花前胡甲乙素）、紫花前胡苷和挥发油，具扩张血管、降血压、祛痰、解痉作用。
summary.en: Qian Hu contains pyranocoumarins (praeruptorin A/B), coumarin glycosides, and volatile oil with vasodilator, hypotensive, expectorant, and antispasmodic effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 前胡苦辛微寒，降气化痰，散风清热。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-acrid and slightly cold; descends qi, transforms phlegm, and disperses wind-heat.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）前胡能散风邪，下气消痰，治伤寒寒热，热气在胸，实喘满咳。

description_zh: 半夏加面粉等辅料发酵制成的曲剂。归脾、胃经。在半夏化痰止咳基础上增消食和胃之功，用于痰湿咳嗽兼食积不化、脘腹胀满。
description_en: Fermented leaven preparation of Ban Xia (Pinellia ternata rhizome) combined with flour and other aromatic herbs. Derived from the same Spleen and Stomach channel entry as parent Ban Xia but with added food-dispersing and stomach-harmonizing functions, used for phlegm-damp cough accompanied by food stagnation and indigestion.

actions.en: Disperse food and harmonize the stomach

indications.en: Cough with copious phlegm
Food stagnation without transformation
Epigastric and abdominal distension and oppression

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal irritant; markedly reduced by fermentation/processing

summary.zh: 半夏曲为半夏经加工发酵制成的曲剂，保留止呕化痰作用而刺激性和毒性显著降低，兼有消食化滞之功。
summary.en: Ban Xia Qu is fermented processed Pinellia which retains antiemetic and phlegm-transforming activity while markedly reducing irritancy and toxicity; it additionally has food-digesting effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 半夏曲辛平，化痰止咳，消食除胀，较生半夏毒性降低。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-neutral; transforms phlegm, stops cough, and resolves food stagnation; markedly less toxic than raw Pinellia.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）半夏以生姜制为曲，燥湿化痰之力较纯，而性稍缓，治痰湿食积胀满尤效。

description_zh: 小檗科植物南天竹的干燥成熟果实。归肺经。甘苦平，有小毒，止咳平喘，主治久咳、气喘、百日咳。因含氰苷成分，用量不宜过大，常配百部、款冬花等润肺之品以缓其燥性、扩大应用范围。
description_en: The dried ripe fruit of Nandina domestica (Berberidaceae). Enters the Lung channel. Sweet, bitter, and neutral with slight toxicity, Tian Zhu Zi stops cough and calms panting, and is traditionally used for chronic cough, wheezing, and whooping cough in children. Should be used in moderate dose owing to its cyanogenic constituents; combining with moistening herbs such as Bai Bu or Kuan Dong Hua tempers its acridity and broadens its clinical application.

actions.en: Constrain the Lung and downbear qi

indications.en: Cough and asthma
Whooping cough
Lung vacuity chronic cough

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 天竺子含阿朴啡类生物碱及微量氰苷，具平喘止咳作用；过量因释放氢氰酸可致中毒。
summary.en: Tian Zhu Zi contains aporphine alkaloids and trace cyanogenic glycosides with antitussive and antiasthmatic effects; overdose releases hydrocyanic acid producing toxicity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 天竺子酸甘平，有小毒，敛肺止咳，平喘。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sour-sweet and neutral with mild toxicity; astringes the lung, stops cough, and calms wheezing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 南天竹所含生物碱及氰苷可致呕吐、中枢抑制，须严格限量。
evidence_notes.note_en: Nandina alkaloids and cyanogenic glycosides can cause vomiting and CNS depression; dosage must be strictly limited.

classical_references.passage: 天竺（南天竹）果味酸甘平小毒，敛肺止咳，久咳喘息用之。

description_zh: 皂角刺——豆科植物皂荚的干燥棘刺，与皂荚（果实）同源而用刺。归肝、胃经。辛温，消肿排脓、透脓溃坚、搜风杀虫，较皂荚更善于溃脓消疮，用于痈疽初起或脓成不溃。
description_en: The dried thorn of Gleditsia sinensis (Fabaceae) — the spine of the same plant whose fruit is Zao Jia (Chinese honeylocust fruit). Enters the Liver and Stomach channels. Acrid and warm; disperses swelling, expels pus, pierces fixed masses, and searches out wind to kill parasites, preferred over the parent fruit when the clinical focus is on abscess breakthrough and sore-toxin dispersal.

actions.en: Search out wind and kill parasites

indications.en: Early-stage welling-abscess and flat-abscess
Breast welling-abscess (mastitis)
Scabies and tinea

contraindications_zh: 孕妇禁用。痈疽已溃者不宜。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy. Not suitable for already-ulcerated welling-abscesses.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 皂角刺含三萜皂苷、黄酮和鞣质，具抗菌、抗炎、消痈排脓和抗肿瘤作用，为痈肿疮毒常用药。
summary.en: Zao Jiao Ci contains triterpene saponins, flavonoids, and tannins with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, pus-draining, and antineoplastic effects; used for abscess and toxin-sores.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 皂角刺辛温，消肿托毒，排脓杀虫。
evidence_notes.note_en: Acrid-warm; reduces swelling, expels toxin, drains pus, and kills parasites.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）皂荚刺治痈肿无头者，能引之出头；疮肿已溃者不用。

description_zh: 大青叶（十字花科植物菘蓝的干燥叶）的备用索引条目，完整药理与文献见大青叶主条。苦咸大寒，清热解毒、凉血消斑，用于温病发斑、咽喉肿毒。
description_en: Alternate-entry record of Da Qing Ye (dried leaf of Isatis indigotica, Brassicaceae) retained for legacy indexing. See the primary Da Qing Ye entry for full pharmacology and classical references. Bitter, salty, and very cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools the blood, and disperses macules in warm-disease eruptions and throat toxin.

actions.en: Cool the blood and disperse macules
Disinhibit the throat and disperse swelling

indications.zh: 温病热入营血、发斑发疹
indications.en: Warm disease heat entering the construction-blood, macules and papules
Throat impediment and sore throat
Cinnabar toxin (erysipelas) and mumps

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 大青叶（本条为变体/重复条目）含靛蓝、靛玉红等吲哚类色素，具抗病毒、抗菌、抗炎和抗白血病细胞作用。
summary.en: This Da Qing Ye variant contains the same indigo/indirubin/tryptanthrin indole pigments as the canonical entry, with antiviral, antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antileukemic activity.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 大青叶苦寒，清热解毒，凉血消斑。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood, and resolves eruptions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）大青气寒味苦咸，能解心胃热毒。

description_zh: 生地黄炒炭后的加工品。归心、肝、肾经。凉血止血力增强，寒性缓和，用于血热妄行之吐血、咯血、崩漏而生地黄寒性过甚者。
description_en: Charred processed form of Sheng Di Huang (Rehmannia glutinosa root). Retains entry into the same Heart, Liver, and Kidney channels but with strengthened blood-cooling hemostatic action and moderated cold nature, making it suitable for blood-heat hemorrhage — hematemesis, hemoptysis, flooding and spotting — where unprocessed Sheng Di Huang would be too cooling.

actions.en: Cool the blood and stanch bleeding

indications.en: Blood-heat bleeding
Hematemesis and epistaxis
Flooding and spotting with downward bleeding

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 生地炭为生地黄炒炭而成，其炭化结构增强收敛止血作用，同时保留部分凉血功效。
summary.en: Sheng Di Tan is charred Rehmannia; carbonization enhances astringent hemostatic action while partially preserving blood-cooling function.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 生地炭甘寒，凉血止血，用于血热妄行之出血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cold; cools blood and stops bleeding, used for blood-heat reckless movement patterns.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）地黄生用凉血，制炭增其止血之功，治吐衄崩漏诸血证。

description_zh: 紫河车（人体胎盘的干燥炮制品）的备用索引条目，完整资料见紫河车主条。甘咸温，大补气血、益精养血，为血肉有情之品，用于气血精亏之劳损诸证。
description_en: Alternate-entry record of Zi He Che (dried prepared human placenta). See the primary Zi He Che entry for full pharmacology, safety, and sourcing notes. Sweet, salty, and warm; greatly supplements qi and blood, boosts essence and marrow — a sentient flesh-and-blood medicinal used for severe qi-blood-essence depletion.

actions.en: Supplement the Kidney and boost essence

indications.en: Qi and blood insufficiency
Essence-blood depletion
Kidney vacuity asthma and cough

dosage_range.notes: 研末吞服

safety_notes_zh: 取自人体组织，存在伦理争议及感染风险，现代临床使用受限。
safety_notes_en: Derived from human tissue with ethical concerns and infection risks; modern clinical use is restricted.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: includes hCG, progesterone, steroid and peptide hormones

active_constituents.name_zh: 免疫球蛋白及类干扰素因子

summary.zh: 紫河车（人胎盘）含多种蛋白、激素、免疫球蛋白及多糖，具免疫调节、抗贫血、补益精血作用；存在血源性病原体污染风险，须严格处理。
summary.en: Zi He Che (human placenta) contains proteins, hormones, immunoglobulins, and polysaccharides with immunomodulatory, antianemic, and blood-essence-supplementing effects; carries risk of bloodborne pathogen contamination requiring strict processing.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 紫河车甘咸温，温肾补精，益气养血。现代因病原体风险，多国限制使用。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-salty and warm; warms the kidney, supplements essence, and tonifies qi and blood. Pathogen transmission risk has led to regulatory restrictions in many jurisdictions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 人胎盘制剂存在乙肝、HIV 等血源性病原体传播风险；多国已禁用或严格管制。
evidence_notes.note_en: Human placenta preparations carry risk of transmitting HBV, HIV, and other bloodborne pathogens; banned or strictly regulated in many jurisdictions.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）紫河车，其功甚伟，治男女一切虚损劳极，不足之症，益气血，补精髓。

description_zh: 当归身——伞形科植物当归主根（身）部分，与当归头、当归尾分用。归心、肝、脾经。补血力强于全当归，活血作用较弱，适用于血虚无明显瘀滞之证。
description_en: Dang Gui Shen — the main root body of Dang Gui (Angelica sinensis, Apiaceae), as distinct from the head (Dang Gui Tou) and tail (Dang Gui Wei). Enters the same Heart, Liver, and Spleen channels as whole Dang Gui but with markedly stronger blood-supplementing action and weaker blood-invigorating effect, suited to blood-vacuity patterns without significant stasis.

actions.en: Harmonize the construction and nourish the blood
Moisten the intestines and free the stool

indications.en: Blood vacuity with sallow complexion
Heart palpitations and insomnia
Menstrual irregularity

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 当归身（当归的主根部分）含挥发油（藁本内酯）、阿魏酸和多糖，以补血养血为专长。
summary.en: Dang Gui Shen (the main root of Angelica sinensis) contains volatile oil (ligustilide), ferulic acid, and polysaccharides, specializing in blood tonification.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 当归身甘辛温，养血补血。当归全身活血，头身偏补，尾偏破血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-acrid and warm; principally tonifies blood. The whole root harmonizes blood; the body (shen) tonifies, the tail disperses.

classical_references.passage: （当归）味甘，温。主咳逆上气，温疟寒热洗洗在皮肤中，妇人漏下绝子，诸恶疮疡金疮。

description_zh: 蓼科植物何首乌的干燥藤茎，与何首乌同源而用茎，别名夜交藤。归心、肝经。甘平，养血安神、祛风通络，用于血虚不寐、血虚身痛及风湿痹痛。
description_en: The dried vine stem of Polygonum multiflorum (Polygonaceae) — the same plant as He Shou Wu but using the stem rather than the tuberous root. Also known as Ye Jiao Teng. Enters the Heart and Liver channels. Sweet and neutral; nourishes Heart blood, quiets the spirit, dispels wind, and frees the network vessels, used for vacuity-type insomnia and blood-deficiency wind-damp joint pain.

actions.en: Nourish the blood and calm the spirit
Dispel wind and free the network vessels
Nourish the Heart and calm the spirit

indications.en: Insomnia with profuse dreaming
Blood vacuity body pain
Skin itching

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 二苯乙烯苷（四羟基二苯乙烯-2-O-β-葡萄糖苷）

summary.zh: 首乌藤（夜交藤）含二苯乙烯苷、蒽醌和磷脂，具镇静催眠、降血脂、抗氧化及神经保护作用。
summary.en: Shou Wu Teng (Ye Jiao Teng) contains stilbene glycosides, anthraquinones, and phospholipids with sedative, hypnotic, hypolipidemic, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 首乌藤甘平，养心安神，祛风通络。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-neutral; nourishes the heart, calms the spirit, and dispels wind to free the collaterals.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 首乌类制剂有特异性肝损害报告，长期使用须监测肝功能。
evidence_notes.note_en: Polygonum multiflorum preparations have idiosyncratic hepatotoxicity case reports; monitor liver function with prolonged use.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）何首乌藤（夜交藤）煎浴治全身瘙痒，风疮疥癞，亦治失眠多梦。

description_zh: 山楂炒炭后的加工品。归脾、胃、肝经。消食化积之力减弱，收敛止泻止血止痢之力增强，用于食积泄泻、痢疾、便血诸证。
description_en: Charred processed form of Shan Zha (hawthorn fruit). Retains the Spleen, Stomach, and Liver channel entry of the parent but shifts its action toward checking diarrhea and dysentery and stanching bleeding, while preserving some food-dispersing function. Used for diarrhea and bloody stool accompanied by food stagnation.

indications.en: Food accumulation diarrhea
Postpartum stasis obstruction
Diarrhea-dysentery abdominal pain

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 残留黄酮（金丝桃苷、牡荆素）

summary.zh: 山楂炭为山楂炒炭制品，鞣质含量增加，具收敛止血止泻功效，原有消食作用部分保留。
summary.en: Shan Zha Tan is charred hawthorn with increased tannin content producing astringent hemostatic and antidiarrheal effects; some original food-digesting action is retained.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 山楂炭苦涩微温，消食止泻，用于食滞兼出血或泄泻。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-astringent and slightly warm; digests food stagnation and arrests bleeding/diarrhea.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）山楂炒炭止泄痢，消肉积血瘀，治妇人产后儿枕痛。

description_zh: 稻芽——禾本科植物稻的成熟果实经发芽干燥而成，与谷芽（古多指粟芽）近似而来源稍异。归脾、胃经。甘温（或平），消食和中，药力较麦芽柔和。
description_en: Dao Ya — germinated and dried mature caryopsis of Oryza sativa (Poaceae), the rice-derived form closely related to the primary Gu Ya (which in classical usage more often referred to millet sprouts). Enters the Spleen and Stomach channels. Sweet and warm/neutral; disperses food stagnation and harmonizes the center, with gentler action than Mai Ya.

actions.en: Disperse food and harmonize the center
Fortify the Spleen and open the stomach

indications.en: Food accumulation without transformation
Epigastric and abdominal distension and fullness
Spleen vacuity with reduced eating

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 稻芽含多种淀粉水解酶和 B 族维生素，具助消化、化米食积作用。
summary.en: Dao Ya contains starch-hydrolyzing enzymes (amylase, maltase) and B-vitamins with digestive-aid effects, specifically for rice-based food stagnation.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 稻芽甘平，消食和中，健脾开胃。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-neutral; transforms food stagnation, harmonizes the middle, and strengthens the spleen.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）粟芽与麦芽之性相近，稻米芽亦能消宿食，和胃气。

description_zh: 毛茛科植物多叶唐松草及同属数种的干燥根茎及根。归心、肝、胃、大肠经。苦寒，清热燥湿、泻火解毒，功似黄连而力稍逊，用于湿热泻痢、热毒疮疡、胃火牙痛口疮，黄连短缺地区常以其代用。
description_en: The dried rhizome and root of Thalictrum foliolosum or related Thalictrum species (Ranunculaceae). Enters the Heart, Liver, Stomach, and Large Intestine channels. Bitter and cold, Ma Wei Lian clears heat, dries dampness, drains fire, and resolves toxin, with clinical applications overlapping those of Huang Lian — it is used as a substitute in damp-heat dysentery, heat-toxin sores, and stomach-fire mouth ulcers, particularly in regions where Coptis is scarce.

indications.en: Damp-heat diarrhea and dysentery
Jaundice
Red swollen painful eyes

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 马尾连含小檗碱、唐松草碱等异喹啉生物碱，药理作用类似黄连，具抗菌、抗炎、抗腹泻及降糖作用。
summary.en: Ma Wei Lian contains berberine and thalicarpine-type isoquinoline alkaloids with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, antidiarrheal, and hypoglycemic effects similar to Huang Lian.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 马尾连苦寒，为黄连代用品，清热燥湿，泻火解毒。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; used as Huang Lian substitute for heat-clearing, damp-drying, and fire-draining.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）马尾黄连（马尾连）形细而苦寒，功用近似黄连，医者常用以代之。

description_zh: 番泻叶（豆科植物狭叶番泻或尖叶番泻的干燥小叶）的备用索引条目，完整资料见番泻叶主条。甘苦寒，泻下通便、清热导滞，用于热结便秘、食积停滞。
description_en: Alternate-entry record linked to Fan Xie Ye (senna leaf, Cassia angustifolia / C. acutifolia, Fabaceae); see the primary Fan Xie Ye entry for full data. Sweet, bitter, and cold; purges downward, frees the stool, clears heat, and abducts stagnation in heat-type constipation and damp-heat food accumulation.

actions.en: Purge downward and free the stool

indications.en: Heat bind constipation
Ascites and drum distension
Food accumulation stagnation

dosage_range.notes: 后下或开水泡服

contraindications_zh: 孕妇、哺乳期妇女禁用。不宜久服。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in pregnancy and lactation. Not for prolonged use.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 此条为番泻叶变体，主要泻下成分同番泻叶（番泻苷类二蒽酮苷），经肠菌代谢为大黄酸蒽酮刺激结肠产生泻下作用。
summary.en: This Fan Xie Ye variant shares the canonical entry's laxative sennosides (dianthrone glycosides), which are activated to rheinanthrone by colonic microbiota for cathartic effect.

evidence_notes.note_zh: WHO 专论列番泻叶用于短期便秘；禁用于肠梗阻、孕妇。
evidence_notes.note_en: WHO monograph lists Senna for short-term constipation; contraindicated in bowel obstruction and pregnancy.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 番泻叶甘苦寒，泻下通便。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bitter and cold; promotes catharsis.

classical_references.passage: 番泻叶味甘苦寒，泻热行滞通便，近代广用于热结便秘。

description_zh: 龟甲（龟板）经水煎浓缩制成的固体胶剂。归肝、肾、心经。较龟甲滋阴补血之力更强，兼止血，尤宜阴血亏虚出血及虚劳重证。
description_en: Solid glue prepared by prolonged decoction and concentration of Gui Jia (tortoise plastron, Chinemys reevesii). Enters the same Liver, Kidney, and Heart channels as Gui Jia but with stronger yin-enriching and blood-supplementing action and enhanced hemostatic effect, preferred for marked yin-blood vacuity with bleeding and taxation patterns.

actions.en: Boost the Kidney and strengthen bones

indications.en: Yin vacuity tidal heat
Hematemesis and epistaxis
Flooding and spotting

dosage_range.notes: 烊化兑服

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: principal mass; from boiled turtle plastron

active_constituents.name_zh: 氨基酸（甘氨酸、脯氨酸、羟脯氨酸）

summary.zh: 龟甲胶为龟板熬制的胶类，富含胶原蛋白、氨基酸和钙盐，具滋阴补血、止血安胎作用。
summary.en: Gui Ban Jiao is gelatin-type glue prepared from tortoise plastron, rich in collagen, amino acids, and calcium salts with yin-nourishing, blood-tonifying, and fetal-calming effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 龟甲胶咸甘平，滋阴潜阳，益肾健骨，养血止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Salty-sweet and neutral; nourishes yin, subdues yang, strengthens the kidney and bones, tonifies blood, and arrests bleeding.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）龟甲胶补心益肾，滋阴止血，为阴虚血亏要药。

description_zh: 禾本科植物小麦的干瘪轻浮、入水上浮的颖果。归心经。甘凉，固表止汗，兼益气阴以退虚热，为气虚自汗、阴虚盗汗之要药，常配黄芪、牡蛎、五味子等同用以增强敛汗宁心之力。
description_en: The light, shriveled, sun-dried caryopsis of Triticum aestivum (Poaceae) that floats when placed in water. Enters the Heart channel. Sweet and cool, Fu Xiao Mai secures the exterior and stops sweating, and also nourishes the Heart to abate steaming fever in yin-vacuity patterns. It is the first-line medicinal for spontaneous sweating and night sweats due to qi or yin deficiency, often paired with Huang Qi, Mu Li, or Wu Wei Zi.

actions.en: Secure the exterior and stop sweating

indications.en: Spontaneous sweating and night sweating
Steaming bone taxation heat
Body vacuity with profuse sweating

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 浮小麦为轻浮瘪瘦小麦，含淀粉、麦谷蛋白和 B 族维生素，具收敛止汗、益气除热作用。
summary.en: Fu Xiao Mai is light unfilled wheat grain, containing starch, gluten protein, and B-vitamins with astringent sweat-stopping, qi-supplementing, and heat-relieving effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 浮小麦甘凉，止汗，益气除热，治自汗盗汗。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-cool; astringes sweat, supplements qi, and relieves heat; used for spontaneous and night sweats.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）浮小麦益气除热，止自汗盗汗，骨蒸虚热，妇人劳热。

description_zh: 睡莲科植物莲的干燥叶。归肝、脾、胃经。苦涩平，清暑化湿、升发清阳、散瘀止血（炒炭用），主治暑热烦渴、暑湿泄泻、脾虚泄泻及血热出血诸证，为清络饮等祛暑名方之要药。
description_en: The dried leaf of Nelumbo nucifera (Nelumbonaceae). Enters the Liver, Spleen, and Stomach channels. Bitter, astringent, and neutral, He Ye clears summerheat, transforms dampness, upbears and effuses the clear yang of the Spleen, and — when charred (He Ye Tan) — cools and stanches bleeding. It is classically used for summerheat vexation with thirst, summerheat-damp diarrhea, and blood-heat hemorrhage, and is a core ingredient of Qing Luo Yin for summerheat patterns.

indications.en: Summerheat-damp diarrhea
Spleen vacuity diarrhea
Blood-heat bleeding

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 荷叶含阿朴啡类生物碱（荷叶碱）和黄酮苷，具降血脂、降压、减肥、止血和清暑作用。
summary.en: He Ye contains aporphine alkaloids (nuciferine) and flavonoid glycosides with hypolipidemic, hypotensive, antiobesity, hemostatic, and summer-heat-clearing effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 荷叶苦涩平，清暑利湿，升发清阳，凉血止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-astringent and neutral; clears summer-heat, drains damp, upbears clear yang, and cools blood to arrest bleeding.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）荷叶服之令人瘦劣；生发元气，裨助脾胃，涩精浊，散瘀血，消水肿。

description_zh: 茯神——多孔菌科真菌茯苓菌核中间抱有松根的部分，为茯苓的专用取材形式。相较全茯苓更专入心经。甘淡平，宁心安神之力尤著，用于心悸、失眠、惊悸兼水湿者。
description_en: The inner portion of the Fu Ling sclerotium (Poria cocos, Polyporaceae) that envelops the host pine root — a specialty processed form of parent Fu Ling. Enters the Heart channel more specifically than whole Fu Ling. Sweet, bland, and neutral; with emphasis shifted toward calming the Heart and quieting the spirit, used for palpitations, insomnia, and restlessness with underlying dampness.

actions.en: Calm the Heart and quiet the spirit
Fortify the Spleen and calm the Heart

indications.en: Heart palpitations and fearful throbbing
Insomnia with profuse dreaming
Fright palpitations and forgetfulness

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 茯神为茯苓抱松根之菌核部分，含多糖和三萜酸，具镇静安神、利尿、增强免疫作用，尤长于安神。
summary.en: Fu Shen is the portion of Poria sclerotium surrounding the pine root, containing polysaccharides and triterpene acids with sedative, diuretic, and immune-enhancing effects; specialized for calming the spirit.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 茯神甘淡平，宁心安神，利水渗湿。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-bland and neutral; calms the heart and spirit and drains damp via urination.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）茯神抱根而生者也，主治风眩风虚，五劳口干，止惊悸多恚怒，善忘，开心益智，安魂魄。

description_zh: 荷叶的新鲜未干燥品。归肝、脾、胃经。挥发性芳香成分较干荷叶更丰，清暑透发之力尤强，宜于暑热烦渴、中暑发热等急症。
description_en: Fresh (undried) form of He Ye (Nelumbo nucifera leaf). Retains the same Liver, Spleen, and Stomach channel entry as dried He Ye but with a higher volatile aromatic content, yielding stronger summerheat-clearing and outward-venting action, preferred for acute summer heatstroke with vexation and thirst.

actions.en: Cool the blood and stanch bleeding

indications.en: Summerheat vexation and thirst
Summerheat-damp diarrhea
Blood-heat bleeding

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 鲜荷叶较干品保留更多挥发性芳香成分，具清暑解热、清轻透发之力更强。
summary.en: Fresh lotus leaf (Sheng He Ye) retains more volatile aromatics than the dried form and is preferred for summer-heat clearing and outward venting.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 鲜荷叶苦甘平，清暑热，解暑湿，尤宜夏令中暑烦渴。
evidence_notes.note_en: Fresh He Ye is bitter-sweet and neutral, clearing summer-heat and resolving summer-damp, especially suited to summer heatstroke with irritability and thirst.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）荷叶新鲜者尤效，清暑和胃，主治阳气下陷，霍乱烦渴。

description_zh: 旱莲草，即墨旱莲，菊科植物鳢肠的干燥地上部分，完整药理见墨旱莲主条。归肝、肾经。甘酸寒，滋补肝肾、凉血止血，用于肝肾阴虚眩晕、须发早白及血热出血。
description_en: Alternate name for Mo Han Lian — the dried aerial part of Eclipta prostrata (Asteraceae); see the primary Mo Han Lian entry for full pharmacology. Enters the Liver and Kidney channels. Sweet, sour, and cold; enriches and supplements Liver and Kidney yin, cools the blood, and stanches bleeding, used for yin-vacuity dizziness, premature greying, and blood-heat hemorrhage.

actions.en: Enrich and supplement Liver and Kidney

indications.en: Liver-Kidney yin vacuity
Loose teeth and hair loss
Hematemesis and epistaxis

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 旱莲草（墨旱莲）含蟛蜞菊内酯类香豆雌酚和三萜皂苷，具保肝、止血、抗蛇毒、促毛发生长作用。
summary.en: Han Lian Cao (Mo Han Lian) contains coumestans (wedelolactone) and triterpene saponins with hepatoprotective, hemostatic, antivenom, and hair-growth-promoting effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 旱莲草甘酸寒，补肝肾阴，凉血止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-sour and cold; nourishes liver-kidney yin, cools blood, and arrests bleeding.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）乌须发，益肾阴，止血痢，治须发早白，血痢肠痔，齿龈出血，金疮。

description_zh: 莲须——睡莲科植物莲的干燥雄蕊，与莲子、荷叶、莲房、藕节同出一株。归心、肾经。甘涩平，固肾涩精，用于遗精、滑精、遗尿、崩漏带下。
description_en: Dried stamen of the lotus flower (Nelumbo nucifera, Nelumbonaceae) — the stamen portion of the same plant yielding Lian Zi, He Ye, Lian Fang, and Ou Jie. Enters the Heart and Kidney channels. Sweet, astringent, and neutral; secures the Kidney and constrains essence, used for seminal emission, spermatorrhea, enuresis, and excessive uterine bleeding.

actions.en: Secure the Kidney and constrain essence
Clear the Heart and free the Kidney
Stanch bleeding and stop vaginal discharge

indications.en: Seminal emission and seminal efflux
Vaginal discharge
Hematemesis and flooding-spotting

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 黄酮（槲皮素、木犀草素苷）

summary.zh: 莲须含黄酮和鞣质，具收敛、抗氧化、止血作用，为固精止带常用药。
summary.en: Lian Xu contains flavonoids and tannins with astringent, antioxidant, and hemostatic effects; used to secure essence and stop leukorrhea.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 莲须甘涩平，固肾涩精，止血止带。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-astringent and neutral; secures the kidney, astringes essence, and arrests bleeding and leukorrhea.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）莲须清心固肾，涩精止血，乌须发，治梦遗滑泄、吐衄崩带。

description_zh: 莲房——睡莲科植物莲的干燥花托，与莲子、荷叶同出一株。归肝经。苦涩温，化瘀止血，用于产后瘀阻恶露不尽、崩漏及瘀血性出血。
description_en: Dried receptacle of the lotus flower (Nelumbo nucifera, Nelumbonaceae) — the seed-bearing structure of the same plant yielding Lian Zi and He Ye. Enters the Liver channel. Bitter, astringent, and warm; transforms stasis and stanches bleeding, used for postpartum stasis-type lochia retention, flooding and spotting, and blood stasis with hemorrhage.

indications.en: Flooding and spotting
Hematuria and hematochezia
Stasis blood abdominal pain

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.notes: high concentration; principal astringent hemostatic component

active_constituents.name_zh: 莲子心碱类（莲心碱、甲基莲心碱）

summary.zh: 莲房富含鞣质和黄酮，为强收敛止血药，主治崩漏、便血、尿血。
summary.en: Lian Fang is rich in tannins and flavonoids; a potent astringent hemostatic used for flooding, bloody stool, and hematuria.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 莲房苦涩温，化瘀止血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-astringent and warm; transforms stasis and arrests bleeding.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）莲房破血消瘀，治崩漏下血，胞衣不下。

description_zh: 藕节——睡莲科植物莲的干燥根茎节部，与莲子、荷叶、莲须、莲房同出一株。归肝、肺、胃经。甘涩平，收敛止血兼化瘀，止血而不留瘀，用于吐血、衄血、尿血、崩漏等。
description_en: Dried node of the lotus rhizome (Nelumbo nucifera, Nelumbonaceae) — the joint of the underwater rhizome from the same plant yielding Lian Zi, He Ye, Lian Xu, and Lian Fang. Enters the Liver, Lung, and Stomach channels. Sweet, astringent, and neutral; constrains and stanches bleeding while also transforming stasis, valued for hemostasis without retaining pathogenic stasis.

indications.en: Hematemesis and epistaxis
Hemoptysis
Hematochezia and hematuria

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 藕节富含鞣质、黄酮苷和天冬酰胺，具收敛止血、凉血作用。
summary.en: Ou Jie is rich in tannins, flavonoid glycosides, and asparagine with astringent hemostatic and blood-cooling effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 藕节甘涩平，收敛止血，化瘀。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sweet-astringent and neutral; astringes to arrest bleeding while transforming stasis.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）藕节涩血，止吐衄血痢下血，止崩中血溢，产后血闷，血上冲心。

description_zh: 茜草根——茜草科植物茜草的干燥根及根茎，完整药理见茜草主条。归肝经。苦寒，凉血化瘀止血、通经，用于血热夹瘀之出血及瘀阻经闭。
description_en: Alternate-name entry for Qian Cao — the dried root and rhizome of Rubia cordifolia (Rubiaceae); see the primary Qian Cao entry for full pharmacology. Enters the Liver channel. Bitter and cold; cools the blood, transforms stasis, stanches bleeding, and frees the menses, used for blood-heat hemorrhage with stasis and stasis-type amenorrhea.

indications.en: Hematemesis and epistaxis
Flooding and spotting
Menstrual block due to stasis obstruction

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

active_constituents.name_zh: 茜草萘醌（萘并二氢吡喃）

summary.zh: 茜草含蒽醌类（茜素、茜草素）和萘醌，具凉血止血、化瘀通经、抗菌和抗氧化作用。
summary.en: Qian Cao Gen contains anthraquinones (alizarin, rubiadin) and naphthoquinones with blood-cooling hemostatic, stasis-dissolving, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 茜草苦寒，凉血止血，活血祛瘀，通经。
evidence_notes.note_en: Bitter-cold; cools blood and stops bleeding, invigorates blood, dispels stasis, and frees menses.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 含羟基蒽醌的茜草长期大量使用有潜在致突变风险，短期治疗用量安全。
evidence_notes.note_en: Long-term high-dose use of hydroxyanthraquinone-containing Rubia carries theoretical genotoxic risk; therapeutic short-term doses are considered safe.

classical_references.passage: 味苦，寒。主寒湿风痹，黄疸，补中。

description_zh: 棕榈科植物棕榈的干燥叶鞘纤维，为棕榈炭的原药材。归肺、肝、大肠经。苦涩平，收涩止血，炒炭后止血力尤强，主治吐血、衄血、崩漏、便血等虚寒性出血证，尤宜崩漏日久、气虚不摄血者。
description_en: The dried stipule fiber (leaf-sheath fiber) of Trachycarpus fortunei (Arecaceae), the raw source material for the more commonly used charred preparation Zong Lv Tan. Enters the Lung, Liver, and Large Intestine channels. Bitter, astringent, and neutral, Zong Lv Pi constrains and stanches bleeding, with its astringent action intensified when charred. It is used for hematemesis, epistaxis, flooding and spotting, and bloody stool from cold or deficiency patterns.

indications.en: Hematemesis and epistaxis
Flooding-spotting and hematochezia
Hematochezia and hemorrhoidal bleeding

dosage_range.notes: 多用炒炭

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

summary.zh: 棕榈皮主要含纤维素、鞣质和黄酮，炒炭后具强收敛止血作用，为崩漏、便血要药。
summary.en: Zong Lv Pi contains cellulose, tannins, and flavonoids; when charred it becomes a potent astringent hemostatic used for flooding and bloody stool.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 棕榈炭苦涩平，收敛止血，多用于崩漏、吐衄、便血。
evidence_notes.note_en: Charred Zong Lv Pi is bitter-astringent and neutral; astringes to arrest bleeding, used for flooding, hematemesis, epistaxis, and bloody stool.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）棕榈皮烧灰存性，治吐血衄血，肠风赤白痢，妇人崩中带下。

description_zh: 罂粟成熟蒴果的干燥果壳。味酸涩，性平，有毒。敛肺止咳，涩肠止泻，止痛。因含吗啡等生物碱，属管制药物，仅供学术参考。
description_en: The dried mature capsule of the opium poppy. Sour and astringent in flavor, neutral in nature, toxic. Constrains the Lung and stops cough, astringes the intestines and stops diarrhea, relieves pain. Contains morphine alkaloids and is a controlled substance in most jurisdictions; included here only for classical-formula reference.

actions.en: Constrain the Lung and stop cough
Astringe the intestines and stop diarrhea

indications.en: Chronic cough from Lung vacuity
Chronic diarrhea and dysentery
Pain in the chest, abdomen, sinews, and bones

contraindications_zh: 咳嗽或泻痢初起者忌用。孕妇、哺乳期妇女、儿童禁用。属管制药物，临床使用需遵循当地法律法规。
contraindications_en: Contraindicated in early-stage cough or diarrhea. Avoid in pregnancy, lactation, and pediatric populations. A controlled substance in most jurisdictions; any clinical use must follow local law.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

pregnancy.note_zh: 含吗啡类生物碱，孕期禁用。
pregnancy.note_en: Contains morphine alkaloids; contraindicated in pregnancy.

lactation.note_zh: 经乳汁分泌，哺乳期禁用。
lactation.note_en: Excreted in breast milk; contraindicated during lactation.

active_constituents.notes: principal analgesic; schedule-controlled; narrow therapeutic index

summary.zh: 罂粟壳含吗啡、可待因等强效阿片类生物碱，具镇痛、止咳、止泻作用；极易成瘾，许多国家和地区严格管制。
summary.en: Ying Su Ke contains potent opioid alkaloids (morphine, codeine) with analgesic, antitussive, and antidiarrheal effects; highly addictive and strictly controlled in most jurisdictions.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 罂粟壳酸涩平有毒，敛肺止咳，涩肠止泻，止痛；易成瘾，大陆等地严格管制。
evidence_notes.note_en: Sour-astringent and neutral with toxicity; astringes the lung, stops cough, secures the intestines, and relieves pain; addictive and strictly regulated.

evidence_notes.note_zh: 罂粟壳（及其吗啡类生物碱）可致呼吸抑制、成瘾和新生儿撤药综合征；孕妇、哺乳期禁用；大多数国家按毒麻药品管理。
evidence_notes.note_en: Ying Su Ke (and its morphine-class alkaloids) causes respiratory depression, addiction, and neonatal withdrawal; contraindicated in pregnancy and lactation; regulated as a controlled substance.

classical_references.passage: （时珍曰）罂粟壳酸涩有毒，主治久咳久痢脱肛遗精，心腹筋骨诸痛；此物性收敛太过，如初痢误服则涩而难愈。
